papers.title: Learning biophysical models of gene regulation with probability flow matching
papers.summary: Cellular differentiation is governed by gene regulatory networks, the high-dimensional stochastic biochemical systems that determine the transcriptional landscape and mediate cellular responses to signals and perturbations. Although single-cell RNA sequencing provides quantitative snapshots of the transcriptome, current methods for inferring gene-regulatory dynamics often lack mechanistic interpretability and fail to generalize to unseen conditions. Here we introduce Probability Flow Matching (PFM), a scalable framework for learning biophysically consistent stochastic processes directly from time-resolved single-cell measurements. Applying PFM to three hematopoiesis datasets, we show that models with similar interpolation accuracy can encode fundamentally different dynamics, with only biophysically consistent formulations accurately capturing mechanisms of lineage transitions, fate specification, and gene perturbation responses. We further demonstrate that PFM accommodates unbalanced populations, enabling simultaneous inference of cellular proliferation and death dynamics. Together, these results establish PFM as a flexible, scalable framework for integrating mechanistic modeling with single-cell omics.

ai.tldr: 提出概率流匹配（PFM）框架，从时间分辨单细胞数据中学习生物物理一致的随机过程，应用于造血数据集，揭示只有生物物理一致的模型才能准确捕捉谱系转变、命运决定和基因扰动响应机制。
ai.motivation: 现有推断基因调控动力学的方法缺乏机制可解释性，且难以泛化到未见条件。
ai.method: 概率流匹配（PFM）是一种可扩展框架，直接从时间分辨单细胞测量中学习生物物理一致的随机过程。
ai.result: 在三个造血数据集上，PFM 表明具有相似插值精度的模型可编码根本不同的动力学，只有生物物理一致的公式才能准确捕捉谱系转变、命运决定和基因扰动响应；PFM 还能适应不平衡群体，同时推断细胞增殖和死亡动力学。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户从单细胞数据中推断具有机制可解释性的基因调控动力学，并预测未观测条件下的细胞行为。

idea_spark.idea: 将 PFM 与多模态单细胞数据（如染色质可及性、蛋白质丰度）结合，构建更全面的细胞状态动力学模型。
idea_spark.risk: 模型对数据质量和时间分辨率敏感，可能引入偏差；生物物理假设的准确性需实验验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受物理中流匹配方法启发，将连续归一化流与随机微分方程结合，实现生物物理约束下的概率推断。

en.tldr: Proposes Probability Flow Matching (PFM), a scalable framework for learning biophysically consistent stochastic processes from time-resolved single-cell data, applied to hematopoiesis datasets, showing that only biophysically consistent formulations accurately capture lineage transitions, fate specification, and gene perturbation responses.
en.motivation: Current methods for inferring gene-regulatory dynamics lack mechanistic interpretability and fail to generalize to unseen conditions.
en.method: Probability Flow Matching (PFM) is a scalable framework that learns biophysically consistent stochastic processes directly from time-resolved single-cell measurements.
en.result: On three hematopoiesis datasets, PFM shows that models with similar interpolation accuracy can encode fundamentally different dynamics, with only biophysically consistent formulations accurately capturing mechanisms of lineage transitions, fate specification, and gene perturbation responses; PFM also accommodates unbalanced populations for simultaneous inference of proliferation and death dynamics.
en.help_to_user: Helps users infer mechanistically interpretable gene regulatory dynamics from single-cell data and predict cellular behavior under unseen conditions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine PFM with multimodal single-cell data (e.g., chromatin accessibility, protein abundance) to build more comprehensive models of cell state dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: Model sensitivity to data quality and temporal resolution may introduce bias; biophysical assumptions require experimental validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by flow matching methods in physics, combining continuous normalizing flows with stochastic differential equations to achieve biophysically constrained probabilistic inference.

papers.title: The Effects of Population Size on the Performance of BEAGLE GPU-Based Genetic Programming Runs
papers.summary: The Beagle framework, through GPU-based Genetic Programming, enables population dynamics previously unattainable (within practical time frames) by CPU-constrained Genetic Programming systems. This work explores how GPU-enabled population sizes impact the success of training for symbolic regression problems. Specifically, when using constant population sizes, we see benefits of using very narrow and deep searches (as narrow as 1000 individuals) for some problems, while other problems benefit from very broad and shallow searches (as broad as 10 million individuals). We also explore stepped population sizes that start with large populations and drop to small populations to balance the breadth and depth of search.

ai.tldr: 研究GPU遗传编程中种群大小对符号回归问题训练成功的影响，发现不同问题需要不同搜索策略。
ai.motivation: 探索GPU加速遗传编程中种群大小对训练效果的影响，以优化搜索策略。
ai.method: 在BEAGLE框架上使用GPU进行遗传编程，比较恒定种群大小和阶梯种群大小对符号回归问题的性能。
ai.result: 某些问题适合窄深搜索（小至1000个体），另一些适合宽浅搜索（大至1000万个体）；阶梯种群大小可平衡搜索广度与深度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何根据问题特性选择种群大小策略，提升遗传编程效率。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应种群大小算法，根据搜索进度自动调整种群规模。
idea_spark.risk: 自适应策略可能增加计算开销，且需避免过早收敛。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受阶梯种群大小启发，可结合强化学习动态控制种群规模。

en.tldr: Investigates how GPU-enabled population sizes affect symbolic regression training success in genetic programming, revealing problem-dependent optimal search strategies.
en.motivation: To explore the impact of population size on training effectiveness in GPU-accelerated genetic programming for optimizing search strategies.
en.method: Used BEAGLE framework with GPU-based genetic programming, comparing constant and stepped population sizes on symbolic regression problems.
en.result: Some problems benefit from narrow deep searches (as small as 1000 individuals), others from broad shallow searches (up to 10 million); stepped sizes balance breadth and depth.
en.help_to_user: Helps users choose population size strategies based on problem characteristics to improve genetic programming efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Design an adaptive population size algorithm that automatically adjusts population size based on search progress.
idea_spark.risk: Adaptive strategies may increase computational overhead and risk premature convergence.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by stepped population sizes, reinforcement learning could be used to dynamically control population size.

papers.title: Shearlet Neural Operators for Anisotropic-Shock-Dominated and Multi-scale parametric partial differential equations
papers.summary: Neural operators have emerged as powerful data-driven surrogates for learning solution operators of parametric partial differential equations (PDEs). However, widely used Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) rely on global Fourier representations, which can be inefficient for resolving anisotropic structures, sharp gradients, and spatially localized discontinuities that arise in shock-dominated and multiscale regimes. To address these limitations, we introduce the Shearlet Neural Operator (SNO), a neural operator architecture that replaces the Fourier transform with a shearlet-based representation. Shearlets offer directional, multiscale, and spatially localized atoms with near-optimal sparse approximation of anisotropic features, providing an inductive bias aligned with PDE solutions containing edges, fronts, and shocks. SNO learns in the shearlet domain and reconstructs predictions via the inverse transform, retaining efficient spectral computation while improving locality and directional selectivity. Across seven benchmark PDE families, including strongly anisotropic advection, anisotropic diffusion, and nonlinear conservation laws with straight, curved, interacting, spiral, and polygonal shock structures, SNO consistently improves predictive accuracy and feature fidelity over FNO baselines, with the largest gains observed in anisotropic and discontinuity-dominated settings.

ai.tldr: 提出剪切波神经算子（SNO），用剪切波变换替代傅里叶变换，提升对含各向异性、激波和多尺度结构的偏微分方程解算子的学习能力。
ai.motivation: 傅里叶神经算子（FNO）依赖全局傅里叶表示，难以高效捕捉各向异性结构、尖锐梯度和局部间断，尤其在激波主导和多尺度问题中表现不足。
ai.method: SNO用剪切波变换替代傅里叶变换，利用剪切波的方向性、多尺度性和空间局部性，在剪切波域学习并反变换重建预测。
ai.result: 在七个基准PDE族（包括强各向异性对流、扩散和非线性守恒律）上，SNO在预测精度和特征保真度上一致优于FNO，在各项异性和间断主导场景中提升最大。
ai.help_to_user: 若您处理含激波、各向异性或多尺度特征的PDE问题，SNO可提供比FNO更精确的代理模型。

idea_spark.idea: 将剪切波变换与图神经网络结合，处理不规则网格上的各向异性PDE。
idea_spark.risk: 剪切波变换的计算开销可能高于傅里叶变换，需权衡效率与精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴剪切波在图像边缘检测中的成功，将其引入科学计算领域。

en.tldr: Proposes Shearlet Neural Operator (SNO), replacing Fourier transform with shearlet transform to better learn solution operators for PDEs with anisotropic, shock, and multiscale structures.
en.motivation: Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) rely on global Fourier representations, which are inefficient for resolving anisotropic structures, sharp gradients, and localized discontinuities in shock-dominated and multiscale regimes.
en.method: SNO replaces the Fourier transform with a shearlet-based representation, leveraging directional, multiscale, and spatially localized atoms, learning in the shearlet domain and reconstructing via inverse transform.
en.result: On seven benchmark PDE families, SNO consistently outperforms FNO baselines in predictive accuracy and feature fidelity, with largest gains in anisotropic and discontinuity-dominated settings.
en.help_to_user: If you work with PDEs involving shocks, anisotropy, or multiscale features, SNO can provide a more accurate surrogate model than FNO.

idea_spark.idea: Combine shearlet transform with graph neural networks to handle anisotropic PDEs on irregular grids.
idea_spark.risk: Shearlet transform may incur higher computational cost than Fourier transform, requiring trade-off between efficiency and accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the success of shearlets in image edge detection, applying them to scientific computing.

papers.title: A New Kind of Network? Review and Reference Implementation of Neural Cellular Automata
papers.summary: Stephen Wolfram proclaimed in his 2003 seminal work "A New Kind Of Science" that simple recursive programs in the form of Cellular Automata (CA) are a promising approach to replace currently used mathematical formalizations, e.g. differential equations, to improve the modeling of complex systems. Over two decades later, while Cellular Automata have still been waiting for a substantial breakthrough in scientific applications, recent research showed new and promising approaches which combine Wolfram's ideas with learnable Artificial Neural Networks: So-called Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) are able to learn the complex update rules of CA from data samples, allowing them to model complex, self-organizing generative systems. The aim of this paper is to review the existing work on NCA and provide a unified modular framework and notation, as well as a reference implementation in the open-source library NCAtorch.

ai.tldr: 本文综述了神经细胞自动机（NCA）的研究，并提供了统一模块化框架、符号表示及开源库NCAtorch的参考实现。
ai.motivation: 细胞自动机在科学应用中尚未取得重大突破，而神经细胞自动机通过学习数据中的复杂更新规则，有望建模自组织生成系统。
ai.method: 通过综述现有NCA工作，设计统一模块化框架和符号，并在NCAtorch中实现参考代码。
ai.result: 提供了NCA的标准化框架和开源实现，便于后续研究和应用。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户快速理解NCA领域现状，并获取可直接使用的代码库。

idea_spark.idea: 利用NCA学习动态系统的局部更新规则，替代传统微分方程，实现更灵活的自适应模拟。
idea_spark.risk: NCA的训练可能不稳定，且对大规模系统扩展性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Wolfram的细胞自动机思想启发，将可学习神经网络与简单递归规则结合，开辟了复杂系统建模新路径。

en.tldr: This paper reviews Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) research and provides a unified modular framework, notation, and a reference implementation in the open-source library NCAtorch.
en.motivation: Cellular Automata have not achieved a major breakthrough in scientific applications, while NCA can learn complex update rules from data to model self-organizing generative systems.
en.method: By reviewing existing NCA work, designing a unified modular framework and notation, and implementing a reference codebase in NCAtorch.
en.result: Provides a standardized framework and open-source implementation for NCA, facilitating future research and applications.
en.help_to_user: Helps users quickly understand the NCA field and obtain a ready-to-use code library.

idea_spark.idea: Use NCA to learn local update rules of dynamical systems, replacing traditional differential equations for more flexible adaptive simulation.
idea_spark.risk: NCA training may be unstable and scalability to large systems is limited.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Wolfram's cellular automata, combining learnable neural networks with simple recursive rules opens new paths for complex system modeling.

papers.title: Uniqueness of simultaneous reconstruction of general space- and time-dependent sources and initial states in fractional diffusion equations and systems from single boundary measurements
papers.summary: Inverse problem to determine simultaneously a general space- and time-dependent source and an initial state in a fractional diffusion equation from an {\it a posteriori} measurement of the normal derivative of the state on a portion of a boundary of the space domain is considered. Uniqueness for this problem is proved under the assumption that an order of a fractional derivative involved in the equation is irrational. The uniqueness result is generalized to an inverse problem for a coupled system of fractional diffusion equations, where both sources and initial states are unknown and first component of the state is measured on the boundary.

ai.tldr: 证明了在分数阶扩散方程中，通过单一边界测量同时重构一般时空依赖源和初始状态的唯一性，要求分数阶阶数为无理数，并推广到耦合系统。
ai.motivation: 实际应用中常需同时反演多个未知量（如源项和初始状态），但现有理论多针对单一未知量，缺乏同时反演的唯一性保证。
ai.method: 利用分数阶导数的无理数阶性质，结合边界法向导数测量数据，通过解析延拓和谱分析建立唯一性证明。
ai.result: 在无理数阶条件下，单一边界测量足以唯一确定一般时空依赖源和初始状态；该结果可推广至耦合分数阶扩散方程组。
ai.help_to_user: 为分数阶扩散方程的反问题提供了理论唯一性基础，指导实验设计（如选择无理数阶）和数值反演算法开发。

idea_spark.idea: 利用无理数阶的代数独立性，将源和初始状态的傅里叶模式解耦，从而从单一边界数据中唯一恢复。
idea_spark.risk: 无理数阶假设在实验中可能难以精确实现，且实际测量噪声可能破坏唯一性证明的解析条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将无理数阶条件替换为其他代数条件（如阶数满足某种超越方程），或结合多频测量放松假设。

zh.tldr: 证明了在分数阶扩散方程中，通过单一边界测量同时重构一般时空依赖源和初始状态的唯一性，要求分数阶阶数为无理数，并推广到耦合系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用无理数阶的代数独立性，将源和初始状态的傅里叶模式解耦，从而从单一边界数据中唯一恢复。
idea_spark.risk: 无理数阶假设在实验中可能难以精确实现，且实际测量噪声可能破坏唯一性证明的解析条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将无理数阶条件替换为其他代数条件（如阶数满足某种超越方程），或结合多频测量放松假设。

en.tldr: Proves uniqueness for simultaneously reconstructing a general space- and time-dependent source and an initial state in a fractional diffusion equation from a single boundary measurement, assuming the fractional order is irrational, and extends to coupled systems.
en.motivation: Practical applications often require simultaneous inversion of multiple unknowns (e.g., source and initial state), but existing theories mostly focus on single unknowns, lacking uniqueness guarantees for joint inversion.
en.method: Leverages the irrationality of the fractional derivative order, combined with boundary normal derivative measurements, to establish uniqueness via analytic continuation and spectral analysis.
en.result: Under the irrational order condition, a single boundary measurement uniquely determines a general space- and time-dependent source and initial state; the result generalizes to coupled systems of fractional diffusion equations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical uniqueness foundation for inverse problems in fractional diffusion, guiding experimental design (e.g., choosing irrational orders) and numerical inversion algorithm development.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit the algebraic independence of irrational orders to decouple Fourier modes of the source and initial state, enabling unique recovery from single boundary data.
idea_spark.risk: The irrational order assumption may be difficult to realize precisely in experiments, and measurement noise could break the analytic conditions required for uniqueness.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider replacing the irrational order condition with other algebraic conditions (e.g., orders satisfying certain transcendental equations) or relaxing the assumption by using multi-frequency measurements.

papers.title: On rates of convergence for sample average approximations without smoothness
papers.summary: Sample average approximation (SAA) replaces an intractable expected objective by an empirical average and is a basic device of modern stochastic optimization. We develop a rate theory for optimal values and empirical $\varepsilon$-minimizers that does not assume continuity, lower semicontinuity, or smooth perturbation structure of the sample objectives. Working on $\ell^{\infty}(X)$ with the Hoffmann--Jørgensen outer-probability formalism, we show that uniform control of the empirical objective process transfers deterministically to convergence rates for optimal values, excess risks of empirical $\varepsilon$-minimizers, and, under a sharp-growth condition, distances to the expected objective solution set. Combined with the directional differentiability of the infimum functional, this yields weak limits for empirical optimal values at the $n^{-1/2}$ scale. Combined with LILs and maximal inequalities, it yields outer almost-sure and outer-mean rates. The definability, envelope, and VC-subgraph hypotheses are verified for definable discontinuous or non-Lipschitz classes arising in direct $0$--$1$ classification, fixed-architecture neural networks, threshold regression, and non-Lipschitz $\ell_{p}$-type objectives with rational $0<p<1$. Practical sufficient conditions for measurability hypotheses are discussed. Together, the framework extends continuity-based SAA theory to a tame-topological setting.

ai.tldr: 本文在不假设样本目标函数连续、下半连续或光滑扰动结构的前提下，建立了样本均值近似（SAA）最优值和经验ε-极小化子的收敛速率理论。
ai.motivation: 经典SAA理论通常依赖连续性或光滑性假设，限制了其在非光滑、不连续问题（如0-1分类、固定架构神经网络、阈值回归等）中的应用。
ai.method: 在ℓ^∞(X)空间上利用Hoffmann–Jørgensen外概率形式，证明经验目标过程的均匀控制可确定性地转化为最优值和经验ε-极小化子的收敛速率；结合方向可微性、LIL和极大不等式得到弱极限和几乎必然/外均值速率。
ai.result: 建立了不依赖连续性的SAA收敛速率理论，验证了可定义、包络和VC-子图假设在多种非光滑/非Lipschitz目标类中的适用性。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理非光滑、不连续随机优化问题提供了严格的收敛速率保证，扩展了SAA方法的适用范围。

idea_spark.idea: 利用可定义性和VC-子图类替代连续性假设，可能启发设计新的非光滑随机优化算法。
idea_spark.risk: 可定义性假设在复杂神经网络架构中可能难以验证，实际应用需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将外概率形式与可定义集结合，为处理非光滑目标函数提供了新视角。

en.tldr: This paper develops a rate theory for sample average approximation (SAA) optimal values and empirical ε-minimizers without assuming continuity, lower semicontinuity, or smooth perturbation structure of the sample objectives.
en.motivation: Classical SAA theory relies on continuity or smoothness assumptions, limiting its application to nonsmooth, discontinuous problems such as 0-1 classification, fixed-architecture neural networks, and threshold regression.
en.method: Working on ℓ^∞(X) with the Hoffmann–Jørgensen outer-probability formalism, we show that uniform control of the empirical objective process transfers deterministically to convergence rates for optimal values and empirical ε-minimizers; combined with directional differentiability, LILs, and maximal inequalities, we obtain weak limits and outer almost-sure/outer-mean rates.
en.result: Established a convergence rate theory for SAA without continuity assumptions, verifying definability, envelope, and VC-subgraph hypotheses for various nonsmooth/non-Lipschitz objective classes.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous convergence rate guarantees for nonsmooth, discontinuous stochastic optimization problems, extending the applicability of SAA methods.

idea_spark.idea: Replacing continuity assumptions with definability and VC-subgraph classes may inspire new algorithms for nonsmooth stochastic optimization.
idea_spark.risk: Definability assumptions may be difficult to verify for complex neural network architectures, requiring caution in practice.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining outer-probability formalism with definable sets offers a new perspective for handling nonsmooth objective functions.

papers.title: Conditional Flow Matching for Probabilistic Downscaling of Maximum 3-day Snowfall in Alaska
papers.summary: Precipitation in complex terrain is governed by orographic processes operating at scales of a few kilometers, yet climate models typically run at resolutions of 50--100~km where this topographic detail is absent. Dynamical downscaling with high-resolution regional models such as WRF can resolve these processes, but the computational cost -- months of wall-clock time per scenario -- precludes the large ensembles needed for uncertainty quantification. We present WxFlow, a conditional generative model based on flow matching that learns to map coarse-resolution climate model output and high-resolution topography to calibrated probabilistic ensembles of fine-scale precipitation fields. Applied to 4~km WRF simulations of maximum 3-day snowfall over southeast Alaska, WxFlow achieves 87.8\% improvement in spectral fidelity and dramatically lower Continuous Ranked Probability Scores relative to conventional lapse-rate-corrected bicubic downscaling, while generating 50-member ensembles in seconds on a laptop. Ensemble spread is spatially coherent and governed by topography, reflecting physically plausible uncertainty structure. All code is available at https://github.com/glide-ism/wrf-flow.

ai.tldr: 提出WxFlow，一种基于条件流匹配的生成模型，用于将粗分辨率气候模型输出和地形数据转换为精细尺度降水的概率集合，在阿拉斯加东南部最大3日降雪降尺度中显著提升谱保真度和概率评分。
ai.motivation: 复杂地形降水受千米尺度地形过程控制，但气候模型分辨率粗（50-100公里），动力降尺度计算成本高，难以生成大集合进行不确定性量化。
ai.method: WxFlow采用条件流匹配生成模型，以粗分辨率气候模型输出和高分辨率地形为条件，学习映射到精细尺度降水场的校准概率集合。
ai.result: 在4公里WRF模拟上，谱保真度提升87.8%，连续等级概率评分显著低于传统递减率校正双三次降尺度，50成员集合可在笔记本上数秒内生成，集合离散度空间一致且受地形控制。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效、概率化的降尺度方法，适用于需要高分辨率降水不确定性评估的气候影响研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将流匹配与物理约束（如质量守恒）结合，进一步提升降尺度结果的物理一致性。
idea_spark.risk: 模型依赖高质量高分辨率训练数据（如WRF模拟），在数据稀缺区域可能泛化不足。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用生成模型快速生成大集合，为气候风险评估提供计算可行的不确定性量化工具。

en.tldr: We present WxFlow, a conditional generative model based on flow matching that maps coarse climate model output and high-resolution topography to calibrated probabilistic ensembles of fine-scale precipitation, achieving 87.8% improvement in spectral fidelity for maximum 3-day snowfall downscaling in southeast Alaska.
en.motivation: Precipitation in complex terrain is governed by orographic processes at kilometer scales, but climate models run at coarse resolutions (50-100 km); dynamical downscaling is computationally expensive, precluding large ensembles for uncertainty quantification.
en.method: WxFlow uses conditional flow matching to learn a mapping from coarse climate model output and high-resolution topography to calibrated probabilistic ensembles of fine-scale precipitation fields.
en.result: On 4 km WRF simulations, it achieves 87.8% improvement in spectral fidelity and dramatically lower Continuous Ranked Probability Scores compared to conventional lapse-rate-corrected bicubic downscaling, generating 50-member ensembles in seconds on a laptop with spatially coherent, topography-governed spread.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient, probabilistic downscaling method for high-resolution precipitation uncertainty assessment in climate impact studies.

idea_spark.idea: Integrate physical constraints (e.g., mass conservation) into flow matching to further improve physical consistency of downscaled fields.
idea_spark.risk: The model relies on high-quality high-resolution training data (e.g., WRF simulations), which may limit generalization in data-scarce regions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging generative models for rapid ensemble generation offers a computationally feasible uncertainty quantification tool for climate risk assessment.

papers.title: Approximations of the Mortensen observer using higher order extended Kalman filters
papers.summary: A polynomial approximation of the minimum energy estimator, also called Mortensen observer, is discussed. The method relies on successive differentiations of an underlying value function and the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation, respectively. By means of neglecting higher order derivatives of the value function along the unknown observer trajectory, a coupled set of nonlinear tensor structured differential equations is derived. In its simplest form, the approach boils down to the well-known extended Kalman filter. Numerical experiments with polynomials up to the order eight illustrate the potential of the new approach and indicate local convergence to the Mortensen observer.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种基于多项式近似的Mortensen观测器实现方法，通过高阶扩展卡尔曼滤波器逼近最小能量估计器。
ai.motivation: Mortensen观测器计算复杂，难以直接应用，需要高效近似方法。
ai.method: 对值函数和Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman方程进行逐次微分，忽略高阶导数项，导出耦合的非线性张量微分方程组。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，八阶多项式近似能局部收敛到Mortensen观测器，且低阶形式退化为扩展卡尔曼滤波器。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可扩展的非线性状态估计框架，便于在实际系统中权衡精度与计算成本。

idea_spark.idea: 利用稀疏张量或低秩近似降低高阶多项式近似的计算负担。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶近似可能引入数值不稳定或过拟合，需谨慎选择多项式阶数。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将值函数的高阶导数截断思想与机器学习中的神经微分方程结合，探索数据驱动的观测器设计。

en.tldr: A polynomial approximation of the Mortensen observer is realized via higher order extended Kalman filters, derived from successive differentiation of the value function and Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman equation.
en.motivation: The Mortensen observer is computationally intensive, necessitating efficient approximations for practical use.
en.method: By neglecting higher order derivatives of the value function along the observer trajectory, a coupled set of nonlinear tensor differential equations is obtained.
en.result: Numerical experiments with polynomials up to order eight demonstrate local convergence to the Mortensen observer, with the simplest case reducing to the extended Kalman filter.
en.help_to_user: Provides a scalable framework for nonlinear state estimation, allowing trade-offs between accuracy and computational cost.

idea_spark.idea: Use sparse tensor or low-rank approximations to reduce the computational burden of high-order polynomial approximations.
idea_spark.risk: High-order approximations may introduce numerical instability or overfitting; careful selection of polynomial order is required.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine the truncation of higher-order value function derivatives with neural differential equations from machine learning to explore data-driven observer design.

papers.title: Incompressible Knowledge Probes: Estimating Black-Box LLM Parameter Counts via Factual Capacity
papers.summary: Closed-source frontier labs do not disclose parameter counts, and the standard alternative -- inference economics -- carries $2\times$+ uncertainty from hardware, batching, and serving-stack assumptions external to the model. We exploit a tighter intrinsic bound: storing $F$ facts requires at least $F/$(bits per parameter) weights, so measuring how much a model \emph{knows} lower-bounds how many parameters it \emph{has}. We introduce \textbf{Incompressible Knowledge Probes (IKPs)}, a benchmark of 1{,}400 factual questions spanning 7 tiers of obscurity, designed to isolate knowledge that cannot be derived by reasoning or compressed by architectural improvements.   We calibrate a log-linear mapping from IKP accuracy to parameter count on 89 open-weight models (135M--1,600B) spanning 19 vendors, achieving $R^2 = 0.917$; leave-one-out cross-validation confirms generalization (median fold error $1.59\times$, $68.5\%$ within $2\times$ and $87.6\%$ within $3\times$). For Mixture-of-Experts models, total parameters predict knowledge ($R^2 = 0.79$) far better than active parameters ($R^2 = 0.51$). We evaluate 188 models from 27 vendors and estimate effective knowledge capacity for all major proprietary frontier models; for heavily safety-tuned models the estimates are lower bounds, since refusal policy can hide tens of percentage points of "refused but known" capacity.   The widely-reported saturation of reasoning benchmarks does not imply the end of scaling. Procedural capability compresses under the "Densing Law," but across 96 dated open-weight models the IKP time coefficient is $-0.0010$/month (95\% CI $[-0.0031, +0.0008]$) -- indistinguishable from zero, and rejecting the Densing prediction of $+0.0117$/month at $p < 10^{-15}$. Factual capacity continues to scale log-linearly with parameters across generations and across vendors.

ai.tldr: 提出不可压缩知识探针（IKP），通过测量模型已知事实数量来估计黑盒大语言模型的参数量，在89个开源模型上达到R²=0.917，并发现事实容量随参数对数线性增长，反驳了“致密化定律”。
ai.motivation: 闭源前沿模型不公开参数量，传统推理经济学方法因硬件、批处理和服务栈假设带来2倍以上不确定性，需要更精确的内在估计方法。
ai.method: 设计包含1400个事实问题的IKP基准，覆盖7个难度层级，隔离无法通过推理或架构压缩获得的知识；在89个开源模型上校准准确率与参数量的对数线性映射。
ai.result: 映射R²=0.917，留一交叉验证中位数误差1.59倍，68.5%在2倍以内；MoE模型总参数比活跃参数预测更好（R²=0.79 vs 0.51）；安全微调模型估计为下界；事实容量随时间变化不显著，拒绝致密化定律。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需访问模型内部即可估计黑盒LLM参数量的可靠方法，帮助用户评估模型规模和能力。

idea_spark.idea: 结合IKP与推理基准，构建模型能力的多维评估框架，区分事实知识与推理能力。
idea_spark.risk: 安全微调模型可能隐藏知识，导致低估参数量；事实知识库的覆盖和时效性可能影响泛化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用信息论下界进行模型属性估计，启发其他不可观测属性的间接测量方法。

en.tldr: Proposes Incompressible Knowledge Probes (IKPs) to estimate black-box LLM parameter counts by measuring factual knowledge, achieving R²=0.917 on 89 open-weight models, and refuting the Densing Law with factual capacity scaling log-linearly across generations.
en.motivation: Closed-source frontier models do not disclose parameter counts; traditional inference economics has >2× uncertainty due to hardware and serving assumptions, requiring a tighter intrinsic bound.
en.method: Designs a benchmark of 1,400 factual questions across 7 obscurity tiers to isolate non-compressible knowledge; calibrates a log-linear mapping from IKP accuracy to parameter count on 89 open-weight models.
en.result: Mapping achieves R²=0.917; leave-one-out cross-validation median fold error 1.59×, 68.5% within 2×; MoE total parameters predict knowledge better than active (R²=0.79 vs 0.51); safety-tuned estimates are lower bounds; factual capacity shows no significant time trend, rejecting Densing Law.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reliable method to estimate parameter counts of black-box LLMs without internal access, aiding users in assessing model scale and capability.

idea_spark.idea: Combine IKPs with reasoning benchmarks to build a multi-dimensional capability evaluation framework distinguishing factual knowledge from reasoning ability.
idea_spark.risk: Safety-tuned models may hide knowledge, leading to underestimation; coverage and timeliness of factual knowledge bases may affect generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using information-theoretic lower bounds for model property estimation inspires indirect measurement methods for other unobservable attributes.

keywords_raw: log-linear mapping from accuracy to parameters

papers.title: The SK model with a sparse variance profile: free energy and AMP algorithm for TAP equations at high temperature
papers.summary: A generalization of the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) model for spin glasses is considered, in which the interaction matrix is endowed with a variance profile that has no particular structure an may be sparse. In the first part of this paper, an asymptotic equivalent of the free energy is derived at sufficiently high temperatures, regardless of the signature of the variance profile matrix. In the second part, the mean of the spin vector under the Gibbs measure is estimated using an Approximate Message Passing algorithm based on the Thouless-Anderson-Palmer equations. The dynamical approach of Adhikari et.al. (J. Stat. Phys., 2021), originally developed for the classical SK model, is adapted to the present setting to obtain these results.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了具有稀疏方差轮廓的Sherrington-Kirkpatrick自旋玻璃模型，在高温度下推导了自由能的渐近等价形式，并利用基于Thouless-Anderson-Palmer方程的近似消息传递算法估计了Gibbs测度下自旋向量的均值。
ai.motivation: 经典SK模型假设相互作用矩阵为全连接，而实际系统中相互作用往往稀疏且具有异质性。本文旨在推广SK模型，允许方差轮廓无特定结构且稀疏，并分析其在高温度下的统计力学性质。
ai.method: 首先，利用统计力学方法推导自由能的高温渐近表达式；其次，将Adhikari等人针对经典SK模型的动力学方法扩展到本设置，设计基于TAP方程的近似消息传递算法来估计自旋均值。
ai.result: 在高温度下，无论方差轮廓矩阵的符号如何，均得到了自由能的渐近等价形式；同时，AMP算法能够有效估计Gibbs测度下的自旋向量均值。
ai.help_to_user: 该研究为处理具有稀疏或异质性相互作用的自旋系统提供了理论框架和高效算法，有助于理解复杂网络中的集体行为。

idea_spark.idea: 将AMP算法与稀疏方差轮廓结合，可能用于大规模图上的贝叶斯推断或压缩感知问题，其中观测矩阵具有异质性方差。
idea_spark.risk: 稀疏性可能导致算法收敛性变差或需要更精细的初始化；理论结果仅在高温度下成立，低温行为可能完全不同。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴自旋玻璃理论中的TAP方程和AMP方法，可以启发设计针对异质性数据的消息传递算法，例如在推荐系统或生物网络推断中处理非均匀交互强度。

zh.tldr: 本文研究了具有稀疏方差轮廓的Sherrington-Kirkpatrick自旋玻璃模型，在高温度下推导了自由能的渐近等价形式，并利用基于Thouless-Anderson-Palmer方程的近似消息传递算法估计了Gibbs测度下自旋向量的均值。
zh.motivation: 经典SK模型假设相互作用矩阵为全连接，而实际系统中相互作用往往稀疏且具有异质性。本文旨在推广SK模型，允许方差轮廓无特定结构且稀疏，并分析其在高温度下的统计力学性质。
zh.method: 首先，利用统计力学方法推导自由能的高温渐近表达式；其次，将Adhikari等人针对经典SK模型的动力学方法扩展到本设置，设计基于TAP方程的近似消息传递算法来估计自旋均值。
zh.result: 在高温度下，无论方差轮廓矩阵的符号如何，均得到了自由能的渐近等价形式；同时，AMP算法能够有效估计Gibbs测度下的自旋向量均值。
zh.help_to_user: 该研究为处理具有稀疏或异质性相互作用的自旋系统提供了理论框架和高效算法，有助于理解复杂网络中的集体行为。

en.tldr: This paper studies a generalization of the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick spin glass model with a sparse variance profile, derives an asymptotic free energy at high temperature, and estimates the mean spin vector under the Gibbs measure using an AMP algorithm based on TAP equations.
en.motivation: The classical SK model assumes fully connected interactions, but real systems often exhibit sparse and heterogeneous couplings. This work extends the SK model to allow an unstructured sparse variance profile and analyzes its statistical mechanics at high temperature.
en.method: First, an asymptotic expression for the free energy is derived at sufficiently high temperatures using statistical mechanics. Second, the dynamical approach of Adhikari et al. for the classical SK model is adapted to design an AMP algorithm based on TAP equations to estimate the mean spin vector.
en.result: At high temperature, an asymptotic equivalent of the free energy is obtained regardless of the signature of the variance profile matrix, and the AMP algorithm effectively estimates the mean spin vector under the Gibbs measure.
en.help_to_user: This work provides a theoretical framework and efficient algorithm for spin systems with sparse or heterogeneous interactions, aiding the understanding of collective behavior in complex networks.

idea_spark.idea: Combining AMP with sparse variance profiles may be applied to Bayesian inference or compressed sensing on large graphs where the observation matrix has heterogeneous variances.
idea_spark.risk: Sparsity may degrade algorithm convergence or require careful initialization; theoretical results hold only at high temperature, and low-temperature behavior may differ significantly.
idea_spark.inspiration: Drawing from TAP equations and AMP in spin glass theory can inspire message-passing algorithms for heterogeneous data, e.g., in recommendation systems or biological network inference with non-uniform interaction strengths.

papers.title: Time-varying Interaction Graph ODE for Dynamic Graph Representation Learning
papers.summary: Graph neural Ordinary Differential Equations (ODE) combine neural ODE with the message passing mechanism of Graph Neural Networks (GNN), providing a continuous-time modeling method for graph representation learning. However, in dynamic graph scenarios, existing graph neural ODEs typically employ a unified message passing mechanism, assuming that inter-node interactions share the same message passing function at any time, which makes it challenging to capture the diversity and time-varying nature of inter-node interaction patterns. To address this, we propose Time-varying Interaction Graph Ordinary Differential Equations (TI-ODE). The core idea of TI-ODE is to decompose the evolution function of a graph ODE into a set of learnable interaction basis functions, where each basis function corresponds to a distinct type of inter-node interaction. These basis functions are dynamically combined through time-dependent learnable weights, enabling inter-node interaction patterns to adaptively evolve over time. Experimental results on six dynamic graph datasets demonstrate that TI-ODE consistently outperforms existing methods and achieves state-of-the-art performance on attribute prediction tasks, and experiments on the \textit{Covid} dataset further verify the interpretability and generalizability of our TI-ODE. Furthermore, we demonstrate both theoretically and empirically that TI-ODE exhibits superior robustness compared to models utilizing a unified message-passing mechanism.

ai.tldr: 提出时变交互图常微分方程（TI-ODE），通过可学习的交互基函数和时变权重捕捉动态图中节点交互模式的多样性和时变性。
ai.motivation: 现有图神经ODE在动态图场景中使用统一的消息传递机制，难以捕捉节点间交互模式的多样性和时变性。
ai.method: 将图ODE的演化函数分解为一组可学习的交互基函数，并通过时变权重动态组合这些基函数，使交互模式随时间自适应演化。
ai.result: 在六个动态图数据集上，TI-ODE在属性预测任务中达到最优性能，在Covid数据集上验证了可解释性和泛化性，并展现出更强的鲁棒性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用连续时间模型和可学习基函数处理动态图中的复杂交互模式。

idea_spark.idea: 将交互基函数与注意力机制结合，自动学习不同时间尺度下的交互模式。
idea_spark.risk: 基函数数量选择可能影响模型复杂度与泛化能力，需谨慎调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受函数分解和时变权重启发，可探索将静态图模型扩展为动态自适应模型。

en.tldr: Proposes Time-varying Interaction Graph ODE (TI-ODE), which uses learnable interaction basis functions and time-dependent weights to capture diverse and time-varying inter-node interaction patterns in dynamic graphs.
en.motivation: Existing graph neural ODEs use a unified message passing mechanism in dynamic graphs, failing to capture the diversity and time-varying nature of inter-node interactions.
en.method: Decomposes the evolution function of a graph ODE into a set of learnable interaction basis functions, dynamically combined via time-dependent weights to adapt interaction patterns over time.
en.result: TI-ODE achieves state-of-the-art performance on attribute prediction across six dynamic graph datasets, demonstrates interpretability and generalizability on the Covid dataset, and shows superior robustness.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to model complex dynamic interactions using continuous-time models and learnable basis functions.

idea_spark.idea: Combine interaction basis functions with attention mechanisms to automatically learn interaction patterns at different time scales.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of the number of basis functions may affect model complexity and generalization, requiring careful tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by function decomposition and time-varying weights, one can explore extending static graph models to dynamic adaptive models.

papers.title: A polynomial-time solvable class of sparse box-constrained polynomial optimization problems
papers.summary: We study the problem of minimizing a multivariate polynomial function over the unit hypercube. By representing the polynomial through a hypergraph and exploiting its sparsity structure, we establish a new sufficient condition under which the problem can be solved in time polynomial in the encoding length of the input. Our approach identifies a subset of variables that attain binary values at optimality and shows how the remaining continuous variables can be eliminated locally when they appear in small, weakly coupled blocks, yielding a reduction to a structured binary optimization problem that can be solved efficiently. Our result extends the classical tractability result for binary polynomial optimization, namely, that problems with bounded treewidth are solvable in polynomial time, to box-constrained polynomial optimization.

ai.tldr: 提出一类稀疏盒约束多项式优化问题，在特定条件下可在多项式时间内求解。
ai.motivation: 一般多项式优化是NP难的，但实际中许多问题具有稀疏结构，现有方法未能充分利用。
ai.method: 通过超图表示多项式，利用稀疏性识别最优解中取二值的变量，并将剩余连续变量按弱耦合小块局部消去，转化为可高效求解的结构化二元优化。
ai.result: 将二元多项式优化的树宽可解性推广到盒约束情形，给出了新的多项式时间可解充分条件。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户识别哪些稀疏多项式优化问题可以高效求解，避免盲目使用通用NP难算法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用问题稀疏性将连续变量局部消去，转化为二元优化，可能启发设计更通用的稀疏优化求解框架。
idea_spark.risk: 条件可能过于严格，实际应用中稀疏结构未必满足弱耦合要求。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似思想用于非线性方程组求解或机器学习中的稀疏正则化问题。

idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似思想用于非线性方程组求解或机器学习中的稀疏正则化问题。

en.tldr: A class of sparse box-constrained polynomial optimization problems is shown to be solvable in polynomial time under a new sufficient condition.
en.motivation: General polynomial optimization is NP-hard, but many practical problems exhibit sparsity that existing methods do not fully exploit.
en.method: Represent the polynomial via a hypergraph, exploit sparsity to identify variables that are binary at optimality, and eliminate remaining continuous variables locally in small weakly coupled blocks, reducing to a tractable binary optimization.
en.result: Extends the classical treewidth-based tractability result for binary polynomial optimization to box-constrained polynomial optimization.
en.help_to_user: Helps users identify which sparse polynomial optimization problems can be solved efficiently, avoiding unnecessary use of general NP-hard algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging sparsity to eliminate continuous variables locally and reduce to binary optimization may inspire a general framework for sparse optimization.
idea_spark.risk: The sufficient condition may be too restrictive; real-world problems may not satisfy the weak coupling requirement.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar ideas to nonlinear equation solving or sparse regularization in machine learning.

papers.title: PLMGH: What Matters in PLM-GNN Hybrids for Code Classification and Vulnerability Detection
papers.summary: Code understanding models increasingly rely on pretrained language models (PLMs) and graph neural networks (GNNs), which capture complementary semantic and structural information. We conduct a controlled empirical study of PLM-GNN hybrids for code classification and vulnerability detection tasks by systematically pairing three code-specialized PLMs with three foundational GNN architectures. We compare these hybrids against PLM-only and GNN-only baselines on Java250 and Devign, including an identifier-obfuscation setting. Across both tasks, hybrids consistently outperform GNN-only baselines and often improve ranking quality over frozen PLMs. On Devign, performance and robustness are more sensitive to the PLM feature source than to the GNN backbone. We also find that larger PLMs are not necessarily better feature extractors in this pipeline, and that the PLM choice has more impact than the GNN choice. Finally, we distill these findings into practical guidelines for PLM-GNN design choices in code classification and vulnerability detection.

ai.tldr: 系统研究了PLM与GNN混合模型在代码分类和漏洞检测中的表现，发现PLM特征源比GNN骨架影响更大，且大PLM不一定更好。
ai.motivation: 现有代码理解模型分别利用PLM和GNN捕捉语义与结构信息，但缺乏对两者混合设计的系统比较。
ai.method: 配对三种代码专用PLM与三种基础GNN架构，在Java250和Devign数据集上进行控制实验，包括标识符混淆设置。
ai.result: 混合模型优于纯GNN，常改善冻结PLM的排序质量；PLM特征源比GNN骨架对性能影响更大；大PLM并非总是更好的特征提取器。
ai.help_to_user: 为选择PLM-GNN混合模型提供实用指南，帮助研究人员在代码分类和漏洞检测中做出更优设计决策。

idea_spark.idea: 探索动态调整PLM与GNN贡献权重的自适应混合机制，根据任务或数据特性自动平衡语义与结构信息。
idea_spark.risk: 自适应机制可能增加模型复杂度和训练成本，且在不同任务间泛化性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受PLM特征源比GNN骨架更关键的发现启发，可尝试用轻量GNN配合强PLM，或设计PLM特征选择方法提升效率。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受PLM特征源比GNN骨架更关键的发现启发，可尝试用轻量GNN配合强PLM，或设计PLM特征选择方法提升效率。

en.tldr: A controlled empirical study of PLM-GNN hybrids for code classification and vulnerability detection reveals that PLM feature source matters more than GNN backbone, and larger PLMs are not always better.
en.motivation: Existing code understanding models use PLMs and GNNs for semantic and structural information, but lack systematic comparison of their hybrids.
en.method: Paired three code-specialized PLMs with three foundational GNNs, evaluated on Java250 and Devign with identifier obfuscation.
en.result: Hybrids outperform GNN-only baselines and often improve ranking over frozen PLMs; PLM feature source impacts performance more than GNN choice; larger PLMs are not necessarily better feature extractors.
en.help_to_user: Provides practical guidelines for designing PLM-GNN hybrids in code classification and vulnerability detection.

idea_spark.idea: Explore an adaptive hybrid mechanism that dynamically weights PLM and GNN contributions based on task or data characteristics.
idea_spark.risk: Adaptive mechanisms may increase model complexity and training cost, and generalization across tasks needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the finding that PLM feature source matters more than GNN backbone, consider lightweight GNNs paired with strong PLMs or PLM feature selection methods.

papers.title: On Halting vs Converging in Recurrent Graph Neural Networks
papers.summary: Recurrent Graph Neural Networks (RGNNs) extend standard GNNs by iterating message-passing until some stopping condition is met. Various RGNN models have been proposed in the literature. In this paper, we study three such models: converging RGNNs, where all vertex representations must stabilise; output-converging RGNNs, where only the output classifications must stabilise; and halting RGNNs, where a per-vertex halting classifier determines when to stop. We establish expressiveness relationships between these models: over undirected graphs, converging RGNNs are equally expressive as graded-bisimulation-invariant halting RGNNs, while output-converging RGNNs are at least as expressive. Combined with prior results on halting RGNNs, this shows that, relative to the classifiers expressible in monadic second-order logic (MSO), converging RGNNs express exactly the graded modal $μ$-calculus ($μ$GML), and output-converging RGNNs express at least $μ$GML. These results hold even when restricting to ReLU networks with sum aggregation. The main technical challenge is simulating halting RGNNs by converging ones: without a global halting classifier, vertices may locally decide to halt at different times, causing desynchronisation. We develop a "traffic-light" protocol that enables vertices to coordinate despite this asynchrony. Our results answer an open question from Bollen et al. (2025) and show that the RGNN model of Pflueger et al. (2024) retains full $μ$GML expressiveness even when convergence is guaranteed.

ai.tldr: 研究了三种递归图神经网络（RGNN）的停止与收敛机制，证明了它们在无向图上的表达能力关系，并开发了“交通灯”协议解决异步问题。
ai.motivation: 现有RGNN模型在停止条件上存在差异，但缺乏对它们表达能力关系的系统理解。
ai.method: 通过形式化定义三种RGNN模型（收敛型、输出收敛型、停止型），利用分级双模拟不变量和模态μ-演算建立表达能力层级，并设计“交通灯”协议实现异步协调。
ai.result: 收敛型RGNN与分级双模拟不变的停止型RGNN表达能力等价；输出收敛型RGNN至少等价于分级模态μ-演算；即使使用ReLU网络和求和聚合，结果仍成立。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解不同RGNN停止策略的表达能力差异，为选择合适模型提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用局部信号（如颜色状态）实现全局协调，避免全局停止分类器的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 协议可能增加计算开销，且对图拓扑敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从交通信号灯中借鉴了状态转换机制，用于解决异步停止问题。

zh.tldr: 研究了三种递归图神经网络（RGNN）的停止与收敛机制，证明了它们在无向图上的表达能力关系，并开发了“交通灯”协议解决异步问题。
zh.motivation: 现有RGNN模型在停止条件上存在差异，但缺乏对它们表达能力关系的系统理解。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解不同RGNN停止策略的表达能力差异，为选择合适模型提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用局部信号（如颜色状态）实现全局协调，避免全局停止分类器的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 协议可能增加计算开销，且对图拓扑敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从交通信号灯中借鉴了状态转换机制，用于解决异步停止问题。

en.tldr: Investigates halting vs converging in recurrent graph neural networks, establishes expressiveness relationships among three models, and develops a traffic-light protocol to handle asynchrony.
en.motivation: Different RGNN models use varying stopping conditions, but their relative expressiveness was not well understood.
en.method: Formally defines three RGNN models (converging, output-converging, halting), uses graded bisimulation invariance and modal μ-calculus to establish expressiveness hierarchy, and designs a traffic-light protocol for asynchronous coordination.
en.result: Converging RGNNs are equally expressive as graded-bisimulation-invariant halting RGNNs; output-converging RGNNs are at least as expressive as graded modal μ-calculus; results hold even with ReLU networks and sum aggregation.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guidance on choosing RGNN models based on desired expressiveness and stopping behavior.

idea_spark.idea: Use local state signals (e.g., color) to achieve global coordination without a global halting classifier.
idea_spark.risk: Protocol may introduce computational overhead and is sensitive to graph topology.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrowed state transition mechanism from traffic lights to solve asynchronous halting problems.

papers.title: Back to Repair: A Minimal Denoising Network for Time Series Anomaly Detection
papers.summary: We introduce JuRe (Just Repair), a minimal denoising network for time series anomaly detection that exposes a central finding: architectural complexity is unnecessary when the training objective correctly implements the manifold-projection principle. JuRe consists of a single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block with hidden dimension 128, trained to repair corrupted time series windows and scored at inference by a fixed, parameter-free structural discrepancy function. Despite using no attention, no latent variable, and no adversarial component, JuRe ranks second on the TSB-AD multivariate benchmark (AUC-PR 0.404, 180 series, 17 datasets) and second on the UCR univariate archive by AUC-PR (0.198, 250 series), leading all neural baselines on AUC-PR and VUS-PR. Component ablation on TSB-AD identifies training-time corruption as the dominant factor ($Δ$AUC-PR $= 0.047$ on removal), confirming that the denoising objective, not network capacity, drives detection quality. Pairwise Wilcoxon signed-rank tests establish statistical significance against 21 of 25 baselines on TSB-AD. Code is available at the URL https://github.com/iis-esslingen/JuRe.

ai.tldr: 提出最小去噪网络JuRe，仅用单残差块和固定结构差异函数，在时间序列异常检测基准上超越多数复杂模型。
ai.motivation: 现有时间序列异常检测模型依赖注意力、潜变量等复杂组件，但检测性能提升有限，且训练目标与流形投影原理的匹配关系未被充分研究。
ai.method: JuRe由单个深度可分离卷积残差块（隐藏维度128）构成，训练时对损坏时间序列窗口进行修复，推理时使用无参数的结构差异函数计算异常分数。
ai.result: 在TSB-AD多变量基准（AUC-PR 0.404）和UCR单变量档案（AUC-PR 0.198）上排名第二，领先所有神经基线，消融实验证实训练时损坏是主导因素。
ai.help_to_user: 提供极简架构实现高效异常检测的范例，强调训练目标设计比网络容量更重要，可指导资源受限场景的模型选择。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将结构差异函数替换为可学习的度量，或引入多尺度损坏策略以提升对复杂异常模式的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 极简架构可能对高度非平稳或长依赖时间序列的检测能力有限，需验证在更广泛数据集上的泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“少即是多”思想启发，重新审视深度学习中的组件必要性，推动模型设计向简洁高效方向发展。

en.tldr: Proposes JuRe, a minimal denoising network with a single residual block and fixed structural discrepancy function, outperforming complex models on time series anomaly detection benchmarks.
en.motivation: Existing time series anomaly detection models rely on complex components like attention and latent variables, yet detection gains are marginal, and the alignment between training objective and manifold-projection principle is underexplored.
en.method: JuRe uses a single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block (hidden dim 128), trained to repair corrupted time series windows, and scored at inference by a parameter-free structural discrepancy function.
en.result: Ranks second on TSB-AD multivariate benchmark (AUC-PR 0.404) and UCR univariate archive (AUC-PR 0.198), leading all neural baselines; ablation confirms training-time corruption as the dominant factor.
en.help_to_user: Provides a paradigm for efficient anomaly detection with minimal architecture, emphasizing training objective design over network capacity, guiding model selection in resource-constrained settings.

idea_spark.idea: Explore replacing the structural discrepancy function with a learnable metric or introducing multi-scale corruption strategies to enhance robustness to complex anomaly patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Minimal architecture may struggle with highly non-stationary or long-dependency time series, requiring validation on broader datasets.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by 'less is more', re-evaluating necessity of components in deep learning, pushing model design toward simplicity and efficiency.

papers.title: A systematic literature Review for Transformer-based Software Vulnerability detection
papers.summary: Context: Software vulnerabilities pose significant security threats to software systems, especially as software is increasingly used across many areas of daily life, including health, government, and finance. Recently, transformer-based models have demonstrated promising results in automatic software vulnerability identification due to their robust contextual modelling and representation learning capabilities. Objectives: While numerous systematic literature reviews (SLRs) have examined machine learning and deep learning methods for identifying vulnerabilities, a more transformer-centric analysis remains to be explored. This SLR critically analysed 80 studies published between 2021 and 2025 that utilised transformer models to identify software vulnerabilities. Methods: Using Kitchenhams SLR guidelines, we methodically evaluate current research from various perspectives, encompassing study trends, datasets and sources, programming languages, transformer frameworks, detection detail levels, assessment metrics, reference models, types of vulnerabilities, and experimental configurations. Results: We classify transformer models into encoder, decoder, and combined architectures and analyse both pre-trained and fine-tuned versions utilized on source code, logs, and smart contracts. The results emphasise prevailing research trends, frequently utilised benchmarks, and main baselines. It also uncovers crucial technical issues like data imbalance, interpretability, scalability, and generalization across programming languages. Conclusion: By integrating current evidence and recognising unaddressed research areas, this SLR provides a consolidated resource for researchers and professionals seeking to develop more reliable, precise, and interpretable transformer-based vulnerability identification systems.

ai.tldr: 对2021-2025年间80篇基于Transformer的软件漏洞检测研究进行了系统综述，分析了模型架构、数据集、评估指标等，并指出了数据不平衡、可解释性等关键问题。
ai.motivation: 现有综述多关注传统机器学习或深度学习，缺乏对Transformer模型在软件漏洞检测中应用的专门分析。
ai.method: 遵循Kitchenham系统综述指南，从研究趋势、数据集、编程语言、Transformer框架、检测粒度、评估指标等维度对80篇论文进行批判性分析。
ai.result: 将Transformer模型分为编码器、解码器和组合架构，总结了常用基准和基线，揭示了数据不平衡、可解释性、可扩展性和跨语言泛化等关键挑战。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究人员和从业者提供了Transformer漏洞检测领域的全面现状、趋势和未解决问题，有助于选择研究方向或评估现有方法。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一种结合对比学习和数据增强的预训练策略，专门缓解漏洞检测中的数据不平衡问题。
idea_spark.risk: 对比学习可能引入噪声，且数据增强需谨慎设计以避免破坏漏洞语义。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受综述中“可解释性”挑战启发，可探索利用注意力权重可视化或基于原型的解释方法提升模型透明度。

en.tldr: A systematic literature review of 80 studies (2021-2025) on Transformer-based software vulnerability detection, analyzing model architectures, datasets, metrics, and highlighting issues like data imbalance and interpretability.
en.motivation: Existing reviews focus on traditional ML/DL, lacking a dedicated analysis of Transformer models for vulnerability detection.
en.method: Following Kitchenham's SLR guidelines, critically analyzed 80 papers from perspectives including study trends, datasets, programming languages, Transformer frameworks, detection granularity, and evaluation metrics.
en.result: Classified Transformer models into encoder, decoder, and combined architectures; summarized common benchmarks and baselines; revealed key challenges such as data imbalance, interpretability, scalability, and cross-language generalization.
en.help_to_user: Provides researchers and practitioners with a comprehensive overview of the current state, trends, and open problems in Transformer-based vulnerability detection, aiding in research direction selection or method evaluation.

idea_spark.idea: Design a pre-training strategy combining contrastive learning and data augmentation specifically to mitigate data imbalance in vulnerability detection.
idea_spark.risk: Contrastive learning may introduce noise, and data augmentation must be carefully designed to avoid corrupting vulnerability semantics.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the 'interpretability' challenge, explore using attention weight visualization or prototype-based explanations to improve model transparency.

papers.title: Exploring Time Conditioning in Diffusion Generative Models from Disjoint Noisy Data Manifolds
papers.summary: Practically, training diffusion models typically requires explicit time conditioning to guide the network through the denoising sampling process. Especially in deterministic methods like DDIM, the absence of time conditioning leads to significant performance degradation. However, other deterministic sampling approaches, such as flow matching, can generate high-quality content without this conditioning, raising the question of its necessity. In this work, we revisit the role of time conditioning from a geometric perspective. We analyze the evolution of noisy data distributions under the forward diffusion process and demonstrate that, in high-dimensional spaces, these distributions concentrate on low-dimensional hyper-cylinder-like manifolds embedded within the input space. Successful generation, we argue, stems from the disentanglement of these manifolds in high-dimensional space. Based on this insight, we modify the forward process of DDIM to align the noisy data manifold with the flow-matching approach, proving that DDIM can generate high-quality content without time conditioning, provided the noisy manifold evolves according to the flow-matching method. Additionally, we extend our framework to class-conditioned generation by decoupling classes into distinct time spaces, enabling class-conditioned synthesis with a class-unconditional denoising model. Extensive experiments validate our theoretical analysis and show that high-quality generation is achievable without explicit conditional embeddings.

ai.tldr: 从几何角度重新审视扩散模型中的时间条件，证明在流匹配的噪声流形演化下，DDIM无需时间条件也能生成高质量内容。
ai.motivation: 传统扩散模型依赖显式时间条件，但流匹配等方法无需此条件也能生成高质量内容，引发对时间条件必要性的疑问。
ai.method: 分析前向扩散过程中噪声数据分布在高维空间集中于低维超圆柱流形，提出修改DDIM前向过程使其与流匹配对齐，并扩展至类条件生成。
ai.result: 实验验证无需显式时间条件即可实现高质量生成，类条件生成可通过解耦类到不同时间空间实现。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解扩散模型中时间条件的几何本质，提供无需时间条件的生成方案。

idea_spark.idea: 利用流形解耦实现无时间条件的类条件生成，可能简化模型设计。
idea_spark.risk: 流形对齐假设在高维空间成立，低维或复杂数据分布可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从几何视角重新审视生成模型中的条件机制，启发更简洁的生成框架。

en.tldr: Revisits time conditioning in diffusion models from a geometric perspective, showing that DDIM can generate high-quality content without time conditioning when the noisy manifold evolves according to flow matching.
en.motivation: Traditional diffusion models require explicit time conditioning, but flow matching generates high-quality content without it, questioning its necessity.
en.method: Analyzes noisy data distributions as low-dimensional hyper-cylinder manifolds, modifies DDIM's forward process to align with flow matching, and extends to class-conditioned generation by decoupling classes into separate time spaces.
en.result: Experiments validate high-quality generation without explicit time conditioning and enable class-conditioned synthesis with a class-unconditional model.
en.help_to_user: Provides geometric insights into time conditioning and offers a method for generation without it.

idea_spark.idea: Decoupling classes into time spaces enables class-conditioned generation without class embeddings.
idea_spark.risk: Assumptions may fail for low-dimensional or complex data distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Geometric perspective inspires simpler conditional generation frameworks.

papers.title: Distributed adaptive estimation for stochastic large regression models
papers.summary: This paper studies the distributed adaptiveestimation problems for stochastic large regression modelswith an infinite number of parameters. By constructing a re-cursive local cost function, we propose a novel distributedrecursive least squares algorithm to estimate the unknownsystem parameters, where the growth rate of regressors'dimension is characterized by a non-decreasing positivefunction. The almost sure convergence of the proposedalgorithm is established under a cooperative excitationcondition, which incorporates the temporal information andthe spatial information to reflect the cooperative effectamong multiple agents. Moreover, we analyze the predic-tion error by establishing the asymptotic upper boundof the accumulated regret without any excitation condi-tions. The main difficulty of theoretical analysis lies in howto analyze properties of the product of non-independentand non-stationary random matrices, whose dimensionschange over time simultaneously. Some techniques, suchas stochastic Lyapunov function, double-array martingaletheory and algebraic graph theory, are employed to dealwith the above issue. Our theoretical results are derivedwithout imposing independence or stationarity assump-tions on the regression vectors, thereby not excluding thecorrelated feedback signals.

ai.tldr: 针对具有无限参数的大规模随机回归模型，提出一种分布式自适应估计算法，在合作激励条件下证明几乎必然收敛，并给出无激励假设下的累积遗憾上界。
ai.motivation: 现有分布式估计算法通常假设回归向量独立或平稳，且参数维度固定，无法处理维度随时间增长的大规模随机回归模型。
ai.method: 构造递归局部代价函数，提出分布式递归最小二乘算法；利用随机Lyapunov函数、双阵列鞅理论和代数图论分析时变非独立随机矩阵乘积的性质。
ai.result: 在合作激励条件下算法几乎必然收敛；无需任何激励条件即可得到累积遗憾的渐近上界。
ai.help_to_user: 为大规模分布式系统中的在线参数估计提供理论保证，尤其适用于回归向量相关且维度动态增长的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将合作激励条件与遗憾分析结合，可能启发设计更鲁棒的分布式学习规则。
idea_spark.risk: 理论分析依赖图结构，实际应用中图拓扑变化可能影响收敛性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将双阵列鞅方法用于联邦学习中的非独立数据流分析。

idea_spark.risk: 理论分析依赖图结构，实际应用中图拓扑变化可能影响收敛性。

en.tldr: Proposes a distributed adaptive estimation algorithm for stochastic large regression models with infinite parameters, proving almost sure convergence under a cooperative excitation condition and establishing an asymptotic regret bound without excitation assumptions.
en.motivation: Existing distributed estimation algorithms assume independent/stationary regression vectors and fixed parameter dimensions, failing to handle large-scale stochastic regression models with growing dimensions.
en.method: Constructs a recursive local cost function and a distributed recursive least squares algorithm; employs stochastic Lyapunov function, double-array martingale theory, and algebraic graph theory to analyze products of time-varying non-independent random matrices.
en.result: Almost sure convergence under cooperative excitation; asymptotic upper bound of accumulated regret without any excitation condition.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees for online parameter estimation in large-scale distributed systems, especially when regression vectors are correlated and dimensions grow over time.

idea_spark.idea: Combining cooperative excitation with regret analysis may inspire more robust distributed learning rules.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical analysis depends on graph structure; topology changes in practice may affect convergence.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying double-array martingale methods to analyze non-i.i.d. data streams in federated learning.

papers.title: Conditonal Lipschitz stability for the Inverse Problem of the 2D Navier-Stokes System in a Bounded Domain
papers.summary: This paper concerns an inverse problem for the initial boundary value problem of the two-dimensional Navier-Stokes system defined in a bounded simply connected domain with slip, vorticity boundary conditions, and a global vorticity invariant constraint. We establish conditional Lipschitz stability and a local recovery for this inverse problem, where the velocity field and space-independent boundary vorticity are locally recovered from the given initial velocity field and the global vorticity invariant. Our analysis is based on well-posedness estimates and energy methods for the vorticity transport equation.

ai.tldr: 本文针对有界单连通区域中二维Navier-Stokes系统的逆问题，在滑移涡度边界条件和全局涡度不变约束下，建立了条件Lipschitz稳定性和局部恢复结果。
ai.motivation: 为二维Navier-Stokes系统的逆问题提供稳定性保证，从而提升反演解的可靠性和可解释性。
ai.method: 基于涡度输运方程的适定性估计和能量方法，结合全局涡度不变约束，推导条件Lipschitz稳定性。
ai.result: 从给定的初始速度场和全局涡度不变量中，局部恢复速度场和空间无关的边界涡度，并证明恢复过程具有条件Lipschitz稳定性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在复杂流体系统中逆问题的稳定性条件，为实际反演算法设计提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用全局涡度不变约束作为正则化项，设计数值反演算法，实现速度场和边界涡度的联合重建。
idea_spark.risk: 理论分析依赖于特定边界条件和全局约束，实际应用中可能因数据噪声或模型误差导致稳定性退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将全局守恒量（如涡度、能量）作为逆问题的额外约束，有望提升反演的唯一性和稳定性。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解在复杂流体系统中逆问题的稳定性条件，为实际反演算法设计提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用全局涡度不变约束作为正则化项，设计数值反演算法，实现速度场和边界涡度的联合重建。
idea_spark.risk: 理论分析依赖于特定边界条件和全局约束，实际应用中可能因数据噪声或模型误差导致稳定性退化。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将全局守恒量（如涡度、能量）作为逆问题的额外约束，有望提升反演的唯一性和稳定性。

en.tldr: This paper establishes conditional Lipschitz stability and local recovery for an inverse problem of the 2D Navier-Stokes system in a bounded simply connected domain with slip, vorticity boundary conditions and a global vorticity invariant constraint.
en.motivation: To provide stability guarantees for the inverse problem of the 2D Navier-Stokes system, thereby enhancing the reliability and interpretability of the recovered solution.
en.method: Based on well-posedness estimates and energy methods for the vorticity transport equation, combined with the global vorticity invariant constraint, to derive conditional Lipschitz stability.
en.result: Local recovery of the velocity field and space-independent boundary vorticity from the given initial velocity field and global vorticity invariant, with conditional Lipschitz stability.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the stability conditions for inverse problems in complex fluid systems, providing theoretical foundations for practical inversion algorithms.

idea_spark.idea: Use the global vorticity invariant constraint as a regularization term to design numerical inversion algorithms for joint reconstruction of velocity field and boundary vorticity.
idea_spark.risk: The theoretical analysis relies on specific boundary conditions and global constraints; in practice, data noise or model errors may degrade stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Incorporating global conserved quantities (e.g., vorticity, energy) as additional constraints in inverse problems may improve uniqueness and stability.

papers.title: SPDEs with time-independent Lévy colored noise
papers.summary: In this article, we introduce a time-independent version of the Lévy colored noise considered in Balan (2015) and Balan and Jiménez (2026). We study the existence of the solution of a linear stochastic partial differential equation with this type of noise, and we identify some necessary conditions which guarantee that the solution has finite $p$-th order moments. Using tools from Malliavin calculus, we investigate the existence of the solution for the equation with multiplicative noise. As examples, we consider the stochastic heat and wave equations in any dimension $d \geq 1$.

ai.tldr: 本文引入时间无关的Lévy色噪声，研究线性随机偏微分方程解的存在性及有限p阶矩条件，并利用Malliavin分析处理乘性噪声，以热方程和波动方程为例。
ai.motivation: 扩展Lévy色噪声理论至时间无关情形，填补现有研究空白。
ai.method: 采用Malliavin微积分工具，分析线性与乘性噪声SPDE的解存在性及矩条件。
ai.result: 给出了解存在及有限p阶矩的必要条件，并推广至任意维度的热方程和波动方程。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解时间无关Lévy色噪声驱动的SPDE解的性质及矩分析。

idea_spark.idea: 将时间无关Lévy色噪声与分数阶算子结合，研究非局部SPDE。
idea_spark.risk: Malliavin分析在非光滑噪声下可能失效，需验证正则性条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴Malliavin微积分处理乘性噪声的思路，可应用于随机控制或滤波问题。

en.tldr: This paper introduces time-independent Lévy colored noise, studies the existence of solutions for linear SPDEs and finite p-th moment conditions, and uses Malliavin calculus for multiplicative noise, with examples of heat and wave equations.
en.motivation: Extend Lévy colored noise theory to the time-independent case, filling a gap in existing research.
en.method: Use Malliavin calculus to analyze solution existence and moment conditions for SPDEs with linear and multiplicative noise.
en.result: Provide necessary conditions for solution existence and finite p-th moments, generalized to heat and wave equations in any dimension.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand solution properties and moment analysis of SPDEs driven by time-independent Lévy colored noise.

idea_spark.idea: Combine time-independent Lévy colored noise with fractional operators to study nonlocal SPDEs.
idea_spark.risk: Malliavin calculus may fail under non-smooth noise; regularity conditions need verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: The use of Malliavin calculus for multiplicative noise can inspire applications in stochastic control or filtering.

papers.title: The Wooding problem revisited
papers.summary: The threshold conditions to convective instability in a semi-infinite porous layer saturated by a fluid are determined. The classical setup for this problem in geothermal fluid dynamics was originally modelled by Wooding in 1960. Its formulation is here reconsidered to allow for an imperfect heat transfer across the boundary, parametrised through the Biot number. The temperature boundary condition considered by Wooding is here recovered as the limit of an infinite Biot number. The linear stability analysis of the stationary boundary layer which establishes in the porous medium when a boundary steady suction occurs is carried out. Two different versions of the Rayleigh number are considered, namely, a temperature-difference-based version and a heat-flux-based version. While the former is the classical Rayleigh number for flow in porous media, the latter is a variant definition which displays a finite limit at neutral stability in both the opposite limiting cases of an infinite or of a zero Biot number.

ai.tldr: 重新审视Wooding问题，考虑边界非完美传热（Biot数），对半无限多孔介质中的对流不稳定性进行线性稳定性分析。
ai.motivation: 经典Wooding模型假设完美传热（无限Biot数），实际边界传热不完美，需推广模型。
ai.method: 引入Biot数参数化边界传热，对稳态边界层进行线性稳定性分析，考虑两种Rayleigh数定义。
ai.result: 温度差和热流两种Rayleigh数在中性稳定条件下，无限和零Biot数极限均存在有限值。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解边界传热条件对多孔介质对流不稳定性的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 将Biot数引入其他经典对流稳定性问题（如Rayleigh-Bénard对流）。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设半无限介质和稳态吸力，实际系统可能更复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 边界传热条件对稳定性阈值有显著影响，启发实验设计时需精确控制边界热交换。

zh.tldr: 重新审视Wooding问题，考虑边界非完美传热（Biot数），对半无限多孔介质中的对流不稳定性进行线性稳定性分析。

idea_spark.inspiration: 边界传热条件对稳定性阈值有显著影响，启发实验设计时需精确控制边界热交换。

en.tldr: Revisits the Wooding problem by incorporating imperfect heat transfer at the boundary (Biot number) and performs linear stability analysis of the stationary boundary layer in a semi-infinite porous medium.
en.motivation: The classical Wooding model assumes perfect heat transfer (infinite Biot number), but real boundaries are imperfect, necessitating a generalized model.
en.method: Introduces the Biot number to parametrize boundary heat transfer, conducts linear stability analysis of the steady boundary layer, and considers two definitions of the Rayleigh number.
en.result: Both temperature-difference-based and heat-flux-based Rayleigh numbers yield finite limits at neutral stability for infinite and zero Biot numbers.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how boundary heat transfer conditions affect convective instability in porous media.

idea_spark.idea: Introduce the Biot number into other classical convection stability problems (e.g., Rayleigh-Bénard convection).
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes a semi-infinite medium and steady suction; real systems may be more complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Boundary heat transfer conditions significantly influence stability thresholds, inspiring experimental designs with precise control of boundary heat exchange.

papers.title: Handling Overtime Constraints in Mixed Integer Linear Programming for Surgical Scheduling: A Comparison of Neural Network and Classical Linearization Techniques
papers.summary: Uncertainty in surgery durations continues to be difficult to account for in operating room scheduling. In particular, it remains complex to accurately incorporate uncertainty in surgical overtime constraints within mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) models. Therefore, we propose a method that integrates feedforward neural networks (FNNs) into MILP models to approximate the total surgery duration in these overtime constraints. The proposed approach is evaluated using real-life hospital data and compared against two classical approaches: scenario-based modelling and piecewise linear function approximations. We demonstrate that with a relatively small FNN, we achieve competitive operating room schedules in terms of both solution quality and computational performance. The FNN-based approach is the most computationally efficient with an optimality gap lower than 2% in all cases, achieves the highest operating room utilization in six out of eight considered cases, and on average produces simulated overtime probabilities closest to the predefined target.

ai.tldr: 提出将前馈神经网络集成到混合整数线性规划中，以处理手术排程中的超时约束，并在真实医院数据上验证了其竞争性的调度质量和计算效率。
ai.motivation: 手术时长的不确定性使得在手术室排程中准确纳入超时约束非常困难，现有方法难以兼顾精度和计算效率。
ai.method: 将小型前馈神经网络嵌入MILP模型，近似总手术时长，并与基于场景和分段线性函数两种经典方法对比。
ai.result: FNN方法在所有案例中最优间隙低于2%，在8个案例中6个达到最高手术室利用率，平均模拟超时概率最接近预设目标。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用神经网络处理混合整数规划中的非线性约束，提升手术排程的实用性和效率。

idea_spark.idea: 探索使用更复杂的神经网络结构（如LSTM或Transformer）捕捉手术时长的时间依赖模式。
idea_spark.risk: 神经网络近似可能引入不可预测的误差，尤其在极端手术时长情况下，需要谨慎验证泛化能力。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将数据驱动的预测模型直接嵌入优化框架，实现端到端的决策支持系统。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将数据驱动的预测模型直接嵌入优化框架，实现端到端的决策支持系统。

en.tldr: Proposes integrating feedforward neural networks into MILP to handle overtime constraints in surgical scheduling, achieving competitive solution quality and computational efficiency on real hospital data.
en.motivation: Uncertainty in surgery durations makes it difficult to accurately incorporate overtime constraints in MILP models, and existing methods struggle with both accuracy and efficiency.
en.method: Embeds a small FNN into MILP to approximate total surgery duration, and compares with scenario-based modeling and piecewise linear function approximations.
en.result: FNN approach achieves optimality gap below 2% in all cases, highest OR utilization in 6 out of 8 cases, and simulated overtime probabilities closest to the target.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to use neural networks to handle nonlinear constraints in MILP, improving practicality and efficiency of surgical scheduling.

idea_spark.idea: Explore more complex neural architectures (e.g., LSTM or Transformer) to capture temporal dependencies in surgery durations.
idea_spark.risk: Neural network approximation may introduce unpredictable errors, especially for extreme surgery durations; careful validation of generalization is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Embed data-driven predictive models directly into optimization frameworks for end-to-end decision support systems.

papers.title: Sakawa-Shindo algorithm for optimal control of time-delay systems, with applications to epidemiology
papers.summary: We extend the Sakawa-Shindo algorithm to solve optimal control problems where the system dynamics involve an arbitrary number of discrete state delays. We prove that the algorithm guarantees termination in a finite number of steps, asymptotic first-order optimality of the generated control sequence and convergence of a subsequence to a control satisfying first-order optimality, and we apply it to the optimal design of non-pharmaceutical interventions and vaccination plans for epidemic models with delays associated with incubation period and vaccination.

ai.tldr: 将Sakawa-Shindo算法扩展到具有任意多个离散状态时滞的系统，证明其有限步终止、渐近一阶最优性，并应用于流行病模型中的非药物干预和疫苗接种优化。
ai.motivation: 现有最优控制方法难以处理流行病模型中因潜伏期和疫苗接种产生的多个时滞，需要一种保证收敛且实用的算法。
ai.method: 扩展Sakawa-Shindo算法，处理任意多个离散状态时滞，并给出有限步终止和最优性证明。
ai.result: 算法在有限步内终止，生成的控制序列满足渐近一阶最优性，且存在子序列收敛到一阶最优控制。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可证明收敛的时滞系统最优控制算法，可直接用于设计流行病干预策略。

idea_spark.idea: 结合强化学习在线调整时滞参数，实现自适应最优控制。
idea_spark.risk: 时滞估计误差可能导致控制性能下降，需鲁棒性分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将有限步终止性质与模型预测控制结合，减少计算负担。

zh.tldr: 将Sakawa-Shindo算法扩展到具有任意多个离散状态时滞的系统，证明其有限步终止、渐近一阶最优性，并应用于流行病模型中的非药物干预和疫苗接种优化。

idea_spark.inspiration: 将有限步终止性质与模型预测控制结合，减少计算负担。

en.tldr: Extends the Sakawa-Shindo algorithm to systems with arbitrary discrete state delays, proves finite termination and asymptotic first-order optimality, and applies it to optimize non-pharmaceutical interventions and vaccination in epidemic models.
en.motivation: Existing optimal control methods struggle with multiple delays in epidemic models (e.g., incubation, vaccination), requiring a convergent and practical algorithm.
en.method: Extends the Sakawa-Shindo algorithm to handle any number of discrete state delays, with proofs of finite termination and optimality.
en.result: The algorithm terminates in finite steps, the generated control sequence is asymptotically first-order optimal, and a subsequence converges to a first-order optimal control.
en.help_to_user: Provides a provably convergent optimal control algorithm for time-delay systems, directly applicable to designing epidemic intervention strategies.

idea_spark.idea: Combine with reinforcement learning to adaptively tune delay parameters for online optimal control.
idea_spark.risk: Errors in delay estimation may degrade control performance; robustness analysis is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage the finite termination property with model predictive control to reduce computational burden.

papers.title: Boundary epsilon regularity for incompressible Navier--Stokes equations via weak-strong uniqueness
papers.summary: We show that finite-energy weak solutions to the incompressible Navier--Stokes equations on a three-dimensional bounded smooth domain are regular up to the boundary, provided that the $L^4_tL^4_x$-norm of the solution is smaller than a constant depending only on the domain. This answers a problem raised in [D. Albritton, T. Barker, and C. Prange, J. Math. Fluid Mech. 25 (2023), Paper No. 49]. Our proof relies on a new slicing construction near the boundary of the domain.

ai.tldr: 证明了三维有界光滑域上不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的有限能量弱解在边界附近的正则性，条件是解的L4_t L4_x范数小于仅依赖于域的常数。
ai.motivation: 解决[D. Albritton, T. Barker, and C. Prange, J. Math. Fluid Mech. 25 (2023), Paper No. 49]中提出的边界epsilon正则性问题。
ai.method: 在域边界附近构造新的切片结构，结合弱-强唯一性原理。
ai.result: 当解的L4_t L4_x范数足够小时，弱解在边界处是正则的。
ai.help_to_user: 为Navier-Stokes方程的边界正则性提供了新的充分条件，有助于理解湍流和边界层行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用弱-强唯一性将全局小性条件转化为边界局部正则性。
idea_spark.risk: 常数依赖于域的具体形状，可能难以显式计算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从流体力学中边界层理论出发，将整体小性条件与边界局部行为联系起来。

zh.tldr: 证明了三维有界光滑域上不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的有限能量弱解在边界附近的正则性，条件是解的L4_t L4_x范数小于仅依赖于域的常数。
zh.motivation: 解决[D. Albritton, T. Barker, and C. Prange, J. Math. Fluid Mech. 25 (2023), Paper No. 49]中提出的边界epsilon正则性问题。
