en.tldr: We prove that finite-energy weak solutions to the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations on a three-dimensional bounded smooth domain are regular up to the boundary, provided the L4_t L4_x norm of the solution is smaller than a domain-dependent constant.
en.motivation: To address a problem raised in [D. Albritton, T. Barker, and C. Prange, J. Math. Fluid Mech. 25 (2023), Paper No. 49] regarding boundary epsilon regularity.
en.method: A new slicing construction near the boundary, combined with weak-strong uniqueness.
en.result: Weak solutions are regular at the boundary when the L4_t L4_x norm is sufficiently small.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new sufficient condition for boundary regularity of Navier-Stokes equations, aiding understanding of turbulence and boundary layer behavior.

idea_spark.idea: Use weak-strong uniqueness to convert a global smallness condition into local boundary regularity.
idea_spark.risk: The constant depends on the specific domain shape, which may be difficult to compute explicitly.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by boundary layer theory in fluid dynamics, linking global smallness to local boundary behavior.

papers.title: Sharp Strichartz estimate for the 1D periodic Schrödinger equation
papers.summary: We prove the following estimate \[ \|{e^{it\partial_x^2}f}\|_{L_{(t,x)\in \mathbb{T}^2}^6}\leq C (\log N)^{1/6} \|f\|_{L^2_x(\mathbb{T})}, \] assuming $\mbox{supp} (\hat f)\subset [-N,N]$ for $N>1$. The bound $(\log N)^{1/6}$ is sharp in view of the lower bound by Bourgain \cite{Bourgain}.

ai.tldr: 证明了周期Schrödinger方程在初始数据频率受限时的最优Strichartz估计，上界为(log N)^{1/6}，与Bourgain下界匹配。
ai.motivation: 完善一维周期Schrödinger方程的Strichartz估计理论，确定精确的对数增长阶。
ai.method: 利用频率截断和振荡积分技巧，结合Bourgain的下界构造反例。
ai.result: 得到sharp上界(log N)^{1/6}，证明该估计不可改进。
ai.help_to_user: 为周期色散方程的时空估计提供精确的范数增长规律。

idea_spark.idea: 通过频率局部化和对偶论证，将问题转化为组合数论中的指数和估计。
idea_spark.risk: 高维周期情形可能涉及更复杂的共振结构，对数阶可能不同。
idea_spark.inspiration: Bourgain的下界构造提示了最优估计与算术序列的关联。

zh.tldr: 证明了周期Schrödinger方程在初始数据频率受限时的最优Strichartz估计，上界为(log N)^{1/6}，与Bourgain下界匹配。
zh.motivation: 完善一维周期Schrödinger方程的Strichartz估计理论，确定精确的对数增长阶。
zh.method: 利用频率截断和振荡积分技巧，结合Bourgain的下界构造反例。
zh.result: 得到sharp上界(log N)^{1/6}，证明该估计不可改进。
zh.help_to_user: 为周期色散方程的时空估计提供精确的范数增长规律。

idea_spark.idea: 通过频率局部化和对偶论证，将问题转化为组合数论中的指数和估计。
idea_spark.risk: 高维周期情形可能涉及更复杂的共振结构，对数阶可能不同。
idea_spark.inspiration: Bourgain的下界构造提示了最优估计与算术序列的关联。

en.tldr: Proves the sharp Strichartz estimate for the 1D periodic Schrödinger equation with frequency truncation, achieving the optimal logarithmic growth (log N)^{1/6} matching Bourgain's lower bound.
en.motivation: To determine the exact logarithmic growth order in the Strichartz estimate for the periodic Schrödinger equation in one dimension.
en.method: Frequency truncation combined with oscillatory integral estimates, and construction of counterexample following Bourgain's lower bound.
en.result: Established the sharp upper bound (log N)^{1/6}, showing the estimate cannot be improved.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise norm growth law for space-time estimates of periodic dispersive equations.

idea_spark.idea: Via frequency localization and duality, reduce the problem to exponential sum estimates in combinatorial number theory.
idea_spark.risk: Higher-dimensional periodic settings may involve more complex resonance structures, possibly altering the logarithmic exponent.
idea_spark.inspiration: Bourgain's lower bound construction hints at the connection between optimal estimates and arithmetic sequences.

papers.title: Non-uniqueness of nonlinear Markov processes in the sense of McKean associated with parabolic PDEs
papers.summary: We derive a general scheme to construct infinitely many probabilistic counterparts for solutions to nonlinear PDEs by recasting the latter as different nonlinear Fokker--Planck equations and by constructing, for each of these equations, a solution to the associated McKean--Vlasov SDE with one-dimensional time marginal densities given by the PDE solution. We utilize this scheme to prove that nonlinear Markov processes in the sense of McKean as introduced by Rehmeier--Röckner (J.\,Theor.\,Probab. 38, 60 (2025)) are not uniquely determined by their one-dimensional time marginals. This is in sharp contrast to the case of classical Markov processes, which are uniquely determined by their one-dimensional time marginals. We demonstrate our results by constructing a continuum of nonlinear Markov processes with one-dimensional time marginal densities given by the Barenblatt solutions to the porous medium and $p$-Laplace equations, as well as by the fundamental solution to the heat equation. This includes a novel martingale representation for the $p$-Laplace Barenblatt solutions. We also prove that a nonlinear Markov process is uniquely determined by its two-dimensional time marginals. Moreover, for the porous medium equation, we show that the different McKean--Vlasov SDEs we investigate are consistent with corresponding gradient flow interpretations of the equation in the sense of Otto calculus.

ai.tldr: 本文证明，在McKean意义下的非线性马尔可夫过程不能由其单时边际分布唯一确定，这与经典马尔可夫过程形成鲜明对比。
ai.motivation: 经典马尔可夫过程由其单时边际分布唯一确定，但非线性情形是否成立尚不清楚。
ai.method: 将非线性PDE重新表述为不同的非线性Fokker-Planck方程，并为每个方程构造相应的McKean-Vlasov SDE解。
ai.result: 构造了无穷多个不同的非线性马尔可夫过程，它们具有相同的单时边际密度（如多孔介质方程和p-Laplace方程的Barenblatt解），并证明双时边际分布可唯一确定该过程。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解非线性马尔可夫过程与经典马尔可夫过程在唯一性上的本质区别，并提供构造反例的系统方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用不同非线性Fokker-Planck方程对应不同McKean-Vlasov SDE，从而生成多个概率表示。
idea_spark.risk: 构造的SDE可能缺乏实际物理意义或数值稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Otto微积分梯度流解释出发，寻找与多孔介质方程一致的SDE族。

en.tldr: This paper proves that nonlinear Markov processes in the sense of McKean are not uniquely determined by their one-dimensional time marginals, in sharp contrast to classical Markov processes.
en.motivation: Classical Markov processes are uniquely determined by their one-dimensional time marginals, but it was unclear whether the same holds for nonlinear Markov processes.
en.method: Recast nonlinear PDEs as different nonlinear Fokker-Planck equations and construct, for each, a solution to the associated McKean-Vlasov SDE with one-dimensional time marginal densities given by the PDE solution.
en.result: Constructed infinitely many distinct nonlinear Markov processes sharing the same one-dimensional time marginal densities (e.g., Barenblatt solutions of porous medium and p-Laplace equations), and proved that two-dimensional time marginals uniquely determine the process.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the fundamental difference in uniqueness between nonlinear and classical Markov processes, and provides a systematic method for constructing counterexamples.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit the fact that different nonlinear Fokker-Planck equations correspond to different McKean-Vlasov SDEs, generating multiple probabilistic representations.
idea_spark.risk: The constructed SDEs may lack physical interpretability or numerical stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage gradient flow interpretations in the sense of Otto calculus to find families of SDEs consistent with the porous medium equation.

papers.title: Reconfiguring flexibility in renewable power-to-ammonia systems using molten-salt thermal energy storage in the ammonia synthesis loop: A coordinated electro-hydrogen-thermal scheduling approach
papers.summary: In renewable power-to-ammonia (ReP2A) systems, the intermittency of wind and solar generation propagates through electrolytic hydrogen production and induces thermal instability in the ammonia synthesis reactor (ASR). The resulting temperature cycling accelerates fatigue and shortens service life, while reactor thermal inertia limits flexible start-up, shutdown, and load adjustment. To address this issue, this study integrates molten-salt thermal energy storage (MS-TES) into the Haber-Bosch synthesis loop and develops a coordinated electro-hydrogen-thermal scheduling framework. MS-TES decouples hydrogen supply fluctuations from reactor thermal dynamics by enabling hot standby operation and sustained thermal support during start-up and low-load conditions. A state-space model is established to capture the thermal dynamics of the ASR and MS-TES. Based on this model, an optimal scheduling program coordinates ammonia synthesis operation with hydrogen production, battery energy storage (BES), and hydrogen storage (HS). The problem is formulated as a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) and extended with information gap decision theory (IGDT) to address renewable uncertainty. Case studies based on an industrial-scale project in northern China show that MS-TES enhances reactor thermal stability and system-level flexibility, while diminishing the marginal benefit of large BES capacity. As a result, a configuration combining small BES, HS, and MS-TES achieves near-equivalent performance to large-BES systems, with lower investment and improved economic returns. Year-round simulations further show that MS-TES avoids ASR start-up and shutdown and delivers consistently higher net revenue under variable renewable conditions.

ai.tldr: 提出在可再生电力制氨系统中将熔盐储热集成到氨合成回路，并通过电-氢-热协同调度提升系统灵活性与经济性。
ai.motivation: 风电和光伏的间歇性导致电解制氢波动，进而引起氨合成反应器温度循环，加速疲劳并缩短寿命；同时反应器热惯性限制了灵活启停和负荷调节。
ai.method: 在哈伯-博世合成回路中集成熔盐储热，建立状态空间模型描述反应器与储热的热动态，构建混合整数线性规划调度模型，并采用信息间隙决策理论处理可再生能源不确定性。
ai.result: 熔盐储热增强了反应器热稳定性和系统灵活性，降低了大型电池储能的边际效益；小电池+氢储+熔盐储热的配置在投资更低的情况下达到与大型电池系统相近的性能，全年模拟显示可避免反应器启停并提高净收益。
ai.help_to_user: 为可再生电力制氨系统的灵活运行和储能配置提供了优化方法和决策支持。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将熔盐储热与电加热耦合，在可再生能源过剩时直接加热储热介质，进一步降低对电解槽的依赖。
idea_spark.risk: 熔盐储热系统的初始投资和高温腐蚀问题可能影响实际经济性，需结合具体项目进行详细评估。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用热储能替代部分电池储能，实现多能互补，启发其他工业脱碳场景中热-电-化协同调度设计。

en.tldr: Integrating molten-salt thermal energy storage into the ammonia synthesis loop and coordinating electro-hydrogen-thermal scheduling improves flexibility and economics in renewable power-to-ammonia systems.
en.motivation: Intermittent wind and solar generation causes fluctuations in electrolytic hydrogen production, leading to temperature cycling in the ammonia synthesis reactor that accelerates fatigue and shortens lifespan; reactor thermal inertia also limits flexible start-up, shutdown, and load adjustment.
en.method: Molten-salt thermal energy storage is integrated into the Haber-Bosch synthesis loop. A state-space model captures the thermal dynamics of the reactor and storage. An optimal scheduling problem is formulated as a mixed-integer linear program and extended with information gap decision theory to handle renewable uncertainty.
en.result: Molten-salt thermal energy storage enhances reactor thermal stability and system flexibility, reducing the marginal benefit of large battery capacity. A configuration with small battery, hydrogen storage, and molten-salt thermal storage achieves near-equivalent performance to large-battery systems at lower investment, and year-round simulations show avoided reactor start-up/shutdown and higher net revenue.
en.help_to_user: Provides optimization methods and configuration guidance for flexible operation and energy storage design in renewable power-to-ammonia systems.

idea_spark.idea: Explore coupling molten-salt storage with electric heating to directly store excess renewable energy as heat, further reducing reliance on electrolyzers.
idea_spark.risk: High initial investment and potential corrosion issues of molten-salt systems may affect practical economics, requiring detailed project-specific assessment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using thermal storage to partially replace battery storage enables multi-energy complementarity, inspiring similar electro-thermal-chemical scheduling designs in other industrial decarbonization scenarios.

papers.title: Implications of weak convergence rates of Markov transition kernels
papers.summary: This article extends weak convergence bounds of Markov transition kernels to convergence bounds on the variance of the Markov kernel applied to Lipschitz functions. In the reversible case, weak convergence rates of the transition kernels imply chi-squared divergence convergence bounds if the density of the initialization measure is Lipschitz. These results provide new tools to establish central limit theorems for Lipschitz functions used in Markov chain Monte Carlo simulations. Applications are explored to the stability of Metropolis-Hastings algorithms in high dimensions, stochastic gradient descent, and solutions to stochastic delay equations.

ai.tldr: 本文扩展了马尔可夫转移核的弱收敛速率到Lipschitz函数方差的收敛界，并应用于高维Metropolis-Hastings算法、随机梯度下降和随机延迟方程。
ai.motivation: 现有弱收敛界仅针对分布本身，缺乏对函数方差的直接控制，而方差是中心极限定理和MCMC可靠性的关键。
ai.method: 利用可逆马尔可夫链的谱理论，将弱收敛速率转化为χ²散度收敛界，前提是初始测度密度为Lipschitz。
ai.result: 建立了弱收敛速率与方差收敛之间的桥梁，为Lipschitz函数的中心极限定理提供了新工具。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解MCMC算法在高维和复杂动态系统中的收敛行为，指导算法设计和诊断。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Lipschitz函数类构造自适应MCMC步长调整准则，基于方差界实时监控收敛。
idea_spark.risk: Lipschitz常数可能随维度增长，导致界在实际高维问题中过于保守。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合谱间隙与函数光滑性，设计更紧的收敛诊断指标。

en.tldr: This paper extends weak convergence rates of Markov transition kernels to variance bounds for Lipschitz functions, with applications to high-dimensional Metropolis-Hastings, stochastic gradient descent, and stochastic delay equations.
en.motivation: Existing weak convergence bounds only target distributions, lacking direct control over function variance, which is crucial for central limit theorems and MCMC reliability.
en.method: Using spectral theory of reversible Markov chains, weak convergence rates are translated into chi-squared divergence bounds, provided the initial density is Lipschitz.
en.result: A bridge between weak convergence rates and variance convergence is established, providing new tools for central limit theorems for Lipschitz functions.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand convergence behavior of MCMC in high dimensions and complex dynamics, guiding algorithm design and diagnostics.

idea_spark.idea: Use Lipschitz function classes to construct adaptive MCMC step-size tuning criteria, monitoring convergence in real time via variance bounds.
idea_spark.risk: Lipschitz constants may grow with dimension, making bounds overly conservative in practical high-dimensional problems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine spectral gap with function smoothness to design tighter convergence diagnostics.

papers.title: On nonnegative solutions of the parabolic differential inequality with $(p,q)$-Laplace on Riemannian manifolds
papers.summary: In this paper, we establish Liouville-type theorems for parabolic differential inequalities with $(p,q)-$Laplacian operator on Riemannian manifolds. By a test function argument, we establish nonexistence results under suitable weighted volume growth assumptions involving potential. In particular, we can obtain nonexistence results for a wider class of parabolic inequalities.

ai.tldr: 本文在黎曼流形上建立了带(p,q)-拉普拉斯算子的抛物型微分不等式的刘维尔型定理，通过测试函数论证在加权体积增长条件下得到非存在性结果。
ai.motivation: 研究黎曼流形上抛物型微分不等式解的非存在性，推广已有的刘维尔型结果。
ai.method: 采用测试函数论证，结合加权体积增长假设。
ai.result: 在适当的加权体积增长条件下，证明了抛物型不等式非平凡非负解的不存在性。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解流形上退化抛物方程解的性质提供理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将加权体积增长条件与非线性算子结合，可能导出更一般的非存在性准则。
idea_spark.risk: 加权体积假设可能难以验证，且结果对算子形式敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑更一般的非线性扩散算子或带时间依赖的势函数。

en.tldr: This paper establishes Liouville-type theorems for parabolic differential inequalities with the (p,q)-Laplacian on Riemannian manifolds, proving nonexistence results under weighted volume growth conditions via a test function argument.
en.motivation: To study the nonexistence of solutions for parabolic differential inequalities on manifolds, extending known Liouville-type results.
en.method: Test function argument combined with weighted volume growth assumptions.
en.result: Nonexistence of nontrivial nonnegative solutions for a class of parabolic inequalities under suitable weighted volume growth.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for understanding solutions of degenerate parabolic equations on manifolds.

idea_spark.idea: Combining weighted volume growth with nonlinear operators may yield more general nonexistence criteria.
idea_spark.risk: Weighted volume assumptions may be hard to verify, and results are sensitive to operator form.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider more general nonlinear diffusion operators or time-dependent potentials.

papers.title: The optimal betting wealth growth rate
papers.summary: This paper characterizes the best possible rate of growth of wealth in a Kelly betting game when repeatedly betting against a general i.i.d. null hypothesis $\mathscr{P}$, but the data are drawn i.i.d from an arbitrary alternative $Q$. We prove that it equals $\lim_{n \to \infty}n^{-1}\inf_{P \in (\mathscr P)^n)^{\circ\circ}} \mathrm{KL}(Q^n,P)$, where ${\mathscr P}^n = \{P^n: P \in \mathscr{P}\}$ and $(\mathscr {P}^n)^{\circ\circ}$ is its bipolar, i.e., this rate is achievable and one cannot do better. This quantity is in general smaller than a more popular quantity in the literature, $\mathrm{KL}_{\inf}(Q,\mathscr{P}) := \inf_{P \in \mathscr P}\mathrm{KL}(Q,P)$. If $\mathrm{KL}_{\mathrm{inf}}(\cdot,\mathscr P)$ is weakly lowersemicontinuous (w.l.s.c.) at $Q$, we show that the two quantities are equal; in particular, this happens when $\mathscr P$ is weakly compact. For simple alternatives, we provide the first matching necessary and sufficient condition for when power-one sequential tests exist (without assumptions on $\mathscr P, Q$). We also derive the optimal worst-case growth rate against composite $\mathscr Q$. We emphasize that test supermartingales on reduced filtrations suffice for all i.i.d. testing problems, and more general e-processes are not required. We thus completely generalize the recent results of Larsson et al.~\cite{larsson2025numeraire} to the sequential setting.

ai.tldr: 本文刻画了在重复Kelly博弈中，针对一般独立同分布零假设的最优财富增长率，并证明其等于一个基于双极的KL散度极限值。
ai.motivation: 经典Kelly准则假设零假设已知，但实际中常面临未知或复合的备择假设，需要更一般的增长率上界。
ai.method: 利用双极（bipolar）和KL散度的极限下确界，结合测试超鞅（test supermartingales）方法，推导最优增长率。
ai.result: 最优增长率等于n^{-1} inf_{P in (P^n)^{oo}} KL(Q^n,P)，通常小于文献中常用的KL_inf(Q,P)；当KL_inf(·,P)弱下半连续时两者相等。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在不确定分布下如何最大化长期财富增长率，并给出存在功率一序贯检验的充要条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将测试超鞅限制在缩减滤子上足以处理所有独立同分布检验问题，无需更一般的e过程。
idea_spark.risk: 弱下半连续条件在实际中可能不易验证，限制了直接应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典Kelly博弈出发，利用泛函分析工具（双极）推广到复合假设，启发其他博弈论或信息论问题的类似推广。

zh.tldr: 本文刻画了在重复Kelly博弈中，针对一般独立同分布零假设的最优财富增长率，并证明其等于一个基于双极的KL散度极限值。
zh.motivation: 经典Kelly准则假设零假设已知，但实际中常面临未知或复合的备择假设，需要更一般的增长率上界。
zh.method: 利用双极（bipolar）和KL散度的极限下确界，结合测试超鞅（test supermartingales）方法，推导最优增长率。
zh.result: 最优增长率等于n^{-1} inf_{P in (P^n)^{oo}} KL(Q^n,P)，通常小于文献中常用的KL_inf(Q,P)；当KL_inf(·,P)弱下半连续时两者相等。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解在不确定分布下如何最大化长期财富增长率，并给出存在功率一序贯检验的充要条件。

idea_spark.idea: 将测试超鞅限制在缩减滤子上足以处理所有独立同分布检验问题，无需更一般的e过程。
idea_spark.risk: 弱下半连续条件在实际中可能不易验证，限制了直接应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从经典Kelly博弈出发，利用泛函分析工具（双极）推广到复合假设，启发其他博弈论或信息论问题的类似推广。

en.tldr: This paper characterizes the optimal wealth growth rate in a repeated Kelly betting game against a general i.i.d. null hypothesis, proving it equals a bipolar-based KL divergence limit.
en.motivation: Classical Kelly criterion assumes known null hypothesis, but real scenarios often involve unknown or composite alternatives, requiring a more general growth rate bound.
en.method: Using bipolar and infimum of KL divergence limits, combined with test supermartingales, to derive the optimal growth rate.
en.result: The optimal growth rate equals n^{-1} inf_{P in (P^n)^{oo}} KL(Q^n,P), generally smaller than the popular KL_inf(Q,P); equality holds when KL_inf(·,P) is weakly lower semicontinuous at Q.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to maximize long-term wealth growth under uncertain distributions, and provides necessary and sufficient conditions for power-one sequential tests.

idea_spark.idea: Test supermartingales on reduced filtrations suffice for all i.i.d. testing problems, without needing more general e-processes.
idea_spark.risk: The weak lower semicontinuity condition may be hard to verify in practice, limiting direct application.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from classical Kelly betting, using functional analysis tools (bipolar) to generalize to composite hypotheses inspires similar extensions in other game-theoretic or information-theoretic problems.

papers.title: A multi-stage soft computing framework for complex disease modelling and decision support: A liver cirrhosis case study
papers.summary: Liver cirrhosis is a major global health problem causing millions of deaths annually, and timely detection with aggressive treatment can significantly improve patients' quality of life. Modelling complex diseases from biomedical data is computationally challenging due to high dimensionality, strong feature correlations, noise, and limited labelled samples. Conventional Machine Learning (ML) pipelines often struggle with robustness, interpretability, and generalisation under such conditions. In this study, we propose an ML-driven multi-stage decision framework for complex disease modelling and therapeutic exploration. The framework integrates single-cell transcriptomic profiling, high-dimensional network-based feature stabilisation, multi-model learning, deep representation construction, and post-hoc decision support. Specifically, single-cell sequencing data were analysed to identify key cellular subpopulations, followed by high-dimensional weighted gene co-expression network analysis (hdWGCNA) to stabilise gene modules under sparsity and noise. To enhance non-linear feature interaction modelling, tabular molecular features were restructured into two-dimensional disease maps and analysed using a CNN. Finally, molecular docking was incorporated as a decision-support module to evaluate candidate therapeutic compounds. Using liver cirrhosis as a representative case, the framework identified a disease-associated endothelial subpopulation and extracted seven robust signature genes (HSPB1, GADD45A, CLDN5, ATP1B3, C1QBP, ENPP2, and PARL). The CNN-based representation learning module outperformed conventional pipelines in classification. The framework is disease-agnostic and readily extends to other omics-driven biomedical applications involving uncertainty, heterogeneity, and limited samples.

ai.tldr: 提出一个多阶段软计算框架，整合单细胞转录组、高维网络特征稳定、多模型学习、CNN深度表示和分子对接，以肝硬化为例验证了疾病建模与治疗决策支持的有效性。
ai.motivation: 肝硬化等复杂疾病建模面临高维、强相关、噪声和样本少等挑战，传统机器学习鲁棒性、可解释性和泛化能力不足。
ai.method: 框架包括：单细胞测序分析识别关键细胞亚群；高维加权基因共表达网络分析（hdWGCNA）稳定基因模块；将表格分子特征重构为二维疾病图并用CNN建模；最后用分子对接评估候选化合物。
ai.result: 识别出疾病相关内皮细胞亚群和7个稳健特征基因（HSPB1等），CNN表示学习模块在分类上优于传统流程。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种疾病无关的、可处理不确定性和小样本的复杂疾病建模与药物筛选集成方案。

idea_spark.idea: 将分子特征重构为二维图像并用CNN学习，可能捕获传统表格模型忽略的非线性交互模式。
idea_spark.risk: 二维重构可能丢失原始特征的空间或拓扑信息，且CNN训练需要足够样本以避免过拟合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合单细胞分辨率与网络稳定性分析，为精准医学中的早期诊断和个性化治疗提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a multi-stage soft computing framework integrating single-cell transcriptomics, high-dimensional network feature stabilization, multi-model learning, CNN deep representation, and molecular docking, validated on liver cirrhosis for disease modeling and therapeutic decision support.
en.motivation: Complex disease modeling faces challenges of high dimensionality, strong feature correlations, noise, and limited labeled samples, where conventional ML pipelines lack robustness, interpretability, and generalization.
en.method: The framework includes: single-cell sequencing to identify key cellular subpopulations; high-dimensional weighted gene co-expression network analysis (hdWGCNA) to stabilize gene modules; restructuring tabular molecular features into 2D disease maps for CNN analysis; and molecular docking for candidate compound evaluation.
en.result: Identified a disease-associated endothelial subpopulation and seven robust signature genes (HSPB1, GADD45A, CLDN5, ATP1B3, C1QBP, ENPP2, PARL). The CNN representation learning module outperformed conventional pipelines in classification.
en.help_to_user: Provides a disease-agnostic integrated framework for complex disease modeling and drug screening that handles uncertainty, heterogeneity, and small sample sizes.

idea_spark.idea: Restructuring molecular features into 2D images for CNN learning may capture nonlinear interaction patterns missed by traditional tabular models.
idea_spark.risk: 2D restructuring may lose original spatial or topological information, and CNN training requires sufficient samples to avoid overfitting.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining single-cell resolution with network stability analysis offers new avenues for early diagnosis and personalized treatment in precision medicine.

papers.title: The Singular Behaviour of Ambipolar Diffusion Revealed by 1D Cartesian Solutions
papers.summary: Aims. We seek to (a) study 1D Cartesian ambipolar diffusion near null points; (b) characterise the nonlinear eigenmodes for ambipolar diffusion; (c) propose tests for ambipolar diffusion solvers in MHD codes.   Methods. (a) Direct analysis is used to find analytical solutions for ambipolar diffusion. (b) To study the eigenmodes, we solve the ODE for self-similar solutions of the 1D ambipolar diffusion equation using phase-plane techniques. We also solve the general time-dependent 1D problem for initial conditions of interest. (c) We test the Bifrost code by trying to reproduce the behaviour of the eigenmodes.   Results. (a) A stagnation-point flow solution was found with a uniform flux transfer rate across three regions: an external advection region; an internal ambipolar diffusion region with magnetic profile B propto x**(1/3); and an innermost Ohmic region with B propto x; in the latter, flux annihilation occurs at a rate imposed by the advection. (b) Both symmetric and antisymmetric eigenmode solutions to the ambipolar diffusion problem are found with sharp current sheets at the internal nulls. The time evolution of the eigenmodes (pure or perturbed) is probed, showing how higher-order eigenmodes, or perturbed ones, evolve in time towards the lowest-order allowable eigenmodes. (c) The Bifrost code reproduces the behaviour of the eigenmodes with excellent accuracy.   Conclusions. Stagnation-point configurations exist with ambipolar diffusion carrying magnetic flux in an inner layer and serving as an intermediary between the external advection and an Ohmic-diffusion core around the null. Our tests are compatible with the hypothesis that zero-flux higher harmonics of the self-similar equation evolve toward either the first symmetric or antisymmetric harmonic. The self-similar solutions can serve as strong tests for ambipolar diffusion solvers in general MHD codes.

ai.tldr: 通过一维笛卡尔解揭示了双极扩散在零点附近的奇异行为，包括驻点流解、非线性本征模以及磁通量湮灭机制。
ai.motivation: 研究一维笛卡尔双极扩散在零点附近的行为，表征其非线性本征模，并为MHD代码中的双极扩散求解器提供测试。
ai.method: 直接分析获得解析解；利用相平面技术求解自相似ODE；用Bifrost代码复现本征模行为。
ai.result: 发现驻点流解，磁剖面在双极扩散区呈x^(1/3)，在欧姆区呈x；对称和反对称本征模均存在尖锐电流片；Bifrost代码高精度复现本征模演化。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解双极扩散在零点附近的物理行为，并提供验证MHD代码双极扩散求解器的标准测试。

idea_spark.idea: 利用本征模的演化特性设计更高效的数值格式，或用于诊断实际天体物理中的磁通量输运。
idea_spark.risk: 一维假设可能限制在真实三维复杂磁场中的直接应用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从双极扩散的本征模演化联想到非线性波与耗散结构的相互作用，可启发对湍流中磁能级联的研究。

en.tldr: 1D Cartesian solutions reveal singular behavior of ambipolar diffusion near null points, including stagnation-point flow, nonlinear eigenmodes, and magnetic flux annihilation.
en.motivation: To study 1D Cartesian ambipolar diffusion near null points, characterize its nonlinear eigenmodes, and propose tests for ambipolar diffusion solvers in MHD codes.
en.method: Direct analysis for analytical solutions; phase-plane techniques for self-similar ODE; Bifrost code to reproduce eigenmode behavior.
en.result: Stagnation-point flow solution with magnetic profile B ∝ x^(1/3) in ambipolar region and B ∝ x in Ohmic core; symmetric and antisymmetric eigenmodes with sharp current sheets; Bifrost reproduces eigenmode evolution accurately.
en.help_to_user: Provides physical insight into ambipolar diffusion near null points and offers standard tests for validating ambipolar diffusion solvers in MHD codes.

idea_spark.idea: Use eigenmode evolution to design more efficient numerical schemes or diagnose magnetic flux transport in astrophysical contexts.
idea_spark.risk: 1D assumption may limit direct application to realistic 3D magnetic configurations.
idea_spark.inspiration: The eigenmode evolution of ambipolar diffusion inspires studies of nonlinear wave-dissipation interactions and turbulent magnetic energy cascades.

papers.title: On phase retrieval for continuous and discrete Fourier transforms
papers.summary: We continue studies on phase retrieval for continuous and discrete Fourier transforms in multidimensions. Using finite difference operators, we give a large class of unexpected examples of non-uniqueness for this problem, including examples with the sparsity condition. A prototype of this construction in the continuous case is given in the work Novikov, Xu (JFAA, 2026), using linear differential operators. The construction of the present work also yields a large class of non-trivial Pauli partners, i.e., different functions with the same intensities in both configuration and Fourier domains. Besides, our construction yields examples that solve an old open question in phase retrieval with background information arising in many areas including Fourier holography.

ai.tldr: 本文利用有限差分算子，构造了连续和离散傅里叶变换相位恢复问题中大量非唯一性的意外例子，包括满足稀疏条件的例子，并解决了傅里叶全息等领域中一个长期未解的问题。
ai.motivation: 相位恢复问题在多个领域有重要应用，但非唯一性现象尚未被充分理解，特别是存在稀疏约束时。
ai.method: 使用有限差分算子构造反例，并推广到连续情形，同时生成非平凡的Pauli对。
ai.result: 给出了大量非唯一性例子，包括稀疏情形，并解决了傅里叶全息中背景信息的开放问题。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解相位恢复问题的非唯一性边界，以及稀疏约束下的反例构造方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用有限差分算子生成具有相同傅里叶模量的不同函数，可用于设计新的相位恢复算法或验证现有算法的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 构造的反例可能过于特殊，难以直接应用于实际噪声环境。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从数学构造出发，启发在光学成像或全息术中利用背景信息改善相位恢复的唯一性。

en.tldr: This paper constructs a large class of unexpected non-uniqueness examples for phase retrieval in continuous and discrete Fourier transforms using finite difference operators, including sparse cases, and solves an open problem in Fourier holography.
en.motivation: Phase retrieval is widely applied but its non-uniqueness, especially under sparsity, is not fully understood.
en.method: Finite difference operators are used to construct counterexamples, extended to continuous case, yielding non-trivial Pauli partners.
en.result: A large class of non-uniqueness examples, including sparse ones, is provided, solving an open question in Fourier holography with background information.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the boundaries of non-uniqueness in phase retrieval and how to construct counterexamples under sparsity.

idea_spark.idea: Using finite difference operators to generate different functions with identical Fourier magnitudes can inspire new phase retrieval algorithms or robustness tests.
idea_spark.risk: Constructed examples may be too specific for practical noisy scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Mathematical constructions inspire using background information in optical imaging or holography to improve uniqueness in phase retrieval.

papers.title: The conformal dimension of the Brownian tree is one
papers.summary: The Brownian tree, also known as the continuum random tree, is a canonical random compact, geodesic $\mathbf R$-tree that arises as the universal scaling limit for numerous models of discrete random trees. A key quasisymmetric invariant of a metric space is its conformal dimension, defined as the infimum of the Hausdorff dimensions over all quasisymmetrically equivalent spaces. This value is always bounded below by the space's topological dimension and above by its Hausdorff dimension. In the present paper, we prove that the conformal dimension of the Brownian tree is $1$, matching its topological dimension.

ai.tldr: 证明了布朗树的共形维数为1，与其拓扑维数相等。
ai.motivation: 布朗树是许多离散随机树模型的普适缩放极限，其共形维数作为拟对称不变量尚未确定。
ai.method: 通过分析布朗树的拟对称等价类，计算其豪斯多夫维数的下确界。
ai.result: 布朗树的共形维数等于其拓扑维数1。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解随机度量空间的几何不变量。

idea_spark.idea: 探索其他随机度量空间的共形维数是否也等于拓扑维数。
idea_spark.risk: 拟对称等价类的构造可能复杂，需严格分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将拟对称不变量应用于网络或数据结构的维度分析。

en.tldr: Proves that the conformal dimension of the Brownian tree is 1, matching its topological dimension.
en.motivation: The Brownian tree is a universal scaling limit for many discrete random tree models, and its conformal dimension as a quasisymmetric invariant was unknown.
en.method: Analyzes quasisymmetric equivalence classes of the Brownian tree to compute the infimum of Hausdorff dimensions.
en.result: The conformal dimension of the Brownian tree equals its topological dimension, which is 1.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand geometric invariants of random metric spaces.

idea_spark.idea: Explore whether conformal dimension equals topological dimension for other random metric spaces.
idea_spark.risk: Construction of quasisymmetric equivalence classes may be complex and require rigorous analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply quasisymmetric invariants to dimension analysis of networks or data structures.

papers.title: Limitations of LTI Koopman Modeling for Nonlinear Control Systems
papers.summary: Koopman operator theory yields powerful tools for modeling, analysis, and control of nonlinear dynamical systems. Prominently, linear time-invariant (LTI) Koopman representations have been proposed to enable the application of linear control techniques, such as LQR and convex MPC. In this work, we investigate the implications of exact LTI Koopman representations for continuous-time nonlinear control systems. In particular, we show that, assuming a mild controllability condition and full-state observables, the dynamics of the underlying control system must be affine linear. Furthermore, we study the modeling bias introduced by the LTI structure and analyze its dependency on the choice of observables.

ai.tldr: 本文研究精确LTI Koopman表示对连续时间非线性控制系统的限制，证明在可控性和全状态可观测条件下，系统动力学必须是仿射线性的，并分析了LTI结构引入的建模偏差及其对观测函数选择的依赖。
ai.motivation: 探究LTI Koopman建模在非线性控制系统中的适用性边界，揭示其理论局限性。
ai.method: 通过理论推导，在可控性和全状态可观测假设下，证明精确LTI Koopman表示要求系统为仿射线性；并分析建模偏差与观测函数的关系。
ai.result: 精确LTI Koopman表示仅适用于仿射线性系统；LTI结构会引入建模偏差，该偏差依赖于观测函数的选择。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解何时可以使用LTI Koopman方法进行非线性控制，避免误用导致模型失配。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应观测函数选择策略，以最小化LTI Koopman建模偏差。
idea_spark.risk: 自适应策略可能增加计算复杂度，且理论保证需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从系统可控性和可观测性角度出发，重新审视线性化方法的理论基础。

zh.tldr: 本文研究精确LTI Koopman表示对连续时间非线性控制系统的限制，证明在可控性和全状态可观测条件下，系统动力学必须是仿射线性的，并分析了LTI结构引入的建模偏差及其对观测函数选择的依赖。
zh.motivation: 探究LTI Koopman建模在非线性控制系统中的适用性边界，揭示其理论局限性。
zh.method: 通过理论推导，在可控性和全状态可观测假设下，证明精确LTI Koopman表示要求系统为仿射线性；并分析建模偏差与观测函数的关系。
zh.result: 精确LTI Koopman表示仅适用于仿射线性系统；LTI结构会引入建模偏差，该偏差依赖于观测函数的选择。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解何时可以使用LTI Koopman方法进行非线性控制，避免误用导致模型失配。

idea_spark.idea: 设计自适应观测函数选择策略，以最小化LTI Koopman建模偏差。
idea_spark.risk: 自适应策略可能增加计算复杂度，且理论保证需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从系统可控性和可观测性角度出发，重新审视线性化方法的理论基础。

en.tldr: This paper investigates the limitations of exact LTI Koopman representations for continuous-time nonlinear control systems, proving that under mild controllability and full-state observability, the dynamics must be affine linear, and analyzes the modeling bias introduced by the LTI structure and its dependence on observable choice.
en.motivation: To explore the applicability boundaries of LTI Koopman modeling for nonlinear control systems and reveal its theoretical limitations.
en.method: Through theoretical derivation, under controllability and full-state observability assumptions, it proves that exact LTI Koopman representation requires affine linear dynamics; and analyzes the modeling bias in relation to observable choice.
en.result: Exact LTI Koopman representation is only applicable to affine linear systems; the LTI structure introduces modeling bias that depends on the choice of observables.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand when LTI Koopman methods can be used for nonlinear control, avoiding model mismatch due to misuse.

idea_spark.idea: Design an adaptive observable selection strategy to minimize LTI Koopman modeling bias.
idea_spark.risk: Adaptive strategies may increase computational complexity and require further theoretical guarantees.
idea_spark.inspiration: Re-examine the theoretical foundations of linearization methods from the perspective of system controllability and observability.

papers.title: Higher order Schrödinger operators
papers.summary: In this paper we consider higher order Schrödinger operators $$\mathcal L u=Lu+Vu,$$ where $L$ denotes a fourth order operator and $V\geq 0$ a suitable potential. We initiate our analysis by considering the constant coefficients differential operator $L=Δ^2$. Subsequently, we extend our results to more general operators $L$ featuring suitable variable coefficients. We are interested in domain characterization and generation properties of these operators in $L^p(\mathbb{R}^N)$ for $p \in (1, \infty)$. To address this problems we employ a noncommutative version of the Dore-Venni theorem due to Monniaux and Prüss and we prove that the $L^p$-realization of $\mathcal L$ is quasi sectorial and, consequently, generates an analytic semigroup. Furthermore, this approach allows for a sharp characterization of the operator's domain as the intersection of the domains of the bilaplacian and the multiplication operator. The required assumptions allow to treat potentials that grow at infinity like $|x|^r$ for some $r<4$.

ai.tldr: 本文研究四阶薛定谔算子在L^p空间中的定义域刻画与生成性质，利用非交换Dore-Venni定理证明其拟扇形性并生成解析半群。
ai.motivation: 高阶薛定谔算子在数学物理中具有重要应用，但其定义域和生成性质尚未完全清楚，特别是对于变系数算子和增长势函数。
ai.method: 采用Monniaux和Prüss的非交换Dore-Venni定理，将L^p实现转化为拟扇形算子，从而得到解析半群生成性。
ai.result: 证明了算子的L^p实现是拟扇形的，其定义域恰为双拉普拉斯算子与乘法算子定义域的交集，且允许势函数以|x|^r（r<4）增长。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解高阶薛定谔算子的函数空间性质提供了严格的数学框架，可用于偏微分方程和谱理论的研究。

idea_spark.idea: 将势函数增长条件放宽至r<4，可能启发对临界指数r=4情形的进一步研究。
idea_spark.risk: 非交换框架的适用性依赖于特定算子结构，对更一般的非线性势可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合半群理论与算子插值方法，可探索高阶算子在非L^p空间（如Orlicz空间）中的性质。

zh.tldr: 本文研究四阶薛定谔算子在L^p空间中的定义域刻画与生成性质，利用非交换Dore-Venni定理证明其拟扇形性并生成解析半群。

idea_spark.idea: 将势函数增长条件放宽至r<4，可能启发对临界指数r=4情形的进一步研究。
idea_spark.risk: 非交换框架的适用性依赖于特定算子结构，对更一般的非线性势可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合半群理论与算子插值方法，可探索高阶算子在非L^p空间（如Orlicz空间）中的性质。

en.tldr: This paper studies fourth-order Schrödinger operators in L^p spaces, proving their quasi-sectorial property and generation of analytic semigroups via the noncommutative Dore-Venni theorem, with a sharp domain characterization.
en.motivation: Higher-order Schrödinger operators are important in mathematical physics, but their domain and generation properties remain unclear, especially for variable coefficients and growing potentials.
en.method: The noncommutative Dore-Venni theorem by Monniaux and Prüss is employed to show that the L^p realization is quasi-sectorial, yielding an analytic semigroup.
en.result: The L^p realization is quasi-sectorial, its domain equals the intersection of the domains of the bilaplacian and the multiplication operator, and potentials growing like |x|^r with r<4 are allowed.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous functional analytic framework for higher-order Schrödinger operators, useful for PDE and spectral theory.

idea_spark.idea: Relaxing the potential growth condition to r<4 may inspire study of the critical case r=4.
idea_spark.risk: The noncommutative framework depends on specific operator structures and may fail for more general nonlinear potentials.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining semigroup theory with operator interpolation could explore properties in non-L^p spaces such as Orlicz spaces.

papers.title: Observer-Based State Feedback Controller for a Mindlin Plate Model in port-Hamiltonian framework
papers.summary: This paper generalises an early lumped observer-based state-feedback (OBSF) control design methodology, originally developed for one-dimensional (1-D) boundary-controlled port-Hamiltonian systems, to a two-dimensional (2-D) boundary-controlled Mindlin plate. To this end, the 2-D port-Hamiltonian Mindlin plate model is first introduced and then discretized using a structure-preserving finite-difference method on staggered grids. A controllability decomposition is subsequently applied to identify the controllable modes of the discretized model. Furthermore, the state-feedback and observer gains are designed so that the OBSF controller is strictly positive real. This guarantees the stability of the closed-loop system when the finite-dimensional OBSF controller is interconnected with the 2-D boundary-controlled Mindlin plate. Numerical simulations are finally presented to illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.

ai.tldr: 将一维边界控制端口哈密顿系统的观测器状态反馈控制方法推广到二维Mindlin板模型，通过保结构离散和可控性分解设计严格正实控制器，保证闭环稳定性。
ai.motivation: 现有观测器状态反馈控制方法仅适用于一维系统，需要将其扩展到二维边界控制端口哈密顿系统（如Mindlin板）以处理更复杂的结构振动控制问题。
ai.method: 首先引入二维端口哈密顿Mindlin板模型，采用交错网格保结构有限差分法离散；然后进行可控性分解识别可控模态；最后设计严格正实的观测器状态反馈控制器增益。
ai.result: 数值仿真验证了所提方法在二维Mindlin板边界控制中的有效性，闭环系统稳定。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种系统化的二维分布参数系统观测器状态反馈控制器设计框架，适用于结构振动抑制等工程应用。

idea_spark.idea: 结合自适应观测器或鲁棒控制技术，处理模型不确定性和外部扰动。
idea_spark.risk: 二维系统的可控性分解计算复杂度较高，可能限制实时实现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将严格正实条件与无源控制理论结合，为复杂分布参数系统的能量基控制提供新思路。

idea_spark.risk: 二维系统的可控性分解计算复杂度较高，可能限制实时实现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将严格正实条件与无源控制理论结合，为复杂分布参数系统的能量基控制提供新思路。

en.tldr: Extends observer-based state-feedback control from 1-D to 2-D boundary-controlled port-Hamiltonian systems, specifically a Mindlin plate, using structure-preserving discretization and controllability decomposition to design a strictly positive real controller ensuring closed-loop stability.
en.motivation: Existing observer-based state-feedback control methods are limited to 1-D systems; extending them to 2-D boundary-controlled port-Hamiltonian systems (e.g., Mindlin plate) is needed for more complex structural vibration control.
en.method: Introduces the 2-D port-Hamiltonian Mindlin plate model, discretizes it via a structure-preserving finite-difference method on staggered grids, applies controllability decomposition to identify controllable modes, and designs observer and state-feedback gains to make the controller strictly positive real.
en.result: Numerical simulations demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method for boundary control of the 2-D Mindlin plate, with guaranteed closed-loop stability.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic framework for designing observer-based state-feedback controllers for 2-D distributed parameter systems, applicable to structural vibration suppression.

idea_spark.idea: Combine with adaptive observers or robust control techniques to handle model uncertainties and external disturbances.
idea_spark.risk: Computational complexity of controllability decomposition for 2-D systems may hinder real-time implementation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Integrating strictly positive real conditions with passivity-based control offers new insights for energy-based control of complex distributed parameter systems.

papers.title: FED-FSTQ: Fisher-Guided Token Quantization for Communication-Efficient Federated Fine-Tuning of LLMs on Edge Devices
papers.summary: Federated fine-tuning provides a practical route to adapt large language models (LLMs) on edge devices without centralizing private data, yet in mobile deployments the training wall-clock is often bottlenecked by straggler-limited uplink communication under heterogeneous bandwidth and intermittent participation. Although parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) reduces trainable parameters, per-round payloads remain prohibitive in non-IID regimes, where uniform compression can discard rare but task-critical signals. We propose Fed-FSTQ, a Fisher-guided token quantization system primitive for communication-efficient federated LLM fine-tuning. Fed-FSTQ employs a lightweight Fisher proxy to estimate token sensitivity, coupling importance-aware token selection with non-uniform mixed-precision quantization to allocate higher fidelity to informative evidence while suppressing redundant transmission. The method is model-agnostic, serves as a drop-in module for standard federated PEFT pipelines, e.g., LoRA, without modifying the server aggregation rule, and supports bandwidth-heterogeneous clients via compact sparse message packing. Experiments on multilingual QA and medical QA under non-IID partitions show that Fed-FSTQ reduces cumulative uplink traffic required to reach a fixed quality threshold by 46x relative to a standard LoRA baseline, and improves end-to-end wall-clock time-to-accuracy by 52%. Furthermore, enabling Fisher-guided token reduction at inference yields up to a 1.55x end-to-end speedup on NVIDIA Jetson-class edge devices, demonstrating deployability under tight resource constraints.

ai.tldr: 提出Fed-FSTQ，一种基于Fisher信息的令牌量化方法，用于边缘设备上联邦微调大语言模型，显著减少通信开销并加速训练。
ai.motivation: 联邦微调大语言模型时，边缘设备的上行通信受异构带宽和间歇参与限制，均匀压缩会丢失稀有但关键信号。
ai.method: 使用轻量Fisher代理估计令牌敏感性，结合重要性感知令牌选择和非均匀混合精度量化，保留高信息量令牌，抑制冗余传输。
ai.result: 在非IID多语言QA和医学QA任务上，相比标准LoRA基线，累积上行流量减少46倍，端到端时间精度提升52%；推理时令牌减少带来1.55倍加速。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过Fisher引导的令牌量化实现高效联邦微调，适用于资源受限的边缘设备。

idea_spark.idea: 结合重要性感知和混合精度量化，在通信受限环境中优先保护关键信息。
idea_spark.risk: Fisher代理的近似可能引入偏差，需验证在不同数据分布下的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用模型梯度信息指导量化，启发更细粒度的通信优化方法。

zh.tldr: 提出Fed-FSTQ，一种基于Fisher信息的令牌量化方法，用于边缘设备上联邦微调大语言模型，显著减少通信开销并加速训练。
zh.motivation: 联邦微调大语言模型时，边缘设备的上行通信受异构带宽和间歇参与限制，均匀压缩会丢失稀有但关键信号。

idea_spark.risk: Fisher代理的近似可能引入偏差，需验证在不同数据分布下的鲁棒性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用模型梯度信息指导量化，启发更细粒度的通信优化方法。

en.tldr: Proposes Fed-FSTQ, a Fisher-guided token quantization method for communication-efficient federated fine-tuning of LLMs on edge devices, significantly reducing communication overhead and accelerating training.
en.motivation: Uplink communication in federated fine-tuning of LLMs on edge devices is bottlenecked by heterogeneous bandwidth and intermittent participation, and uniform compression discards rare but task-critical signals.
en.method: Uses a lightweight Fisher proxy to estimate token sensitivity, coupling importance-aware token selection with non-uniform mixed-precision quantization to preserve informative tokens and suppress redundant transmission.
en.result: On non-IID multilingual QA and medical QA tasks, reduces cumulative uplink traffic by 46x and improves end-to-end time-to-accuracy by 52% compared to standard LoRA baseline; inference token reduction yields 1.55x speedup.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how Fisher-guided token quantization enables efficient federated fine-tuning on resource-constrained edge devices.

idea_spark.idea: Combines importance-aware selection and mixed-precision quantization to prioritize critical information under communication constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Fisher proxy approximation may introduce bias; robustness across different data distributions needs validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using gradient information to guide quantization inspires finer-grained communication optimization methods.

papers.title: Benders Cut Filtering for Affine Potential-Based Flow Problems with Robustness Scenarios and Topology Switching
papers.summary: Many large-scale optimization problems decompose into a master problem and scenario subproblems, a structure that can be exploited by Benders decomposition. In Benders decomposition, each iteration may generate many cuts from scenario subproblems, and adding all of them as constraints then causes the master problem to grow rapidly. These are constraints that may need to be added to the master problem to guarantee optimality and feasibility of solutions, but we can avoid adding those constraints that are never violated. Adding fewer cuts per iteration can reduce the number of cuts added in total, but increase the number of iterations. In contrast, the cuts filtered for regular cut selection in mixed-integer programming solvers are optional and added exclusively to improve runtime behavior.   We study Benders cut filtering: given the Benders cuts produced in an iteration, which subset should be added to the master problem? To our knowledge, few prior works have studied this question. We propose violation-based filtering (retaining the most-violated cuts), diversity-based filtering via k-medoids clustering on pairwise cosine distances (adding an original cut closest to the cluster centroid), and a hybrid that selects a most-violated cut per cluster. Each strategy can be augmented with an aggregated cut that retains discarded information.   Computational experiments on 149 instances of an affine potential-based flow problem with topology switching and robustness scenarios -- solved via Benders decomposition -- show that all informed filtering strategies solve at least 125 instances (vs. 91 for the unfiltered baseline), reducing shifted geometric mean solve time by 55-57%. The hybrid strategy attains the best geometric mean (271.89 s vs. 629.34 s, a 57% reduction, p < 0.001).

ai.tldr: 提出Benders割过滤策略，通过保留最违反、基于聚类多样性或混合方法选择子问题割，减少主问题规模，在仿射势流问题中求解时间降低57%。
ai.motivation: Benders分解中每次迭代产生大量割，全部添加导致主问题迅速膨胀，增加求解负担。
ai.method: 提出三种过滤策略：基于违反程度保留最违反割、基于k-medoids聚类的多样性选择（取簇心最近割）、以及混合策略（每簇选最违反割）。可附加聚合割保留丢弃信息。
ai.result: 在149个仿射势流实例上，所有过滤策略至少解决125个（未过滤基线91个），几何平均求解时间降低55-57%，混合策略最优（271.89秒 vs 629.34秒，p<0.001）。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过智能选择Benders割来加速大规模优化问题的求解。

idea_spark.idea: 将聚类与违反程度结合，可能进一步利用图神经网络预测割的重要性。
idea_spark.risk: 聚类计算开销可能抵消部分加速收益，需平衡过滤成本与求解时间。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受混合整数规划中割选择启发，将可选割思想引入Benders分解。

zh.tldr: 提出Benders割过滤策略，通过保留最违反、基于聚类多样性或混合方法选择子问题割，减少主问题规模，在仿射势流问题中求解时间降低57%。
zh.motivation: Benders分解中每次迭代产生大量割，全部添加导致主问题迅速膨胀，增加求解负担。
zh.method: 提出三种过滤策略：基于违反程度保留最违反割、基于k-medoids聚类的多样性选择（取簇心最近割）、以及混合策略（每簇选最违反割）。可附加聚合割保留丢弃信息。
zh.result: 在149个仿射势流实例上，所有过滤策略至少解决125个（未过滤基线91个），几何平均求解时间降低55-57%，混合策略最优（271.89秒 vs 629.34秒，p<0.001）。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过智能选择Benders割来加速大规模优化问题的求解。

idea_spark.idea: 将聚类与违反程度结合，可能进一步利用图神经网络预测割的重要性。
idea_spark.risk: 聚类计算开销可能抵消部分加速收益，需平衡过滤成本与求解时间。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受混合整数规划中割选择启发，将可选割思想引入Benders分解。

en.tldr: Proposes Benders cut filtering strategies (violation-based, diversity-based via k-medoids clustering, and hybrid) to reduce master problem growth, achieving 57% solve time reduction on affine potential-based flow problems.
en.motivation: Adding all Benders cuts from scenario subproblems each iteration causes rapid master problem growth, increasing computational burden.
en.method: Three filtering strategies: retain most-violated cuts, select diverse cuts via k-medoids clustering on cosine distances (closest to centroid), and hybrid (most-violated per cluster). Optionally add an aggregated cut to retain discarded information.
en.result: On 149 instances, all informed strategies solve at least 125 (vs. 91 baseline), reducing shifted geometric mean solve time by 55-57%; hybrid best (271.89s vs 629.34s, p<0.001).
en.help_to_user: Helps users accelerate large-scale optimization by intelligently selecting Benders cuts.

idea_spark.idea: Combining clustering with violation scores could be enhanced by graph neural networks to predict cut importance.
idea_spark.risk: Clustering overhead may offset speed gains; trade-off between filtering cost and solve time must be managed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by optional cut selection in mixed-integer programming solvers, adapted to Benders decomposition.

papers.title: Long-time asymptotics of the Newell equation on the line
papers.summary: In 1978, A. C. Newell [SIAM J. Appl. Math. 35(4) (1978) 650-664] proposed an exactly solvable model called Newell equation, which simulates the investigation of significant interaction mechanism between long and short waves. Nearly fifty years have passed, yet the long-time asymptotics of the Newell equation remains an open problem to date, with no results reported. In this work, the long-time asymptotic behaviors of the solutions to this model under Schwartz class initial conditions are studied by using the Riemann-Hilbert formulation. Through direct and inverse scattering analysis, the corresponding Riemann-Hilbert problem is formulated, and its relationship with the solution to the initial-value problem of the Newell equation is established. The existence and uniqueness of the solution to the Riemann-Hilbert problem is proved by vanishing lemma. Subsequently, the asymptotic expressions of the solution to the initial-value problem in the dispersive wave region are obtained by using the Deift-Zhou nonlinear steepest descent method. This work extends Newell's original results, providing a rigorous proof for the findings presented in Section 4 of his paper, along with explicit expressions. Furthermore, the comparison between direct numerical simulations and the theoretical results obtained in this paper demonstrates the reliability of the asymptotic expressions.

en.motivation: The long-time asymptotics of the Newell equation, proposed in 1978, remained an open problem; this paper aims to fill that gap.

papers.title: Terminal Defects, Growing Multiplicity, and Variance Extremality in the Double Dixie Cup Problem
papers.summary: We develop a terminal-defect method for the double Dixie cup problem and use it to prove the finite-variance extremality conjecture of Doumas and Papanicolaou. For every \(m\ge1\) and \(N\ge2\), among all positive coupon probability vectors \(p=(p_1,\ldots,p_N)\), the variance of the time \(T_m(N)\) to collect \(m\) complete sets is uniquely minimized at the uniform vector. We prove the stronger radial statement that the variance is strictly increasing along every ray from the uniform vector. The proof is finite-\(N\) and exact: after Poissonization, the completion time is a maximum of independent Erlang variables, and the radial derivative of its distribution is compared to a size-biased law using a monotone-likelihood-ratio argument based on a log-scale monotonicity property of the Gamma reverse hazard.   The same framework gives a growing-multiplicity Gumbel theorem in the equal-probability case, with expectation and variance asymptotics on the inverse gamma-tail scale. This recovers the fixed-\(m\) equal-probability variance asymptotic stated as Conjecture 1 by Doumas and Papanicolaou, classically known for \(m=1\), and extends the mechanism to \(m=m_N\). We also illustrate the unequal-probability theory with endpoint-Laplace limits for power-law probabilities.

papers.title: $H^2$ Stabilization of the $2$-D and $3$-D Heat Equation via Modal Decomposition
papers.summary: Boundary controllers have been recently proposed in the literature, via modal decomposition, to achieve $H^1$ stabilization of linear parabolic equations in two and three dimensions. In one dimension ($1$-D), $H^1$ exponential stability is known to imply boundedness and asymptotic convergence of the state to zero in the sense of the max norm. However, in two ($2$-D) and three dimensions ($3$-D), this implication does not systematically hold. In this paper, focusing on the full-state feedback case, our objective is to prove that the modal-decomposition based controller in \cite{Munteanu2017IJC} guarantees, not only $H^1$ exponential stability, but also $H^2$ exponential stability. This implies, in particular, boundedness and asymptotic convergence of the state to zero in the sense of the max norm. Our approach consists in rewriting the Laplacian of the state, required in the $H^2$ norm, as a linear combination of the state and its time derivative. The $L^2$ norm of the state being bounded by the $H^1$ norm, we only analyze the $L^2$ norm of the time derivative of the state.

ai.tldr: 本文通过模态分解方法，证明了二维和三维热方程在边界控制下不仅实现H^1指数稳定，还实现H^2指数稳定，从而保证状态在最大范数意义下有界且渐近收敛到零。
ai.motivation: 一维热方程的H^1指数稳定可推出最大范数意义下的有界性和收敛性，但在二维和三维中这一推论不成立，因此需要更强的H^2稳定性。
ai.method: 将状态拉普拉斯算子表示为状态及其时间导数的线性组合，利用H^1范数控制L^2范数，仅分析状态时间导数的L^2范数。
ai.result: 证明了基于模态分解的边界控制器能实现二维和三维热方程的H^2指数稳定性，进而保证最大范数下的有界性和渐近收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 为高维热方程的边界控制设计提供了理论保证，有助于理解稳定性与范数之间的关系。

en.tldr: This paper proves that a modal-decomposition-based boundary controller achieves H^2 exponential stability for the 2-D and 3-D heat equation, ensuring boundedness and asymptotic convergence to zero in the max norm.
en.motivation: In 1-D, H^1 exponential stability implies max-norm boundedness and convergence, but this fails in 2-D and 3-D, necessitating stronger H^2 stability.
en.method: The Laplacian of the state is expressed as a linear combination of the state and its time derivative; the L^2 norm of the state is bounded by the H^1 norm, so only the L^2 norm of the time derivative is analyzed.
en.result: The modal-decomposition controller guarantees H^2 exponential stability for 2-D and 3-D heat equations, implying max-norm boundedness and asymptotic convergence.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical guarantees for boundary control of high-dimensional heat equations, clarifying the relationship between stability and norms.

idea_spark.risk: The choice of linear combination coefficients may depend on the specific equation, requiring further validation of generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decomposing higher-order norms into combinations of lower-order norms can inspire simplified analysis for other PDE stability problems.

papers.title: Derivations on the triplet $W$-algebras with $\mathfrak{sl}_2$-symmetry
papers.summary: We construct derivations on the triplet $W$-algebras $\mathcal{W}_{p_+,p_-}$ by refining the Frobenius homomorphisms of Tsuchiya-Wood and show that the property of the Adamović-Milas derivation for $\mathcal{W}_{2,p}$ extends to our derivations. As an application, we show that the $\mathfrak{sl}_2$-symmetry of $\mathcal{W}_{p_+,p_-}$ arises naturally from our construction. We further show that our method applies to the triplet $W$-superalgebra $\mathcal{SW}(m)$ and that the full automorphism group ${\rm Aut}(\mathcal{SW}(m))$ is $PSL_2(\mathbb{C})\times \mathbb{Z}_2$.

ai.tldr: 通过细化Tsuchiya-Wood的Frobenius同态，构造了三重W-代数上的导子，并证明了其与Adamović-Milas导子的相容性，进而自然导出sl2-对称性，并推广到三重W-超代数，确定了其全自同构群。
ai.motivation: 研究三重W-代数的导子结构及其与sl2-对称性的内在联系，并推广到超代数情形。
ai.method: 细化Frobenius同态构造导子，并验证其满足Adamović-Milas导子的性质。
ai.result: 导子构造自然给出sl2-对称性；对三重W-超代数SW(m)，全自同构群为PSL2(C)×Z2。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了构造W-代数导子的一般方法，并揭示了对称性与自同构群的代数结构。

en.tldr: We construct derivations on triplet W-algebras by refining Frobenius homomorphisms, show they extend the Adamović-Milas derivation, and naturally yield sl2-symmetry; the method also applies to the triplet W-superalgebra, whose full automorphism group is determined.
en.motivation: To understand the derivation structure of triplet W-algebras and its connection to sl2-symmetry, and to extend the results to superalgebras.

papers.title: Sharp Criteria for the existence of positive solutions to Lane-Emden-type inequalities on weighted graphs
papers.summary: We study positive solutions of Lane--Emden-type inequalities on infinite, connected, locally finite weighted graphs. For arbitrary connected domains (with Dirichlet boundary when present), we establish the equivalence between \[ -Δu \ge σu^q \] and the associated Green potential inequality. In particular, existence of positive solutions is characterized by the pointwise condition \[ G_Ω\big(σg_Ω(o,\cdot)^q\big)(x) \le C\, g_Ω(o,x). \] This yields a graph analogue of Green-kernel criteria for superlinear elliptic inequalities, without requiring a separate weak maximum principle.   Our main result resolves a volume-growth conjecture: for any infinite, connected, locally finite weighted graph, if \[ \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{n^{2q-1}}{μ(B(o,n))^{q-1}} = \infty, \] then every nonnegative solution of \( -Δu \ge u^q \) is trivial. This nonexistence result requires no volume doubling, Poincaré inequality, or ellipticity assumptions. The proof combines finite-network Green-function methods, a unit-current decomposition, and a Hardy-type estimate.   We also derive sharp existence criteria under \textnormal{(VD)}, \textnormal{(PI)}, and \textnormal{(P$_0$)}, and, under the \textnormal{(3G)} condition, obtain a criterion via Green level sets. As applications, we determine Serrin-type critical exponents on \(\mathbb{Z}^d\), including half-spaces and orthants with Dirichlet boundary conditions.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了加权图上Lane-Emden型不等式的正解存在性，建立了与Green势不等价的等价性，并解决了体积增长猜想。
ai.motivation: 经典椭圆不等式理论在图上缺乏统一的Green核准则，且体积增长猜想未解决。
ai.method: 结合有限网络Green函数方法、单位电流分解和Hardy型估计。
ai.result: 给出了正解存在的点态条件，并证明了体积增长级数发散时非平凡解不存在。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解图上超线性椭圆不等式的解存在性判据。

en.tldr: This paper studies positive solutions of Lane-Emden-type inequalities on weighted graphs, establishes equivalence with Green potential inequality, and resolves a volume-growth conjecture.
en.motivation: Classical elliptic inequality theory lacks a unified Green kernel criterion on graphs, and the volume-growth conjecture remained open.
en.method: Combines finite-network Green function methods, unit-current decomposition, and Hardy-type estimates.
en.result: Provides pointwise conditions for existence of positive solutions and proves triviality when a volume-growth series diverges.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand existence criteria for superlinear elliptic inequalities on graphs.

idea_spark.idea: Use a volume-growth series as a simple criterion, avoiding complex geometric assumptions.
idea_spark.risk: Results depend on graph structure and may not apply to nonlocal or higher-order operators.
idea_spark.inspiration: Transplant classical Green kernel criteria from analysis to discrete graphs.

papers.title: A Constraint-Lifting Framework for Safe and Stable Nonlinear Control
papers.summary: This paper presents a constraint-lifting control framework for designing stabilizing controllers that guarantee the forward invariance of a prescribed safe set. State-of-the-art safety-enforcing methods, such as control barrier functions (CBFs) and model predictive control (MPC), typically rely on solving constrained optimization problems in real time and therefore may not yield an explicit control law that guarantees constraint satisfaction under all conditions. In contrast, the proposed approach develops an explicit control law for a class of nonlinear systems that ensures both asymptotic stabilization of a desired equilibrium and safety preservation of a user-defined set. The central idea is to lift the constrained state space into an unbounded domain using a sigmoid-based diffeomorphic mapping, synthesize the controller in the transformed coordinates, and then map it back to the original coordinates. To address numerical conditioning near constraint boundaries, a special class of Lyapunov candidate functions, called sigmoid integral functions, is introduced. A rigorous stability analysis, based on the Barbashi-Krasovskii-LaSalle invariance principle, establishes asymptotic convergence and safety guarantees. The efficacy of the proposed controller is demonstrated through a safe attitude-control problem.

ai.tldr: 提出一种约束提升控制框架，通过sigmoid微分同胚映射将约束状态空间提升到无界域，设计显式控制律同时保证非线性系统的渐近稳定和安全集前向不变。
ai.motivation: 现有安全控制方法（如CBF、MPC）依赖实时求解约束优化，难以获得显式控制律且无法在所有条件下保证约束满足。
ai.method: 利用sigmoid微分同胚映射将约束状态空间提升到无界域，在变换坐标中设计控制器再映射回原坐标；引入sigmoid积分函数作为Lyapunov候选函数以改善约束边界附近的数值条件。
ai.result: 基于Barbashi-Krasovskii-LaSalle不变性原理严格证明渐近收敛性和安全保证，通过安全姿态控制问题验证有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需在线优化、显式且保证安全稳定的非线性控制设计方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将sigmoid映射与积分Lyapunov函数结合，为约束边界附近的数值稳定性提供新思路。
idea_spark.risk: sigmoid映射可能引入额外非线性，需验证对系统动态的适应性；理论分析依赖于特定类Lyapunov函数，通用性待检验。

en.tldr: A constraint-lifting control framework is proposed, which lifts the constrained state space into an unbounded domain via a sigmoid-based diffeomorphic mapping, enabling an explicit control law that ensures asymptotic stabilization and forward invariance of a safe set for nonlinear systems.
en.motivation: Existing safety-enforcing methods (e.g., CBF, MPC) rely on real-time constrained optimization and may not yield an explicit control law guaranteeing constraint satisfaction under all conditions.
en.method: A sigmoid-based diffeomorphic mapping lifts the constrained state space to an unbounded domain; the controller is synthesized in transformed coordinates and mapped back. Sigmoid integral functions are introduced as Lyapunov candidates to improve numerical conditioning near constraint boundaries.
en.result: Rigorous stability analysis using the Barbashi-Krasovskii-LaSalle invariance principle proves asymptotic convergence and safety guarantees. Efficacy is demonstrated on a safe attitude-control problem.
en.help_to_user: Provides an explicit, optimization-free control design that simultaneously ensures safety and stability for nonlinear systems.

idea_spark.idea: Combining sigmoid mapping with integral Lyapunov functions offers a novel approach to handle numerical conditioning near constraint boundaries.
idea_spark.risk: The sigmoid mapping may introduce additional nonlinearities; its adaptability to system dynamics needs verification. The theoretical analysis relies on a specific class of Lyapunov functions, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by limitations of CBF and MPC, exploring explicit control laws with constraint handling via diffeomorphic transformations simplifies the problem.

papers.title: SaliencyDecor: Enhancing Neural Network Interpretability through Feature Decorrelation
papers.summary: Gradient-based saliency methods are widely used to interpret deep neural networks, yet they often produce noisy and unstable explanations that poorly align with semantically meaningful input features. We argue that a fundamental cause of this behavior lies in the geometry of learned representations: correlated feature dimensions diffuse attribution gradients across redundant directions, resulting in blurred and unreliable saliency maps. To address this issue, we identify feature correlation as a structural limitation of gradient-based interpretability and propose SaliencyDecor, a training framework that enforces feature decorrelation to improve attribution fidelity without modifying saliency methods or model architectures by reshaping the feature space toward orthogonality, our approach promotes more concentrated gradient flow and improves the fidelity of saliency-based explanations. SaliencyDecor jointly optimizes classification, prediction consistency under feature masking, and a decorrelation regularizer, requiring no architectural changes or inference-time overhead. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and architectures demonstrate that our method produces substantially sharper and more object-focused saliency maps while simultaneously improving predictive performance, achieving accuracy gains across the datasets. These results establish our method as a principled mechanism for enhancing both interpretability and accuracy, challenging the conventional trade-off between explanation quality and model performance.

ai.tldr: 提出SaliencyDecor框架，通过特征去相关增强梯度归因的清晰度和稳定性，同时提升模型性能。
ai.motivation: 梯度归因方法因特征相关性导致归因图模糊不稳定，缺乏语义对齐。
ai.method: 联合优化分类损失、特征掩蔽一致性损失和去相关正则项，重塑特征空间为正交。
ai.result: 在多个基准和架构上获得更清晰、聚焦目标的归因图，并提升分类准确率。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在不修改模型架构或推理开销下提升神经网络可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 将去相关约束与预测一致性损失结合，实现归因质量与性能双赢。
idea_spark.risk: 去相关可能过度约束特征表示，影响复杂模式学习。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从特征几何角度解决归因噪声，启发其他归因方法（如积分梯度）的改进。

en.tldr: Proposes SaliencyDecor, a training framework that enforces feature decorrelation to produce sharper and more object-focused saliency maps while improving predictive performance.
en.motivation: Gradient-based saliency methods suffer from noisy and unstable explanations due to correlated feature dimensions that diffuse attribution gradients.
en.method: Jointly optimizes classification loss, prediction consistency under feature masking, and a decorrelation regularizer to reshape feature space toward orthogonality.
en.result: Achieves substantially sharper and more object-focused saliency maps and accuracy gains across multiple benchmarks and architectures.
en.help_to_user: Helps users enhance neural network interpretability without modifying model architecture or incurring inference-time overhead.

idea_spark.idea: Combining decorrelation constraints with prediction consistency loss achieves dual improvement in attribution quality and model performance.
idea_spark.risk: Decorrelation may overly constrain feature representations, potentially hindering learning of complex patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Addressing attribution noise from a feature geometry perspective inspires improvements in other attribution methods like integrated gradients.

papers.title: Path-dependent Hamilton--Jacobi equations: Uniqueness results for viscosity solutions defined via families of compact sets
papers.summary: We consider a path-dependent Hamilton--Jacobi equation with coinvariant derivatives over the space of continuous functions. We prove two uniqueness results for viscosity (generalized) solutions defined in terms of coinvariantly smooth test functionals and a dense family of compact subsets of the space of continuous functions. It is assumed that the Hamiltonian is continuous and satisfies a local Lipschitz condition in the functional variable with respect to the supremum norm. When the Lipschitz constant satisfies a sublinear growth condition in the gradient (impulse) variable, uniqueness is established in the class of continuous viscosity solutions. In the general case, without any such growth conditions, uniqueness is established in the class of continuous viscosity solutions that satisfy an additional local Lipschitz condition. The proofs are based on the standard method of doubling variables, but use a novel penalty functional for constructing coinvariantly smooth test functionals. The obtained results generalize previously known ones by relaxing the assumptions on the Hamiltonian and/or enlarging the class of functionals in which uniqueness is established.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了连续函数空间上具有协变导数的路径依赖Hamilton-Jacobi方程，通过紧凑集族定义了粘性解，并在不同条件下证明了唯一性。
ai.motivation: 现有路径依赖Hamilton-Jacobi方程的唯一性结果对Hamiltonian或解类要求较强，本文旨在放宽这些条件。
ai.method: 采用加倍变量法，并引入新的惩罚泛函构造协变光滑测试泛函。
ai.result: 在Hamiltonian连续且满足局部Lipschitz条件时，若Lipschitz常数满足次线性增长，则在连续粘性解类中唯一；否则需附加局部Lipschitz条件。
ai.help_to_user: 为路径依赖偏微分方程的唯一性理论提供了更一般的框架，有助于理解相关控制或博弈问题。

idea_spark.idea: 利用紧凑集族定义粘性解，可能适用于处理非光滑或奇异路径空间上的方程。
idea_spark.risk: 紧凑集族的选取可能影响解的定义和唯一性，需谨慎验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将加倍变量法与惩罚泛函结合，为处理路径依赖问题中的光滑性缺失提供了新思路。

en.tldr: This paper studies path-dependent Hamilton-Jacobi equations with coinvariant derivatives on the space of continuous functions, proving uniqueness results for viscosity solutions defined via families of compact sets under various conditions.
en.motivation: Existing uniqueness results for path-dependent Hamilton-Jacobi equations impose strong assumptions on the Hamiltonian or solution class; this work aims to relax those conditions.
en.method: The standard doubling variables method is employed, enhanced by a novel penalty functional to construct coinvariantly smooth test functionals.
en.result: Uniqueness holds in the class of continuous viscosity solutions when the Hamiltonian is continuous and locally Lipschitz with sublinear growth in the gradient variable; otherwise, an additional local Lipschitz condition on solutions is required.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more general uniqueness framework for path-dependent PDEs, aiding the analysis of related control or game problems.

idea_spark.idea: Defining viscosity solutions via families of compact sets may handle equations on non-smooth or singular path spaces.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of compact sets may affect solution definition and uniqueness, requiring careful validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining the doubling variables method with a penalty functional offers a new approach to overcome smoothness deficiencies in path-dependent problems.

papers.title: Geometry of Logarithmic Topological Recursion: Dilaton Equations, Free Energies and Variational Formulas
papers.summary: One of the most important applications of topological recursion concerns spectral curves for which the functions $(x,y)$ defining the spectral curve are allowed to have logarithmic singularities. This occurs for instance for Seiberg-Witten curves and mirror curves computing Gromov--Witten invariants of toric Calabi--Yau threefolds. A recently introduced extension of topological recursion, the so-called logarithmic topological recursion, exhibits the correct behavior under certain limits of those spectral curves.   In this article, we derive the dilaton equations in the setting of logarithmic topological recursion, as well as variational formulas, and provide a definition of the free energies in situations where standard topological recursion was known to fail. We present examples in which the new definition of the free energies \textit{directly} (without any computation) reproduces the full perturbative part of the Nekrasov--Shatashvili partition function of 4d $\mathcal{N}=2$ pure supersymmetric gauge theory, as well as the all-genus free energies of mirror curves of strip geometries, including in particular the topological vertex and the resolved conifold.

ai.tldr: 本文在对数拓扑递归框架中推导了膨胀方程和变分公式，并给出了标准拓扑递归失效情形下的自由能定义。
ai.motivation: 标准拓扑递归在处理具有对数奇点的谱曲线时失效，而这类曲线在Seiberg-Witten理论和镜像曲线中广泛出现。
ai.method: 通过引入对数拓扑递归，推导膨胀方程和变分公式，并重新定义自由能。
ai.result: 新定义的自由能直接复现了4d N=2纯超对称规范理论的Nekrasov-Shatashvili配分函数的微扰部分，以及条带几何镜像曲线的全亏格自由能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解对数拓扑递归在物理和几何中的应用，特别是自由能的计算方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用膨胀方程和变分公式简化自由能计算，避免直接求解复杂递归。
idea_spark.risk: 新定义的自由能可能不适用于所有类型的谱曲线，需验证其普适性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将拓扑递归与超对称规范理论中的配分函数直接关联，启发新的对偶关系探索。

en.tldr: This paper derives dilaton equations and variational formulas within logarithmic topological recursion, and provides a definition of free energies where standard topological recursion fails.
en.motivation: Standard topological recursion fails for spectral curves with logarithmic singularities, which appear in Seiberg-Witten theory and mirror curves.
en.method: By introducing logarithmic topological recursion, dilaton equations and variational formulas are derived, and free energies are redefined.
en.result: The new free energies directly reproduce the perturbative part of the Nekrasov-Shatashvili partition function of 4d N=2 pure supersymmetric gauge theory, as well as all-genus free energies of mirror curves of strip geometries.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the application of logarithmic topological recursion in physics and geometry, especially in computing free energies.

idea_spark.idea: Use dilaton equations and variational formulas to simplify free energy calculations, avoiding direct solution of complex recursions.
idea_spark.risk: The new definition of free energies may not be universal for all types of spectral curves; its generality needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Directly linking topological recursion to partition functions in supersymmetric gauge theory inspires exploration of new dualities.

papers.title: Gegenbauer polynomials and fluctuation properties of the one-dimensional Riesz gas
papers.summary: The Riesz gas in one-dimension consists of particles interacting via a pair potential, ${\rm sgn}(s) |x - x'|^{-s}$, $s \ne 0$ and $-\log | x - x'|$ for $s=0$. In the infinite density limit, with the particle support the interval $[-1,1]$, we apply a functional derivative method due to Beenakker to compute the covariance of two smooth linear statistics for the Riesz gas with exponent $s \in (-1,1)$, $s \ne 0$. This we give in terms of a sum over Fourier components of the linear statistics with respect to a Gegenbauer polynomial $\{C_n^{(s/2)}(x) \}$ basis, which generalises a known form in the case $s=0$ involving a cosine expansion. For the power sum linear statistic, our general formula can be reduced to a product of gamma function form, and compared against recent exact results in the literature for this case.

ai.tldr: 本文利用Beenakker泛函导数方法，计算了一维Riesz气体在无限密度极限下两个光滑线性统计量的协方差，结果以Gegenbauer多项式基展开表示，并推广了s=0时的余弦展开形式。
ai.motivation: 研究一维Riesz气体在无限密度极限下的涨落性质，特别是线性统计量的协方差，以推广已知的s=0结果。
ai.method: 采用Beenakker泛函导数方法，将协方差表示为线性统计量在Gegenbauer多项式基上的傅里叶分量之和。
ai.result: 得到了协方差的通用公式，对于幂和线性统计量可简化为Gamma函数乘积形式，并与近期精确结果一致。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了计算一维Riesz气体线性统计量协方差的解析方法，有助于理解长程相互作用系统的涨落行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Gegenbauer多项式基，将协方差计算转化为傅里叶分量的求和，简化了分析。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法仅适用于s∈(-1,1)且s≠0的情况，对s超出此范围或s=0需单独处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从随机矩阵理论中线性统计量的协方差计算获得启发，将类似技术应用于Riesz气体。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Gegenbauer多项式基，将协方差计算转化为傅里叶分量的求和，简化了分析。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法仅适用于s∈(-1,1)且s≠0的情况，对s超出此范围或s=0需单独处理。

en.tldr: This paper uses Beenakker's functional derivative method to compute the covariance of two smooth linear statistics for the one-dimensional Riesz gas in the infinite density limit, expressed as a sum over Fourier components in a Gegenbauer polynomial basis, generalizing the known cosine expansion for s=0.
en.motivation: To study fluctuation properties of the one-dimensional Riesz gas in the infinite density limit, specifically the covariance of linear statistics, extending known results for s=0.
en.method: Applied Beenakker's functional derivative method, expressing the covariance as a sum over Fourier components of the linear statistics with respect to a Gegenbauer polynomial basis.
en.result: Obtained a general formula for the covariance; for the power sum linear statistic it reduces to a product of gamma functions, matching recent exact results.
en.help_to_user: Provides an analytic method to compute the covariance of linear statistics for the one-dimensional Riesz gas, aiding understanding of fluctuations in long-range interacting systems.

idea_spark.idea: Using Gegenbauer polynomials to simplify the covariance calculation into a sum over Fourier components.
idea_spark.risk: The method is valid only for s∈(-1,1) with s≠0; other values require separate treatment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by covariance calculations of linear statistics in random matrix theory, applying similar techniques to the Riesz gas.

papers.title: Invariant Measures in Hamiltonian Systems: The Analytical Foundations of Statistical Physics
papers.summary: We construct a measure in the hamiltonian function level sets that is invariant under the hamiltonian flow for short times and flow preserving for arbitrarily long times. This allows a probabilistic approach to the study of hamiltonian systems, in the space of states with fixed energy. We prove that this measure generates the microcanonical partition function employed in physics and show that it can be transformed into the canonical partition function in an asymptotic limit, hence reproducing classical Statistical Physics. We also argue that this gives an alternative solution to Simon's second problem.

ai.tldr: 在哈密顿系统的能量水平集上构造了一个短时不变、长时流保持的测度，该测度生成微正则配分函数，并在渐近极限下转化为正则配分函数，从而复现经典统计物理，并提供了Simon第二问题的一个替代解。
ai.motivation: 为哈密顿系统建立严格的概率论基础，使统计物理的微正则和正则系综从动力学第一原理推导出来。
ai.method: 在哈密顿函数的水平集上构造测度，证明其在短时哈密顿流下不变且长时流保持，并推导该测度与微正则配分函数的关系，再通过渐近极限过渡到正则配分函数。
ai.result: 成功构造了不变测度，证明了它生成微正则配分函数，并在渐近极限下得到正则配分函数，从而复现经典统计物理，同时为Simon第二问题提供了新解法。
