en.tldr: We construct a measure on Hamiltonian energy level sets that is invariant under short-time Hamiltonian flow and flow-preserving for arbitrarily long times, generating the microcanonical partition function and transforming into the canonical partition function in an asymptotic limit, thereby reproducing classical statistical physics and offering an alternative solution to Simon's second problem.
en.motivation: To establish a rigorous probabilistic foundation for Hamiltonian systems, deriving the microcanonical and canonical ensembles from first principles of dynamics.
en.method: Construct a measure on level sets of the Hamiltonian, prove its invariance under short-time Hamiltonian flow and flow-preserving for long times, derive its relation to the microcanonical partition function, and transition to the canonical partition function via an asymptotic limit.
en.result: Successfully constructed an invariant measure that generates the microcanonical partition function and yields the canonical partition function in the asymptotic limit, reproducing classical statistical physics and providing a new solution to Simon's second problem.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how statistical mechanics ensembles can be rigorously derived from the analytical foundations of Hamiltonian dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Attempt to apply similar invariant measure constructions to non-equilibrium statistical physics, e.g., constructing steady-state measures for driven-dissipative systems.
idea_spark.risk: For non-conservative systems, flow-preserving properties may fail, requiring dissipation or stochastic terms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using the geometric structure of Hamiltonian systems to unify microcanonical and canonical ensembles via level-set measures inspires thinking about the dynamical foundations of other ensembles (e.g., grand canonical).

papers.title: State-Constrained Control of Discrete-Time Nonlinear Systems via Constraint Lifting
papers.summary: This paper presents a constraint-enforcing control framework for a class of discrete-time strict-feedback nonlinear systems. The objective is to guarantee closed-loop stability while ensuring forward invariance of a prescribed safe set defined by state constraints. The proposed approach transforms the constrained control problem into an equivalent unconstrained one through smooth constraint-lifting mappings constructed using strictly increasing sigmoid functions. Controller synthesis is then performed in the lifted coordinates, enabling recursive backstepping design while preserving the admissibility of the constrained states. Conditions on the controller gains are derived to guarantee both asymptotic stability of the closed-loop system and forward invariance of the admissible domain of the lifting functions. The analysis also establishes a conditional deadbeat property for the second backstepping step once the system trajectory enters a region in which the lifting-domain admissibility conditions are satisfied. Numerical simulations of a constrained double-integrator system demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method in enforcing state constraints while tracking a reference command.

ai.tldr: 提出一种约束提升框架，将离散时间严格反馈非线性系统的状态约束控制问题转化为无约束问题，保证闭环稳定性和前向不变性。
ai.motivation: 现有方法处理离散时间非线性系统状态约束时存在复杂性，需要一种系统化的约束转化与控制器设计方法。
ai.method: 通过严格递增的S型函数构造光滑约束提升映射，将约束控制问题转化为无约束问题，在提升坐标下进行反步设计，并推导控制器增益条件。
ai.result: 数值仿真验证了该方法在约束双积分器系统上有效执行状态约束并跟踪参考指令，同时满足渐近稳定性和前向不变性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种系统化的约束控制设计思路，可应用于需要严格状态约束的离散时间非线性系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将S型函数族参数化，通过在线调整映射形状以适应不同约束边界或动态环境。
idea_spark.risk: 映射的平滑性可能限制约束边界的锐利度，且高阶系统反步步骤的复杂度增加。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合学习控制（如神经网络）自动学习最优提升映射，减少人工设计依赖。

en.tldr: Proposes a constraint-lifting framework that transforms state-constrained control of discrete-time strict-feedback nonlinear systems into an unconstrained problem, ensuring closed-loop stability and forward invariance.
en.motivation: Existing methods for handling state constraints in discrete-time nonlinear systems are complex; a systematic transformation and controller design approach is needed.
en.method: Constructs smooth constraint-lifting mappings using strictly increasing sigmoid functions, performs backstepping design in lifted coordinates, and derives controller gain conditions.
en.result: Numerical simulations on a constrained double-integrator system demonstrate effective state constraint enforcement and reference tracking with asymptotic stability and forward invariance.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic constrained control design approach applicable to discrete-time nonlinear systems requiring strict state constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Parameterize the sigmoid family and adjust the mapping shape online to adapt to varying constraint boundaries or dynamic environments.
idea_spark.risk: Smoothness of the mapping may limit sharpness of constraint boundaries, and complexity increases with higher-order backstepping steps.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine with learning control (e.g., neural networks) to automatically learn optimal lifting mappings, reducing manual design effort.

papers.title: What is The Probability That A Random Graph With A Given Degree Sequence is Connected?
papers.summary: An $n$-tuple $D=(d(1),\dots,d(n))$ is a \emph{feasible degree sequence} if there is a graph on $\{1,\dots,n\}$ such that $i$ has degree $d(i)$. Any such graph will have $m=\sum_{i=1}^n d(i)/2$ edges. Letting $G(D)$ be a graph chosen uniformly from those with the given degree sequence, we upper-bound the probability that $G(D)$ is disconnected based on the number of vertices of degree $d$ for small $d$, and develop a powerful tool for proving such bounds. If there are any vertices of degree zero the probability $G$ is disconnected is $1$, so we assume there are no such vertices. Our results then imply that if there are $o(\sqrt{m})$ vertices of degree $1$ and $o(m)$ vertices of degree 2 then with high probability $G$ is connected, while if there are no vertices of degree 1 or 2 then the probability $G$ is disconnected is $O(\frac{n^4}{m^6})$.

ai.tldr: 研究给定度序列的随机图连通的概率，给出了上界估计。
ai.motivation: 理解随机图在给定度序列下的连通性，为网络可靠性分析提供理论基础。
ai.method: 通过分析小度顶点（度1和度2）的数量，推导连通概率的上界。
ai.result: 若度1顶点数为o(√m)且度2顶点数为o(m)，则图高概率连通；若无度1或度2顶点，则不连通概率为O(n^4/m^6)。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户评估具有特定度序列的随机图是否可能连通。

idea_spark.idea: 利用小度顶点数量控制图的结构脆弱性，从而得到连通性概率的紧界。
idea_spark.risk: 上界可能不够紧，当度序列包含较多小度顶点时，实际连通概率可能更低。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将类似的小度顶点计数技术用于随机图的其他全局性质（如直径、团数）的概率估计。

en.tldr: Upper bounds the probability that a random graph with a given degree sequence is disconnected, based on counts of low-degree vertices.
en.motivation: To understand connectivity of random graphs under prescribed degree sequences, providing theoretical foundation for network reliability.
en.method: Derives upper bounds on disconnection probability by analyzing the number of vertices of degree 1 and degree 2.
en.result: If there are o(√m) vertices of degree 1 and o(m) vertices of degree 2, the graph is connected with high probability; if no vertices of degree 1 or 2, the disconnection probability is O(n^4/m^6).
en.help_to_user: Helps users assess whether a random graph with a specific degree sequence is likely to be connected.

idea_spark.idea: Control structural fragility via counts of low-degree vertices to obtain tight bounds on connectivity probability.
idea_spark.risk: Bounds may not be tight when the degree sequence contains many low-degree vertices; actual connectivity probability could be lower.
idea_spark.inspiration: Similar low-degree vertex counting could be applied to probability estimates of other global properties (e.g., diameter, clique number) of random graphs.

papers.title: A Quantum Spectral Framework for Solving PDEs
papers.summary: Partial differential equations (PDEs) are fundamental across numerous scientific fields. As these problems scale to high dimensions, classical numerical schemes introduce severe computational bottlenecks, known as the curse of dimensionality. Attempts to solve this problem typically rely on either classical sparsity and low-rank decompositions, or neural network surrogate models. On the other hand, Quantum Computing offers a promising alternative, as it allows us to operate in significantly larger spaces while demanding far fewer resources. In this work, we present a quantum subroutine to solve second-order linear PDEs by exploiting the structural properties of the filter in Fourier space using Quantum Block Encoding (QBE) with quantum reversible arithmetic. This approach serves as a specialized alternative to standard quantum matrix inversion, which typically relies solely on Quantum Singular Value Transformation (QSVT) without exploiting the inherent structural properties of the matrix. We validate the proposed methodology against its classical counterpart to prove its correctness. This framework provides a foundation for extending these methods toward quantum group Fourier transforms, wavelet-based analysis, and equivariant quantum neural networks (EQNNs), offering a promising path toward solving broader classes of problems, including nonlinear PDEs.

ai.tldr: 提出一种量子频谱框架，利用量子块编码和可逆算术高效求解二阶线性偏微分方程，避免维度灾难。
ai.motivation: 经典数值方法在高维PDE求解中遭遇维度灾难，量子计算有望突破这一瓶颈。
ai.method: 利用傅里叶空间滤波器的结构特性，结合量子块编码与量子可逆算术，设计专用量子子程序替代标准量子矩阵求逆。
ai.result: 通过与经典方法对比验证了正确性，为扩展至非线性PDE、量子群傅里叶变换、小波分析和等变量子神经网络奠定基础。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种利用量子计算高效求解高维PDE的新思路，适合对量子算法与科学计算交叉领域感兴趣的读者。

idea_spark.idea: 将量子块编码与可逆算术结合，利用傅里叶空间结构特性，替代通用量子矩阵求逆，提升效率。
idea_spark.risk: 当前仅验证线性二阶PDE，非线性扩展及实际量子硬件实现仍存在挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受经典谱方法启发，将傅里叶域滤波结构特性融入量子算法设计。

en.tldr: Proposes a quantum spectral framework that leverages quantum block encoding and reversible arithmetic to efficiently solve second-order linear PDEs, overcoming the curse of dimensionality.
en.motivation: Classical numerical methods suffer from the curse of dimensionality for high-dimensional PDEs; quantum computing offers a promising alternative.
en.method: Exploits structural properties of the Fourier-space filter using quantum block encoding and quantum reversible arithmetic, designing a specialized quantum subroutine as an alternative to standard quantum matrix inversion.
en.result: Validated against classical counterparts for correctness, laying the foundation for extensions to nonlinear PDEs, quantum group Fourier transforms, wavelet analysis, and equivariant quantum neural networks.
en.help_to_user: Provides a new approach to efficiently solve high-dimensional PDEs using quantum computing, suitable for readers interested in the intersection of quantum algorithms and scientific computing.

idea_spark.idea: Combines quantum block encoding with reversible arithmetic, leveraging Fourier-space structural properties to replace generic quantum matrix inversion for improved efficiency.
idea_spark.risk: Currently validated only for linear second-order PDEs; nonlinear extensions and practical quantum hardware implementation remain challenging.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by classical spectral methods, integrating Fourier-domain filter structure into quantum algorithm design.

papers.title: The Lieb-Liniger model
papers.summary: The Lieb-Liniger model describes one-dimensional bosons with contact interactions. This many-body system admits an exact solution in terms of the Bethe ansatz. Some of the exact and perturbative results for this model are reviewed. Particular attention is devoted to the explicit evaluation, in terms of the interaction parameter, of physical quantities that can be formally exactly extracted from the Bethe ansatz solution. Another goal of this review is to stress exact relations between various quantities. The technical developments are explained in detail. The most relevant experimental realisations of the studied problems are eventually discussed. This review also contains several new results such as the study of convergence of the ground-state energy series at strong interactions, the excitation spectrum at high energies, and the evaluation of the boundary energy.

ai.tldr: 本文综述了Lieb-Liniger模型，该模型描述一维玻色子接触相互作用，通过Bethe ansatz精确求解，并讨论了精确与微扰结果、物理量的显式评估、实验实现以及若干新结果。
ai.motivation: 系统总结Lieb-Liniger模型的精确解和物理性质，强调各量之间的精确关系，并介绍强相互作用下基态能量级数收敛性、高能激发谱和边界能等新结果。
ai.method: 基于Bethe ansatz精确求解，结合微扰理论，对相互作用参数进行显式评估，并详细解释技术推导过程。
ai.result: 给出了基态能量级数在强相互作用下的收敛性分析、高能激发谱以及边界能的评估，同时回顾了相关实验实现。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户全面理解一维玻色子系统的精确可解模型及其物理性质，为相关理论研究提供基础参考。

idea_spark.idea: 利用强相互作用级数收敛性分析，探索非微扰区域的新物理效应。
idea_spark.risk: 高能激发谱的解析计算可能依赖于特定边界条件，推广至一般情况需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 边界能的精确评估启发对开放边界一维系统的热力学性质研究。

en.tldr: This review covers the Lieb-Liniger model of one-dimensional bosons with contact interactions, exactly solved via Bethe ansatz, discussing exact and perturbative results, explicit evaluation of physical quantities, experimental realizations, and several new results.
en.motivation: To systematically summarize the exact solution and physical properties of the Lieb-Liniger model, emphasize exact relations among quantities, and present new results on ground-state energy series convergence, high-energy excitation spectrum, and boundary energy.
en.method: Exact solution via Bethe ansatz combined with perturbation theory, explicit evaluation in terms of the interaction parameter, and detailed technical derivations.
en.result: Convergence analysis of the ground-state energy series at strong interactions, evaluation of the high-energy excitation spectrum and boundary energy, along with a review of relevant experimental realizations.
en.help_to_user: Provides a comprehensive understanding of an exactly solvable model for one-dimensional bosons and its physical properties, serving as a foundational reference for theoretical studies.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the strong-coupling series convergence to explore novel physics in the non-perturbative regime.
idea_spark.risk: Analytic calculations of the high-energy spectrum may depend on specific boundary conditions, requiring caution for generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: The exact evaluation of boundary energy inspires studies of thermodynamic properties in open-boundary one-dimensional systems.

papers.title: Level Crossing in Random Matrices. III. Analogs of Girko's circular and Wigner's semicircle laws
papers.summary: We study the asymptotic distribution of level crossings for random matrix pencils A_n+λB_n in several ensembles, including complex and real i.i.d. matrices and Gaussian/Hermitian settings. We derive a representation of the normalized log-discriminant in terms of pairwise eigenvalue interactions and formulate conditions under which its limit is governed by a deterministic potential.   Under assumptions combining a uniform circular law, logarithmic tail control, and small-spacing (repulsion) estimates, we prove convergence of the empirical measure of level crossings to an explicit deterministic limit. In the complex Gaussian case these assumptions are verified (modulo a uniformity step), while in the general i.i.d. setting the results are conditional and motivated by universality theory.   We further analyze the real case, showing that any limiting measure does not concentrate on the real projective line under suitable hypotheses, and discuss analogous phenomena for elliptic/Hermitian ensembles. Our results highlight the role of logarithmic energy and universality in governing spectral degeneracies of random matrix pencils.

ai.tldr: 研究随机矩阵束中水平交叉的渐近分布，推导了归一化对数判别式的表示，并在复高斯和一般i.i.d.条件下证明了经验测度收敛到确定性极限。

en.tldr: Studies the asymptotic distribution of level crossings for random matrix pencils, derives a representation of the normalized log-discriminant, and proves convergence of the empirical measure to an explicit deterministic limit under complex Gaussian and general i.i.d. conditions.
en.motivation: To understand the statistical behavior of eigenvalue crossings in random matrix pencils, a fundamental problem in random matrix theory and quantum chaos.
en.method: Uses a representation of the log-discriminant in terms of pairwise eigenvalue interactions, combined with a uniform circular law, logarithmic tail control, and repulsion estimates, to prove convergence of the empirical measure.
en.result: Assumptions are verified for the complex Gaussian case, yielding an explicit limit; conditional results are given for general i.i.d. case; in the real case, the limiting measure does not concentrate on the real projective line.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework for analyzing spectral degeneracies of random matrix pencils, aiding understanding of level crossing statistics in complex systems.

idea_spark.idea: Unify crossing distributions across different ensembles using logarithmic potential theory, potentially simplifying proofs.
idea_spark.risk: Verification of assumptions in the general i.i.d. case is challenging and may require refined tail estimates.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing level crossings as critical points of a logarithmic potential inspires new spectral statistics designs.

papers.title: Asymptotic height of Plancherel random trees
papers.summary: We study a natural analogue of Ulam's problem for random rooted trees distributed according to a Plancherel-type measure. This probability measure is closely related to the classical Plancherel measure on integer partitions. For a Plancherel random tree $T_n$ with $n$ vertices, we investigate the asymptotic behavior of its height $H_n$, defined as the maximal distance from the root to a leaf. We prove that this height grows logarithmically. More precisely, there is a one-parameter family of random trees $(T_n(θ))_{n \in \mathbb{N}}$ indexed by $θ>0$ such that $\frac{H_n}{\log n}$ converges in probability to $c_\star(θ)$, where $c_\star(θ)$ is an explicit constant depending on the parameter $θ$. The case of Plancherel trees corresponds to the parameter $θ=2$.   The proof is based on the fact that the Plancherel random trees can be viewed as Ewens fragmentation trees, for which the height exhibits a sharp threshold phenomenon. An upper bound is obtained via $s$-mass functionals and contraction estimates, while the lower bound is derived by embedding the model into a branching random walk with logarithmic displacements governed by a Poisson--Dirichlet distribution. The constant $c_\star(θ)$ is characterized through a variational principle associated with this branching random walk.

ai.tldr: 研究Plancherel随机树的高度渐近行为，证明其高度以对数增长，并给出显式常数。
ai.motivation: 探索随机树结构中Ulam问题的自然类比，理解Plancherel型测度下树高度的极限行为。
ai.method: 将Plancherel随机树视为Ewens分裂树，利用s-质量泛函和收缩估计得到上界，通过嵌入带对数位移的分支随机游走（由Poisson-Dirichlet分布驱动）得到下界，常数由变分原理刻画。
ai.result: 高度H_n除以log n依概率收敛于显式常数c_⋆(θ)，其中θ=2对应Plancherel树情形。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机树高度分析提供一种基于分裂树和分支随机游走的通用框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Poisson-Dirichlet分布驱动的分支随机游走刻画对数增长常数，可能启发对类似随机结构（如随机映射树）的渐近分析。
idea_spark.risk: 常数c_⋆(θ)的变分刻画可能难以显式计算，且嵌入方法对非对数位移的推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将树高度问题转化为分支随机游走的极值问题，可借鉴统计物理中自由能变分原理的思路。

en.tldr: Studies the asymptotic height of Plancherel random trees, proving logarithmic growth with an explicit constant.
en.motivation: To explore a natural analogue of Ulam's problem for random trees under Plancherel-type measure and understand the limiting behavior of tree height.
en.method: Views Plancherel random trees as Ewens fragmentation trees; obtains upper bound via s-mass functionals and contraction estimates, lower bound by embedding into a branching random walk with logarithmic displacements driven by a Poisson-Dirichlet distribution; the constant is characterized by a variational principle.
en.result: The height H_n divided by log n converges in probability to an explicit constant c_⋆(θ), with θ=2 corresponding to the Plancherel tree case.
en.help_to_user: Provides a general framework for analyzing tree heights via fragmentation trees and branching random walks.

idea_spark.idea: Using a Poisson-Dirichlet-driven branching random walk to characterize the logarithmic growth constant may inspire asymptotic analysis of similar random structures (e.g., random mapping trees).
idea_spark.risk: The variational characterization of c_⋆(θ) may be hard to compute explicitly, and the embedding method may not generalize to non-logarithmic displacements.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reducing tree height to an extremal problem of branching random walks can borrow ideas from variational principles in statistical physics for free energy.

papers.title: One Perturbation, Two Failure Modes: Probing VLM Safety via Embedding-Guided Typographic Perturbations
papers.summary: Typographic prompt injection exploits vision language models' (VLMs) ability to read text rendered in images, posing a growing threat as VLMs power autonomous agents. Prior work typically focus on maximizing attack success rate (ASR) but does not explain \emph{why} certain renderings bypass safety alignment. We make two contributions. First, an empirical study across four VLMs including GPT-4o and Claude, twelve font sizes, and ten transformations reveals that multimodal embedding distance strongly predicts ASR ($r{=}{-}0.71$ to ${-}0.93$, $p{<}0.01$), providing an interpretable, model agnostic proxy. Since embedding distance predicts ASR, reducing it should improve attack success, but the relationship is mediated by two factors: perceptual readability (whether the VLM can parse the text) and safety alignment (whether it refuses to comply). Second, we use this as a red teaming tool: we directly maximize image text embedding similarity under bounded $\ell_\infty$ perturbations via CWA-SSA across four surrogate embedding models, stress testing both factors without access to the target model. Experiments across five degradation settings on GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4.5, Mistral-Large-3, and Qwen3-VL confirm that optimization recovers readability and reduces safety aligned refusals as two co-occurring effects, with the dominant mechanism depending on the model's safety filter strength and the degree of visual degradation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种嵌入引导的排版扰动方法，通过最大化图像文本嵌入相似度来同时破坏VLMs的感知可读性和安全对齐，实现高效红队测试。
ai.motivation: 现有排版注入攻击只关注攻击成功率，未解释为何某些渲染能绕过安全对齐。
ai.method: 利用多模态嵌入距离作为ASR的强预测因子，在ℓ∞有界扰动下通过CWA-SSA优化直接最大化图像文本嵌入相似度。
ai.result: 在GPT-4o、Claude等四个模型上验证，优化恢复可读性并减少安全拒绝，主导机制取决于模型安全过滤强度与视觉退化程度。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解VLM安全漏洞的根源，并提供一种无需目标模型访问的红队测试工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将攻击分解为感知可读性与安全对齐两个独立因素，分别优化。
idea_spark.risk: 优化可能被恶意利用生成更隐蔽的注入攻击。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用模型内部嵌入空间指导外部扰动，实现可解释的对抗攻击。

en.tldr: Proposes embedding-guided typographic perturbations that maximize image-text embedding similarity under bounded ℓ∞ perturbations to simultaneously degrade perceptual readability and safety alignment, enabling effective red teaming without target model access.
en.motivation: Prior typographic injection attacks focus on attack success rate but fail to explain why certain renderings bypass safety alignment.
en.method: Leverages multimodal embedding distance as a strong predictor of ASR, then directly maximizes image-text embedding similarity via CWA-SSA under bounded ℓ∞ perturbations.
en.result: Validated on GPT-4o, Claude, Mistral-Large-3, and Qwen3-VL; optimization recovers readability and reduces safety refusals, with dominant mechanism depending on model safety filter strength and visual degradation degree.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable, model-agnostic proxy for VLM safety vulnerabilities and a practical red teaming tool.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose attack into two independent factors—perceptual readability and safety alignment—and optimize each separately.
idea_spark.risk: Optimization could be misused to craft more stealthy injection attacks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Use internal embedding space to guide external perturbations for interpretable adversarial attacks.

papers.title: Asymptotic Solution of a Cheap Control Game with Slow and Fast State Variables
papers.summary: A finite-horizon zero-sum linear-quadratic differential game is considered. Its features are: (i) the control cost of the minimizing player in the game's cost functional is much smaller than the control cost of the maximizing player and the state cost; (ii) the cost of the fast state variable in the integrand of the cost functional is a positive semi-definite (but non-zero) quadratic form. These features require developing a significantly novel approach to asymptotic analysis of the matrix Riccati differential equation associated with the considered game. Using this analysis, an asymptotic solution of the game is derived. An illustrative example is presented.

ai.tldr: 研究了一个有限时域零和线性二次型微分博弈，其中最小化玩家的控制成本远小于最大化玩家和状态成本，且快状态变量的成本为半正定二次型。通过矩阵Riccati微分方程的渐近分析，得到了博弈的渐近解。
ai.motivation: 现有方法无法处理控制成本极小且快状态变量成本半正定的博弈问题，需要发展新的渐近分析技术。
ai.method: 对关联的矩阵Riccati微分方程进行渐近分析，推导博弈的渐近解。
ai.result: 给出了博弈的渐近解，并提供了数值示例验证。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理具有多时间尺度和廉价控制的博弈问题提供了理论工具。

idea_spark.idea: 将快慢变量分离与廉价控制结合，可能用于多智能体系统或经济博弈中的分层决策。
idea_spark.risk: 渐近解的有效性依赖于参数范围，可能对某些边界情况不适用。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受奇异摄动理论启发，将快慢动力学与不对称控制成本结合建模。

en.tldr: A finite-horizon zero-sum linear-quadratic differential game is studied, where the minimizing player's control cost is much smaller than the maximizing player's and state costs, and the fast state variable cost is a positive semi-definite quadratic form. An asymptotic solution is derived via analysis of the matrix Riccati differential equation.
en.motivation: Existing methods cannot handle games with extremely cheap control and semi-definite fast state cost, necessitating a novel asymptotic approach.
en.method: Asymptotic analysis of the associated matrix Riccati differential equation to derive the game's asymptotic solution.
en.result: An asymptotic solution of the game is obtained, illustrated by a numerical example.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools for games with multiple time scales and cheap control.

idea_spark.idea: Combining slow-fast separation with cheap control may enable hierarchical decision-making in multi-agent systems or economic games.
idea_spark.risk: Validity of the asymptotic solution depends on parameter ranges and may fail at boundaries.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by singular perturbation theory to model asymmetric control costs with slow-fast dynamics.

papers.title: Graphical Functions by Examples
papers.summary: Graphical functions have emerged as a powerful framework for evaluating multi-loop Feynman integrals in perturbative quantum field theory. Defined as massless three-point position-space integrals, they reveal rich analytic structures and have enabled major advances, including the highest-loop results currently known in several quantum field theories. Their role extends to conformal field theory, and recent algorithmic developments now allow many graphical functions to be computed automatically. This review, based on graduate-level lectures held by O.S. in 2025/26 at the University of Hamburg, introduces the central ideas behind graphical functions, covering periods, Feynman residues, and the treatment of regular and singular cases in both integer and non-integer dimensions. It also discusses connections to momentum space and self-duality, and provides guidance for further study, offering a coherent entry point into a topic not addressed in standard textbooks.

ai.tldr: 本文综述了图形函数在微扰量子场论中用于评估多圈费曼积分的方法，涵盖周期、费曼留数、整数与非整数维度的正则与奇异情况，以及与动量空间和自对偶性的联系。
ai.motivation: 图形函数是评估多圈费曼积分的有力框架，但标准教科书缺乏系统介绍，本文旨在为初学者提供连贯的入门指南。
ai.method: 基于研究生讲座内容，通过定义无质量三点位置空间积分，介绍图形函数的中心思想，包括周期、费曼留数以及正则与奇异情况的处理。
ai.result: 总结了图形函数在量子场论和共形场论中的最新进展，包括自动计算算法和最高圈数结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助读者快速理解图形函数的基本概念、计算技巧及其在量子场论中的应用，为进一步研究提供指导。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将图形函数的自动计算算法应用于非微扰量子场论或格点场论中的积分问题。
idea_spark.risk: 图形函数主要针对无质量三点积分，扩展到有质量或更高点积分可能面临解析复杂性增加的风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受图形函数与共形场论联系的启发，可尝试将类似方法用于研究共形自举中的积分表示。

en.tldr: This review introduces graphical functions for evaluating multi-loop Feynman integrals in perturbative QFT, covering periods, Feynman residues, regular/singular cases in integer and non-integer dimensions, and connections to momentum space and self-duality.
en.motivation: Graphical functions are a powerful framework for multi-loop integrals but are not covered in standard textbooks; this review provides a coherent entry point for beginners.
en.method: Based on graduate-level lectures, the review defines massless three-point position-space integrals and explains central ideas including periods, Feynman residues, and treatment of regular and singular cases.
en.result: Summarizes recent advances in graphical functions for QFT and CFT, including automated computation algorithms and highest-loop results.
en.help_to_user: Helps readers quickly grasp the basic concepts, computational techniques, and applications of graphical functions in QFT, with guidance for further study.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying automated graphical function algorithms to non-perturbative QFT or lattice field theory integrals.
idea_spark.risk: Graphical functions are primarily for massless three-point integrals; extension to massive or higher-point integrals may face increased analytic complexity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the connection to CFT, similar methods could be used to study integral representations in conformal bootstrap.

papers.title: Null Measurability at the Symmetrization Interface in VC Learning
papers.summary: Recent work revisiting measurability in the fundamental theorem of statistical learning imposes Borel measurability of ghost-gap suprema. We show that, at the one-sided ghost-gap interface actually used by the standard symmetrization proof, this requirement is stronger than necessary. For any Borel-parameterized concept class on a Polish domain, the bad event "there exists a hypothesis whose ghost empirical error exceeds its training empirical error by at least ε/2" is analytic. By Choquet capacitability, it is therefore measurable in the completion of every finite Borel measure. We then construct a concept class whose bad event is null-measurable but not Borel, giving a strict separation from the Borel supremum condition. Finally, we prove closure under patching, fixed and countable interpolation, and fiber-product amalgamation, showing that the weaker regularity level is stable under natural concept-class constructors. In the realizable setting, where targets belong to the class and are measurable, these results weaken the measurability hypothesis needed by the symmetrization route from finite VC dimension to PAC learnability. The main results and the descriptive-set-theoretic infrastructure used by them are formalized in Lean 4.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了VC学习理论中对称化接口处的可测性问题，证明了在标准对称化证明中，Borel可测性要求过强，并构造了反例展示零可测性与Borel可测性的严格分离。
ai.motivation: 经典统计学习基本定理依赖于对称化论证中ghost-gap上确界的Borel可测性，但该条件可能过强，需要更精确的可测性条件。

en.tldr: This paper investigates measurability at the symmetrization interface in VC learning, showing that Borel measurability of ghost-gap suprema is stronger than necessary, and constructs a concept class achieving null-measurability but not Borel measurability.
en.motivation: The fundamental theorem of statistical learning relies on Borel measurability of ghost-gap suprema in symmetrization, but this condition may be unnecessarily strong.
en.method: Using Choquet capacitability to show the bad event is analytic and thus measurable in the completion of any finite Borel measure; constructing a counterexample for strict separation; proving closure under natural concept-class constructors.
en.result: In the realizable setting, the measurability hypothesis needed for symmetrization from finite VC dimension to PAC learnability is weakened, with a strict separation result.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies the precise level of measurability required in statistical learning theory, potentially simplifying PAC learnability proofs.

idea_spark.idea: Use formal verification tools like Lean 4 to automatically check measurability conditions in learning theory.
idea_spark.risk: The constructed counterexample may be too pathological for practical learning scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Weaker measurability conditions may suffice for learning guarantees, simplifying theoretical analysis in machine learning.

papers.title: Adaptive Constraint-Lifting Control with Stability and Invariance Guarantees
papers.summary: This paper develops an adaptive tracking controller for a class of nonlinear systems with parametric uncertainty subject to state constraints. The system is characterized by a strict-feedback structure with unknown parameters entering both the drift and input channels. The objective is to design a control law, without knowledge of the unknown parameters, that guarantees closed-loop stability, achieves desired tracking performance, and ensures forward invariance of a prescribed safe set. An adaptive constraint-lifting framework is developed that transforms the constrained control problem into an equivalent unconstrained representation, enabling recursive controller synthesis in lifted coordinates. The proposed design integrates parameter estimation with constraint enforcement without requiring online optimization. A Lyapunov-based stability analysis, combined with the Barbashin-Krasovskii-LaSalle invariance principle, establishes boundedness of all closed-loop signals, asymptotic convergence of the system states to the desired equilibrium, and forward invariance of the safe set under uncertainty. In particular, the analysis characterizes the largest invariant set of the closed-loop system and guarantees convergence despite unknown parameters. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated on a DC motor system with uncertain parameters, illustrating accurate tracking performance and safe operation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种自适应约束提升控制框架，在参数未知且存在状态约束的非线性系统中，无需在线优化即可保证闭环稳定性、跟踪性能和安全集前向不变性。
ai.motivation: 现有约束控制方法通常依赖在线优化或精确参数知识，难以处理参数不确定性与状态约束的耦合问题。
ai.method: 通过约束提升变换将受约束问题转化为无约束表示，在提升坐标中递归设计控制器，并集成参数估计与约束执行。
ai.result: 基于Lyapunov和Barbashin-Krasovskii-LaSalle不变性原理，证明所有信号有界、状态渐近收敛至期望平衡点、安全集前向不变；在直流电机系统上验证了准确跟踪与安全运行。
ai.help_to_user: 为参数不确定的约束非线性系统提供一种无需在线优化的自适应控制方案，适用于安全关键应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将约束提升与自适应估计结合，避免在线优化，可能简化实时实现。
idea_spark.risk: 变换后的无约束系统可能引入额外非线性，需验证其可逆性与数值稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受约束系统可通过坐标变换转化为无约束问题，类似方法或可推广至输出约束或时变约束场景。

en.tldr: An adaptive constraint-lifting control framework is proposed for nonlinear systems with parametric uncertainty and state constraints, guaranteeing closed-loop stability, tracking performance, and forward invariance of a safe set without online optimization.
en.motivation: Existing constrained control methods often rely on online optimization or exact parameter knowledge, struggling with the coupling between parametric uncertainty and state constraints.
en.method: The constrained problem is transformed into an equivalent unconstrained representation via constraint lifting, enabling recursive controller synthesis in lifted coordinates with integrated parameter estimation and constraint enforcement.
en.result: Lyapunov-based analysis combined with the Barbashin-Krasovskii-LaSalle invariance principle proves boundedness of all signals, asymptotic convergence to the desired equilibrium, and forward invariance of the safe set; effectiveness is demonstrated on a DC motor system.
en.help_to_user: Provides an adaptive control solution for constrained nonlinear systems with parametric uncertainty that avoids online optimization, suitable for safety-critical applications.

idea_spark.idea: Combining constraint lifting with adaptive estimation eliminates the need for online optimization, potentially simplifying real-time implementation.
idea_spark.risk: The transformed unconstrained system may introduce additional nonlinearities, requiring verification of invertibility and numerical stability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Constrained systems can be transformed into unconstrained ones via coordinate changes; similar approaches may extend to output constraints or time-varying constraints.

papers.title: Pollicott-Ruelle Resonances on Flag Manifolds
papers.summary: We study the resonance spectrum of the multiflow induced on a flag manifold by the action, through multiplication by the exponential map, of the Cartan subalgebra of the underlying Lie group. We give a definition of joint resonance for the flow, then prove its discreteness and existence of resonant states. We conclude by explicit characterization of the spectrum in the special cases of Projective spaces and manifolds of full flags.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了旗流形上由Cartan子代数作用诱导的多流的共振谱，给出了联合共振的定义，证明了其离散性和共振态的存在性，并在射影空间和全旗流形上显式刻画了谱。
ai.motivation: 理解旗流形上多流的共振结构，推广Pollicott-Ruelle共振理论到更一般的齐性空间。
ai.method: 利用Lie群和Cartan子代数的代数结构，定义联合共振并证明离散性，通过特殊情形显式计算谱。
ai.result: 证明了共振谱的离散性和共振态的存在性，并在射影空间和全旗流形上给出了显式谱刻画。
ai.help_to_user: 为研究旗流形上的动力系统共振现象提供了理论基础和显式例子。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将联合共振定义用于研究量子混沌或量子遍历性中的谱问题。
idea_spark.risk: 高维旗流形上的显式谱计算可能非常复杂，需要更精细的代数工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从Cartan子代数的对称性出发，将共振视为群作用的谱不变量，启发新的谱几何研究方向。

en.tldr: This paper studies the resonance spectrum of the multiflow induced on a flag manifold by the action of the Cartan subalgebra, defines joint resonance, proves discreteness and existence of resonant states, and explicitly characterizes the spectrum for projective spaces and full flag manifolds.
en.motivation: To understand the resonance structure of multiflows on flag manifolds and extend Pollicott-Ruelle resonance theory to more general homogeneous spaces.
en.method: Using the algebraic structure of Lie groups and Cartan subalgebras, define joint resonance and prove discreteness, with explicit spectral computation in special cases.
en.result: Discreteness of the resonance spectrum and existence of resonant states are proved, with explicit spectral characterization for projective spaces and full flag manifolds.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical foundation and explicit examples for studying resonance phenomena in dynamical systems on flag manifolds.

idea_spark.idea: Apply the joint resonance definition to spectral problems in quantum chaos or quantum ergodicity.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit spectral computation on higher-dimensional flag manifolds may be highly complex, requiring more refined algebraic tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing resonances as spectral invariants of group actions via Cartan subalgebra symmetry inspires new directions in spectral geometry.

papers.title: Lie symmetry classification and invariant solutions of time-fractional telegraph systems with variable coefficients
papers.summary: Time-fractional telegraph equations provide fundamental mathematical models for transport processes that exhibit memory and nonlocal effects in industrial and physical systems. These models arise naturally in heat transport in materials with thermal memory, wave propagation in viscoelastic media, and charge transport in spatially heterogeneous semiconductor devices. In this study, we investigate a class of time-fractional telegraph systems with spatially varying coefficients using Lie symmetry analysis and the Riemann--Liouville fractional derivative. We establish a complete Lie group classification for sufficiently differentiable coefficient functions and determine all functional forms that admit such symmetry extensions. The symmetry structure is shown to depend fundamentally on the relationship between the transport coefficient and the potential function, resulting in three distinct symmetry classes. For each case, optimal systems of one-dimensional Lie subalgebras are constructed, and the governing fractional partial differential equations are systematically reduced to fractional ordinary differential equations. Exact invariant solutions are obtained in closed form and expressed in terms of Mittag--Leffler functions, generalized Wright functions, and Fox $H$-functions. These analytical solutions provide valuable insights into fractional telegraph-type transport phenomena and serve as important benchmarks for validating numerical methods in industrial transport modeling and fractional evolution systems.

papers.title: QB-LIF: Learnable-Scale Quantized Burst Neurons for Efficient SNNs
papers.summary: Binary spike coding enables sparse and event-driven computation in spiking neural networks (SNNs), yet its 1-bit-per-timestep representation fundamentally limits information throughput. This bottleneck becomes increasingly restrictive in deep architectures under short simulation horizons. We propose the Quantized Burst-LIF (QB-LIF) neuron, which reformulates burst spiking as a saturated uniform quantization of membrane potentials with a learnable scale. Instead of relying on predefined multi-threshold structures, QB-LIF treats the quantization scale as a trainable parameter, allowing each layer to autonomously adapt its spiking resolution to the underlying membrane-potential statistics. To preserve hardware efficiency, we introduce an absorbable scale strategy that folds the learned quantized scale into synaptic weights during inference, maintaining a strict accumulate-only (AC) execution paradigm. To enable stable optimization in the discrete multi-level space, we further design ReLSG-ET, a rectified-linear surrogate gradient with exponential tails that sustains gradient flow across burst intervals. Extensive experiments on static (CIFAR-10/100, ImageNet) and event-driven (CIFAR10-DVS, DVS128-Gesture) benchmarks demonstrate that QB-LIF consistently outperforms binary and fixed-burst SNNs, achieving higher accuracy under ultra-low latency while preserving neuromorphic compatibility.

ai.tldr: 提出可学习尺度的量化爆发LIF神经元（QB-LIF），将爆发脉冲建模为膜电位的饱和均匀量化，通过可训练尺度自适应调整脉冲分辨率，并引入可吸收尺度策略保持纯累加执行范式，在超低延迟下提升SNN精度。
ai.motivation: 二进制脉冲编码每时间步仅1比特，信息吞吐量受限，在深度网络和短模拟步数下成为瓶颈。
ai.method: 将爆发脉冲视为膜电位的饱和均匀量化，量化尺度作为可训练参数；推理时通过可吸收尺度策略将尺度折叠到突触权重中；设计带指数尾的修正线性替代梯度（ReLSG-ET）以稳定离散多级空间的优化。
ai.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、ImageNet、CIFAR10-DVS、DVS128-Gesture等数据集上，QB-LIF在超低延迟下精度优于二进制和固定爆发SNN，且保持神经形态兼容性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种高效提升SNN信息吞吐量的方法，适用于资源受限或低延迟场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将量化尺度作为可训练参数，并利用可吸收策略在不增加推理开销的前提下实现自适应分辨率。
idea_spark.risk: 量化尺度的训练可能引入额外优化难度，替代梯度设计需谨慎以避免梯度消失或爆炸。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从均匀量化的角度重新解释爆发脉冲，简化了多阈值结构，同时保持硬件友好性。

papers.title: Mathematical Models of Traffic Flow at a Signalized Intersection
papers.summary: This paper presents two one-dimensional mathematical models describing automobile traffic flow on straight road segments at a signalized intersection. When the traffic light is permissive, the flow density and velocity are obtained by solving an initial-boundary value problem for a first-order hyperbolic system. When the signal is prohibitive, the same quantities are governed by a mixed system comprising a second-order parabolic equation for the velocity and a first-order equation for the density.

ai.tldr: 本文提出了两个一维数学模型，描述信号交叉口直行路段上的汽车交通流。
ai.motivation: 为信号交叉口的交通流提供精确的数学描述，以支持交通工程分析与控制。
ai.method: 采用一阶双曲型系统求解绿灯时的流密度和速度，采用二阶抛物型方程与一阶方程混合系统求解红灯时的相应量。
ai.result: 给出了绿灯和红灯两种信号状态下交通流密度和速度的数学表达式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解信号交叉口交通流的数学建模方法，可用于交通仿真或控制策略设计。

idea_spark.idea: 将信号灯切换视为边界条件变化，利用偏微分方程描述交通流动态。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设道路为直线段，未考虑转弯、行人或非机动车等复杂因素。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可借鉴双曲-抛物混合系统的求解方法，用于其他受开关控制的连续介质问题。

en.tldr: This paper presents two one-dimensional mathematical models describing automobile traffic flow on straight road segments at a signalized intersection.
en.motivation: To provide precise mathematical descriptions of traffic flow at signalized intersections for traffic engineering analysis and control.
en.method: A first-order hyperbolic system is solved for flow density and velocity during green light; a mixed system of a second-order parabolic equation and a first-order equation is used for red light.
en.result: Mathematical expressions for traffic flow density and velocity under both green and red signal states are derived.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand mathematical modeling of traffic flow at signalized intersections, useful for simulation or control strategy design.

idea_spark.idea: Treat signal switching as boundary condition changes and use PDEs to describe traffic dynamics.
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes straight road segments and does not account for turns, pedestrians, or bicycles.
idea_spark.inspiration: The hyperbolic-parabolic mixed system solution method may be applied to other switched continuum problems.

papers.title: Backstepping Observer for the Quasilinear Heat Equation with Linear Design Gains: Beyond Local Stability
papers.summary: We consider the one-dimensional quasilinear heat equation with state-dependent heat capacity and thermal conductivity, and design a boundary-output observer based on the backstepping design for a linear heat equation with constant coefficients. Viewing the quasilinear system as a perturbation of the linear one, we establish exponential stability of the origin for the observation error dynamics in $H^1$, with an explicit region of attraction depending on the system parameters, observer gains, and the mismatch between the nonlinear diffusivity and the constant design diffusivity. Importantly, the observation error converges to zero rather than merely to a neighborhood scaling with this mismatch, even though, in contrast to backstepping-based stabilization of nonlinear PDEs, the mismatch need not decay along trajectories and may remain bounded away from zero, acting as a persistent state-dependent multiplicative perturbation. A technical challenge was to perform a sufficiently-fine Lyapunov analysis that does not yield overly conservative results such as mere boundedness of the observation error. Interestingly, while in the linear case the relationship between one of the backstepping observer gains and the convergence rate is monotonic, we show that in the nonlinear setting this is no longer the case: there may exist an optimal value of that gain, beyond which further increases deteriorate the system's performance. Such behavior cannot be predicted without our analysis: one might expect a priori the decay rate to be freely tunable at the expense of a region of attraction that shrinks to zero as the prescribed rate tends to infinity. However, our Lyapunov analysis (supported by numerical experiments) reveals that this intuition is incorrect.

ai.tldr: 针对具有状态依赖热容和热导率的一维拟线性热方程，设计了基于线性反步法的边界输出观测器，并证明了观测误差在H¹范数下的指数稳定性及显式吸引域。
ai.motivation: 现有非线性PDE观测器设计多依赖局部线性化或保守假设，缺乏对拟线性热方程这类强非线性系统的全局或大范围稳定性分析。
ai.method: 将拟线性系统视为线性常系数热方程的扰动，利用反步法设计观测器，并通过精细的李雅普诺夫分析建立指数稳定性和吸引域。
ai.result: 观测误差收敛到零而非仅收敛到与失配量相关的邻域；发现非线性情形下观测器增益与收敛速率不再单调，存在最优增益值。
ai.help_to_user: 为拟线性PDE的观测器设计提供了非保守的稳定性保证，揭示了非线性系统中增益调优的复杂性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用李雅普诺夫分析揭示非线性系统中增益与性能的非单调关系，可启发自适应或在线增益调度策略。
idea_spark.risk: 分析依赖于特定的拟线性结构，对更一般的非线性PDE可能不成立；吸引域显式表达式可能过于保守。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法用于耦合PDE系统（如热-结构耦合）的观测器设计，或结合数据驱动方法估计状态依赖系数。

en.tldr: For the 1D quasilinear heat equation with state-dependent heat capacity and thermal conductivity, a backstepping-based boundary-output observer is designed, proving exponential stability of the observation error in H¹ with an explicit region of attraction.
en.motivation: Existing observer designs for nonlinear PDEs often rely on local linearization or conservative assumptions, lacking global or large-region stability guarantees for strongly nonlinear systems like the quasilinear heat equation.
en.method: Treating the quasilinear system as a perturbation of a linear constant-coefficient heat equation, the observer is designed via backstepping, and exponential stability with an explicit region of attraction is established through a refined Lyapunov analysis.
en.result: The observation error converges to zero, not merely to a neighborhood scaling with the mismatch; a non-monotonic relationship between observer gain and convergence rate is discovered in the nonlinear setting, with an optimal gain value.
en.help_to_user: Provides non-conservative stability guarantees for observer design of quasilinear PDEs and reveals the complexity of gain tuning in nonlinear systems.

idea_spark.idea: The Lyapunov analysis revealing non-monotonic gain-performance relationship can inspire adaptive or online gain scheduling strategies.
idea_spark.risk: The analysis relies on the specific quasilinear structure and may not hold for more general nonlinear PDEs; the explicit region of attraction might be conservative.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to observer design for coupled PDE systems (e.g., thermo-elasticity) or combining with data-driven approaches to estimate state-dependent coefficients.

papers.title: Dynamics, Random Products, and Ultrametric Geometry in Kiselman's Semigroup
papers.summary: We study certain dynamical and metric aspects of Kiselman's semigroup $K_n$. The level function $\mathcal{L}$ is introduced and shown to admit a simple description in terms of right multiplication by generators. We show that every sequence of partial products in $K_n$ is eventually constant. Using $\mathcal{L}$, we further study sequences of random partial products in $K_n$ and show that, in the independent and identically distributed setting where every generator is chosen with positive probability, the hitting time of the eventual constant value is distributed as a sum of $n$ independent geometric random variables. Finally, we define a natural ultrametric on $K_n$ arising from the level function and obtain some basic results on the associated metric balls and spheres.

ai.tldr: 研究了Kiselman半群K_n的动力学与度量性质，引入水平函数L，证明其可由右乘生成元简单描述，并发现所有部分乘积序列最终恒定。在独立同分布随机选择生成元的情况下，到达最终恒定值的命中时间服从n个独立几何随机变量之和。最后，基于水平函数定义了K_n上的自然超度量，并给出了度量球与球面的基本结果。
ai.motivation: 探索Kiselman半群中乘积序列的动力学行为与随机性质，并建立其超度量几何结构。
ai.method: 引入水平函数L，分析右乘生成元下的序列行为；利用概率论研究随机部分乘积的命中时间分布；基于水平函数构造超度量并分析度量球与球面。
ai.result: 部分乘积序列最终恒定；随机命中时间等于n个独立几何随机变量之和；定义了超度量并得到度量球与球面的基本性质。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解半群中的随机动力学和超度量结构提供了理论工具与具体结果。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机乘积的命中时间分布与独立几何变量之和的等价性，用于设计随机算法或分析马尔可夫链的混合时间。
idea_spark.risk: 结果高度依赖于生成元等概率选择的假设，实际应用中概率分布可能不对称。
idea_spark.inspiration: 超度量结构可能为半群上的随机游走或优化问题提供新的几何视角。

idea_spark.risk: 结果高度依赖于生成元等概率选择的假设，实际应用中概率分布可能不对称。
idea_spark.inspiration: 超度量结构可能为半群上的随机游走或优化问题提供新的几何视角。

en.tldr: We study dynamical and metric aspects of Kiselman's semigroup K_n, introduce the level function L, show that every sequence of partial products is eventually constant, and in the i.i.d. setting the hitting time to the constant value is a sum of n independent geometric random variables. We also define a natural ultrametric on K_n from L and obtain basic results on metric balls and spheres.
en.motivation: To explore the dynamical behavior and random properties of product sequences in Kiselman's semigroup, and to establish its ultrametric geometry.
en.method: Introduce the level function L, analyze sequences under right multiplication; use probability theory to study the hitting time distribution of random partial products; construct an ultrametric based on L and analyze metric balls and spheres.
en.result: Partial product sequences are eventually constant; the random hitting time equals the sum of n independent geometric random variables; an ultrametric is defined with basic properties of metric balls and spheres.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical tools and concrete results for understanding random dynamics and ultrametric geometry in semigroups.

idea_spark.idea: The equivalence of hitting time distribution to a sum of independent geometric variables can be used to design random algorithms or analyze mixing times of Markov chains.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on the assumption of equal probability for each generator; real applications may involve asymmetric distributions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The ultrametric structure may offer a new geometric perspective for random walks or optimization problems on semigroups.

papers.title: An uncertainty model for positive-valued parameters with application to robust optimization
papers.summary: Many practical optimization problems involve uncertain parameters that are strictly positive. However, the most common uncertainty sets used in robust optimization are the box and the ellipsoidal sets, which may include non-positive values when the level of uncertainty is large. This can lead to overly conservative solutions or make the corresponding robust counterpart infeasible. To overcome this, in this paper, we propose a new uncertainty-set model that not only preserves positivity but is also computationally tractable. The proposed set uses a particular convex function that measures the variation of uncertain parameters from their nominal values. We can also write the dual reformulation of the associated robust problem. For the theoretical results, we show several properties of the proposed model, including analytical bounds that guide the choice of the uncertainty level, as well as a probabilistic guarantee result. To check the validity of our proposal, we consider photovoltaic-battery operation planning problems and support vector machines in the numerical experiments. For these problems, standard uncertainty models may lead to infeasibility of the robust counterpart, while the proposed uncertainty set gives a tractable dual reformulation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种保持参数正性的不确定性集模型，用于鲁棒优化，避免标准模型因包含非正值导致的保守或不可行问题。
ai.motivation: 实际优化问题中参数严格为正，但常用箱形和椭球不确定性集在大不确定性下可能包含非正值，导致解过于保守或鲁棒对应问题不可行。
ai.method: 利用特定凸函数度量参数偏离名义值的变化，构建保持正性且计算可处理的不确定性集，并推导鲁棒问题的对偶重构。
ai.result: 理论证明了模型的性质，包括不确定性水平选择的解析界和概率保证；在光伏电池运行规划和支持向量机实验中，标准模型导致不可行，而所提模型给出可处理的对偶重构。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理严格正参数的不确定性提供一种计算高效且保持物理意义的方法，避免标准模型的缺陷。

idea_spark.idea: 将不确定性集建模与特定凸函数结合，同时保证正性和计算可处理性，并给出解析界指导参数选择。
idea_spark.risk: 凸函数的选择可能影响模型保守性，且对偶重构的推导需问题结构支持。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从参数正性约束出发，利用凸函数自然保持正性的特性，启发设计更贴合物理意义的鲁棒优化模型。

en.tldr: Proposes a new uncertainty-set model that preserves positivity of parameters for robust optimization, avoiding conservatism or infeasibility caused by standard sets.
en.motivation: Many practical problems have strictly positive uncertain parameters, but standard box and ellipsoidal sets may include non-positive values under high uncertainty, leading to overly conservative solutions or infeasible robust counterparts.
en.method: Uses a specific convex function to measure deviation from nominal values, constructing a positivity-preserving and computationally tractable uncertainty set, and derives the dual reformulation of the robust problem.
en.result: Theoretical properties are proven, including analytical bounds for uncertainty level selection and probabilistic guarantees; numerical experiments on photovoltaic-battery planning and support vector machines show standard models cause infeasibility while the proposed set yields a tractable dual reformulation.
en.help_to_user: Provides a computationally efficient and physically meaningful way to handle uncertainty in strictly positive parameters, overcoming limitations of standard models.

idea_spark.idea: Combines uncertainty set modeling with a specific convex function to ensure both positivity and tractability, with analytical bounds guiding parameter choice.
idea_spark.risk: The choice of convex function may affect conservatism, and dual reformulation derivation depends on problem structure.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from parameter positivity constraints, leveraging convex functions that naturally preserve positivity inspires designing more physically meaningful robust optimization models.

papers.title: Rethinking Dimensional Regularization in Critical Phenomena
papers.summary: We show that it is possible to use dimensional regularization (DR) beyond the usual $\varepsilon$-expansion in the context of renormalization group (RG) calculations in Critical Phenomena. Based on this fact, we propose a new functional RG scheme - Functional Dimensional Regularization (FDR) - and apply it to a scalar theory in three dimensions. We compute the critical exponents of the Ising universality class directly in $d=3$ under various typical approximations. The method that emerges combines the agility typical of DR with the generality proper of functional RG. Moreover, at a given order of approximation, FDR seems to provide faster convergence and better estimates than other functional RGs.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种超越传统ε展开的维度正规化方法，并构建了功能维度正规化方案，直接在三维标量场论中计算了伊辛普适类的临界指数。
ai.motivation: 传统维度正规化在临界现象中通常依赖ε展开，限制了其直接应用于三维等固定维度。
ai.method: 将维度正规化与功能重整化群结合，提出功能维度正规化，并在三维标量理论中实施多种典型近似。
ai.result: 功能维度正规化在给定近似阶数下收敛更快，临界指数估计优于其他功能重整化群方法。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种更高效、更通用的临界指数计算框架，可用于研究相变和普适类。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将功能维度正规化应用于非平衡相变或量子临界系统。
idea_spark.risk: 高阶近似的系统误差和收敛性需进一步验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 维度正规化的灵活性可能启发新的重整化群方案设计。

en.tldr: We show that dimensional regularization can be used beyond the usual ε-expansion in critical phenomena, and propose Functional Dimensional Regularization to compute critical exponents of the Ising universality class directly in d=3.
en.motivation: Standard dimensional regularization in critical phenomena relies on ε-expansion, limiting direct application in fixed dimensions like d=3.
en.method: Combine dimensional regularization with functional RG to construct Functional Dimensional Regularization, applied to a scalar theory in three dimensions under various approximations.
en.result: FDR provides faster convergence and better estimates of critical exponents than other functional RGs at a given approximation order.
en.help_to_user: Offers a more efficient and general framework for computing critical exponents, useful for studying phase transitions and universality classes.

idea_spark.idea: Apply FDR to non-equilibrium phase transitions or quantum critical systems.
idea_spark.risk: Systematic errors and convergence at higher orders need further validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The flexibility of dimensional regularization may inspire new RG scheme designs.

papers.title: Image Classification via Random Dilated Convolution with Multi-Branch Feature Extraction and Context Excitation
papers.summary: Image classification remains a fundamental yet challenging task in computer vision, particularly when fine-grained feature extraction and background noise suppression are required simultaneously. Conventional convolutional neural networks, despite their remarkable success in hierarchical feature learning, often struggle with capturing multi-scale contextual information and are susceptible to overfitting when confronted with noisy or irrelevant image regions. In this paper, we propose RDCNet (Image Classification Network with Random Dilated Convolution), a novel architecture built upon ResNet-34 that integrates three synergistic innovations to address these limitations: (1) a Multi-Branch Random Dilated Convolution (MRDC) module that employs parallel branches with varying dilation rates combined with a stochastic masking mechanism to capture fine-grained features across multiple scales while enhancing robustness against noise and overfitting; (2) a Fine-Grained Feature Enhancement (FGFE) module embedded within MRDC that bridges global contextual information with local feature representations through adaptive pooling and bilinear interpolation, thereby amplifying sensitivity to subtle visual patterns; and (3) a Context Excitation (CE) module that leverages softmax-based spatial attention and channel recalibration to dynamically emphasize task-relevant features while suppressing background interference. Extensive experiments conducted on five benchmark datasets -- CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, SVHN, Imagenette, and Imagewoof -- demonstrate that RDCNet consistently achieves state-of-the-art classification accuracy, outperforming the second-best competing methods by margins of 0.02\%, 1.12\%, 0.18\%, 4.73\%, and 3.56\%, respectively, thereby validating the effectiveness and generalizability of the proposed approach across diverse visual recognition scenarios.

ai.tldr: 提出RDCNet，通过随机膨胀卷积、多分支特征提取和上下文激励模块，在五个基准数据集上取得最优分类精度。
ai.motivation: 传统CNN难以同时捕捉多尺度上下文信息和抑制背景噪声，且易过拟合。
ai.method: 基于ResNet-34，集成多分支随机膨胀卷积（MRDC）、细粒度特征增强（FGFE）和上下文激励（CE）模块。
ai.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、SVHN、Imagenette和Imagewoof上分别超越第二名0.02%、1.12%、0.18%、4.73%和3.56%。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种提升图像分类精度、增强噪声鲁棒性的网络架构设计思路。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机掩码机制与多分支膨胀卷积结合，实现自适应多尺度特征选择。
idea_spark.risk: 随机掩码可能引入训练不稳定，需调整掩码概率和分支数量。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Dropout和空洞卷积启发，融合随机性与多尺度特性以提升泛化能力。

en.tldr: Proposes RDCNet, integrating random dilated convolution, multi-branch feature extraction, and context excitation, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy on five benchmark datasets.
en.motivation: Traditional CNNs struggle to capture multi-scale context and suppress background noise simultaneously, and are prone to overfitting.
en.method: Built upon ResNet-34, incorporates Multi-Branch Random Dilated Convolution (MRDC), Fine-Grained Feature Enhancement (FGFE), and Context Excitation (CE) modules.
en.result: Outperforms second-best methods by 0.02%, 1.12%, 0.18%, 4.73%, and 3.56% on CIFAR-10/100, SVHN, Imagenette, and Imagewoof, respectively.
en.help_to_user: Provides a network architecture design that improves classification accuracy and robustness to noise.

idea_spark.idea: Combining stochastic masking with multi-branch dilated convolution for adaptive multi-scale feature selection.
idea_spark.risk: Stochastic masking may cause training instability; mask probability and branch count need tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Dropout and dilated convolution, merging randomness with multi-scale properties to enhance generalization.

papers.title: Image Compression with Bubble-Aware Frame Rate Adaptation for Energy-Efficient Video Capsule Endoscopy
papers.summary: Video Capsule Endoscopy (VCE) is a promising method for improving the medical examination of the small intestine in the gastrointestinal tract. A key challenge is their limited size, resulting in a short battery lifetime which conflicts with high energy consumption for image capturing and transmission to an on-body device. Thus, we propose an image compression pipeline that substantially reduces the transmitted data while preserving diagnostic image quality. Furthermore, we exploit characteristics of the compression process to identify frames with low diagnostic value mainly caused by bubbles, without requiring additional image analysis. For low-visibility frames, a dynamic bubble-aware frame rate adaptation strategy reduces image acquisition and transmission during these phases while preserving sensitivity to potential anomalies. The proposed compression and frame rate adaptation are evaluated on a RISC-V platform using the Kvasir-Capsule and Galar datasets. The compression method achieves a compression ratio of 5.748 (82.6%) at a peak signal-to-noise ratio of 40.3 dB, indicating negligible loss of visual quality. The compression accomplished a mean energy reduction of the whole system by 20.58%. Additionally, the proposed bubble-aware frame rate adaptation reduced the energy consumption by up to 40%. These results demonstrate the potential of our method to increase the applicability of VCE.

ai.tldr: 提出一种气泡感知帧率自适应图像压缩方法，在保持诊断质量的同时大幅降低无线胶囊内窥镜的能耗。
ai.motivation: 胶囊内窥镜尺寸受限导致电池寿命短，而图像采集与传输能耗高，需要在不损失诊断质量的前提下减少传输数据量。
ai.method: 设计图像压缩流水线，利用压缩过程特征识别气泡导致的低诊断价值帧，并动态调整帧率以减少低可见度阶段的采集与传输。
ai.result: 压缩比5.748（82.6%），PSNR 40.3 dB；系统能耗平均降低20.58%，气泡感知帧率自适应进一步降低能耗达40%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过压缩与帧率自适应技术延长胶囊内窥镜的电池寿命，同时保持诊断图像质量。

idea_spark.idea: 结合压缩过程特征与帧率自适应，无需额外图像分析即可识别低价值帧，实现轻量级节能方案。
idea_spark.risk: 气泡识别依赖压缩特征，可能对非气泡导致的低质量帧（如运动模糊）不敏感，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用压缩过程本身作为信号源，避免额外计算开销，为资源受限设备上的智能感知提供新思路。

en.tldr: Proposes a bubble-aware frame rate adaptation and image compression method that significantly reduces energy consumption in video capsule endoscopy while preserving diagnostic quality.
en.motivation: Limited battery life of capsule endoscopes conflicts with high energy consumption for image capture and transmission, requiring reduced data without compromising diagnostic quality.
en.method: Designs an image compression pipeline that exploits compression characteristics to identify low-diagnostic-value frames caused by bubbles, and dynamically adjusts frame rate to reduce acquisition and transmission during low-visibility phases.
en.result: Achieves compression ratio of 5.748 (82.6%) with PSNR of 40.3 dB; reduces overall system energy by 20.58%, and bubble-aware frame rate adaptation further reduces energy by up to 40%.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how compression and frame rate adaptation can extend battery life of capsule endoscopes while maintaining diagnostic image quality.

idea_spark.idea: Leverages compression process features for frame quality assessment without additional image analysis, enabling lightweight energy-saving solution.
idea_spark.risk: Bubble detection relies on compression characteristics, which may not generalize to other low-quality frames (e.g., motion blur), requiring validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using the compression process itself as a signal source avoids extra computation, offering a new approach for intelligent sensing in resource-constrained devices.

papers.title: Sector-dominant graph-local drivers for path-window barrier Hamiltonians on the Boolean hypercube
papers.summary: We study finite-size adiabatic state preparation on Boolean hypercubes using graph-local drivers built from sector/path coordinates related to monotone Gray-code representatives. The construction is not presented as a new all-$n$ Gray-code existence theorem; rather, it provides finite representatives, explicitly checked through the cases used in the numerical experiments, for testing problem-dependent graph-local drivers. For ordinary diagonal-cost transverse-field annealing, the ordering does not yield a robust advantage, and we include this negative result as a baseline. For non-diagonal target Hamiltonians whose geometry is expressed in the same sector/path coordinates, hybrid drivers combining sector, path-window, and small transverse-field components can substantially improve the final ground-state fidelity in centered barrier instances. Reproduction runs from the accompanying code confirm a representative centered original-window barrier value of approximately \(0.9799\) for the fixed-control hybrid parameters \((w,α,ε)=(8,0.50,0.15)\), while also showing that the improvement is target-class dependent. Randomized and ablation controls indicate that the dominant contribution is the sector-preserving skeleton, with strict one-bit completion acting as a secondary refinement. We provide code, finite certificates, CSV files, validation logs, and reproduction scripts to make the finite-size claims traceable.

ai.tldr: 研究布尔超立方体上的有限尺寸绝热态制备，使用基于扇区/路径坐标的图局部驱动，并验证了混合驱动在非对角目标哈密顿量中的保真度提升。
ai.motivation: 探索在布尔超立方体上使用图局部驱动进行绝热态制备，以改进路径窗口势垒哈密顿量的性能。
ai.method: 构建基于单调格雷码扇区/路径坐标的图局部驱动，结合扇区、路径窗口和小横向场分量，进行数值实验和消融分析。
ai.result: 混合驱动在中心势垒实例中显著提高基态保真度（如约0.9799），但改进依赖于目标类别；扇区保持骨架起主导作用。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了可复现的代码、证书和日志，帮助验证有限尺寸绝热态制备的图局部驱动方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用单调格雷码的扇区分解来定制哈密顿量驱动，可能启发新的量子绝热算法。
idea_spark.risk: 改进对目标哈密顿量的几何依赖性较强，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合扇区保持和单比特完成策略，可启发混合驱动在量子模拟中的应用。

zh.tldr: 研究布尔超立方体上的有限尺寸绝热态制备，使用基于扇区/路径坐标的图局部驱动，并验证了混合驱动在非对角目标哈密顿量中的保真度提升。
zh.motivation: 探索在布尔超立方体上使用图局部驱动进行绝热态制备，以改进路径窗口势垒哈密顿量的性能。
zh.method: 构建基于单调格雷码扇区/路径坐标的图局部驱动，结合扇区、路径窗口和小横向场分量，进行数值实验和消融分析。
zh.result: 混合驱动在中心势垒实例中显著提高基态保真度（如约0.9799），但改进依赖于目标类别；扇区保持骨架起主导作用。
zh.help_to_user: 提供了可复现的代码、证书和日志，帮助验证有限尺寸绝热态制备的图局部驱动方法。

idea_spark.idea: 利用单调格雷码的扇区分解来定制哈密顿量驱动，可能启发新的量子绝热算法。
idea_spark.risk: 改进对目标哈密顿量的几何依赖性较强，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合扇区保持和单比特完成策略，可启发混合驱动在量子模拟中的应用。

en.tldr: Studies finite-size adiabatic state preparation on Boolean hypercubes using graph-local drivers based on sector/path coordinates, showing hybrid drivers improve ground-state fidelity for non-diagonal target Hamiltonians.
en.motivation: To explore graph-local drivers for adiabatic state preparation on Boolean hypercubes, aiming to improve performance for path-window barrier Hamiltonians.
en.method: Constructs graph-local drivers from sector/path coordinates of monotone Gray-code representatives, combining sector, path-window, and small transverse-field components, with numerical experiments and ablation studies.
en.result: Hybrid drivers significantly improve ground-state fidelity (e.g., ~0.9799) in centered barrier instances, but improvement is target-class dependent; sector-preserving skeleton dominates.
en.help_to_user: Provides reproducible code, certificates, and logs to verify the finite-size claims for graph-local drivers in adiabatic state preparation.

idea_spark.idea: Using monotone Gray-code sector decomposition to tailor Hamiltonian drivers may inspire new quantum adiabatic algorithms.
idea_spark.risk: Improvement heavily depends on target Hamiltonian geometry, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining sector preservation with one-bit completion can inspire hybrid drivers for quantum simulation.

papers.title: Edge-Cloud Collaborative Reconstruction via Structure-Aware Latent Diffusion for Downstream Remote Sensing Perception
papers.summary: The exponential surge in high-resolution remote sensing data faces a severe bottleneck in satellite-to-ground transmission. Limited downlink bandwidth forces the use of extreme high-ratio compression, which irreversibly destroys high-frequency structural details essential for downstream machine perception tasks like object detection. While current super-resolution techniques attempt to recover these details, regression-based methods often yield over-smoothed textures, and generative diffusion models frequently introduce structural hallucinations that mislead detection systems. To address this trade-off, we propose the Structure-Aware Latent Diffusion (SALD) framework, an asymmetric edge-cloud collaborative SR system. At the resource-constrained edge, the system decouples imagery into a highly compressed low-frequency payload and a lightweight soft structural prior. Transmitting this decoupled representation minimizes bandwidth consumption. On the powerful cloud side, we introduce a Structure-Gated Large Kernel (SGLK) module and a Semantic-Guidance Engine (SGE) within the diffusion backbone. These modules leverage the transmitted structural priors to gate large-kernel convolutions, effectively capturing long-range dependencies inherent in aerial scenes while actively suppressing generative hallucinations. Extensive experiments on both the MSCM and UCMerced datasets demonstrate that, even under extreme bandwidth constraints, SALD achieves superior perceptual quality (LPIPS) and significantly enhances downstream performance in both scene classification and small-target detection.

ai.tldr: 提出结构感知潜在扩散框架，通过边缘-云协同实现高压缩比下的遥感图像超分辨率重建，提升下游感知任务性能。
ai.motivation: 高分辨率遥感数据在卫星-地面传输中受限于带宽，极端压缩破坏高频结构细节，现有超分辨率方法存在过平滑或结构幻觉问题。
ai.method: 边缘端将图像解耦为低频载荷和轻量结构先验；云端引入结构门控大核模块和语义引导引擎，利用先验抑制幻觉并捕获长程依赖。
ai.result: 在MSCM和UCMerced数据集上，极端带宽下LPIPS指标更优，场景分类和小目标检测性能显著提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何在带宽受限的遥感场景下，通过边缘-云协同和扩散模型实现高质量图像重建与感知任务增强。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将结构先验与扩散模型结合，在边缘端保留关键信息，云端利用先验引导生成，平衡压缩与恢复质量。
idea_spark.risk: 结构先验的提取可能增加边缘端计算负担，且先验质量直接影响云端生成效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受启发于遥感传输瓶颈，思考如何将任务感知先验融入生成模型，实现高效通信与下游性能的联合优化。

en.tldr: Proposes a Structure-Aware Latent Diffusion framework for edge-cloud collaborative super-resolution of remote sensing images under extreme bandwidth constraints, improving downstream perception tasks.
en.motivation: High-resolution remote sensing data transmission is bottlenecked by bandwidth; extreme compression destroys high-frequency details, and existing super-resolution methods suffer from over-smoothing or structural hallucinations.
en.method: At the edge, imagery is decoupled into a low-frequency payload and a lightweight structural prior; on the cloud, a Structure-Gated Large Kernel module and a Semantic-Guidance Engine leverage the prior to suppress hallucinations and capture long-range dependencies.
en.result: On MSCM and UCMerced datasets, achieves superior LPIPS and significantly enhances scene classification and small-target detection under extreme bandwidth constraints.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how edge-cloud collaboration and diffusion models can achieve high-quality image reconstruction and perception enhancement in bandwidth-limited remote sensing scenarios.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining structural priors with diffusion models to retain key information at the edge and guide generation on the cloud, balancing compression and recovery quality.
idea_spark.risk: Extracting structural priors may increase edge computation load, and the quality of priors directly affects cloud generation results.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by remote sensing transmission bottlenecks, consider how to incorporate task-aware priors into generative models for joint optimization of communication efficiency and downstream performance.

papers.title: Proof of the Error Scaling for Universally Robust Dynamical Decoupling Sequences
papers.summary: Universally robust dynamical decoupling (UR$n$) sequences were proposed to compensate pulse imperfections arising from arbitrary experimental parameters while achieving high-order error suppression with only a linear increase in the number of pulses. Although their performance was supported by analytical arguments, numerical simulations, and experiments, a complete mathematical proof of the claimed order of error compensation has been absent. In this work, we present a rigorous proof for UR$n$ DD sequences with even $n$. Using a series expansion of a quantity whose modulus is the fidelity $F$, we derive necessary and sufficient conditions for the cancellation of its coefficients up to, but not including, order $n$. The UR$n$ phase prescription satisfies these conditions, and therefore $1-F=O(ε^n)$. Our results establish the UR$n$ construction on firm analytical grounds and clarify the structure responsible for its high-order robustness.

ai.tldr: 本文严格证明了偶数阶URn动态解耦序列的误差缩放阶数，确认其保真度误差为O(ε^n)。
ai.motivation: URn序列虽被广泛使用，但缺乏完整的数学证明来支持其声称的高阶误差补偿能力。
ai.method: 通过展开与保真度模相关的量，推导出系数消去的充要条件，并验证URn相位方案满足这些条件。
ai.result: 证明了对于偶数n，1-F = O(ε^n)，为URn序列提供了严格的分析基础。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解URn序列的误差缩放理论，并确认其高阶鲁棒性的数学依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用保真度展开的充要条件，可以设计新的相位方案以实现更高阶的误差抑制。
idea_spark.risk: 证明仅针对偶数n，奇数n的情况可能需要额外分析。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从数学上严格刻画误差补偿结构，启发更通用的鲁棒量子控制协议设计。

en.tldr: This paper provides a rigorous proof of the error scaling order for even-order URn dynamical decoupling sequences, confirming that the fidelity error is O(ε^n).
en.motivation: URn sequences have been widely used but lacked a complete mathematical proof for their claimed high-order error compensation capability.
en.method: By expanding a quantity whose modulus is the fidelity, necessary and sufficient conditions for coefficient cancellation are derived, and the URn phase prescription is shown to satisfy them.
en.result: It is proved that for even n, 1-F = O(ε^n), placing the URn construction on firm analytical grounds.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the error scaling theory of URn sequences and confirms the mathematical basis for their high-order robustness.

idea_spark.idea: Using the necessary and sufficient conditions from the fidelity expansion, new phase prescriptions can be designed for even higher-order error suppression.
idea_spark.risk: The proof only covers even n; odd n cases may require additional analysis.
idea_spark.inspiration: The rigorous characterization of the error compensation structure inspires the design of more general robust quantum control protocols.

papers.title: Co-rotating Vortices on Surfaces of Variable Negative Curvature: Hamiltonian Structure and Drift Dynamics
papers.summary: Vortices in fluids and superfluids underpin phenomena ranging from Bose--Einstein condensates and superfluid films to neutron stars and hydrodynamic micro-rotors, where geometry can strongly influence their motion. Curvature can induce vortex motion with no planar analogue. We study Hamiltonian vortex motion on a catenoid, a minimal surface of variable negative curvature, and derive explicit equations of motion, conserved quantities, and reductions for co-rotating vortex pairs. For two identical vortices we find an exact antipodal solution in which the pair rotates rigidly at fixed latitude, with angular velocity $Ω=(Γ/16π)\,K'(V)/\sqrt{-K(V)}$, where $K(V)$ is the Gaussian curvature. Thus the motion is governed by the curvature gradient rather than the curvature itself. The symmetric state is linearly unstable, with growth rate $λ=\sqrt{3}|Ω|$, in agreement with numerical simulations. For generic equal-strength pairs, conservation of the Hamiltonian and rotational momentum reduces the nonlinear dynamics to a single quadrature, yielding bounded relative oscillations together with a secular azimuthal drift. Simulations of the full equations confirm the reduced theory and reveal the same curvature-induced transport mechanism in a localized many-vortex cluster, motivating a broader theory of collective vortex drift on curved surfaces.

ai.tldr: 研究负曲率曲面（悬链面）上同向旋转涡旋对的哈密顿结构和漂移动力学，发现运动由曲率梯度而非曲率本身主导，并推导出精确解和稳定性分析。
ai.motivation: 理解几何曲率如何影响涡旋运动，特别是负曲率曲面上的新现象，为超流薄膜、中子星等系统提供理论基础。
ai.method: 利用哈密顿力学推导悬链面上同向涡旋对的运动方程、守恒量和约化模型，结合数值模拟验证。
ai.result: 发现精确的反极点解，涡旋对以固定纬度刚性旋转，角速度由曲率梯度决定；对称态线性不稳定，增长率为√3|Ω|；一般等强涡旋对呈现有界相对振荡和长期方位漂移。
ai.help_to_user: 提供负曲率曲面上涡旋运动的解析框架和数值验证，有助于设计微流体转子或理解天体物理中的涡旋行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用曲率梯度设计涡旋操控路径，例如在微流控芯片中通过局部曲率变化引导涡旋运动。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中曲率梯度可能难以精确控制，且多涡旋相互作用可能引入混沌。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将哈密顿约化方法应用于更一般的曲面涡旋集群，建立集体漂移的统计理论。
