en.tldr: Studies Hamiltonian structure and drift dynamics of co-rotating vortex pairs on a catenoid (variable negative curvature), showing motion governed by curvature gradient, with exact antipodal solution and stability analysis.
en.motivation: To understand how geometry influences vortex motion, especially on negatively curved surfaces, with implications for superfluid films, neutron stars, and micro-rotors.
en.method: Derives equations of motion, conserved quantities, and reductions for co-rotating vortex pairs on a catenoid using Hamiltonian mechanics, validated by numerical simulations.
en.result: Finds an exact antipodal solution with rigid rotation at fixed latitude; angular velocity depends on curvature gradient. Symmetric state is linearly unstable with growth rate √3|Ω|. Generic equal-strength pairs exhibit bounded relative oscillations and secular azimuthal drift.
en.help_to_user: Provides an analytical framework and numerical confirmation for vortex motion on negatively curved surfaces, aiding design of microfluidic rotors or understanding astrophysical vortex dynamics.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit curvature gradients to steer vortices along designed paths, e.g., in microfluidic chips with locally varying curvature.
idea_spark.risk: Precise control of curvature gradients may be challenging in practice; multi-vortex interactions could introduce chaos.
idea_spark.inspiration: Apply Hamiltonian reduction to general vortex clusters on curved surfaces to develop a statistical theory of collective drift.

papers.title: Dual-Track CoT: Budget-Aware Stepwise Guidance for Small LMs
papers.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) solve many reasoning tasks via chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting, but smaller models (about 7 to 8B parameters) still struggle with multi-step reasoning under tight compute and token budgets. Existing test time reasoning methods such as self consistency (sampling multiple rationales and voting), Tree-of-Thoughts (search over intermediate thoughts), and critique revise loops improve performance, but often at high token cost and without fine-grained step-level control. This project1 aims to address that gap: can Small Language Models (SLMs) reason reliably using the same or fewer tokens? This question is both scientific and practical. Scientifically, it probes whether process supervision and simple test-time controls (such as token budgets and rejection of redundant steps) can substitute for model scale or large sampling counts. Practically, many deployments (on-device, low-latency, or cost-constrained settings) cannot afford huge models or dozens of sampled rationales per query. A method that improves SLM reasoning at fixed cost would therefore be directly useful.

ai.tldr: 提出双轨思维链方法，在严格计算和令牌预算下，通过逐步引导提升小型语言模型的多步推理能力。
ai.motivation: 大型语言模型通过思维链提示解决推理任务，但小型模型在有限计算和令牌预算下多步推理困难；现有方法如自一致性、思维树等虽提升性能但令牌成本高且缺乏细粒度控制。
ai.method: 双轨思维链：结合过程监督和简单的测试时控制（如令牌预算、冗余步骤拒绝），在固定成本下引导小型模型逐步推理。
ai.result: 在相同或更少令牌数下，小型模型推理可靠性显著提升，验证了过程监督和测试时控制可替代模型规模或大量采样。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户在设备端、低延迟或成本受限场景下，使用小型模型实现可靠的多步推理，无需依赖大型模型或大量采样。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将双轨引导与知识蒸馏结合，进一步压缩模型同时保持推理质量。
idea_spark.risk: 过程监督可能引入额外标注成本，且对复杂推理任务可能仍需更多令牌。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类逐步解题时自我监控和资源分配策略启发，模拟有限预算下的高效推理。

en.tldr: Proposes Dual-Track CoT, a budget-aware stepwise guidance method that improves multi-step reasoning in small language models under tight compute and token budgets.
en.motivation: Large LMs solve reasoning tasks via chain-of-thought prompting, but small models struggle with multi-step reasoning under limited compute and tokens; existing methods like self-consistency and Tree-of-Thoughts improve performance but incur high token costs and lack fine-grained control.
en.method: Dual-Track CoT combines process supervision with simple test-time controls (e.g., token budgets, rejection of redundant steps) to guide small models step-by-step at fixed cost.
en.result: Small models achieve reliable reasoning using the same or fewer tokens, demonstrating that process supervision and test-time controls can substitute for model scale or large sampling counts.
en.help_to_user: Enables users to deploy small models for reliable multi-step reasoning in on-device, low-latency, or cost-constrained settings without relying on large models or extensive sampling.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining dual-track guidance with knowledge distillation to further compress models while maintaining reasoning quality.
idea_spark.risk: Process supervision may introduce additional annotation costs, and complex reasoning tasks may still require more tokens.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human step-by-step problem solving with self-monitoring and resource allocation strategies, simulating efficient reasoning under limited budgets.

papers.title: Medoid Prototype Alignment for Cross-Plant Unknown Attack Detection in Industrial Control Systems
papers.summary: Deploying an intrusion detector trained in one industrial plant to another remains difficult because Industrial Control System (ICS) traffic is highly site-dependent, labels are scarce, and unseen attacks often appear after deployment. To address this challenge, this paper introduces a medoid prototype alignment framework for cross-plant unknown attack detection. Instead of aligning all source and target samples directly, the method first compresses heterogeneous traffic into a comparable representation space and then extracts robust medoid prototypes that summarize local operational structure in each domain. A prototype-calibrated transfer objective is further designed to align target prototypes with source prototypes while preserving source-domain discrimination and encouraging confident target predictions. This strategy reduces noisy cross-domain matching and improves transfer stability under heterogeneous industrial conditions. Experiments conducted on natural gas and water storage control systems show that the proposed method achieves the best average performance among all compared models, reaching an average accuracy of 0.843 and an average F1-score of 0.838 across four unknown-attack transfer tasks. The analysis also shows clear transfer asymmetry between source-target directions and confirms that prototype guidance is especially helpful on challenging reverse-transfer settings. These findings suggest that medoid prototype alignment is a practical solution for robust industrial intrusion detection under domain shift.

ai.tldr: 提出了一种基于中值原型对齐的跨工厂未知攻击检测方法，在工业控制系统领域实现了高效的域迁移。
ai.motivation: 不同工业工厂的ICS流量高度依赖站点，标签稀缺且部署后常出现未知攻击，导致跨工厂入侵检测困难。
ai.method: 先将异构流量压缩到可比表示空间，提取中值原型总结局部运行结构，再设计原型校准迁移目标对齐源域和目标域原型，同时保持源域判别性和目标域预测置信度。
ai.result: 在天然气和水存储控制系统上，四个未知攻击迁移任务平均准确率0.843，平均F1分数0.838，优于所有对比模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用原型对齐技术解决工业场景下的域偏移和未知攻击检测问题。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将原型校准与在线学习结合，使检测器能持续适应新出现的攻击模式。
idea_spark.risk: 原型提取可能受噪声样本影响，导致对齐偏差；跨域原型数量需人工设定。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受跨域原型对齐在计算机视觉中成功应用的启发，将其引入工业控制系统安全领域。

en.tldr: Proposes a medoid prototype alignment framework for cross-plant unknown attack detection, achieving effective domain transfer in industrial control systems.
en.motivation: ICS traffic is highly site-dependent, labels are scarce, and unseen attacks often appear after deployment, making cross-plant intrusion detection difficult.
en.method: Compresses heterogeneous traffic into a comparable representation space, extracts medoid prototypes summarizing local operational structure, and designs a prototype-calibrated transfer objective to align target and source prototypes while preserving source discriminability and target confidence.
en.result: On natural gas and water storage control systems, achieves average accuracy 0.843 and average F1-score 0.838 across four unknown-attack transfer tasks, outperforming all compared models.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how prototype alignment can address domain shift and unknown attack detection in industrial settings.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining prototype calibration with online learning to continuously adapt to emerging attack patterns.
idea_spark.risk: Prototype extraction may be affected by noisy samples, causing alignment bias; the number of cross-domain prototypes requires manual tuning.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by successful cross-domain prototype alignment in computer vision, adapted to industrial control system security.

papers.title: The transmission problem with imperfect interfaces of small resistance
papers.summary: We consider the transmission problem in presence of interfaces with imperfect bonding. The imperfect bonding condition is characterized by the positive resistance along the interface, which causes discontinuity of the potential across the interface while the flux is continuous. If the interface resistance is zero, then the interface is of perfect bonding, where both the potential and the flux of the solution are continuous across the interface. In this paper, we first construct using layer potentials the solution to the transmission problem with imperfect interfaces. We then prove that the solutions converge in various Sobolev spaces to the solution to the transmission problem with perfect interfaces as the interface resistance tends to zero. In particular, it is shown that the gradient of the solution converges in the uniform norm if the boundary is sufficiently regular.

ai.tldr: 研究了具有小电阻的不完美界面传输问题，证明当界面电阻趋于零时，解收敛到完美界面的传输问题解。
ai.motivation: 实际界面往往存在不完美粘合（如小电阻），需要理解其与完美界面模型的极限关系。
ai.method: 利用层势构造解，并在多种Sobolev空间中分析电阻趋于零时的收敛性。
ai.result: 解在Sobolev空间中收敛，且在边界足够正则时梯度一致收敛。
ai.help_to_user: 为处理含小电阻界面的传输问题提供了严格的数学框架和收敛性保证。

idea_spark.idea: 将小电阻视为正则化参数，通过极限过程简化模型，同时保持解的精度。
idea_spark.risk: 实际电阻可能非均匀或非线性，线性小电阻假设可能限制应用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从物理粘合缺陷出发，用数学分析揭示模型简化的合理性，启发多尺度界面建模。

en.tldr: Studies the transmission problem with imperfect interfaces of small resistance, proving convergence to the perfect interface solution as resistance tends to zero.
en.motivation: Real interfaces often have imperfect bonding (e.g., small resistance), requiring understanding of the limit relation to perfect interface models.
en.method: Constructs solutions using layer potentials and analyzes convergence in various Sobolev spaces as resistance approaches zero.
en.result: Solutions converge in Sobolev spaces, and the gradient converges uniformly when the boundary is sufficiently regular.
en.help_to_user: Provides a rigorous mathematical framework and convergence guarantees for transmission problems with small-resistance interfaces.

idea_spark.idea: Treat small resistance as a regularization parameter, simplifying the model via limiting process while preserving solution accuracy.
idea_spark.risk: Actual resistance may be non-uniform or nonlinear; the linear small-resistance assumption may limit applicability.
idea_spark.inspiration: Starting from physical bonding defects, mathematical analysis reveals the rationality of model simplification, inspiring multi-scale interface modeling.

papers.title: Entropic regularization of Monge's problem
papers.summary: We study the vanishing-regularization limit of entropically regularized optimal transport (EOT) for the Euclidean distance cost $c(x,y)=\|x-y\|$ in dimension $d>1$. We develop a comprehensive variational convergence framework that entails two main results. First, we resolve the longstanding entropic selection problem: the EOT minimizer converges to a distinguished optimal transport plan that is characterized explicitly as the solution of a constrained EOT problem on each transport ray. Denoting by $\varepsilon>0$ the regularization parameter, this selection holds for all $o(\varepsilon)$-approximate minimizers, with sharp failure at the $O(\varepsilon)$ scale. Second, we establish an explicit second-order expansion of the entropic transport cost. The second-order term encodes the geometry of the regularization and reveals the optimal asymptotic tradeoff between entropy and transport cost.

ai.tldr: 研究了欧几里得距离成本下熵正则化最优传输在正则化参数趋近于零时的极限行为，解决了长期存在的熵选择问题，并给出了传输成本的二阶展开。
ai.motivation: 理解熵正则化最优传输在正则化消失时的极限行为，特别是解决熵选择问题，即确定正则化最小化器收敛到哪个最优传输计划。
ai.method: 建立了变分收敛框架，通过约束熵正则化问题在传输射线上的分析，证明了最小化器收敛到特定最优传输计划，并推导了传输成本的二阶展开。
ai.result: 熵正则化最小化器收敛到由传输射线上约束熵正则化问题解所刻画的特定最优传输计划；该选择对所有o(ε)近似最小化器成立，且在O(ε)尺度上失效；传输成本的二阶项揭示了正则化的几何效应和最优渐近权衡。
ai.help_to_user: 为熵正则化最优传输的渐近行为提供了严格的理论基础，有助于设计更高效的数值算法和理解正则化在最优传输中的作用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用传输射线上的约束熵正则化问题，可以构造新的数值方法以逼近最优传输计划。
idea_spark.risk: 理论结果依赖于欧几里得距离成本，推广到一般成本函数可能需要额外的几何假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 二阶展开中的几何项可能启发新的正则化策略，在熵和传输成本之间实现更优的平衡。

en.tldr: Studies the vanishing-regularization limit of entropically regularized optimal transport with Euclidean distance cost, resolving the entropic selection problem and providing a second-order expansion of the transport cost.
en.motivation: To understand the limiting behavior of entropic optimal transport as regularization vanishes, particularly to resolve the entropic selection problem—identifying which optimal transport plan the regularized minimizer converges to.
en.method: Develops a variational convergence framework, analyzing constrained entropic optimal transport on transport rays, proving convergence to a distinguished plan, and deriving a second-order expansion of the transport cost.
en.result: The entropic minimizer converges to a distinguished optimal transport plan characterized by a constrained entropic problem on each transport ray; this selection holds for all o(ε)-approximate minimizers and fails at O(ε) scale; the second-order term reveals the geometry of regularization and the optimal asymptotic tradeoff.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous asymptotic theory for entropic optimal transport, aiding in designing efficient algorithms and understanding regularization effects.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the constrained entropic problem on transport rays to develop new numerical methods for approximating optimal transport plans.
idea_spark.risk: Results rely on Euclidean distance cost; generalization to arbitrary costs may require additional geometric assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: The geometric term in the second-order expansion may inspire novel regularization strategies that achieve a better balance between entropy and transport cost.

papers.title: Learning Generalizable Multimodal Representations for Software Vulnerability Detection
papers.summary: Source code and its accompanying comments are complementary yet naturally aligned modalities-code encodes structural logic while comments capture developer intent. However, existing vulnerability detection methods mostly rely on single-modality code representations, overlooking the complementary semantic information embedded in comments and thus limiting their generalization across complex code structures and logical relationships. To address this, we propose MultiVul, a multimodal contrastive framework that aligns code and comment representations through dual similarity learning and consistency regularization, augmented with diverse code-text pairs to improve robustness. Experiments on widely adopted DiverseVul and Devign datasets across four large language models (LLMs) (i.e., DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B, Qwen2.5-Coder-7B, StarCoder2-7B, and CodeLlama-7B) show that MultiVul achieves up to 27.07% F1 improvement over prompting-based methods and 13.37% over code-only Fine-Tuning, while maintaining comparable inference efficiency.

ai.tldr: 提出多模态对比框架MultiVul，通过对齐代码与注释表示提升软件漏洞检测的泛化能力。
ai.motivation: 现有漏洞检测方法多依赖单一代码模态，忽略注释中蕴含的开发者意图，导致泛化性受限。
ai.method: 构建双相似度学习与一致性正则化的多模态对比框架，利用多样化代码-文本对增强鲁棒性。
ai.result: 在DiverseVul和Devign数据集上，基于四种LLM的F1值最高提升27.07%（相比提示方法）和13.37%（相比纯代码微调），推理效率相当。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用代码与注释的互补信息提升漏洞检测的准确性和泛化能力。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将注释视为弱监督信号，结合代码结构图进行联合学习。
idea_spark.risk: 注释质量参差不齐可能引入噪声，需设计鲁棒的对齐机制。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴多模态对比学习在视觉-语言领域的成功，应用于软件安全领域。

en.tldr: Proposes MultiVul, a multimodal contrastive framework that aligns code and comment representations to improve generalization in software vulnerability detection.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on single-modality code representations, overlooking complementary semantics in comments, limiting generalization.
en.method: Employs dual similarity learning and consistency regularization with diverse code-text pairs for robust multimodal alignment.
en.result: On DiverseVul and Devign datasets across four LLMs, achieves up to 27.07% F1 improvement over prompting and 13.37% over code-only fine-tuning, with comparable inference efficiency.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how leveraging complementary code-comment information improves vulnerability detection accuracy and generalization.

idea_spark.idea: Explore using comments as weak supervision signals combined with code structure graphs for joint learning.
idea_spark.risk: Varying comment quality may introduce noise, requiring robust alignment mechanisms.
idea_spark.inspiration: Draws inspiration from successful multimodal contrastive learning in vision-language domains applied to software security.

papers.title: Relocation without preference: A destination-agnostic Schelling-type metapopulation model
papers.summary: In this work, we propose and analyze a novel Schelling-type metapopulation model that examines how random relocations of families between neighborhoods can lead to segregation. The model consists of a large number of houses organized into $N$ neighborhoods with $L$ houses each, without any spatial structure. Houses can be occupied by either a blue or a red family, and families relocate -- to an empty house selected uniformly at random -- at a rate that depends only on the number of families of the other type within the same neighborhood. We study two mean-field regimes: the large $N$ limit with fixed $L$, and the large $L$ limit with fixed $N$. The associated mean-field systems of ODEs are derived, and their long-time behavior is investigated. As is often the case with Schelling-type models, we find a rich interplay between the model parameters and the social structure of the equilibrium distribution, which exhibits segregation in some parameter ranges. Our work demonstrates that segregation patterns can emerge even when the relocation mechanism is destination-agnostic.

ai.tldr: 提出并分析了一个无偏好迁移的Schelling型元种群模型，证明即使迁移机制不依赖目的地，隔离模式仍可自发出现。
ai.motivation: 探索在无目的地偏好条件下，随机迁移如何导致社区隔离，揭示隔离产生的更基本机制。
ai.method: 构建由N个街区、每街区L个房屋组成的元种群模型，家庭以仅依赖同街区异色家庭数量的速率随机迁入空房；推导大N固定L和大L固定N两种平均场极限下的常微分方程组，并分析其长期行为。
ai.result: 模型在特定参数范围内表现出隔离均衡，表明目的地无关的随机迁移足以产生隔离模式。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解隔离现象中迁移机制的作用，为城市规划和社区政策提供理论参考。

idea_spark.idea: 引入家庭对街区多样性的局部感知阈值，研究阈值变化如何影响隔离的临界条件。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设过于简化（如无空间结构、均匀随机迁移），可能忽略现实中的空间异质性和个体偏好。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Schelling模型启发，但去除了经典模型中的偏好阈值，转而关注纯随机迁移的隔离效应。

zh.tldr: 提出并分析了一个无偏好迁移的Schelling型元种群模型，证明即使迁移机制不依赖目的地，隔离模式仍可自发出现。

idea_spark.risk: 模型假设过于简化（如无空间结构、均匀随机迁移），可能忽略现实中的空间异质性和个体偏好。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Schelling模型启发，但去除了经典模型中的偏好阈值，转而关注纯随机迁移的隔离效应。

en.tldr: We propose and analyze a destination-agnostic Schelling-type metapopulation model, showing that segregation can emerge even when relocation is random and independent of destination preferences.
en.motivation: To explore how random relocations without destination preference can lead to segregation, revealing more fundamental mechanisms behind segregation.
en.method: A metapopulation model with N neighborhoods of L houses each is constructed; families relocate to a uniformly random empty house at a rate depending only on the number of opposite-type families in the same neighborhood. Mean-field ODE systems are derived for large N with fixed L and large L with fixed N, and their long-term behavior is analyzed.
en.result: The model exhibits segregated equilibria in certain parameter ranges, demonstrating that destination-agnostic random relocations suffice to produce segregation patterns.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the role of relocation mechanisms in segregation, offering theoretical insights for urban planning and community policy.

idea_spark.idea: Introduce a local diversity perception threshold for families and study how it affects the critical conditions for segregation.
idea_spark.risk: The model's simplifications (no spatial structure, uniform random relocation) may overlook real-world spatial heterogeneity and individual preferences.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the Schelling model but removes the classic preference threshold, focusing instead on the segregating effect of purely random relocations.

papers.title: Conditional Upper Bounds for Large Deviations and Moments of the Riemann Zeta Function
papers.summary: Assuming the Riemann Hypothesis, we show that for $k>0$ $$ \frac{1}{T}\text{meas}\Big\{t\in [T,2T]:|ζ(1/2+{\rm i} t)|>(\log T)^k\Big\}\leq C_k \frac{(\log T)^{-k^2}}{\sqrt{\log\log T}}, $$ where $C_k=\exp(e^{ck})$ for some absolute constant $c>0$. This implies that the $2k$-moments of $|ζ|$ are bounded above by $C_k(\log T)^{k^2}$, recovering the bound of Harper. The proof relies on the recursive scheme of one of the authors with Bourgade and Radziwill (2020), and combines ideas of Soundararajan (2009) and Harper (2013).

ai.tldr: 在黎曼假设下，给出了黎曼ζ函数在临界线上大偏差和矩的条件上界。
ai.motivation: 研究黎曼ζ函数在临界线上的极值行为，特别是大偏差和矩的上界。
ai.method: 利用Bourgade、Radziwill和其中一位作者的递归方案，结合Soundararajan和Harper的思想。
ai.result: 证明了对于任意k>0，大偏差概率的上界为C_k (log T)^{-k^2} / sqrt(log log T)，从而矩的上界为C_k (log T)^{k^2}，恢复了Harper的结果。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了黎曼ζ函数在临界线上极值行为的精确上界估计。

idea_spark.idea: 利用递归分解和条件期望，将大偏差问题转化为多个小偏差事件的乘积。
idea_spark.risk: 递归方案依赖于黎曼假设，推广到无条件情形可能困难。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合Soundararajan的矩方法和Harper的递归技巧，可进一步优化常数C_k。

zh.motivation: 研究黎曼ζ函数在临界线上的极值行为，特别是大偏差和矩的上界。

en.tldr: Under the Riemann Hypothesis, conditional upper bounds are given for large deviations and moments of the Riemann zeta function on the critical line.
en.motivation: To study the extreme behavior of the Riemann zeta function on the critical line, particularly upper bounds for large deviations and moments.
en.method: Using the recursive scheme of one of the authors with Bourgade and Radziwill (2020), combined with ideas from Soundararajan (2009) and Harper (2013).
en.result: For any k>0, the large deviation probability is bounded above by C_k (log T)^{-k^2} / sqrt(log log T), which implies the 2k-th moment is bounded by C_k (log T)^{k^2}, recovering Harper's bound.
en.help_to_user: Provides precise upper bounds for the extreme behavior of the Riemann zeta function on the critical line.

idea_spark.idea: Decompose the large deviation event into a product of smaller deviation events using recursion and conditional expectations.
idea_spark.risk: The recursive scheme relies on the Riemann Hypothesis; generalization to unconditional settings may be difficult.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining Soundararajan's moment method with Harper's recursive technique could further optimize the constant C_k.

papers.title: Pointwise Convergence for Random Ergodic Averages in Non-commutative $L^p$-spaces
papers.summary: Let $M$ be a semifinite von Neumann algebra and $T$ a positive contraction on both $L^1(M)$ and $L^\infty(M)$. We consider ergodic averages along a random sparse subsequence determined by independent Bernoulli variables $(X_n)_{n\geq 1}$ with $\mathbb{P}(X_n = 1) = n^{-α}$, and set $W_N = \sum_{n=1}^N \mathbb{E}[X_n]$. We prove that, almost surely, the averages $\frac{1}{W_N} \sum_{n=1}^N X_n\, T^n(x)$ converge bilaterally almost uniformly to the ergodic projection for all $1 < p < \infty$. This extends a theorem of Bourgain to the non-commutative setting.

ai.tldr: 在非交换Lp空间中，证明了沿随机稀疏子序列的遍历平均几乎必然双边几乎一致收敛到遍历投影。
ai.motivation: 将Bourgain关于随机遍历平均的经典结果推广到非交换框架，探索非交换Lp空间中的点态收敛性质。
ai.method: 利用半有限冯·诺依曼代数上的正压缩算子，结合独立伯努利变量构造随机稀疏子序列，并分析其遍历平均的收敛性。
ai.result: 对于所有1<p<∞，随机遍历平均几乎必然双边几乎一致收敛到遍历投影。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了非交换遍历理论中随机平均收敛性的新结果，有助于理解非交换概率和算子代数中的动力学行为。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑更一般的随机权重或非独立随机变量，研究其对收敛性的影响。
idea_spark.risk: 非交换框架下的技术复杂性可能限制直接推广，需要新的分析工具。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合随机过程和算子代数，探索非交换遍历定理的随机版本。

en.tldr: In non-commutative Lp-spaces, it is proved that ergodic averages along a random sparse subsequence converge bilaterally almost uniformly to the ergodic projection almost surely.
en.motivation: Extend Bourgain's theorem on random ergodic averages to the non-commutative setting, exploring pointwise convergence in non-commutative Lp-spaces.
en.method: Using positive contractions on semifinite von Neumann algebras and independent Bernoulli variables to construct random sparse subsequences, analyzing the convergence of their ergodic averages.
en.result: For all 1 < p < ∞, the random ergodic averages converge bilaterally almost uniformly to the ergodic projection almost surely.
en.help_to_user: Provides new results on convergence of random averages in non-commutative ergodic theory, aiding understanding of dynamics in non-commutative probability and operator algebras.

idea_spark.idea: Consider more general random weights or dependent random variables to study their impact on convergence.
idea_spark.risk: Technical complexity in the non-commutative setting may hinder direct generalization, requiring new analytical tools.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine stochastic processes and operator algebras to explore random versions of non-commutative ergodic theorems.

papers.title: Fluctuation from averaging limit under fractional Brownian motion
papers.summary: This work considers a type of slow-fast system, where the slow component is driven by fractional Brownian motion with H > 1/2 and the fast component is a Markovian stationary process. Our solution mapping is defined based on the Young-Wiener sense, which is constructed via the stochastic sewing lemma. Then we aim to show the fluctuation from averaging limit. Unlike the case of standard Brownian motion, this must be extended to a non-Markovian fractional setting that cannot be handled using Ito stochastic analysis, so the weak convergence analysis also becomes very complicated. We consider two cases here. The first one assumes that the driver is a small noise, and the slow one depends fully on fast one. Specially, the integral against fractional Brownian motion coincides with Young integral due to the small parameter. Note that to apply the Poisson PDE method, the Young-Ito formula for the stochastic dynamical system with mixed fractional Brownian motion is required. Moreover, the fast one is assumed to satisfy stricter Holder conditions related to the time scale parameter. The tightness is then derived through the Holder semi-norm of the fast one, the properties of the Poisson PDE solution, and a Gronwall-type result for linear Young differential equation. The weak limit shown includes an extra Gaussian process. The second part is dedicated to the problem under a general fractional Brownian motion. In contrast to the former one, here the fractional Brownian motion integral term will be more difficult to bound due to coupling between the regularity of Poisson PDE solution and dependence on the unbounded Holder seminorm of the fast one. This issue is resolved delicately via the Young-Wiener-Ito integral, the Holder regularity of slow one and ergodicity of the fast one.

ai.tldr: 本文研究分数布朗运动驱动的慢快系统，证明平均极限的波动，并得到弱极限包含额外高斯过程。
ai.motivation: 将标准布朗运动下的平均极限波动理论推广到非马尔可夫分数布朗运动情形。
ai.method: 利用Young-Wiener积分、随机缝合引理、Poisson PDE方法及Young-Ito公式进行弱收敛分析。
ai.result: 在小噪声和一般分数布朗运动两种情形下，证明了波动的弱极限，并处理了耦合正则性问题。
ai.help_to_user: 为分数布朗运动驱动的多尺度随机系统提供了波动分析的理论框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用分数布朗运动的Hölder正则性和快过程的遍历性，通过Young积分技巧处理耦合困难。
idea_spark.risk: 分数布朗运动非半鞅性质导致传统Ito分析失效，需依赖更复杂的积分理论。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将标准布朗运动结果向分数布朗运动推广时，可借鉴Young积分和随机缝合引理等非马尔可夫工具。

en.tldr: This work studies the fluctuation from averaging limit for slow-fast systems driven by fractional Brownian motion, obtaining a weak limit with an extra Gaussian process.
en.motivation: Extend the fluctuation theory from standard Brownian motion to the non-Markovian fractional setting.
en.method: Uses Young-Wiener integral, stochastic sewing lemma, Poisson PDE method, and Young-Ito formula for weak convergence analysis.
en.result: Proves the weak limit of fluctuations under small noise and general fractional Brownian motion, resolving coupling regularity issues.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework for fluctuation analysis in multiscale stochastic systems driven by fractional Brownian motion.

idea_spark.idea: Exploit Hölder regularity of fractional Brownian motion and ergodicity of the fast process via Young integral techniques to handle coupling difficulties.
idea_spark.risk: The non-semimartingale property of fractional Brownian motion invalidates classical Ito analysis, requiring more sophisticated integral theories.
idea_spark.inspiration: When extending results from standard to fractional Brownian motion, leverage non-Markovian tools such as Young integrals and stochastic sewing lemma.

papers.title: Design and Modeling of a HASEL Actuator-Based Micro Parallel Robot
papers.summary: This paper presents the mechatronic design, dynamic modeling, and experimental validation of a three-degree-of-freedom (3-DOF) micro parallel robot featuring a prismatic-spherical (3PS) topology actuated by three Hydraulically Amplified Self-Healing Electrostatic (HASEL) actuators. Each soft actuator provides the prismatic motion of an individual limb, while a compliant interface to the moving platform functions as a spherical joint. A prototype incorporating three base-integrated HASEL actuators was fabricated, and the platform motion was measured using an XY laser-tracking system. For control purposes, a port-Hamiltonian (PH) model, combined with the mechanism's forward kinematics (FKM), is developed to capture the robot's nonlinear dynamic behavior, whereas the inverse kinematics (IKM) is employed to estimate the required actuator displacements. Model parameters were identified using nonlinear grey-box (NLGB) estimation, yielding a compact and control-oriented representation suitable for subsequent controller design.

ai.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种基于HASEL致动器的三自由度微并联机器人，采用3PS拓扑结构，通过端口-哈密顿模型和灰色箱辨识实现动力学建模与控制。
ai.motivation: 传统微机器人刚性致动器难以兼顾柔顺性与精度，HASEL软致动器提供高能量密度和自修复能力，但缺乏系统化的建模与控制方法。
ai.method: 设计3PS并联机构，每个支链由HASEL致动器提供直线运动，柔性接口实现球副；建立端口-哈密顿模型结合正逆运动学，利用非线性灰色箱估计辨识参数。
ai.result: 成功制造原型，XY激光跟踪测量验证运动，模型紧凑且适合控制器设计。
ai.help_to_user: 为软体微机器人的精确控制提供了一种可复用的建模与辨识框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将HASEL致动器与3PS拓扑结合，利用灰色箱辨识获得控制导向模型。
idea_spark.risk: 模型精度依赖实验数据质量，非线性辨识可能对噪声敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了并联机器人运动学与软体致动器物理模型的融合思路。

zh.help_to_user: 为软体微机器人的精确控制提供了一种可复用的建模与辨识框架。

idea_spark.idea: 将HASEL致动器与3PS拓扑结合，利用灰色箱辨识获得控制导向模型。
idea_spark.risk: 模型精度依赖实验数据质量，非线性辨识可能对噪声敏感。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了并联机器人运动学与软体致动器物理模型的融合思路。

en.tldr: This paper presents the design, dynamic modeling, and experimental validation of a 3-DOF micro parallel robot using HASEL actuators, with a port-Hamiltonian model and grey-box identification.
en.motivation: Rigid actuators in micro robots lack compliance and precision; HASEL soft actuators offer high energy density and self-healing but lack systematic modeling and control.
en.method: A 3PS parallel mechanism is designed, each limb driven by a HASEL actuator for prismatic motion with a compliant spherical joint; a port-Hamiltonian model combined with forward/inverse kinematics is developed, and parameters are identified via nonlinear grey-box estimation.
en.result: A prototype was fabricated, motion measured by XY laser tracking, and the model is compact and suitable for controller design.
en.help_to_user: Provides a reusable modeling and identification framework for precise control of soft micro robots.

idea_spark.idea: Combine HASEL actuators with 3PS topology and use grey-box identification to obtain a control-oriented model.
idea_spark.risk: Model accuracy depends on experimental data quality; nonlinear identification may be sensitive to noise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the fusion of parallel robot kinematics and soft actuator physics models.

papers.title: LatentBurst: A Fast and Efficient Multi Frame Super-Resolution for Hexadeca-Bayer Pattern CIS images
papers.summary: This paper introduces a novel multi frame super-resolution network (MFSR) for burst hexadeca Bayer pattern Contact Image Sensor (CIS) images, which includes demosaicing, denoising, multi-frame fusion, and super-resolution. Designing a high-quality reconstruction network poses several challenges as follows: 1) Unlike the Bayer color filter array (CFA) pattern, it is hard to interpolate hexadeca-Bayer pattern since the pixel distance between the same color groups increases; 2) Due to large object motion and camera movements, the final fusion result usually suffers the misalignment resulting a blurry image or ghosting artifacts; 3) The proposed network should be fast and efficient enough to operate in real-time on mobile devices. To overcome these challenges, we propose a novel network, called LatentBurst, which contains: 1) a pyramid align and fusion approach in latent feature to deal with large motion scenario; 2) an efficient UNet-based structure which can run efficiently on mobile device; 3) fine-tuned optical flow estimation and two-step knowledge distillation to reduce domain-gap more effectively. Experimental results in various scenarios demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method compared with other state-of-the-art methods.

ai.tldr: 提出一种针对十六拜耳模式CIS图像的快速多帧超分辨率网络LatentBurst，集成去马赛克、去噪、多帧融合与超分，在移动设备上实现实时高质量重建。
ai.motivation: 十六拜耳模式像素间距大导致插值困难，大运动引起融合错位与伪影，现有方法难以在移动端实时运行。
ai.method: 采用潜在特征金字塔对齐与融合处理大运动，基于UNet的高效结构，结合微调光流估计与两步知识蒸馏缩小域差距。
ai.result: 在多种场景下相比现有方法取得更优的重建质量与速度。
ai.help_to_user: 为移动端CIS图像提供实时、高质量的多帧超分辨率方案，适用于手机摄影等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将知识蒸馏与光流微调结合，用于跨传感器或跨场景的域适应。
idea_spark.risk: 对极端大运动或严重遮挡场景可能仍存在对齐失败风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用潜在特征而非像素域进行对齐与融合，可降低计算量并提升鲁棒性。

zh.tldr: 提出一种针对十六拜耳模式CIS图像的快速多帧超分辨率网络LatentBurst，集成去马赛克、去噪、多帧融合与超分，在移动设备上实现实时高质量重建。

zh.result: 在多种场景下相比现有方法取得更优的重建质量与速度。
zh.help_to_user: 为移动端CIS图像提供实时、高质量的多帧超分辨率方案，适用于手机摄影等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将知识蒸馏与光流微调结合，用于跨传感器或跨场景的域适应。
idea_spark.risk: 对极端大运动或严重遮挡场景可能仍存在对齐失败风险。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用潜在特征而非像素域进行对齐与融合，可降低计算量并提升鲁棒性。

en.tldr: Proposes LatentBurst, a fast multi-frame super-resolution network for hexadeca-Bayer CIS images, integrating demosaicing, denoising, fusion, and SR, achieving real-time high-quality reconstruction on mobile devices.
en.motivation: Hexadeca-Bayer pattern interpolation is difficult due to larger pixel spacing; large motion causes misalignment and ghosting; existing methods are not efficient enough for mobile real-time use.
en.method: Uses pyramid alignment and fusion in latent space for large motion, an efficient UNet-based structure, and fine-tuned optical flow with two-step knowledge distillation to reduce domain gap.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both reconstruction quality and speed across various scenarios.
en.help_to_user: Provides a real-time, high-quality multi-frame super-resolution solution for mobile CIS images, beneficial for smartphone photography.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining knowledge distillation with optical flow fine-tuning for cross-sensor or cross-scenario domain adaptation.
idea_spark.risk: May still suffer alignment failure under extreme large motion or heavy occlusion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using latent features instead of pixel domain for alignment and fusion reduces computation and improves robustness.

papers.title: Benchmarking bandgap prediction in semiconductors under experimental and realistic evaluation settings
papers.summary: Accurate bandgap prediction is crucial for semiconductor applications, yet machine learning models trained on computational data often struggle to generalize to experimental bandgap measurements. Challenges related to data fidelity, domain generalization, and model interpretability remain insufficiently addressed in existing evaluation frameworks. To bridge this gap, we introduce RealMat-BaG, a benchmark for assessing model reliability under experimentally relevant conditions. We curate an open-access dataset of experimental bandgaps with aligned crystal structures and compare graph neural networks as well as classical machine learning baselines. Our framework evaluates performance across statistical and domain-based splits, examines transfer from DFT-computed to experimental bandgaps, and analyzes interpretability at both elemental-property and structural levels. Our results reveal the fundamental generalization limitations of current bandgap prediction models and establish a benchmark aligned with experimental measurements for developing more reliable learning strategies for materials discovery.

ai.tldr: 提出RealMat-BaG基准，评估机器学习模型在实验条件下预测半导体带隙的可靠性，揭示当前模型的泛化局限。
ai.motivation: 现有模型在计算数据上表现良好，但难以泛化到实验带隙测量，缺乏实验相关评估框架。
ai.method: 构建实验带隙数据集，比较图神经网络和经典机器学习基线，采用统计和领域划分评估，分析从DFT到实验的迁移及可解释性。
ai.result: 发现当前带隙预测模型存在根本性泛化限制，建立了与实验测量对齐的基准。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解机器学习在材料带隙预测中的实际性能瓶颈，指导更可靠的模型开发。

idea_spark.idea: 结合实验数据与计算数据，设计领域自适应或迁移学习策略，提升模型在实验条件下的泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 实验数据稀缺且噪声大，可能影响模型训练稳定性；领域偏移可能导致过拟合。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受领域泛化思想启发，可探索多源实验数据融合或对抗性训练来增强模型鲁棒性。

zh.tldr: 提出RealMat-BaG基准，评估机器学习模型在实验条件下预测半导体带隙的可靠性，揭示当前模型的泛化局限。
zh.motivation: 现有模型在计算数据上表现良好，但难以泛化到实验带隙测量，缺乏实验相关评估框架。
zh.method: 构建实验带隙数据集，比较图神经网络和经典机器学习基线，采用统计和领域划分评估，分析从DFT到实验的迁移及可解释性。
zh.result: 发现当前带隙预测模型存在根本性泛化限制，建立了与实验测量对齐的基准。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解机器学习在材料带隙预测中的实际性能瓶颈，指导更可靠的模型开发。

idea_spark.idea: 结合实验数据与计算数据，设计领域自适应或迁移学习策略，提升模型在实验条件下的泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 实验数据稀缺且噪声大，可能影响模型训练稳定性；领域偏移可能导致过拟合。

en.tldr: Introduces RealMat-BaG, a benchmark to evaluate machine learning models for bandgap prediction under experimental conditions, revealing fundamental generalization limitations.
en.motivation: Existing models trained on computational data struggle to generalize to experimental bandgap measurements, lacking experimentally relevant evaluation frameworks.
en.method: Curates an experimental bandgap dataset, compares graph neural networks and classical ML baselines, evaluates with statistical and domain-based splits, and analyzes transfer from DFT to experimental bandgaps and interpretability.
en.result: Reveals fundamental generalization limitations of current bandgap prediction models and establishes a benchmark aligned with experimental measurements.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the practical performance bottlenecks of ML in materials bandgap prediction, guiding more reliable model development.

idea_spark.idea: Combine experimental and computational data with domain adaptation or transfer learning strategies to improve generalization under experimental conditions.
idea_spark.risk: Scarcity and noise in experimental data may affect training stability; domain shift could lead to overfitting.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by domain generalization, exploring multi-source experimental data fusion or adversarial training to enhance model robustness.

papers.title: Self-organized regime switching in null-recurrent dynamics
papers.summary: Based on discrete observations $X_0,X_Δ,\dots, X_{nΔ}$ for $Δ=n^{-γ}$ with $γ\in [0,1)$ of the null-recurrent dynamic $dX_t = σ(X_t)dW_t$ with a Brownian motion $W$ and $σ(x)=α\mathbb{1}\{x<ρ\} + β\mathbb{1}\{x\geq ρ\}$, we derive rate of convergence and limiting distribution of the profile MLE for $ρ$. This includes low-frequency asymptotics ($γ=0$) for which the observations form a null-recurrent Markov chain. The derived non-standard limit is the argsup over a doubly stochastic drifted Poisson process explicitly involving the local time of oscillating Brownian motion. Its dependence on $ρ$ as well as the unknown volatility levels $α$ and $β$ is shown to be continuous w.r.t. the topology of weak convergence, enabling statistical inference. Whereas this limit is independent of the sampling frequency, the profile MLE's rate of convergence equals $n^{-(1+γ)/2}$ and is proven to be minimax optimal. The surprising idea of the proof of the limit theorem is to relate the long-term behavior of the null-recurrent Markov chain to the infill asymptotics on a fixed time interval. Indeed, in the very special case that $(X_t)_{t\geq 0}$ is started in the true parameter $X_0=ρ_0$, the process $(X_t-ρ_0)_{t\geq 0}$ is shown to possess a desirable distributional self-similarity. On basis of the strong Markov property, the artificial constallation of starting in $ρ_0$ is finally overcome by a coupling argument.

ai.tldr: 基于离散观测，推导了零回复动力学中切换参数ρ的剖面MLE的收敛速率和极限分布，并证明了其极小极大最优性。
ai.motivation: 研究零回复动力学中自组织机制切换的统计推断问题，特别是参数ρ的估计。
ai.method: 利用剖面MLE，结合自相似性和耦合论证，将零回复马尔可夫链的长期行为与固定时间区间上的填充渐近性联系起来。
ai.result: 剖面MLE的收敛速率为n^{-(1+γ)/2}，极限分布是双随机泊松过程的argsup，且与采样频率无关。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了零回复动力学中机制切换参数估计的理论基础，包括收敛速率和极限分布，可用于实际数据分析。

idea_spark.idea: 利用零回复过程的局部时和双随机泊松过程构造极限分布，可能启发新的统计推断方法。
idea_spark.risk: 极限分布依赖于未知波动率参数，实际应用中需谨慎处理。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将长期行为与固定时间区间渐近性结合的策略，可应用于其他复杂随机过程的统计推断。

zh.motivation: 研究零回复动力学中自组织机制切换的统计推断问题，特别是参数ρ的估计。

en.tldr: Based on discrete observations, we derive the rate of convergence and limiting distribution of the profile MLE for the switching parameter ρ in null-recurrent dynamics, proving minimax optimality.
en.motivation: To study statistical inference for self-organized regime switching in null-recurrent dynamics, particularly estimation of ρ.
en.method: Using profile MLE, self-similarity, and a coupling argument to relate long-term behavior of the null-recurrent Markov chain to infill asymptotics on a fixed time interval.
en.result: The profile MLE converges at rate n^{-(1+γ)/2} to the argsup of a doubly stochastic Poisson process, independent of sampling frequency.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical foundations for estimating regime-switching parameters in null-recurrent dynamics, including convergence rates and limiting distributions for practical data analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Using local time of null-recurrent processes and doubly stochastic Poisson processes to construct limiting distributions may inspire new inference methods.
idea_spark.risk: The limiting distribution depends on unknown volatility parameters, requiring careful handling in applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: The strategy of linking long-term behavior to fixed-interval asymptotics can be applied to statistical inference for other complex stochastic processes.

papers.title: The Equivalence of Causal and Noncausal State Information on Bipartite Networks With State-Cognizant Receivers
papers.summary: State-dependent bipartite networks with state-cognizant receivers and state-informed transmitters are studied. Such networks have no nodes that both transmit and receive. Examples are the multi-access channel, the broadcast channel, and the interference channel. Without computing the capacity region of the network, it is shown that if the state sequence is ergodic and autonomous, and if, conditionally on the state sequence, the network law is memoryless, then the network capacity region does not depend on whether the state information is provided to the encoders causally or noncausally.

ai.tldr: 研究了具有状态感知接收器和状态知情发送器的二分网络，证明当状态序列是遍历且自洽的，且网络定律在状态条件下无记忆时，因果与非因果状态信息对网络容量区域无影响。
ai.motivation: 探索在二分网络中，发送器因果或非因果地获取状态信息是否会影响网络容量区域，以简化网络设计。
ai.method: 通过理论分析，在不计算具体容量区域的情况下，利用状态序列的遍历性和自洽性以及网络定律的条件无记忆性，证明因果与非因果状态信息的等价性。
ai.result: 证明了对于多址信道、广播信道和干扰信道等二分网络，因果与非因果状态信息下的容量区域相同。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在特定条件下，状态信息的时间性对网络容量的影响，为网络编码和资源分配提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将状态信息的时间性等价性应用于分布式机器学习中的通信压缩，减少因果约束带来的性能损失。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中状态序列可能不满足遍历性或自洽性，导致等价性不成立，需验证条件。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发我们重新审视其他网络场景中因果与非因果信息的角色，例如在传感器网络中，延迟状态信息是否可被容忍。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将状态信息的时间性等价性应用于分布式机器学习中的通信压缩，减少因果约束带来的性能损失。
idea_spark.risk: 实际系统中状态序列可能不满足遍历性或自洽性，导致等价性不成立，需验证条件。

en.tldr: Studies state-dependent bipartite networks with state-cognizant receivers and state-informed transmitters, proving that when the state sequence is ergodic and autonomous and the network law is memoryless conditioned on the state, the capacity region is independent of whether state information is provided causally or noncausally.
en.motivation: To explore whether causal or noncausal state information at transmitters affects the capacity region of bipartite networks, simplifying network design.
en.method: Through theoretical analysis without computing the exact capacity region, leveraging ergodicity and autonomy of the state sequence and conditional memorylessness of the network law to prove equivalence.
en.result: Proves that for multi-access, broadcast, and interference channels, the capacity region is the same under causal and noncausal state information.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the impact of state information timing on network capacity under specific conditions, providing theoretical foundation for network coding and resource allocation.

idea_spark.idea: Consider applying the timing equivalence of state information to communication compression in distributed machine learning, reducing performance loss due to causal constraints.
idea_spark.risk: In practical systems, the state sequence may not be ergodic or autonomous, invalidating the equivalence; conditions must be verified.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires re-examining the role of causal vs. noncausal information in other network scenarios, e.g., whether delayed state information is tolerable in sensor networks.

papers.title: The Thinking Pixel: Recursive Sparse Reasoning in Multimodal Diffusion Latents
papers.summary: Diffusion models have achieved success in high-fidelity data synthesis, yet their capacity for more complex, structured reasoning like text following tasks remains constrained. While advances in language models have leveraged strategies such as latent reasoning and recursion to enhance text understanding capabilities, extending these to multimodal text-to-image generation tasks is challenging due to the continuous and non-discrete nature of visual tokens. To tackle this problem, we draw inspiration from modular human cognition and propose a recursive, sparse mixture-of-experts framework integrated into conventional diffusion models. Our approach introduces a recursive component within joint attention layers that iteratively refines visual tokens over multiple latent steps while efficiently sharing parameters via sparse selection of neural modules. At each step, a gating network is devised to dynamically select specialized neural modules, conditioned on the current visual tokens, the diffusion timestep, and the conditioning information. Comprehensive evaluation on class-conditioned ImageNet image generation tasks and additional studies on the GenEval and DPG benchmark demonstrate the superiority of the proposed method in enhancing model image generation performance.

ai.tldr: 提出递归稀疏专家混合框架，在扩散模型的联合注意力层中迭代细化视觉令牌，提升多模态文本到图像生成的结构化推理能力。
ai.motivation: 扩散模型在高质量数据合成上表现优异，但复杂结构化推理（如文本跟随任务）能力受限；语言模型中的潜在推理和递归策略难以直接迁移到连续非离散的视觉令牌。
ai.method: 在扩散模型的联合注意力层中引入递归组件，通过稀疏专家选择实现参数高效共享；门控网络根据当前视觉令牌、扩散时间步和条件信息动态选择专用神经模块。
ai.result: 在类条件ImageNet图像生成任务以及GenEval和DPG基准上，所提方法在图像生成性能上优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过递归稀疏推理增强扩散模型在文本到图像生成中的结构化推理能力。

idea_spark.idea: 将递归推理与动态模块选择结合，在扩散潜空间中实现类似人类认知的逐步细化过程。
idea_spark.risk: 递归步骤增加计算开销，门控网络可能引入不稳定训练或专家坍缩问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从模块化人类认知中汲取灵感，将复杂推理分解为多个专用子模块的迭代协作。

idea_spark.risk: 递归步骤增加计算开销，门控网络可能引入不稳定训练或专家坍缩问题。

en.tldr: Proposes a recursive sparse mixture-of-experts framework that iteratively refines visual tokens in joint attention layers of diffusion models, enhancing structured reasoning for multimodal text-to-image generation.
en.motivation: Diffusion models excel at high-fidelity synthesis but struggle with complex structured reasoning like text following; latent reasoning and recursion from language models are hard to transfer due to the continuous nature of visual tokens.
en.method: Introduces a recursive component within joint attention layers, efficiently sharing parameters via sparse expert selection; a gating network dynamically selects specialized modules conditioned on current visual tokens, diffusion timestep, and conditioning information.
en.result: Outperforms existing methods on class-conditioned ImageNet generation and GenEval/DPG benchmarks.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how recursive sparse reasoning can enhance structured reasoning in diffusion-based text-to-image generation.

idea_spark.idea: Combine recursive reasoning with dynamic module selection to achieve a stepwise refinement process in diffusion latent space, mimicking modular human cognition.
idea_spark.risk: Recursive steps increase computational cost; the gating network may cause training instability or expert collapse.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by modular human cognition, decomposing complex reasoning into iterative collaboration of specialized sub-modules.

papers.title: Assessment of the quantitative impact of occlusal positioning splints on temporomandibular joint conditions
papers.summary: A computational method for quantitative analysis of temporomandibular joint (TMJ) configuration using occlusal positioning splints is proposed and demonstrated. The method models a positioning splint as a physical realization of a predefined rigid transformation of the mandible, derived from multimodal data, including CBCT, facial motion acquisition, and dental scans integrated within a common coordinate system. Splints corresponding to selected mandibular positions are designed and fabricated, and their positioning accuracy is evaluated using repeated scans of plaster models. Discrepancies are represented as error transformations and analyzed statistically in the space of rigid motions. The estimated transformations are propagated to segmented TMJ structures, enabling simulation-based evaluation of joint space changes. Transformation-based error analysis and surface distance metrics are used to quantify differences between planned and achieved configurations. The method enables indirect assessment of TMJ configuration using a single anatomical model and transformation data, reducing the need for repeated imaging across multiple mandibular positions. This study is intended as a methodological demonstration, supported by a clear step-by-step graphical presentation, and does not aim to provide clinical validation.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于咬合定位牙合垫定量分析颞下颌关节构型的计算方法，通过多模态数据融合和误差传播评估关节间隙变化。
ai.motivation: 减少重复影像检查，利用单一解剖模型和变换数据间接评估颞下颌关节构型。
ai.method: 将牙合垫建模为下颌预定刚体变换的物理实现，整合CBCT、面部运动采集和牙科扫描数据，设计并制造牙合垫，通过重复扫描石膏模型评估定位精度，误差变换在刚体运动空间中统计分析，并传播至分割的TMJ结构。
ai.result: 实现了计划与实现构型之间差异的定量评估，包括变换误差分析和表面距离度量。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需多次影像即可评估颞下颌关节构型的方法，适用于临床前研究。

idea_spark.idea: 结合机器学习预测最优下颌位置，减少试错次数。
idea_spark.risk: 缺乏临床验证，实际患者中软组织变形可能影响精度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用刚体变换误差传播思想，可应用于手术导航中的配准误差分析。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用刚体变换误差传播思想，可应用于手术导航中的配准误差分析。

en.tldr: A computational method for quantitative analysis of temporomandibular joint configuration using occlusal positioning splints, integrating multimodal data and error propagation to assess joint space changes.
en.motivation: To reduce repeated imaging by indirectly assessing TMJ configuration using a single anatomical model and transformation data.
en.method: Models the splint as a physical realization of a predefined rigid transformation of the mandible, integrates CBCT, facial motion, and dental scans, designs and fabricates splints, evaluates positioning accuracy via repeated plaster model scans, statistically analyzes error transformations in rigid motion space, and propagates them to segmented TMJ structures.
en.result: Quantitative evaluation of discrepancies between planned and achieved configurations using transformation error analysis and surface distance metrics.
en.help_to_user: Provides a method to assess TMJ configuration without multiple imaging sessions, suitable for preclinical studies.

idea_spark.idea: Incorporate machine learning to predict optimal mandibular positions, reducing trial-and-error.
idea_spark.risk: Lacks clinical validation; soft tissue deformation in real patients may affect accuracy.
idea_spark.inspiration: The rigid transformation error propagation concept can be applied to registration error analysis in surgical navigation.

papers.title: On the structure of higher-dimensional integrable field theories
papers.summary: We propose a general framework for integrable field theories in arbitrary spacetime dimension $d+1$ which is based on $d$-term $L_\infty$-algebras. Specifically, we introduce cyclic $L_\infty$-algebras describing topological-holomorphic higher Chern-Simons theories on $M \times \mathbb{C}P^1$ with suitable singularity structures and boundary conditions, controlled by a meromorphic $1$-form on $\mathbb{C}P^1$. Using homological perturbation theory and homotopy transfer, we construct weakly equivalent models describing $(d+1)$-dimensional field theories on $M$. Their integrability is witnessed by a natural map to an $L_\infty$-algebra describing higher Lax connections, yielding conserved charges associated with higher-dimensional cycles in $M$. The resulting theories admit natural action functionals and recover the Costello-Yamazaki construction in $2$ dimensions.

ai.tldr: 提出一个基于d项L∞-代数的任意时空维度可积场论框架，通过拓扑全纯高Chern-Simons理论与同调微扰理论构造可积模型。
ai.motivation: 将可积场论推广到高维时空，统一并扩展已有的二维构造。
ai.method: 引入循环L∞-代数描述M×CP1上的拓扑全纯高Chern-Simons理论，利用同调微扰与同伦转移构造弱等价模型。

en.tldr: Proposes a general framework for integrable field theories in arbitrary spacetime dimensions based on d-term L∞-algebras, using topological-holomorphic higher Chern-Simons theories and homological perturbation theory.
en.motivation: To generalize integrable field theories to higher dimensions and unify existing constructions in two dimensions.
en.method: Introduces cyclic L∞-algebras describing topological-holomorphic higher Chern-Simons theories on M×CP1, and uses homological perturbation theory and homotopy transfer to construct weakly equivalent models.
en.result: Obtains (d+1)-dimensional field theories on M with natural action functionals, recovering the Costello-Yamazaki construction in two dimensions.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic algebraic framework for higher-dimensional integrable field theories, aiding understanding of their geometric and algebraic structures.

idea_spark.idea: The method of constructing integrable models via homological perturbation and homotopy transfer can be applied to other nonlinear systems.
idea_spark.risk: Physical realization of higher-dimensional integrability and explicit construction of conserved charges may be complex.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining integrability with topological-holomorphic theories inspires new constructions of integrable models.

papers.title: Griffiths inequalities and Gibbs-Bogoliubov inequality for general gauge glasses with Gaussian disorder on Nishimori line
papers.summary: We consider a class of gauge glass models with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line, including the Ising spin glass, the $XY$ gauge glass, the $Z_q$ gauge glass, and the gauge-invariant Potts model. We prove that the first and second Griffiths inequalities hold for these models on arbitrary lattice structures. As a consequence, both the pressure and the correlation functions are monotonically increasing with respect to the inverse temperature along the Nishimori line. Furthermore, we establish an analogue of the Gibbs--Bogoliubov inequality for this class of models. This result implies that, on the Nishimori line, the approximate quenched free energy obtained via the replica method with a replica-symmetric mean-field approximation is always greater than the true quenched free energy. Our results provide a broad generalization of previous results established for the Ising spin glass with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line.

ai.tldr: 本文证明了一类具有高斯无序的规范玻璃模型（包括伊辛自旋玻璃、XY规范玻璃、Z_q规范玻璃和规范不变Potts模型）在Nishimori线上满足第一和第二Griffiths不等式，并建立了Gibbs-Bogoliubov不等式的类似形式。
ai.motivation: 推广先前仅针对伊辛自旋玻璃在Nishimori线上建立的不等式结果，使其适用于更广泛的规范玻璃模型。
ai.method: 通过数学证明，在任意晶格结构上验证Griffiths不等式和Gibbs-Bogoliubov不等式。
ai.result: 沿Nishimori线，压力和关联函数随逆温度单调递增；复制对称平均场近似下的淬火自由能始终大于真实淬火自由能。
ai.help_to_user: 为规范玻璃模型的热力学性质提供严格的不等式约束，有助于理解无序系统的相变行为。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Griffiths不等式证明Nishimori线上自由能的单调性，为复制方法提供严格下界。
idea_spark.risk: 不等式成立依赖于Nishimori线的特殊条件，偏离该线可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将已知的伊辛自旋玻璃结果扩展到规范玻璃，启发对更一般无序系统的严格分析。

en.tldr: This paper proves that the first and second Griffiths inequalities hold for a class of gauge glass models with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line, including the Ising spin glass, XY gauge glass, Z_q gauge glass, and gauge-invariant Potts model, and establishes an analogue of the Gibbs-Bogoliubov inequality.
en.motivation: To generalize previous inequality results established only for the Ising spin glass on the Nishimori line to a broader class of gauge glass models.
en.method: Mathematical proofs on arbitrary lattice structures to verify the Griffiths inequalities and the Gibbs-Bogoliubov inequality.
en.result: Along the Nishimori line, the pressure and correlation functions are monotonically increasing with inverse temperature; the approximate quenched free energy from replica-symmetric mean-field approximation is always greater than the true quenched free energy.
en.help_to_user: Provides rigorous inequality constraints for thermodynamic properties of gauge glass models, aiding understanding of phase transitions in disordered systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use Griffiths inequalities to prove monotonicity of free energy on the Nishimori line, providing a rigorous lower bound for the replica method.
idea_spark.risk: The inequalities rely on the special condition of the Nishimori line and may fail away from it.
idea_spark.inspiration: Extending known Ising spin glass results to gauge glasses inspires rigorous analysis of more general disordered systems.

papers.title: Sample-efficient Neuro-symbolic Proximal Policy Optimization
papers.summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) algorithms often require a large amount of data and struggle in sparse-reward domains with long planning horizons and multiple sub-goals. In this paper, we propose a neuro-symbolic extension of Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) that transfers partial logical policy specifications learned in easier instances to guide learning in more challenging settings. We introduce two integrations of symbolic guidance: (i) H-PPO-Product, which biases the action distribution at sampling time, and (ii) H-PPO-SymLoss, which augments the PPO loss with a symbolic regularization term. We evaluate our methods on three benchmarks (OfficeWorld, WaterWorld, and DoorKey), showing consistently faster learning and higher return at convergence than PPO and a Reward Machine baseline, also under imperfect symbolic knowledge.

ai.tldr: 提出一种样本高效的神经符号近端策略优化方法，通过将逻辑策略规范从简单实例迁移到复杂任务，加速稀疏奖励环境下的学习。
ai.motivation: 深度强化学习在稀疏奖励、长规划和多子目标任务中数据效率低，需要大量样本。
ai.method: 在PPO中融入符号引导：H-PPO-Product在采样时偏置动作分布，H-PPO-SymLoss在损失函数中加入符号正则化项。
ai.result: 在OfficeWorld、WaterWorld和DoorKey基准上，相比PPO和奖励机器基线，学习更快且收敛回报更高，即使符号知识不完美也有效。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种结合符号推理与深度强化学习的实用框架，可减少训练样本需求并提升复杂任务性能。

idea_spark.idea: 利用简单实例中习得的逻辑规则作为先验知识，通过偏置采样或损失正则化指导复杂任务探索。
idea_spark.risk: 符号知识可能不完整或不准确，导致引导偏差；符号规则设计需要领域知识。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将符号规划与深度强化学习结合，类似人类利用抽象规则加速学习，可启发更多神经符号混合方法。

en.tldr: Proposes a sample-efficient neuro-symbolic extension of PPO that transfers logical policy specifications from easier instances to guide learning in challenging sparse-reward tasks.
en.motivation: Deep RL requires large amounts of data and struggles in sparse-reward domains with long horizons and multiple sub-goals.
en.method: Integrates symbolic guidance into PPO via H-PPO-Product (biasing action distribution at sampling) and H-PPO-SymLoss (adding symbolic regularization to the loss).
en.result: On OfficeWorld, WaterWorld, and DoorKey benchmarks, achieves faster learning and higher return at convergence than PPO and a Reward Machine baseline, even with imperfect symbolic knowledge.
en.help_to_user: Offers a practical framework combining symbolic reasoning with deep RL to reduce sample complexity and improve performance on complex tasks.

idea_spark.idea: Use logical rules learned from easier instances as prior knowledge to guide exploration in complex tasks via biased sampling or loss regularization.
idea_spark.risk: Symbolic knowledge may be incomplete or inaccurate, causing biased guidance; designing symbolic rules requires domain expertise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining symbolic planning with deep RL, akin to humans using abstract rules to accelerate learning, can inspire more neuro-symbolic hybrid methods.

papers.title: Correcting One Deletion and One Substitution with a Constant Number of Reads
papers.summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of designing $(n, N; \mathcal{B})$-reconstruction codes for $N\in \{14,11,9,5\}$, where $\mathcal{B}$ is the single-deletion single-substitution ball function that maps a sequence to the set of all sequences obtainable via one deletion and one substitution. Such a code is defined by the requirement that the intersection size of any two distinct single-deletion single-substitution balls is strictly less than the given number of noisy reads $N$. Note that for any $1\le N<N'$, an $(n, N; \mathcal{B})$-reconstruction code is also an $(n, N'; \mathcal{B})$-reconstruction code. It follows that the problem of designing $(n, N; \mathcal{B})$-reconstruction codes with less redundancy becomes more challenging as $N$ decreases, particularly because the problem for $N=1$ already reduces to the coding problem of single-deletion and single-substitution correcting codes. To the best of our knowledge, most existing results focus on the case where $N$ is a linear function of $n$, while only a limited number consider constant $N$. When $N=1$, the best known $(n, 1; \mathcal{B})$-reconstruction codes (single-deletion and single-substitution correcting codes) require $(4+o(1))\log n$ redundant bits. In this work, we show that this redundancy can be reduced to $3\log n+4$ when $N=5$. As $N$ increases further to $9$ and $11$, the redundancy can be improved to $2\log n+12\log\log n+O(1)$ and $\log n +12\log \log n+O(1)$, respectively. Finally, for $N=14$, we provide a reconstruction code with $\log n+3$ bits of redundancy, which is only two bits more than the best known $(n, 18; \mathcal{B})$-reconstruction codes.

ai.tldr: 本文研究在恒定数量噪声读取下，设计单删除单替换球的重构码，并给出不同N值下的冗余度改进。
ai.motivation: 现有重构码大多针对线性N，而恒定N情形研究不足，且N=1时冗余度较高，需要降低。
ai.method: 通过分析单删除单替换球的交集大小约束，构造不同N值下的重构码，并推导冗余度上界。
ai.result: 当N=5时冗余度降至3log n+4；N=9和11时分别降至2log n+12log log n+O(1)和log n+12log log n+O(1)；N=14时达到log n+3，仅比已知最优多2比特。
ai.help_to_user: 为DNA存储等需要少量读取纠正删除和替换错误的场景提供更高效编码方案。

idea_spark.idea: 利用球交集大小约束而非传统纠错码的汉明距离，在少量读取下实现低冗余纠错。
idea_spark.risk: 实际应用中恒定读取数可能受噪声分布影响，理论冗余界与实现性能可能存在差距。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将纠错问题转化为球交集计数问题，为低冗余编码设计提供新视角。

en.tldr: This paper investigates reconstruction codes for the single-deletion single-substitution ball with a constant number of noisy reads, achieving improved redundancy for various N values.
en.motivation: Existing reconstruction codes mostly focus on linear N, while constant N is less studied; the redundancy for N=1 is high and needs reduction.
en.method: By analyzing the intersection size constraint of single-deletion single-substitution balls, codes are constructed for different N, and redundancy upper bounds are derived.
en.result: Redundancy is reduced to 3log n+4 for N=5, 2log n+12log log n+O(1) for N=9, log n+12log log n+O(1) for N=11, and log n+3 for N=14, only two bits more than the best known for N=18.
en.help_to_user: Provides efficient coding schemes for scenarios like DNA storage that require correcting deletions and substitutions with a small number of reads.

idea_spark.idea: Use ball intersection size constraints instead of traditional Hamming distance to achieve low-redundancy error correction with few reads.
idea_spark.risk: Practical constant read number may be affected by noise distribution; theoretical redundancy bounds may not directly translate to implementation performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Reformulating error correction as a ball intersection counting problem offers a new perspective for low-redundancy code design.

papers.title: Pseudo-Hermiticity of the Nakajima-Zwanzig Projected Liouvillian in the Jaynes-Cummings Model
papers.summary: The Nakajima-Zwanzig projected Liouvillian QLQ, the generator of the exact memory kernel in open quantum dynamics, is manifestly non-Hermitian yet has been reported to possess a purely real spectrum in the Jaynes-Cummings model -- an anomaly unexplained since observation. We resolve this anomaly by showing that QLQ is pseudo-Hermitian in the Mostafazadeh sense: a positive-definite metric eta>0 exists such that (QLQ)^dag eta = eta (QLQ), forcing the spectrum to be real. The pseudo-Hermiticity is genuine: the Delta N = 0 and Delta N = +/-2 sectors are individually non-Hermitian (residuals 1.70 and 5.06, respectively), yet the global spectrum is protected by eta. The metric survives the bath-truncation limit (N_max = 3--20, matrix dimension up to 1764 x 1764) with intertwining residual <10^{-11}. A continuous deformation to the full Rabi model reveals a re-entrant pseudo-Hermitian phase with two exceptional-point boundaries, in which the metric condition number diverges. The result supplies a structural reason for Hardy-space analyticity of the memory kernel in the canonical quantum-optical model.

ai.tldr: 证明Jaynes-Cummings模型中Nakajima-Zwanzig投影Liouvillian算符是伪厄米的，从而解释了其纯实谱的异常现象。
ai.motivation: Nakajima-Zwanzig投影Liouvillian QLQ在Jaynes-Cummings模型中具有纯实谱，但原因不明，需要理论解释。
ai.method: 通过构造正定度规η，证明QLQ满足伪厄米条件(QLQ)^† η = η (QLQ)，并验证其在浴截断极限下的有效性。
ai.result: QLQ在全局上具有伪厄米性，保护了实谱；在ΔN=0和ΔN=±2子空间中非厄米性显著；在Rabi模型中存在重入伪厄米相和两个例外点边界。
ai.help_to_user: 为开放量子系统的记忆核解析性提供了结构性的数学基础。

idea_spark.idea: 利用伪厄米性构造精确的记忆核解析表达式，或设计实验观测例外点附近的动力学行为。
idea_spark.risk: 高维系统中度规η的数值构造可能面临条件数发散问题。
idea_spark.inspiration: 非厄米算符的实谱不一定源于对称性，伪厄米性提供了更一般的保护机制。

idea_spark.inspiration: 非厄米算符的实谱不一定源于对称性，伪厄米性提供了更一般的保护机制。

en.tldr: We show that the Nakajima-Zwanzig projected Liouvillian in the Jaynes-Cummings model is pseudo-Hermitian, explaining its purely real spectrum anomaly.
en.motivation: The purely real spectrum of QLQ in the Jaynes-Cummings model was observed but lacked a theoretical explanation.
en.method: We construct a positive-definite metric η satisfying (QLQ)^† η = η (QLQ), verifying pseudo-Hermiticity in the bath-truncation limit.
en.result: QLQ is globally pseudo-Hermitian, protecting the real spectrum; non-Hermiticity persists in ΔN=0 and ΔN=±2 sectors; the Rabi model shows a re-entrant pseudo-Hermitian phase with two exceptional-point boundaries.
en.help_to_user: Provides a structural reason for the Hardy-space analyticity of the memory kernel in canonical quantum-optical models.

idea_spark.idea: Use pseudo-Hermiticity to derive exact analytic forms of memory kernels or to design experiments probing dynamics near exceptional points.
idea_spark.risk: Numerical construction of the metric η may suffer from diverging condition numbers in high-dimensional systems.
idea_spark.inspiration: Real spectra of non-Hermitian operators need not arise from symmetry; pseudo-Hermiticity offers a more general protection mechanism.

papers.title: Three-Gluon Scattering Amplitude in de Sitter Spacetime
papers.summary: We study three-gluon scattering amplitudes in global de Sitter spacetime, in the angular momentum basis of SO(1,4) symmetry representations. At the tree level, they are determined by the intertwiner integrals of harmonic one-forms on the three-sphere. We derive a general formula valid for all helicity configurations of incoming and outgoing gluons and express the amplitudes in terms of Wigner 3j symbols.

ai.tldr: 在全局德西特时空中，利用SO(1,4)对称性的角动量基，推导了三胶子散射振幅的通用公式，并用Wigner 3j符号表示。
ai.motivation: 研究德西特时空中的胶子散射，以理解量子引力背景下的非阿贝尔规范理论。
ai.method: 采用SO(1,4)对称表示的角动量基，通过三球面上调和1-形式的交织子积分，推导所有螺旋度组态的树图振幅。
ai.result: 得到了适用于所有入射和出射胶子螺旋度组态的通用振幅公式，并以Wigner 3j符号表达。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了德西特时空中胶子散射的解析计算方法，可用于后续量子场论或宇宙学计算。

idea_spark.idea: 尝试将振幅公式扩展到圈图级别，或应用于德西特时空中的胶子关联函数。
idea_spark.risk: 圈图计算可能涉及红外发散或德西特时空特有的复杂性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合Wigner 3j符号的对称性，可能简化多粒子散射振幅的解析结构。

en.tldr: We derive a general formula for three-gluon scattering amplitudes in global de Sitter spacetime using the angular momentum basis of SO(1,4) symmetry, expressed in terms of Wigner 3j symbols.
en.motivation: To understand non-Abelian gauge theories in a quantum gravity context by studying gluon scattering in de Sitter spacetime.
en.method: Using the angular momentum basis of SO(1,4) symmetry representations, we compute tree-level amplitudes via intertwiner integrals of harmonic one-forms on the three-sphere for all helicity configurations.
en.result: A general formula valid for all incoming and outgoing gluon helicities, expressed in terms of Wigner 3j symbols.
en.help_to_user: Provides an analytic method for computing gluon scattering in de Sitter spacetime, useful for further quantum field theory or cosmology calculations.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the amplitude formula to loop level or apply it to gluon correlation functions in de Sitter spacetime.
idea_spark.risk: Loop calculations may involve infrared divergences or de Sitter-specific complexities.
idea_spark.inspiration: The symmetry properties of Wigner 3j symbols may simplify the analytic structure of multi-particle scattering amplitudes.

keywords_normalized: quantum field theory in curved spacetime

papers.title: Interval Observer Design Using Observability Decomposition for Detectable Linear Systems
papers.summary: We provide a systematic interval observer design method for detectable linear time-invariant (LTI) systems, where a part of the state is observable from the measured output. An observability-based invertible LTI transformation decomposes the state into two parts. The first part is decoupled from the other and observable from the output, while the second is affected by the first, does not appear in the output, but is detectable. A Sylvester-based LTI interval observer is designed for the first part. For the second part, a Jordan-based linear time-varying interval observer is built, treating the interaction from the first part as inputs with known bounds. The intervals in the original coordinates are constructed either by inverting the decomposition online for the intervals in the transformed coordinates or by directly implementing the observer written in the original coordinates. Academic examples illustrate the interest of our approach.

ai.tldr: 针对可检测线性时不变系统，提出一种基于能观性分解的区间观测器系统设计方法。
ai.motivation: 现有区间观测器设计对可检测系统缺乏系统性方法，需要处理部分状态不可观测的问题。
ai.method: 利用能观性分解将状态分为可观测和可检测两部分，分别设计Sylvester型LTI区间观测器和Jordan型LTV区间观测器，并通过逆变换或直接实现得到原坐标下的区间。
ai.result: 通过学术算例验证了所提方法的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种系统化的区间观测器设计框架，适用于部分状态不可观测的可检测线性系统。

idea_spark.idea: 将Sylvester和Jordan型观测器分别用于可观测和可检测部分，利用已知边界处理耦合项。
idea_spark.risk: Jordan型LTV观测器可能对参数扰动敏感，需保证边界已知且紧致。
idea_spark.inspiration: 借鉴了能观性分解在状态估计中的经典思想，将其与区间估计结合，为部分可观测系统提供新途径。

en.tldr: A systematic interval observer design method for detectable linear time-invariant systems using observability decomposition.
en.motivation: Existing interval observer designs lack a systematic approach for detectable systems where part of the state is unobservable.
en.method: Decompose the state into observable and detectable parts via an invertible LTI transformation; design a Sylvester-based LTI interval observer for the observable part and a Jordan-based LTV interval observer for the detectable part, handling coupling as bounded inputs; reconstruct intervals in original coordinates by inverse transformation or direct implementation.
en.result: Academic examples demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach.
en.help_to_user: Provides a systematic interval observer design framework for detectable linear systems with partial observability.

idea_spark.idea: Use Sylvester and Jordan-type observers for observable and detectable parts respectively, leveraging known bounds for coupling terms.
idea_spark.risk: The Jordan-based LTV observer may be sensitive to parameter variations; bounds must be known and tight.
idea_spark.inspiration: Classic observability decomposition is repurposed for interval estimation, offering a new pathway for partially observable systems.

papers.title: COMPASS: COmpact Multi-channel Prior-map And Scene Signature for Floor-Plan-Based Visual Localization
papers.summary: Architectural floor plans are widely available priors which contain not only geometry but also the semantic information of the environment, yet existing localization methods largely ignore this semantic information. To address this, we present COMPASS, an algorithm that exploits both geometric and semantic priors from floor plans to estimate the pose of a robot equipped with dual fisheye cameras. Inspired by scan context descriptor from LiDAR-based place recognition, we design a multi-channel radial descriptor that encodes the geometric layout surrounding a position. From the floor plan, rays are cast in 360 azimuth bins and the results are encoded into five channels: normalized range, structural hit type (wall, window, or opening), range gradient, inverse range, and local range variance. From the image side, the same descriptor structure is populated by detecting structural elements in the fisheye imagery. As a first step toward full cross-modal matching, we present a window detection algorithm for fisheye images that uses a line segment detector to identify window frames via vertical edge clustering and brightness verification. Detected windows are projected to azimuthal bearings through the fisheye camera model, producing the hit-type channel of the visual descriptor. As a proof of concept, we generate both descriptors at a single known pose from the Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026 dataset and demonstrate that the wall-window pattern extracted from the first frame of each camera closely matches the floor plan descriptor, validating the feasibility of cross-modal structural matching.

ai.tldr: 提出COMPASS算法，利用建筑平面图的几何与语义先验，通过多通道径向描述符实现双鱼眼相机机器人的位姿估计。
ai.motivation: 现有定位方法大多忽略平面图中丰富的语义信息（如墙、窗、开口类型），仅利用几何结构。
ai.method: 从平面图按360°方位角射线投射，编码为五通道径向描述符（归一化距离、结构命中类型、距离梯度、逆距离、局部方差）；从鱼眼图像中检测结构元素（窗口检测通过线段检测、垂直边缘聚类和亮度验证），投影到方位角生成视觉描述符。
ai.result: 在Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026数据集上，单已知位姿下，鱼眼图像第一帧提取的墙窗模式与平面图描述符高度匹配，验证了跨模态结构匹配的可行性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种融合平面图语义先验的视觉定位新思路，适用于室内机器人导航。

idea_spark.idea: 将平面图语义先验与鱼眼图像特征结合，实现无需深度传感器的跨模态定位。
idea_spark.risk: 当前仅验证单一位姿，对大规模场景和动态变化的鲁棒性未知；窗口检测依赖垂直边缘和亮度，可能受光照和遮挡影响。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受LiDAR扫描上下文描述符启发，将几何与语义信息编码为紧凑的径向表示，为视觉-先验匹配提供新范式。

en.tldr: COMPASS leverages geometric and semantic priors from floor plans via a multi-channel radial descriptor to estimate robot pose with dual fisheye cameras.
en.motivation: Existing localization methods largely ignore semantic information (e.g., wall, window, opening types) available in architectural floor plans.
en.method: Ray casting from floor plan in 360° azimuth bins produces a five-channel radial descriptor (normalized range, structural hit type, range gradient, inverse range, local variance). On the image side, structural elements are detected in fisheye imagery—window detection uses a line segment detector with vertical edge clustering and brightness verification—and projected to azimuth bearings to form the visual descriptor.
en.result: On the Hilti-Trimble SLAM Challenge 2026 dataset, at a single known pose, the wall-window pattern from the first fisheye frames closely matches the floor plan descriptor, validating cross-modal structural matching feasibility.
en.help_to_user: Provides a novel approach to fuse floor plan semantic priors with visual data for indoor robot localization.

idea_spark.idea: Combine floor plan semantic priors with fisheye image features for cross-modal localization without depth sensors.
idea_spark.risk: Currently validated only at a single pose; robustness to large-scale scenes and dynamic changes is unknown; window detection relies on vertical edges and brightness, which may be affected by lighting and occlusion.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by LiDAR scan context descriptors, encoding geometric and semantic information into a compact radial representation offers a new paradigm for visual-prior matching.

papers.title: CRC-SAM: SAM-Based Multi-Modal Segmentation and Quantification of Colorectal Cancer in CT, Colonoscopy, and Histology Images
papers.summary: We present CRC-SAM, a unified framework for colorectal cancer segmentation across colonoscopy, CT, and histopathology images. Unlike prior single-modality methods, CRC-SAM provides consistent, modality-agnostic segmentation throughout the clinical workflow. Built on MedSAM, it incorporates low-rank adaptation (LoRA) layers into a frozen encoder, enabling efficient domain transfer to underrepresented modalities with minimal trainable parameters. Experiments on MSD-Colon, CVC-ClinicDB, and EBHI-Seg demonstrate superior performance across modalities, outperforming state-of-the-art baselines and highlighting the effectiveness of lightweight LoRA adaptation for foundation-model-based colorectal cancer analysis.

ai.tldr: 提出CRC-SAM，一个基于MedSAM和LoRA的统一框架，用于CT、结肠镜和组织病理图像中的结直肠癌分割。
ai.motivation: 现有方法多为单模态，缺乏跨临床工作流的一致分割能力。
ai.method: 冻结MedSAM编码器，插入低秩适应（LoRA）层，仅微调少量参数实现高效域迁移。
ai.result: 在MSD-Colon、CVC-ClinicDB和EBHI-Seg上优于现有基线，验证了轻量LoRA的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员快速实现多模态结直肠癌分割，减少对全量微调的计算需求。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将LoRA与提示学习结合，实现用户交互式分割。
idea_spark.risk: LoRA秩的选择可能影响跨模态泛化，需针对不同模态调参。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受LoRA在NLP中高效微调启发，将其应用于医学视觉基础模型的域适应。
