en.tldr: Proposes CRC-SAM, a unified framework based on MedSAM and LoRA for colorectal cancer segmentation across CT, colonoscopy, and histopathology images.
en.motivation: Existing methods are mostly single-modality and lack consistent segmentation across the clinical workflow.
en.method: Freezes the MedSAM encoder and inserts low-rank adaptation (LoRA) layers, enabling efficient domain transfer with minimal trainable parameters.
en.result: Outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on MSD-Colon, CVC-ClinicDB, and EBHI-Seg, demonstrating the effectiveness of lightweight LoRA adaptation.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers quickly implement multi-modal colorectal cancer segmentation with reduced computational cost for fine-tuning.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining LoRA with prompt learning for interactive user-guided segmentation.
idea_spark.risk: Choice of LoRA rank may affect cross-modal generalization and requires tuning per modality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by LoRA's efficient fine-tuning in NLP, applied to domain adaptation of medical vision foundation models.

papers.title: Quantitative Analyticity for Lyapunov Exponents of Random Products of Matrices with Explicit Polydiscs and Cauchy Coefficient Bounds
papers.summary: The top Lyapunov exponent $λ_+(A, p)$ of a random product of matrices in $\mathrm{GL}(d, \mathbb{R})$, $d \geq 2$, with simple top spectrum, depends real-analytically on the probability weights $p$ and the matrix coefficients $A$. We establish a quantitative form of this analyticity through a single Kato perturbation argument on the complexified Markov operator on Hölder functions on projective space, yielding seven main theorems with explicit closed-form constants: (i) an explicit polydisc of holomorphy for $p \mapsto λ_+(A, p)$ in $\mathbb{C}^N$, giving the quantitative form of the Peres and Bezerra-Sánchez-Tall analyticity theorem; (ii) closed-form Cauchy bounds on its Taylor coefficients; (iii) joint analyticity in the weights $p$ and the matrix entries $A$, with explicit radii in both; (iv) an extension to Markov-chain driven cocycles, with polydisc radius explicit in the chain spectral gap; (v) explicit polynomial boundary-decay rates as $p$ approaches $\partial Δ_N$, conditional on a spectral-gap-decay hypothesis; (vi) extension to $\mathrm{GL}(d, \mathbb{R})$ for all $d \geq 2$ via the Fubini-Study metric; and (vii) a Grassmannian variant giving quantitative analyticity of the partial sums $Λ_k = λ_1 + \cdots + λ_k$ under strong $k$-irreducibility, hence of each individual sub-top Lyapunov exponent. The polydisc radius is method-optimal within the Kato class, and a Bernstein-type result shows the Cauchy growth $α! \cdot M_*/r_*^{|α|}$ is sharp up to constants. A two-matrix example with numerical values connects the bounds to the Hölder estimates of the companion paper Thiam (Nov. 2025).

ai.tldr: 本文通过Kato摄动论证，对随机矩阵乘积的顶部Lyapunov指数建立了定量解析性，给出了显式的多圆盘和Cauchy系数界。
ai.motivation: 现有定理仅定性保证Lyapunov指数关于概率权重和矩阵系数的实解析性，缺乏显式的收敛半径和系数界。
ai.method: 在投影空间Hölder函数上对复化Markov算子应用单次Kato摄动，结合Fubini-Study度量和Grassmannian变体。
ai.result: 得到七个主要定理，包括显式多圆盘、Cauchy界、联合解析性、Markov链推广、边界衰减率、所有维数GL(d,R)的扩展以及子指数和的定量解析性。
ai.help_to_user: 为随机动力系统Lyapunov指数的计算和估计提供了显式、可验证的解析性框架。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Fubini-Study度量将投影空间上的解析性自然扩展到Grassmannian，从而处理多个Lyapunov指数之和。
idea_spark.risk: 显式常数依赖于谱间隙和Hölder参数，实际应用中可能难以精确计算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将单次Kato摄动与复分析中的Cauchy估计结合，为非线性谱问题提供定量工具。

en.tldr: This paper establishes quantitative analyticity for the top Lyapunov exponent of random matrix products via a single Kato perturbation argument, yielding explicit polydiscs and Cauchy coefficient bounds.
en.motivation: Existing theorems only guarantee real analyticity qualitatively, without explicit convergence radii or coefficient bounds.
en.method: Apply a single Kato perturbation to the complexified Markov operator on Hölder functions on projective space, using the Fubini-Study metric and Grassmannian variants.
en.result: Seven main theorems: explicit polydisc of holomorphy, closed-form Cauchy bounds, joint analyticity in weights and matrix entries, extension to Markov-driven cocycles, boundary decay rates, extension to all GL(d,R), and quantitative analyticity for sums of Lyapunov exponents.
en.help_to_user: Provides an explicit, verifiable analyticity framework for computing and estimating Lyapunov exponents in random dynamical systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use the Fubini-Study metric to naturally extend analyticity from projective space to Grassmannians, enabling treatment of sums of Lyapunov exponents.
idea_spark.risk: Explicit constants depend on spectral gaps and Hölder parameters, which may be difficult to compute precisely in applications.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining a single Kato perturbation with Cauchy estimates from complex analysis provides a quantitative tool for nonlinear spectral problems.

papers.title: WhisperPipe: A Resource-Efficient Streaming Architecture for Real-Time Automatic Speech Recognition
papers.summary: Real-time automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems face a fundamental trade-off between transcription accuracy and computational efficiency, particularly when deploying large-scale transformer models like Whisper. Existing streaming approaches either sacrifice accuracy through aggressive chunking or incur prohibitive memory costs through unbounded context accumulation. We present WhisperPipe, a novel streaming architecture that achieves bounded memory consumption while maintaining transcription quality through three key innovations a hybrid Voice Activity Detection (VAD) pipeline combining Silero VAD with energy-based filtering to reduce false activations by 34%, a dynamic buffering mechanism with overlapping context windows that prevents information loss at segment boundaries, and an adaptive processing strategy that balances latency and accuracy based on speech characteristics. Evaluated on 2.5 hours of diverse audio data, WhisperPipe demonstrates a median end-to-end latency of 89ms (90th percentile: 142ms) while consuming 48% less peak GPU memory and 80.9% lower average GPU utilization compared to baseline Whisper implementations. The system maintains stable memory usage over extended sessions, with zero growth rate across 150-minute continuous operation. Comparative analysis against related work shows that WhisperPipe achieves competitive accuracy (WER within 2% of offline Whisper) while operating at 3-5x lower latency than existing streaming solutions. The architecture's modular design enables deployment across resource-constrained environments, from edge devices to cloud infrastructure. Our results demonstrate that careful architectural design can reconcile the competing demands of real-time responsiveness and model sophistication in production ASR systems.

ai.tldr: 提出WhisperPipe，一种资源高效的流式架构，在保持转录质量的同时实现有界内存消耗，用于实时自动语音识别。
ai.motivation: 实时ASR系统在准确性和计算效率之间存在根本性权衡，现有流式方法要么通过激进分块牺牲准确性，要么因无界上下文积累导致高昂内存成本。

en.tldr: Proposes WhisperPipe, a resource-efficient streaming architecture that achieves bounded memory consumption while maintaining transcription quality for real-time ASR.
en.motivation: Real-time ASR systems face a fundamental trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency; existing streaming methods either sacrifice accuracy via aggressive chunking or incur prohibitive memory costs from unbounded context accumulation.
en.method: Hybrid VAD pipeline (Silero VAD + energy-based filtering) reduces false activations by 34%; dynamic buffering with overlapping context windows prevents information loss at segment boundaries; adaptive processing strategy balances latency and accuracy based on speech characteristics.
en.result: Median end-to-end latency 89ms (90th percentile 142ms), 48% lower peak GPU memory, 80.9% lower average GPU utilization, zero memory growth over 150-minute continuous operation, WER within 2% of offline Whisper, 3-5x lower latency than existing streaming solutions.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how architectural design can achieve low-latency, high-accuracy real-time ASR in resource-constrained environments.

idea_spark.idea: Combine adaptive processing with edge-cloud collaboration to dynamically adjust model complexity based on device load.
idea_spark.risk: Adaptive strategy may introduce non-deterministic behavior; stability under extreme speech conditions needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by deployment challenges of Whisper model, exploring bounded-memory streaming architecture to reconcile real-time responsiveness and model sophistication.

papers.title: A density-functional perspective on force fields
papers.summary: Force fields are usually formulated directly in nuclear configuration space, whereas density functional theory is naturally formulated in terms of external potentials, densities, and variational duality. In this work, we isolate the structural relation between these viewpoints. A nuclear configuration determines a nuclear-generated external potential, so the Born-Oppenheimer energy surface may be viewed as the pullback of an external-potential energy functional along the nuclear-to-potential map. In the Lieb formulation of density functional theory, the density is the first functional derivative of the energy with respect to the external potential, while the density-density response function is the second. Pulling these derivative objects back to nuclear configuration space yields the force and the nuclear Hessian, together with explicit terms induced by the nuclear-generated potential and the nuclear-nuclear repulsion. The resulting picture places force fields, density functional theory, and response theory within a single derivative hierarchy. The purpose of the present work is conceptual rather than algorithmic.

ai.tldr: 本文从密度泛函理论的角度重新审视力场，通过将核构型空间与外部势、密度和变分对偶联系起来，建立了一个统一的导数层次结构。
ai.motivation: 力场通常直接在核构型空间中表述，而密度泛函理论则自然地在外部势、密度和变分对偶中表述。本文旨在隔离这两种观点之间的结构关系。
ai.method: 将核构型视为生成外部势的映射，Born-Oppenheimer能量面被看作外部势能量泛函沿该映射的拉回。利用Lieb表述，密度是能量对外部势的一阶导数，密度-密度响应函数是二阶导数。将这些导数对象拉回到核构型空间，得到力和核Hessian矩阵，并显式包含核生成势和核-核排斥的贡献。
ai.result: 将力场、密度泛函理论和响应理论统一在一个导数层次中，提供了概念性的框架而非算法。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解力场与密度泛函理论之间的深层数学联系，为设计更精确的力场或混合方法提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 基于该框架，可以开发一种新的力场参数化方法，直接利用密度泛函理论中的响应函数来约束力场形式，从而自动包含电子结构信息。
idea_spark.risk: 该框架目前是概念性的，实际实现可能需要大量计算来获得精确的响应函数，且对近似泛函的依赖性可能引入误差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Lieb表述中变分对偶的启发，可以探索将力场学习问题转化为密度泛函理论中的逆问题，通过优化外部势来匹配目标密度。

en.tldr: This work reexamines force fields from a density functional theory perspective, establishing a unified derivative hierarchy by linking nuclear configuration space to external potentials, densities, and variational duality.
en.motivation: Force fields are usually formulated directly in nuclear configuration space, whereas density functional theory is naturally formulated in terms of external potentials, densities, and variational duality. This work aims to isolate the structural relation between these viewpoints.
en.method: A nuclear configuration determines a nuclear-generated external potential, so the Born-Oppenheimer energy surface is viewed as the pullback of an external-potential energy functional along the nuclear-to-potential map. Using the Lieb formulation, the density is the first functional derivative of the energy with respect to the external potential, and the density-density response function is the second. Pulling these derivative objects back to nuclear configuration space yields the force and the nuclear Hessian, with explicit terms induced by the nuclear-generated potential and nuclear-nuclear repulsion.
en.result: Force fields, density functional theory, and response theory are placed within a single derivative hierarchy, providing a conceptual framework rather than an algorithm.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand the deep mathematical connection between force fields and density functional theory, providing a theoretical foundation for designing more accurate force fields or hybrid methods.

idea_spark.idea: Based on this framework, a new force field parameterization method could be developed that directly uses response functions from density functional theory to constrain the force field form, automatically incorporating electronic structure information.
idea_spark.risk: The framework is currently conceptual; practical implementation may require substantial computation to obtain accurate response functions and may be sensitive to the choice of approximate functionals.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the variational duality in the Lieb formulation, one could explore reformulating force field learning as an inverse problem in density functional theory, optimizing the external potential to match a target density.

papers.title: From CRUD to Autonomous Agents: Formal Validation and Zero-Trust Security for Semantic Gateways in AI-Native Enterprise Systems
papers.summary: Enterprise software engineering is shifting away from deterministic CRUD/REST architectures toward AI-native systems where large language models act as cognitive orchestrators. This transition introduces a critical security tension: probabilistic LLMs weaken classical mechanisms for validation, access control, and formal testing.   This paper proposes the design, formal validation, and empirical evaluation of a Semantic Gateway governed by the Model Context Protocol (MCP). The gateway reframes the enterprise API as a semantic surface where tools are dynamically discovered, authorized, and executed based on intent and policy enforcement. The central contribution rests on a paradigm shift: autonomous agents must not be validated as traditional software nor as simple API consumers, but as stochastic state-transition systems whose behavior must be abstracted, fuzzed, and audited through enabled-tool graphs.   The architecture introduces a three-layer Zero-Trust security model comprising a pre-inference Semantic Firewall, deterministic Tool-Level RBAC, and out-of-band Cryptographic Human-in-the-Loop approval. Enabledness-Preserving Abstractions (EPAs) and greybox semantic fuzzing--originally developed for blockchain smart contract verification--are adapted to audit agent behavior in enterprise environments. Results demonstrate an 84.2% reduction in incidental code. Across 500,000 multi-turn fuzzing sequences, the methodology achieved a 100% discovery rate of hidden unauthorized state transitions, proving that dynamic formal verification is strictly necessary for secure agentic deployment.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于模型上下文协议（MCP）的语义网关，通过三层零信任安全模型和启用性保持抽象（EPA）与灰盒语义模糊测试，实现AI原生企业系统中自主代理的正式验证与安全审计。
ai.motivation: 企业软件从确定性CRUD/REST架构转向AI原生系统，大语言模型作为认知编排器引入安全张力，传统验证、访问控制和形式测试机制被削弱。
ai.method: 设计语义网关，采用三层零信任模型（预推理语义防火墙、确定性工具级RBAC、带外加密人工审批），并适配区块链智能合约验证中的EPA和灰盒语义模糊测试来审计代理行为。
ai.result: 在50万轮多轮模糊测试中，100%发现隐藏的未授权状态转换，代码量减少84.2%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何为AI自主代理构建安全网关，以及形式验证在零信任架构中的必要性。

idea_spark.idea: 将区块链智能合约的正式验证技术应用于AI代理行为审计，实现跨领域安全方法复用。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖MCP协议标准化程度，实际部署中可能面临协议兼容性和性能开销。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从区块链验证借鉴形式化方法，启发将确定性验证技术融入概率性AI系统安全设计。

idea_spark.idea: Adapts formal verification techniques from blockchain smart contracts to audit AI agent behavior, enabling cross-domain security methodology reuse.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on MCP protocol standardization; real deployment may face compatibility and performance overhead issues.

papers.title: Where Did It Go Wrong? Capability-Oriented Failure Attribution for Vision-and-Language Navigation Agents
papers.summary: Embodied agents in safety-critical applications such as Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) rely on multiple interdependent capabilities (e.g., perception, memory, planning, decision), making failures difficult to localize and attribute. Existing testing methods are largely system-level and provide limited insight into which capability deficiencies cause task failures. We propose a capability-oriented testing approach that enables failure detection and attribution by combining (1) adaptive test case generation via seed selection and mutation, (2) capability oracles for identifying capability-specific errors, and (3) a feedback mechanism that attributes failures to capabilities and guides further test generation. Experiments show that our method discovers more failure cases and more accurately pinpoints capability-level deficiencies than state-of-the-art baselines, providing more interpretable and actionable guidance for improving embodied agents.

ai.tldr: 提出一种面向能力的测试方法，通过自适应测试生成、能力预言机和反馈机制，为视觉-语言导航智能体定位和归因能力缺陷。
ai.motivation: 现有系统级测试无法揭示智能体多个相互依赖能力（如感知、记忆、规划、决策）中具体哪项能力不足导致任务失败。
ai.method: 结合种子选择与变异生成自适应测试用例，设计能力预言机识别特定能力错误，并通过反馈机制将失败归因到具体能力并指导后续测试生成。
ai.result: 相比基线方法，发现更多失败案例，更准确地定位能力级缺陷，提供更可解释和可操作的改进指导。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助开发者快速定位VLN智能体失败的根本原因（是感知、记忆还是规划能力问题），从而有针对性地改进模型。

idea_spark.idea: 将能力归因与持续学习结合，在测试中自动识别薄弱能力并触发针对性训练。
idea_spark.risk: 能力预言机的设计可能依赖领域知识，且对能力间交互的建模不足可能导致归因偏差。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受软件工程中故障定位技术启发，将能力视为模块，通过测试用例变异实现细粒度归因。

en.tldr: Proposes a capability-oriented testing approach that combines adaptive test generation, capability oracles, and a feedback mechanism to localize and attribute capability deficiencies in Vision-Language Navigation agents.
en.motivation: Existing system-level tests fail to reveal which specific interdependent capability (e.g., perception, memory, planning, decision) is deficient when an embodied agent fails.
en.method: Generates adaptive test cases via seed selection and mutation, designs capability oracles to identify capability-specific errors, and uses a feedback mechanism to attribute failures to capabilities and guide further test generation.
en.result: Discovers more failure cases and pinpoints capability-level deficiencies more accurately than baselines, providing more interpretable and actionable guidance for improvement.
en.help_to_user: Helps developers quickly identify the root cause of VLN agent failures (e.g., perception vs. planning issues) and target improvements accordingly.

idea_spark.idea: Combine capability attribution with continual learning to automatically detect weak capabilities during testing and trigger targeted training.
idea_spark.risk: Capability oracles may require domain knowledge, and insufficient modeling of capability interactions could lead to attribution bias.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by fault localization in software engineering, treating capabilities as modules and using test case mutation for fine-grained attribution.

papers.title: Toller matrices and the Feynman $i\varepsilon$ in spinfoams
papers.summary: We study the analytic properties and three equivalent representations of the Toller matrices $T^{(\pm)}$ which appear in the causal formulation of spinfoam transition amplitudes for 4d Lorentzian quantum gravity. These are polynomially bounded functions on the Lorentz group which satisfy the relation $T^{(+)}+T^{(-)}=D$, where the Wigner matrix $D$ provides a unitary irreducible representation of $SL(2,C)$. Ruhl's definition of $T^{(\pm)}$ in terms of analyticity and asymptotic properties is shown to be equivalent to the recently introduced Feynman $i\varepsilon$ prescription in spinfoams. We show that, equivalently, they can be represented as an integral over eigenvalues of the boost operator, which results in a sum over residues. The latter reproduces the Wick rotation relating Euclidean $Spin(4)$ to Lorentzian $SL(2,C)$ spinfoams studied by Dona, Gozzini and Nicotra. We provide explicit expressions in terms of hypergeometric functions and specialize them to the $γ$-simple representations relevant for spinfoams.

ai.tldr: 研究自旋泡沫中Toller矩阵的解析性质及其与Feynman iε规则的关系，给出三种等价表示。
ai.motivation: 澄清自旋泡沫因果过渡振幅中Toller矩阵的数学结构，并建立与Feynman iε规则的等价性。
ai.method: 通过解析性质、渐近行为、升算符本征值积分及超几何函数显式表达式进行分析。
ai.result: 证明了Ruhl定义与Feynman iε规则等价，并得到Wick旋转的再现。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解自旋泡沫中因果振幅的数学基础及Wick旋转机制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用升算符本征值积分和留数求和，可简化自旋泡沫振幅的数值计算。
idea_spark.risk: 超几何函数表达式可能在高自旋情况下计算复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Feynman iε规则与群表示论结合，为量子引力中的因果结构提供新视角。

zh.tldr: 研究自旋泡沫中Toller矩阵的解析性质及其与Feynman iε规则的关系，给出三种等价表示。
zh.motivation: 澄清自旋泡沫因果过渡振幅中Toller矩阵的数学结构，并建立与Feynman iε规则的等价性。
zh.method: 通过解析性质、渐近行为、升算符本征值积分及超几何函数显式表达式进行分析。
zh.result: 证明了Ruhl定义与Feynman iε规则等价，并得到Wick旋转的再现。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解自旋泡沫中因果振幅的数学基础及Wick旋转机制。

idea_spark.idea: 利用升算符本征值积分和留数求和，可简化自旋泡沫振幅的数值计算。
idea_spark.risk: 超几何函数表达式可能在高自旋情况下计算复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将Feynman iε规则与群表示论结合，为量子引力中的因果结构提供新视角。

en.tldr: Study of analytic properties and three equivalent representations of Toller matrices in spinfoams, linking them to the Feynman iε prescription.
en.motivation: To clarify the mathematical structure of Toller matrices in causal spinfoam transition amplitudes and establish equivalence with the Feynman iε prescription.
en.method: Analysis via analyticity, asymptotic behavior, eigenvalue integrals of the boost operator, and explicit hypergeometric expressions.
en.result: Proved equivalence between Ruhl's definition and the Feynman iε prescription, and reproduced the Wick rotation.
en.help_to_user: Provides insight into the mathematical foundations of causal amplitudes in spinfoams and the Wick rotation mechanism.

idea_spark.idea: Using eigenvalue integrals and residue sums may simplify numerical evaluation of spinfoam amplitudes.
idea_spark.risk: Hypergeometric expressions may become computationally heavy for high spins.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining the Feynman iε prescription with group representation theory offers a new perspective on causal structures in quantum gravity.

papers.title: Boundary estimates for the fractional spherical maximal function
papers.summary: In this article, we study the fractional spherical maximal function and its lacunary counterpart. We study the necessary and sufficient conditions for $L^p-L^q$ boundedness of both maximal functions. In particular, we prove the restricted weak type estimate for both full and lacunary fractional spherical maximal functions at the boundary of the maximal $L^p-L^q$ bounded regions.

ai.tldr: 本文研究了分数阶球面极大函数及其缺项版本的Lp-Lq有界性，证明了在最大有界区域边界上的限制弱型估计。
ai.motivation: 探索分数阶球面极大函数在边界情形下的精确有界性条件。
ai.method: 通过调和分析技术，分析全极大函数和缺项极大函数的必要与充分条件。
ai.result: 得到了两类极大函数在边界上的限制弱型估计。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解分数阶极大算子的边界行为提供理论依据。

idea_spark.idea: 利用限制弱型估计简化边界有界性证明。
idea_spark.risk: 边界情形可能涉及更精细的调和分析工具，推广需谨慎。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将缺项结构应用于其他极大函数的有界性研究。

en.tldr: This paper studies the Lp-Lq boundedness of the fractional spherical maximal function and its lacunary counterpart, proving restricted weak type estimates at the boundary of the maximal bounded regions.
en.motivation: To explore the precise boundedness conditions for fractional spherical maximal functions at the boundary.
en.method: Harmonic analysis techniques are used to analyze necessary and sufficient conditions for both full and lacunary maximal functions.
en.result: Restricted weak type estimates are obtained for both maximal functions at the boundary.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insights into the boundary behavior of fractional maximal operators.

idea_spark.risk: Boundary cases may require more delicate harmonic analysis tools, so generalization should be cautious.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying lacunary structures to boundedness studies of other maximal functions.

papers.title: Break the Inaccessible Boundary: Distilling Post-Conversion Content for User Retention Modeling
papers.summary: User retention is a key metric to measure long-term engagement in modern platforms. In real-time bidding (RTB) advertising system for user re-engagement, the retention model is required to predict future revisit probability at bidding time, before the user converts and consumes any content. Although post-conversion content, termed Onboarding Content, provides highly informative signals for retention prediction, directly using it in training causes severe feature leakage and creates a gap between training and serving. To address this issue, we propose OCARM, a two-stage distillation-aligned framework for Onboarding Content Augmented Retention Modeling, enabling the model to implicitly capture future content using only observable features during inference. In the first stage, we deliberately expose onboarding content to train a hierarchical encoder that produces teacher representations. In the second stage, a user encoder is aligned with the frozen teacher through distillation, allowing the model to approximate the inaccessible onboarding signals without leakage. Extensive offline experiments and online A/B tests demonstrate that our framework achieves consistent improvements in a real-world growth scenario.

ai.tldr: 提出OCARM框架，通过两阶段蒸馏对齐方法，在用户转化前利用不可见的转化后内容信号进行留存建模，避免特征泄露。
ai.motivation: 用户留存模型在竞价时需预测未来回访概率，但转化后内容（Onboarding Content）虽信号强，直接使用会导致特征泄露和训练服务不一致。
ai.method: 两阶段蒸馏对齐框架：第一阶段暴露转化后内容训练教师编码器；第二阶段通过蒸馏对齐学生编码器，使其仅用可观测特征近似不可达信号。
ai.result: 离线实验和在线A/B测试在真实增长场景中取得一致提升。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助广告系统在用户转化前更准确预测留存，提升再营销效果。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将教师模型替换为多模态编码器，利用转化后内容的文本、图像等多模态信号增强学生模型。
idea_spark.risk: 蒸馏过程可能丢失教师模型中的细粒度信息，导致学生模型泛化能力下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受知识蒸馏和特征对齐启发，将未来不可见信息通过教师-学生框架转化为可用的隐式表示。

en.tldr: Proposes OCARM, a two-stage distillation-aligned framework for user retention modeling that leverages post-conversion content signals without feature leakage.
en.motivation: Retention models need to predict revisit probability before user conversion, but post-conversion content (Onboarding Content) is highly informative yet causes feature leakage if used directly.
en.method: Two-stage distillation: first train a teacher encoder with onboarding content, then align a student encoder via distillation to approximate inaccessible signals using only observable features.
en.result: Consistent improvements in offline experiments and online A/B tests in a real-world growth scenario.
en.help_to_user: Enables more accurate retention prediction before conversion, improving re-engagement advertising effectiveness.

idea_spark.idea: Explore replacing the teacher encoder with a multimodal encoder to leverage text, image, and other modalities from onboarding content.
idea_spark.risk: Distillation may lose fine-grained information from the teacher, potentially reducing student model generalization.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by knowledge distillation and feature alignment, transforming future inaccessible information into implicit representations via teacher-student framework.

papers.title: Generalizable Human Gaussian Splatting via Multi-view Semantic Consistency
papers.summary: Recently, generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs has been actively studied for the photorealistic human rendering. Most existing methods rely on explicit geometric constraints or predefined structural representations to accurately position 3D Gaussians. Although these approaches have shown the remarkable progress in this field, they still suffer from inconsistent feature representations across multi-view inputs due to complex articulations of the human body and limited overlaps between different views. To address this problem, we propose a novel method to accurately localize 3D Gaussians and ultimately improve the quality of human rendering. The key idea is to unproject latent embeddings encoded from each viewpoint into a shared 3D space through predicted depth maps and recalibrate them belonging to the same body part based on cross-view attention. This helps the model resolve the spatial ambiguity occurring in highly textured regions as well as occluded body parts, thus leading to the accurate localization of 3D Gaussians. Experimental results on benchmark datasets show that the proposed method efficiently improves the performance of generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs.

ai.tldr: 提出一种基于多视角语义一致性的可泛化人体高斯泼溅方法，通过跨视角注意力校准3D高斯位置，提升稀疏视角下的人体渲染质量。
ai.motivation: 现有可泛化人体高斯泼溅方法因人体复杂关节和多视角重叠有限，导致特征表示不一致，影响3D高斯定位精度。
ai.method: 将各视角的潜在嵌入通过预测深度图反投影到共享3D空间，并利用跨视角注意力将属于同一身体部分的特征重新校准，解决空间模糊和遮挡问题。
ai.result: 在基准数据集上，该方法有效提升了稀疏视角输入下可泛化人体高斯泼溅的渲染性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何利用多视角语义一致性改进3D高斯定位，适用于稀疏视角人体渲染任务。

idea_spark.idea: 将深度图反投影与跨视角注意力结合，实现无显式几何约束的3D高斯精确定位。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预测深度图质量，深度估计误差可能影响校准效果；跨视角注意力计算复杂度较高。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受多视角语义一致性启发，可探索将语义分割或人体解析先验融入注意力校准过程。

en.tldr: Proposes a generalizable human Gaussian splatting method via multi-view semantic consistency, using cross-view attention to recalibrate 3D Gaussian positions and improve rendering quality from sparse views.
en.motivation: Existing generalizable human Gaussian splatting methods suffer from inconsistent feature representations across multi-view inputs due to complex human articulations and limited view overlaps, leading to inaccurate 3D Gaussian localization.
en.method: Unproject latent embeddings from each view into a shared 3D space via predicted depth maps, then recalibrate features belonging to the same body part using cross-view attention to resolve spatial ambiguity and occlusion.
en.result: Experiments on benchmark datasets show the method effectively improves the performance of generalizable human Gaussian splatting from sparse-view inputs.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how multi-view semantic consistency can improve 3D Gaussian localization for sparse-view human rendering.

idea_spark.idea: Combining depth map unprojection with cross-view attention enables accurate 3D Gaussian localization without explicit geometric constraints.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on predicted depth map quality; depth estimation errors may degrade calibration; cross-view attention incurs high computational cost.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by multi-view semantic consistency, one could explore incorporating semantic segmentation or human parsing priors into the attention calibration process.

papers.title: Subliminal Steering: Stronger Encoding of Hidden Signals
papers.summary: Subliminal learning describes a student language model inheriting a behavioral bias by fine-tuning on seemingly innocuous data generated by a biased teacher model. Prior work has begun to characterize this phenomenon but leaves open questions about the scope of signals it can transfer, the mechanisms that explain it, and the precision with which a bias can be encoded by seemingly unrelated data. We tackle all three problems by introducing subliminal steering, a variant of subliminal learning in which the teacher's bias is implemented not via a system prompt, as in prior work, but through a steering vector trained to maximize the likelihood of a set of target samples. First, we show that subliminal steering transfers complex multi-word biases, whereas prior work focused on single-word preferences, demonstrating a large scope of subliminally transferrable signals. Second, we provide mechanistic evidence that subliminal learning transfers not only the target behavioral bias, but also the steering vector itself, localized to the layers at which the teacher was steered. Finally, we show that the bias is encoded with surprising precision. We train a new steering vector directly on the subliminally-laden dataset and find that it attains high cosine similarity with the original vector.

ai.tldr: 提出“潜意识引导”方法，通过训练引导向量而非系统提示来传递复杂多词偏见，并揭示偏见编码的精确机制。
ai.motivation: 现有潜意识学习研究仅关注单词偏好，且对偏见传递的机制和精度理解不足。
ai.method: 使用引导向量替代系统提示，在教师模型中最大化目标样本似然，然后让学生模型在看似无关的数据上微调。
ai.result: 成功传递多词偏见；发现引导向量本身被传递并定位到特定层；新训练的引导向量与原向量高度相似。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何通过微调数据隐蔽地植入复杂行为偏见，以及如何检测这种偏见。

idea_spark.idea: 利用引导向量在微调数据中编码特定行为，可能用于安全对齐或后门攻击防御。
idea_spark.risk: 该方法可能被滥用于隐蔽植入有害偏见，且难以通过常规数据审查发现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合机械可解释性，可设计更鲁棒的检测方法，或开发反制引导向量的训练策略。

en.tldr: Proposes 'subliminal steering' using steering vectors instead of system prompts to transfer complex multi-word biases, revealing precise encoding mechanisms.
en.motivation: Prior subliminal learning only studied single-word preferences, leaving gaps in understanding the scope, mechanism, and precision of bias transfer.
en.method: Train a steering vector to maximize target sample likelihood in a teacher model, then fine-tune a student model on seemingly innocuous data generated by the biased teacher.
en.result: Successfully transfers multi-word biases; shows the steering vector itself is transferred and localized to specific layers; a new steering vector trained on the subliminal dataset has high cosine similarity with the original.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how complex behavioral biases can be covertly encoded via fine-tuning data and how to detect such biases.

idea_spark.idea: Using steering vectors to encode specific behaviors in fine-tuning data could be applied to safety alignment or backdoor attack defense.
idea_spark.risk: This method could be misused to covertly implant harmful biases that are hard to detect through conventional data inspection.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combined with mechanistic interpretability, it can inspire more robust detection methods or counter-steering training strategies.

papers.title: Refinement via Regeneration: Enlarging Modification Space Boosts Image Refinement in Unified Multimodal Models
papers.summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) integrate visual understanding and generation within a single framework. For text-to-image (T2I) tasks, this unified capability allows UMMs to refine outputs after their initial generation, potentially extending the performance upper bound. Current UMM-based refinement methods primarily follow a refinement-via-editing (RvE) paradigm, where UMMs produce editing instructions to modify misaligned regions while preserving aligned content. However, editing instructions often describe prompt-image misalignment only coarsely, leading to incomplete refinement. Moreover, pixel-level preservation, though necessary for editing, unnecessarily restricts the effective modification space for refinement. To address these limitations, we propose Refinement via Regeneration (RvR), a novel framework that reformulates refinement as conditional image regeneration rather than editing. Instead of relying on editing instructions and enforcing strict content preservation, RvR regenerates images conditioned on the target prompt and the semantic tokens of the initial image, enabling more complete semantic alignment with a larger modification space. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of RvR, improving Geneval from 0.78 to 0.91, DPGBench from 84.02 to 87.21, and UniGenBench++ from 61.53 to 77.41.

ai.tldr: 提出Refinement via Regeneration (RvR)框架，将图像精炼从编辑范式转为条件再生，扩大修改空间以提升语义对齐。
ai.motivation: 现有基于统一多模态模型的编辑式精炼方法受限于编辑指令的粗糙性和像素级保留约束，导致精炼不完整。
ai.method: RvR以目标提示和初始图像的语义token为条件，直接再生图像，而非生成编辑指令并强制保留内容。
ai.result: 在Geneval、DPGBench和UniGenBench++上分别提升至0.91、87.21和77.41。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种更有效的文本到图像精炼方法，可改善生成图像与提示的语义一致性。

idea_spark.idea: 利用语义token而非像素级约束，在更大修改空间内实现更完整的语义对齐。
idea_spark.risk: 再生可能引入与原始图像无关的伪影，需平衡修改幅度与内容保真度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将精炼视为条件再生而非编辑，启发其他需要局部修改但保留整体语义的任务。

zh.motivation: 现有基于统一多模态模型的编辑式精炼方法受限于编辑指令的粗糙性和像素级保留约束，导致精炼不完整。

idea_spark.risk: 再生可能引入与原始图像无关的伪影，需平衡修改幅度与内容保真度。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将精炼视为条件再生而非编辑，启发其他需要局部修改但保留整体语义的任务。

en.tldr: Proposes Refinement via Regeneration (RvR), shifting from editing to conditional regeneration to enlarge modification space and improve semantic alignment.
en.motivation: Existing editing-based refinement in unified multimodal models suffers from coarse editing instructions and pixel-level preservation constraints, leading to incomplete refinement.
en.method: RvR regenerates images conditioned on the target prompt and semantic tokens of the initial image, without generating editing instructions or enforcing strict content preservation.
en.result: Improves Geneval from 0.78 to 0.91, DPGBench from 84.02 to 87.21, and UniGenBench++ from 61.53 to 77.41.
en.help_to_user: Provides a more effective text-to-image refinement method that enhances semantic alignment between generated images and prompts.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging semantic tokens instead of pixel-level constraints enables more complete semantic alignment within a larger modification space.
idea_spark.risk: Regeneration may introduce artifacts unrelated to the original image, requiring a balance between modification extent and content fidelity.
idea_spark.inspiration: Viewing refinement as conditional regeneration rather than editing inspires tasks that need local modification while preserving overall semantics.

papers.title: Leveraging Previous-Traversal Point Cloud Map Priors for Camera-Based 3D Object Detection and Tracking
papers.summary: Camera-based 3D object detection and tracking are central to autonomous driving, yet precise 3D object localization remains fundamentally constrained by depth ambiguity when no expensive, depth-rich online LiDAR is available at inference. In many deployments, however, vehicles repeatedly traverse the same environments, making static point cloud maps from prior traversals a practical source of geometric priors. We propose DualViewMapDet, a camera-only inference framework that retrieves such map priors online and leverages them to mitigate the absence of a LiDAR sensor during deployment. The key idea is a dual-space camera-map fusion strategy that avoids one-sided view conversion. Specifically, we (i) project the map into perspective view (PV) and encode multi-channel geometric cues to enrich image features and support BEV lifting, and (ii) encode the map directly in bird's-eye view (BEV) with a sparse voxel backbone and fuse it with lifted camera features in a shared metric space. Extensive evaluations on nuScenes and Argoverse 2 demonstrate consistent improvements over strong camera-only baselines, with particularly strong gains in object localization. Ablations further validate the contributions of PV/BEV fusion and prior-map coverage. We make the code and pre-trained models available at https://dualviewmapdet.cs.uni-freiburg.de .

ai.tldr: 提出DualViewMapDet，利用先前遍历的点云地图先验，在无在线LiDAR时提升相机3D检测与跟踪精度。
ai.motivation: 相机3D检测受深度模糊限制，而车辆常重复行驶相同环境，静态点云地图可作为几何先验。
ai.method: 双空间相机-地图融合：将地图投影到透视视图编码几何线索增强图像特征，同时在鸟瞰视图用稀疏体素骨干直接编码并与相机特征融合。
ai.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse 2上显著优于纯相机基线，定位精度提升尤其明显。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种利用历史地图先验提升相机3D感知的实用框架，代码已开源。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将地图先验以隐式方式（如可学习位置编码）融入端到端模型，而非显式投影。
idea_spark.risk: 地图先验的获取和更新成本可能限制大规模部署，且环境变化时先验可能过时。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受重复行驶场景启发，将离线地图作为廉价几何先验替代在线LiDAR。

en.tldr: Proposes DualViewMapDet, leveraging prior-traversal point cloud map priors to improve camera-based 3D detection and tracking without online LiDAR.
en.motivation: Camera-based 3D detection suffers from depth ambiguity; vehicles often traverse the same environments, making static point cloud maps a practical geometric prior.
en.method: Dual-space camera-map fusion: project map into perspective view to encode geometric cues for image features, and encode map directly in bird's-eye view with sparse voxel backbone fused with lifted camera features.
en.result: Consistent improvements over strong camera-only baselines on nuScenes and Argoverse 2, with notable gains in object localization.
en.help_to_user: Provides a practical framework to leverage historical map priors for camera-based 3D perception; code is open-sourced.

idea_spark.idea: Explore implicit integration of map priors (e.g., learnable positional encodings) into end-to-end models instead of explicit projection.
idea_spark.risk: Acquisition and update cost of map priors may limit large-scale deployment; priors may become outdated in dynamic environments.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by repeated traversals, using offline maps as cheap geometric priors to replace online LiDAR.

papers.title: The Classification of Pauli Stabilizer Codes: A Lattice and Continuum Treatise
papers.summary: We classify mobile Pauli stabilizer codes up to gapped interfaces and coarse-graining using the framework of algebraic $\mathrm{L}$-theory. We compare this classification with that of framed TQFTs, theories that arise naturally in the continuum, highlighting a close structural relationship between the two. Our approach is formulated in the category of perfect chain complexes equipped with quadratic functor over the Laurent polynomial ring $R = \mathbb{Z}/p[x_1^{\pm 1}, \ldots, x_n^{\pm 1}]$, within which the collection of topological operators of Pauli stabilizer codes arise naturally as objects. In particular, we establish a bulk-boundary correspondence for lattice theories: the equivalence class of a Pauli stabilizer code up to gapped interface is described by a Clifford QCA in one dimension higher. This is done using the universal target category for stabilizer codes, which is the categorical spectrum whose existence and universal properties are introduced in this work. We conclude by highlighting subtle differences between the classification of Pauli stabilizer codes and TQFTs, leading to qualitative distinctions between lattice and continuum theories.

ai.tldr: 利用代数L-理论对移动泡利稳定子码在带隙界面和粗粒化下进行分类，并与连续统中的框架拓扑量子场论进行比较。
ai.motivation: 建立晶格理论（泡利稳定子码）与连续统理论（TQFT）之间的分类对应关系，揭示两者结构上的紧密联系。
ai.method: 在Laurent多项式环上的完美链复形范畴中引入二次函子，将稳定子码的拓扑算子作为对象，并利用范畴谱的普适性质建立体-边界对应。
ai.result: 泡利稳定子码在带隙界面下的等价类由高一维的Clifford QCA描述，且其分类与TQFT分类存在细微差异，导致晶格理论与连续统理论的定性区别。
ai.help_to_user: 为理解量子纠错码的拓扑分类提供代数框架，并揭示晶格与连续统模型之间的深层联系与差异。

idea_spark.idea: 利用二次函子与范畴谱构造，将稳定子码的等价类映射为更高维的QCA，可能为量子计算中的容错方案提供新视角。
idea_spark.risk: 理论框架高度抽象，实际计算或构造具体码的等价类可能面临复杂性挑战。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从TQFT分类的差异出发，探索晶格模型特有的拓扑现象，如非可逆界面或异常边界态。

en.tldr: Classifies mobile Pauli stabilizer codes up to gapped interfaces and coarse-graining using algebraic L-theory, and compares with framed TQFTs from the continuum.
en.motivation: Establish a correspondence between lattice theories (Pauli stabilizer codes) and continuum theories (TQFTs), revealing their close structural relationship.
en.method: Introduces quadratic functors over the Laurent polynomial ring in the category of perfect chain complexes, treats topological operators of stabilizer codes as objects, and uses the universal target category (categorical spectrum) to derive a bulk-boundary correspondence.
en.result: The equivalence class of a Pauli stabilizer code under gapped interfaces is described by a Clifford QCA in one dimension higher; subtle differences from TQFT classification lead to qualitative distinctions between lattice and continuum theories.
en.help_to_user: Provides an algebraic framework for classifying topological quantum error-correcting codes and highlights deep connections and differences between lattice and continuum models.

idea_spark.idea: Mapping stabilizer code equivalence classes to higher-dimensional QCA via quadratic functors may inspire new fault-tolerant schemes in quantum computing.
idea_spark.risk: High abstraction level may hinder practical computation or explicit construction of code equivalence classes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore lattice-specific topological phenomena (e.g., non-invertible interfaces or anomalous boundary states) motivated by differences from TQFT classification.

papers.title: Two Efficient Message-passing Exclusive Scan Algorithms
papers.summary: Parallel scan primitives compute element-wise inclusive or exclusive prefix sums of input vectors contributed by $p$ consecutively ranked processors under an associative, possibly expensive, binary operator $\oplus$. In message-passing systems with bounded, one-ported communication capabilities, at least $\lceil\log_2 p\rceil$ or $\lceil\log_2 (p-1)\rceil$ send-receive communication rounds are required to perform the scans. While there are well-known, simple algorithms for the inclusive scan that solve the problem in $\lceil\log_2 p\rceil$ send-receive communication rounds with $\lceil\log_2 p\rceil$ applications of the $\oplus$ operator, the exclusive scan is different and has been much less addressed.   By considering natural invariants for the exclusive prefix sums problem, we present two different algorithms that are efficient in the number of communication rounds and in the number of applications of the $\oplus$ operator. The first algorithm consists of an inclusive scan phase and an exclusive scan phase and trades the number of communication rounds against the number of applications of the $\oplus$ operator. The smallest number of inclusive scan rounds with $q=\lceil\log_2 p\rceil$ rounds in total is $q'\geq q-\log_2(2^q-p+1)$. The other algorithm is a modification of a round-optimal all-reduce algorithm, and the number of additional applications of the $\oplus$ operator is dependent on the number of bits set (popcount of) in $p-1$. Both algorithms are relevant for small(er) input vectors where performance is dominated by the number of communication rounds. For large input vectors, other (pipelined, fixed-degree tree) algorithms must be used.

ai.tldr: 提出了两种高效的、面向消息传递系统的独占扫描算法，分别优化通信轮数和运算符应用次数。
ai.motivation: 现有并行扫描算法多关注包含扫描，独占扫描研究较少，且在小向量场景下通信轮数成为性能瓶颈。
ai.method: 第一种算法通过包含扫描阶段和独占扫描阶段来权衡通信轮数与运算符应用次数；第二种算法修改了轮数最优的全归约算法，其额外运算符应用次数取决于p-1的二进制表示中1的个数。
ai.result: 第一种算法在总轮数q=⌈log₂p⌉时，包含扫描轮数至少为q'≥q−log₂(2^q−p+1)；第二种算法额外运算符次数与p-1的popcount相关。两种算法在小输入向量时有效。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解在消息传递系统中如何高效实现独占扫描，特别是通信轮数受限的场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用popcount优化运算符应用次数的方法可启发设计更细粒度的通信-计算重叠策略。
idea_spark.risk: 算法仅适用于小向量，大向量时需改用流水线或固定度数树算法，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从全归约算法改造独占扫描的思路，提示可复用经典集体通信算法的结构来设计新原语。

en.tldr: Proposes two efficient exclusive scan algorithms for message-passing systems, trading off communication rounds and operator applications.
en.motivation: Existing parallel scan algorithms focus on inclusive scans; exclusive scans are less studied, and communication rounds become a bottleneck for small vectors.
en.method: The first algorithm uses an inclusive scan phase and an exclusive scan phase to trade communication rounds against operator applications. The second modifies a round-optimal all-reduce algorithm, with extra operator applications depending on the popcount of p-1.
en.result: For the first algorithm, with total rounds q=⌈log₂p⌉, the inclusive scan rounds are at least q'≥q−log₂(2^q−p+1). The second algorithm's extra operator count depends on popcount(p-1). Both are effective for small input vectors.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand efficient exclusive scan implementation in message-passing systems, especially when communication rounds are constrained.

idea_spark.idea: Using popcount to optimize operator applications may inspire finer-grained communication-computation overlap strategies.
idea_spark.risk: Algorithms are only suitable for small vectors; for large vectors, pipelined or fixed-degree tree algorithms are needed, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Adapting all-reduce algorithms for exclusive scan suggests reusing classical collective communication structures to design new primitives.

papers.title: Scaling Probabilistic Transformer via Efficient Cross-Scale Hyperparameter Transfer
papers.summary: Probabilistic Transformer (PT), a white-box probabilistic model for contextual word representation, has demonstrated substantial similarity to standard Transformers in both computational structure and downstream task performance on small models and small to medium sized datasets. However, PT is less robust to hyperparameter choices than standard Transformers, making it harder to scale efficiently. In this work, we follow Maximal Update Parametrization (muP) to rescale PT's parameters, so that hyperparameters optimized on small models can be transferred to larger models without additional tuning. With this approach, we successfully scale PT to models with up to 0.4B parameters. Experiments show that PT consistently outperforms standard transformer under the same parameter budget on Masked Language Modeling (MLM) tasks. We hope this work will contribute to the practical deployment of probabilistic models at substantially larger scales in the future.

ai.tldr: 通过最大更新参数化实现概率Transformer的超参数跨尺度迁移，成功将模型扩展到0.4B参数，并在掩码语言建模任务上优于标准Transformer。
ai.motivation: 概率Transformer在小型模型上表现良好，但对超参数敏感，难以高效扩展至更大规模。
ai.method: 采用最大更新参数化（muP）重新缩放概率Transformer的参数，使小模型优化的超参数可直接迁移至大模型。
ai.result: 成功将模型扩展至0.4B参数，在掩码语言建模任务中，相同参数预算下持续优于标准Transformer。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种将概率模型高效扩展到更大规模的方法，降低了超参数调优成本。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将muP应用于其他非Transformer的概率模型，或结合其他参数化策略进一步提升迁移效果。
idea_spark.risk: muP的适用性可能依赖于特定模型结构，迁移到不同架构时需重新验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 超参数迁移策略可启发其他领域（如强化学习、图神经网络）的模型扩展研究。

en.tldr: Scaling Probabilistic Transformer to 0.4B parameters via Maximal Update Parametrization for cross-scale hyperparameter transfer, outperforming standard Transformer on MLM tasks.
en.motivation: Probabilistic Transformer performs well on small models but is sensitive to hyperparameters, hindering efficient scaling.
en.method: Apply Maximal Update Parametrization (muP) to rescale PT's parameters, enabling hyperparameter transfer from small to large models.
en.result: Successfully scaled PT to 0.4B parameters; consistently outperforms standard Transformer under same parameter budget on MLM tasks.
en.help_to_user: Provides an efficient method to scale probabilistic models to larger sizes with reduced hyperparameter tuning cost.

idea_spark.idea: Explore applying muP to non-Transformer probabilistic models or combining with other parameterization strategies for better transfer.
idea_spark.risk: muP's applicability may depend on specific model structure; re-validation needed for different architectures.
idea_spark.inspiration: Hyperparameter transfer strategies can inspire model scaling research in other domains like reinforcement learning or graph neural networks.

papers.title: Exact Closed-Form Formulae for Linear and Circular Continuous Scan Statistics: $P_c(N - 1; N, w)$, $P_c(3; N, w)$, and $P(3; N, w)$
papers.summary: The continuous linear $P(k; N, w)$ and circular scan statistics $P_c(k; N, w)$ are fundamental tools in probability and spatial statistics, frequently used to detect clustering in uniform data. Let $X_1, X_2, \dots, X_N$ be independently and uniformly distributed random variables on a unit interval or unit ring. The exact distribution of these scan statistics relies on the minimum window width required to capture exactly $k$ points. Furthermore, the survival function $1 - P_c(k; N, w)$ directly corresponds to the geometric probability that if $N$ arcs of length $1 - w$ are uniformly and randomly placed on a unit circle, every point on the circle is covered at least $N + 1 - k$ times. Historically, evaluating the exact cumulative distribution functions, $P(k; N, w)$ and $P_c(k; N, w)$, relies heavily on complex recursive approximations. In this paper, we bypass these traditional recursive methods to derive direct, generalized closed-form expressions for some linear and circular continuous scan statistics. Specifically, we present the exact analytical solutions for $P_c(N - 1; N, w)$, $P_c(3; N, w)$, and $P(3; N, w)$ for arbitrary values of $N$ and window width $w$. These newly derived closed-form expressions not only provide exact baseline distributions for extreme spacings but also significantly simplify computational complexity compared to existing iterative approaches.

ai.tldr: 本文为连续线性扫描统计量 P(k;N,w) 和圆形扫描统计量 P_c(k;N,w) 推导了精确闭式表达式，具体给出了 P_c(N-1;N,w)、P_c(3;N,w) 和 P(3;N,w) 的解析解，避免了传统递归近似。
ai.motivation: 传统计算扫描统计量精确分布依赖复杂递归近似，计算复杂度高，需要更简洁的解析公式。
ai.method: 通过几何概率与极值间距分析，直接推导出特定参数下的闭式表达式。
ai.result: 获得了 P_c(N-1;N,w)、P_c(3;N,w) 和 P(3;N,w) 对任意 N 和 w 的精确解析解，显著简化了计算。
ai.help_to_user: 提供可直接使用的精确概率公式，便于均匀数据聚类检测和空间统计应用。

idea_spark.idea: 利用几何概率与极值间距的对应关系，绕过递归直接求解。
idea_spark.risk: 仅覆盖特定 k 值，通用性有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可尝试将类似方法用于非均匀分布或高维空间扫描统计量。

en.tldr: This paper derives exact closed-form expressions for continuous linear scan statistic P(k;N,w) and circular scan statistic P_c(k;N,w), specifically P_c(N-1;N,w), P_c(3;N,w), and P(3;N,w), bypassing traditional recursive approximations.
en.motivation: Traditional exact evaluation of scan statistic distributions relies on complex recursive approximations with high computational cost, motivating simpler analytical formulas.
en.method: Direct derivation using geometric probability and extreme spacings to obtain closed-form expressions for specific parameters.
en.result: Exact analytical solutions for P_c(N-1;N,w), P_c(3;N,w), and P(3;N,w) for arbitrary N and window width w, significantly simplifying computation.
en.help_to_user: Provides ready-to-use exact probability formulas for clustering detection in uniform data and spatial statistics applications.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage the correspondence between geometric probability and extreme spacings to bypass recursion.
idea_spark.risk: Only covers specific k values, limiting generality.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to non-uniform distributions or higher-dimensional scan statistics.

papers.title: Independent-Component-Based Encoding Models of Brain Activity During Story Comprehension
papers.summary: Encoding models provide a powerful framework for linking continuous stimulus features to neural activity; however, traditional voxelwise approaches are limited by measurement noise, inter-subject variability, and redundancy arising from spatially correlated voxels encoding overlapping neural signals. Here, we propose an independent component (IC)-based encoding framework that dissociates stimulus-driven and noise-driven signals in fMRI data. We decompose continuous fMRI data from naturalistic story listening into ICs using one subset of the data, and train encoding models on independent data to predict IC time series from large language model representations of linguistic input. Across subjects, a subset of ICs exhibited consistently high predictivity. These ICs were spatially and temporally consistent across subjects and included cognitive networks known to respond during story listening (auditory and language). Auditory component time series were strongly correlated with acoustic stimulus features, highlighting the interpretability of identified component time series. Components identified as noise or motion-related artifacts by ICA-AROMA showed uniformly poor predictive performance, confirming that highly predicted components reflect genuine stimulus-related neural signals rather than confounds. Overall, IC-based encoding models enable analyses at the level of functional networks, accommodating the variability in network locations across individuals and providing interpretable results that are easy to compare across subjects.

ai.tldr: 提出基于独立成分的编码模型，从fMRI数据中分离刺激驱动和噪声信号，用于故事理解研究。
ai.motivation: 传统体素级编码模型受测量噪声、个体差异和空间冗余限制，难以准确捕捉神经信号。
ai.method: 将fMRI数据分解为独立成分，用大语言模型特征训练编码模型预测成分时间序列。
ai.result: 部分成分预测性高，对应听觉和语言网络；噪声成分预测性差，验证了方法的有效性。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种在功能网络层面分析脑活动的方法，减少噪声干扰，便于跨被试比较。

idea_spark.idea: 结合独立成分分析和编码模型，自动识别与刺激相关的功能网络，无需手动定义感兴趣区域。
idea_spark.risk: 成分分解可能受数据质量影响，且需要足够数据量进行稳定分解。

papers.title: Regulation of Rumor Propagation via (Multi-Leader) Stackelberg Graphon Games
papers.summary: We study the control of rumor propagation in large networked populations by using Stackelberg graphon games. We first introduce a principal who wants to incentivize the spread of her preferred news and discourage the spread of non-preferred news. We define the Stackelberg graphon game equilibrium (SGGE), characterize the graphon game Nash equilibrium (GGNE) with a forward-backward differential equation system, and establish existence results. We further formulate a multi-leader model with two competing principals, each incentivizing her own preferred news. Finally, we propose a bi-level algorithm for computing (multi-leader) Stackelberg graphon game equilibria and conclude with numerical experiments where we show that existence of competing principals will result in strong opinion divisions in the population.

ai.tldr: 研究通过Stackelberg图博弈调控大规模网络中的谣言传播，提出单领导者和多领导者模型，并证明竞争领导者会导致观点严重分化。
ai.motivation: 大规模网络中谣言传播难以控制，需要有效的激励机制来引导信息扩散。
ai.method: 建立Stackelberg图博弈均衡（SGGE），用前向-后向微分方程组刻画图博弈纳什均衡（GGNE），并提出双层算法求解。
ai.result: 数值实验表明，存在竞争领导者时，人口中会出现强烈的观点分裂。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了利用博弈论和图论工具分析网络信息传播调控的理论框架和算法。

idea_spark.idea: 考虑将模型扩展到动态网络或引入学习型智能体，以模拟更真实的谣言传播场景。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设领导者完全理性且信息对称，实际中可能因信息不完全或计算复杂性导致均衡难以实现。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Stackelberg博弈和图博弈的启发，将主从博弈与大规模网络结构结合，为网络控制提供了新视角。

en.tldr: Studies the control of rumor propagation in large networks via Stackelberg graphon games, proposing single- and multi-leader models, and shows that competing leaders lead to strong opinion divisions.
en.motivation: Rumor propagation in large networks is hard to control; effective incentive mechanisms are needed to guide information spread.
en.method: Defines Stackelberg graphon game equilibrium (SGGE), characterizes graphon game Nash equilibrium (GGNE) via forward-backward differential equations, and proposes a bi-level algorithm for computing equilibria.
en.result: Numerical experiments show that the presence of competing principals results in strong opinion divisions in the population.
en.help_to_user: Provides a theoretical framework and algorithm for analyzing information propagation control in networks using game theory and graphon tools.

idea_spark.idea: Consider extending the model to dynamic networks or incorporating learning agents to simulate more realistic rumor propagation scenarios.
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes fully rational leaders with symmetric information; in practice, incomplete information or computational complexity may hinder equilibrium attainment.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Stackelberg games and graphon theory, combining leader-follower games with large-scale network structures offers a new perspective for network control.

papers.title: Asymptotics of Parking Search in Hyperfractal Networks
papers.summary: We study the asymptotic behaviour of the distance to the first available parking slot in a recursive Manhattan street network endowed with a hyperfractal intensity structure, where slot-release events occur according to Poisson processes along the streets. We establish, by analysing the associated self-similar harmonic sums via Mellin-transform asymptotics, a power-law decay of the expected distance as the total intensity grows, with exponent equal to the inverse of the hyperfractal dimension. In particular, the scaling exponent depends only on the large-scale geometry of the network. We further prove that this exponent is robust under random multiplicative modulations of the street intensities: mild stochastic heterogeneity affects only the multiplicative constant. Similar scaling behaviour holds for the variance, the number of turns before parking, and for a jump-over variant of the search strategy.

ai.tldr: 研究超分形网络中寻找第一个可用停车位的渐近行为，发现期望距离随总强度呈幂律衰减，指数等于超分形维数的倒数。
ai.motivation: 理解复杂网络（如城市街道）中停车搜索的效率，特别是网络几何结构对搜索距离的影响。
ai.method: 利用梅林变换渐近分析自相似调和和，推导期望距离的幂律衰减指数，并验证指数对随机强度调制的鲁棒性。
ai.result: 期望距离的衰减指数仅取决于网络的大尺度几何（超分形维数），随机调制仅改变常数因子；方差和转弯次数也有类似标度行为。
ai.help_to_user: 为城市停车系统设计提供理论依据，例如预测高密度区域停车搜索距离的缩减规律。

idea_spark.idea: 利用超分形维数作为设计参数，优化停车位释放策略（如动态调整泊位开放概率）。
idea_spark.risk: 模型假设泊松释放事件和递归街道结构，实际城市网络可能偏离理想超分形。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将停车搜索视为随机游走，结合网络分形维数预测搜索时间，启发智能停车导航算法。

en.tldr: Studies the asymptotic behavior of finding the first available parking slot in hyperfractal networks, showing power-law decay of expected distance with exponent equal to the inverse hyperfractal dimension.
en.motivation: To understand the efficiency of parking search in complex networks like city streets, especially how network geometry affects search distance.
en.method: Uses Mellin-transform asymptotics on self-similar harmonic sums to derive the power-law exponent for expected distance, and verifies robustness under random intensity modulations.
en.result: The decay exponent depends only on the large-scale geometry (hyperfractal dimension); random modulations only affect the multiplicative constant. Similar scaling holds for variance and number of turns.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insights for urban parking system design, e.g., predicting how search distance shrinks in high-density areas.

idea_spark.idea: Use hyperfractal dimension as a design parameter to optimize parking slot release strategies (e.g., dynamically adjust slot availability probabilities).
idea_spark.risk: The model assumes Poisson release events and recursive street structure; real urban networks may deviate from ideal hyperfractals.
idea_spark.inspiration: View parking search as a random walk and predict search time using network fractal dimension, inspiring smart parking navigation algorithms.

papers.title: Wave Tank Experiment for Sea State Monitoring with Distributed Acoustic Sensing
papers.summary: Monitoring sea states across the offshore wind farm areas is essential to keep their structures safe, efficiently operate the systems, and assess the environmental effects of wind turbines. Conventional sea state sensors like buoys limit their observable coverage; therefore, installing many sensors across the wide area is necessary to obtain sufficient sea state information. However, such a situation is not practical in terms of cost. Instead, the study proposes utilising optical fibres, which is embedded in existing power cables for telecommunications on the seabed, as sea state monitoring sensors with distributed acoustic sensing (DAS). DAS is a vibration-sensing technology along optical fibres based on the Rayleigh backscattering of the injected laser. It measures the dynamic strain of the optical fibre in real time at each spatial bin, which is called a "channel" along the fibre. In power cables on the seabed, time-varying water pressure due to waves is expected to exert dynamic strain. This hypothesis motivates us to validate whether the application of DAS for power cables can estimate sea state, such as wave period, height, and the direction of arrival. Hence, the authors carried out a wave tank experiment with a programmable wave generator. An actual power cable is installed under the same condition as the bottom-mounted offshore wind turbines. The experimental results show that (i) the wave period can be accurately estimated from the frequency-domain analysis. (ii) The strong linearity between DAS vibration power and the wave height is found. (iii) The direction of arrival of waves can be estimated with the error of 1.5$^\circ$ when there are at least two laying angles of the cable in parallel with the estimation of wavelength. These outcomes promote the feasibility of utilising the existing power cables across offshore wind farms as sea state monitoring sensors.

ai.tldr: 提出利用海底现有电力电缆中的光纤进行分布式声学传感（DAS），通过水槽实验验证了该方法可准确估计波浪周期、波高和波向，为海上风电场海况监测提供低成本方案。
ai.motivation: 传统海况传感器（如浮标）覆盖范围有限，大面积部署成本高；而海上风电场已有海底电力电缆，其内嵌光纤可用于DAS传感，有望实现低成本、广覆盖的海况监测。
ai.method: 在波浪水槽中，将实际海底电力电缆按底部固定式风机条件安装，利用可编程造波机生成波浪，通过DAS系统测量光纤动态应变，对数据进行频域分析和波向估计。
ai.result: 波浪周期可从频域分析准确估计；DAS振动功率与波高呈强线性关系；当电缆至少有两个平行布放角度时，波向估计误差仅为1.5°。
ai.help_to_user: 为海上风电场运维提供一种利用现有基础设施的低成本海况监测方案，可实时获取波浪参数，辅助结构安全评估与系统优化。

idea_spark.idea: 结合多根不同走向的电缆，可构建分布式传感网络，实现更大范围的海况实时成像。
idea_spark.risk: 实际海洋环境中电缆的埋设状态、生物附着及长期疲劳可能影响传感精度，需现场验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用已有基础设施进行传感，避免额外部署成本，是物联网与海洋工程结合的典型范例。

idea_spark.risk: 实际海洋环境中电缆的埋设状态、生物附着及长期疲劳可能影响传感精度，需现场验证。

en.tldr: Proposes using optical fibers in existing seabed power cables for distributed acoustic sensing (DAS) to monitor sea states. Wave tank experiments demonstrate accurate estimation of wave period, height, and direction, offering a low-cost solution for offshore wind farms.
en.motivation: Conventional sea state sensors like buoys have limited coverage and high deployment cost; existing submarine power cables with embedded optical fibers can be leveraged for DAS-based monitoring, enabling wide-area, cost-effective sea state estimation.
en.method: A wave tank experiment was conducted with a programmable wave generator and an actual power cable installed as in bottom-mounted offshore wind turbines. DAS measured dynamic strain along the fiber; frequency-domain analysis and direction-of-arrival estimation were applied.
en.result: Wave period was accurately estimated from frequency-domain analysis; DAS vibration power showed strong linearity with wave height; wave direction was estimated with an error of 1.5° when at least two cable laying angles were available.
en.help_to_user: Provides a low-cost sea state monitoring method for offshore wind farm operations, leveraging existing power cable infrastructure to obtain real-time wave parameters for structural safety and system optimization.

idea_spark.idea: Combining multiple cables with different orientations could form a distributed sensing network for real-time sea state imaging over a large area.
idea_spark.risk: Real-world cable burial conditions, biofouling, and long-term fatigue may affect sensing accuracy, requiring field validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leveraging existing infrastructure for sensing avoids additional deployment costs, exemplifying the integration of IoT and ocean engineering.

papers.title: RADD: Retrieval-Augmented Discrete Diffusion for Multi-Modal Knowledge Graph Completion
papers.summary: Most multi-modal knowledge graph completion (MMKGC) models use one embedding scorer to do both retrieval over the full entity set and final decision making. We argue that this coupling is a core bottleneck: global high-recall search and local fine-grained disambiguation require different inductive biases. Therefore, we propose a Retrieval-Augmented Discrete Diffusion (RADD) framework to decouple retrieve and reranking for MMKGC. A relation-aware multimodal KGE retriever serves as both global retriever and distillation teacher, while a conditional discrete denoiser performs shortlist-level entity-identity generation for reranking. Training combines KGE supervision, denoising cross-entropy, and temperature-scaled distillation from the retriever to the denoiser. At inference, the designed Diff-Rerank first forms a top-$K$ shortlist with the retriever and then reranks it with the denoiser, ensuring that recall is a strict prerequisite for precision. Experiments on three MMKGC benchmarks show that RADD achieves the best performance and consistent gains over strong unimodal, multimodal, and LLM-based baselines, while ablations further verify the contribution of each component.

ai.tldr: 提出RADD框架，将多模态知识图谱补全中的检索与重排序解耦，通过检索增强离散扩散实现全局召回与局部精排的分离。
ai.motivation: 现有MMKGC模型将全局检索与最终决策耦合在同一嵌入评分器中，导致高召回搜索与细粒度消歧所需的归纳偏置冲突，成为性能瓶颈。
ai.method: 设计关系感知多模态KGE检索器作为全局检索与蒸馏教师，条件离散去噪器进行候选列表级实体身份生成重排序；训练结合KGE监督、去噪交叉熵与温度缩放蒸馏；推理时通过Diff-Rerank先检索Top-K候选再重排序。
ai.result: 在三个MMKGC基准上取得最佳性能，一致优于强单模态、多模态及基于LLM的基线，消融实验验证各组件贡献。
ai.help_to_user: 若您需要补全多模态知识图谱，RADD提供了一种解耦检索与重排序的高效方案，可提升补全精度。

idea_spark.idea: 将离散扩散模型用于候选实体重排序，利用其生成式特性捕捉实体间细粒度关系。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖检索器质量，若检索器召回不足则重排序无法弥补；蒸馏过程可能引入噪声。
idea_spark.inspiration: 解耦检索与重排序的思路可启发设计更模块化的多模态推理系统，例如将知识图谱补全拆分为独立检索与生成阶段。

zh.tldr: 提出RADD框架，将多模态知识图谱补全中的检索与重排序解耦，通过检索增强离散扩散实现全局召回与局部精排的分离。
zh.motivation: 现有MMKGC模型将全局检索与最终决策耦合在同一嵌入评分器中，导致高召回搜索与细粒度消歧所需的归纳偏置冲突，成为性能瓶颈。
zh.method: 设计关系感知多模态KGE检索器作为全局检索与蒸馏教师，条件离散去噪器进行候选列表级实体身份生成重排序；训练结合KGE监督、去噪交叉熵与温度缩放蒸馏；推理时通过Diff-Rerank先检索Top-K候选再重排序。
zh.result: 在三个MMKGC基准上取得最佳性能，一致优于强单模态、多模态及基于LLM的基线，消融实验验证各组件贡献。
zh.help_to_user: 若您需要补全多模态知识图谱，RADD提供了一种解耦检索与重排序的高效方案，可提升补全精度。

idea_spark.idea: 将离散扩散模型用于候选实体重排序，利用其生成式特性捕捉实体间细粒度关系。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖检索器质量，若检索器召回不足则重排序无法弥补；蒸馏过程可能引入噪声。
idea_spark.inspiration: 解耦检索与重排序的思路可启发设计更模块化的多模态推理系统，例如将知识图谱补全拆分为独立检索与生成阶段。

en.tldr: Proposes RADD, a retrieval-augmented discrete diffusion framework that decouples retrieval and reranking for multi-modal knowledge graph completion, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
en.motivation: Existing MMKGC models couple global retrieval and final decision in one embedding scorer, causing conflicting inductive biases between high-recall search and fine-grained disambiguation.
en.method: A relation-aware multimodal KGE retriever serves as global retriever and distillation teacher; a conditional discrete denoiser performs shortlist-level entity generation for reranking. Training combines KGE loss, denoising cross-entropy, and temperature-scaled distillation. Inference uses Diff-Rerank: first retrieve top-K candidates, then rerank with the denoiser.
en.result: Achieves best performance on three MMKGC benchmarks, consistently outperforming strong unimodal, multimodal, and LLM-based baselines; ablations confirm each component's contribution.
en.help_to_user: If you need to complete multi-modal knowledge graphs, RADD offers an efficient decoupled retrieval-reranking solution to improve accuracy.

idea_spark.idea: Use discrete diffusion models for candidate entity reranking, leveraging generative capabilities to capture fine-grained entity relationships.
idea_spark.risk: Relies on retriever quality; insufficient recall cannot be compensated by reranking; distillation may introduce noise.
idea_spark.inspiration: Decoupling retrieval and reranking inspires more modular multi-modal reasoning systems, e.g., splitting KG completion into independent retrieval and generation stages.

papers.title: A mathematical analysis of hierarchical Hopfield models
papers.summary: The central question that we address is: How can structured information be stored in a hierarchical Hopfield model involving hidden layers? To this end, we develop a formalism of strokes and concepts that allows us to appropriately structure information: initial features are first classified into strokes, which in a second step are aggregated into concepts. We rigorously derive criteria under which concepts can be retrieved from noisy input data. A remarkable effect is that we do not require a perfect retrieval at the level of strokes, as the second-layer retrieval procedure compensates for first-layer errors. We treat separately the cases of fixed and variable-sized concepts.

ai.tldr: 本文对具有隐藏层的分层Hopfield模型进行数学分析，提出“笔画”与“概念”的形式化框架，并严格推导了从噪声输入中检索概念的条件。
ai.motivation: 探索如何在分层Hopfield模型中存储结构化信息，并解决噪声输入下的概念检索问题。
ai.method: 建立笔画与概念的形式化体系，将初始特征先分类为笔画，再聚合为概念；分别处理固定大小和可变大小概念的情况。
ai.result: 严格推导了概念检索的判据，发现第二层检索可补偿第一层笔画级的错误，无需完美检索笔画。
ai.help_to_user: 为设计具有层次结构的联想记忆模型提供数学基础，指导噪声环境下结构化信息的鲁棒存储与检索。

idea_spark.idea: 将笔画-概念框架扩展到连续值或概率表示，实现更灵活的信息聚合与噪声容忍。
idea_spark.risk: 数学推导可能依赖特定假设（如独立噪声），实际应用中需验证假设的合理性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受生物视觉系统分层处理启发，可进一步探索多层级反馈与注意力机制的结合。

en.tldr: This paper provides a mathematical analysis of hierarchical Hopfield models with hidden layers, introducing a formalism of strokes and concepts, and rigorously deriving conditions for concept retrieval from noisy inputs.
en.motivation: To explore how structured information can be stored in hierarchical Hopfield models and retrieved under noise.
en.method: Develops a formalism of strokes and concepts, where initial features are first classified into strokes and then aggregated into concepts; treats fixed-sized and variable-sized concepts separately.
en.result: Rigorously derives criteria for concept retrieval, showing that second-layer retrieval can compensate for first-layer errors, eliminating the need for perfect stroke retrieval.
en.help_to_user: Provides a mathematical foundation for designing hierarchical associative memory models, guiding robust storage and retrieval of structured information in noisy environments.

idea_spark.idea: Extend the stroke-concept framework to continuous or probabilistic representations for more flexible information aggregation and noise tolerance.
idea_spark.risk: Mathematical derivations may rely on specific assumptions (e.g., independent noise); practical applications need to verify these assumptions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by hierarchical processing in biological visual systems, further exploration could combine multi-level feedback with attention mechanisms.

papers.title: Prefactorization algebras of superselection sectors
papers.summary: This paper revisits the theory of superselection sectors in algebraic quantum field theory from the modern perspective of prefactorization algebras. Under the standard assumptions of Haag duality and a locally faithful vacuum representation, it is shown that every AQFT defined over a filtered orthogonal category of spacetime regions, satisfying some mild additional geometric hypotheses, has an associated locally constant $C^\ast$-categorical prefactorization algebra of superselection sectors over the same orthogonal category. In the case of double cones in the $(n\geq 2)$-dimensional Minkowski spacetime, our approach provides a conceptual explanation for the well-known $\mathbb{E}_n$-monoidal structure on the $C^\ast$-category of superselection sectors as the combination, through Dunn-Lurie additivity $\mathbb{E}_n\simeq \mathbb{E}_1\otimes \mathbb{E}_{n-1}$, of the familiar $\mathbb{E}_1$-monoidal structure from Haag duality and an $\mathbb{E}_{n-1}$-monoidal structure from Lorentzian geometry. A refinement of our results to equivariant contexts under a discrete group $G$ is also provided.

ai.tldr: 本文从预因子化代数的现代视角重新审视代数量子场论中的超选择扇区理论。
ai.motivation: 将超选择扇区理论与预因子化代数框架统一，以提供更概念化的解释。
ai.method: 在Haag对偶性和局部忠实真空表示等标准假设下，构造与AQFT相关联的局部常值C*-范畴预因子化代数。
ai.result: 证明了在满足几何假设的过滤正交范畴上，超选择扇区具有E_n-幺半结构，该结构由Haag对偶性和Lorentz几何通过Dunn-Lurie可加性组合而成。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解AQFT中超选择扇区的范畴结构及其几何起源。

idea_spark.idea: 利用Dunn-Lurie可加性将高维幺半结构分解为低维结构的组合。
idea_spark.risk: 对时空几何的假设可能限制其适用范围。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将范畴论工具与物理对偶性结合，为量子场论分类提供新视角。

en.tldr: This paper revisits superselection sectors in algebraic quantum field theory from the modern perspective of prefactorization algebras.
en.motivation: To unify superselection sector theory with the prefactorization algebra framework for a more conceptual explanation.
en.method: Under standard assumptions (Haag duality, locally faithful vacuum representation), construct a locally constant C*-categorical prefactorization algebra of superselection sectors over a filtered orthogonal category.
en.result: Shows that superselection sectors carry an E_n-monoidal structure, arising from the combination of Haag duality and Lorentzian geometry via Dunn-Lurie additivity.
en.help_to_user: Provides a categorical and geometric understanding of superselection sectors in AQFT.

idea_spark.idea: Use Dunn-Lurie additivity to decompose higher-dimensional monoidal structures into lower-dimensional ones.
idea_spark.risk: Geometric assumptions may limit applicability to certain spacetimes.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combining categorical tools with physical dualities offers new perspectives for classifying QFTs.

papers.title: Improving Zero-Shot Offline RL via Behavioral Task Sampling
papers.summary: Offline zero-shot reinforcement learning (RL) aims to learn agents that optimize unseen reward functions without additional environment interaction. The standard approach to this problem trains task-conditioned policies by sampling task vectors that define linear reward functions over learned state representations. In most existing algorithms, these task vectors are randomly sampled, implicitly assuming this adequately captures the structure of the task space. We argue that doing so leads to suboptimal zero-shot generalization. To address this limitation, we propose extracting task vectors directly from the offline dataset and using them to define the task distribution used for policy training. We introduce a simple and general reward function extraction procedure that integrates into existing offline zero-shot RL algorithms. Across multiple benchmark environments and baselines, our approach improves zero-shot performance by an average of 20%, highlighting the importance of principled task sampling in offline zero-shot RL.

ai.tldr: 提出从离线数据集中提取任务向量来改进离线零样本强化学习的任务采样策略，提升零样本泛化性能。
ai.motivation: 现有离线零样本强化学习算法随机采样任务向量，未能充分捕捉任务空间结构，导致零样本泛化次优。
ai.method: 从离线数据集中直接提取任务向量，用于定义策略训练的任务分布，并集成到现有算法中。
ai.result: 在多个基准环境和基线上，零样本性能平均提升20%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过更合理的任务采样策略提升离线零样本强化学习的效果。

idea_spark.idea: 利用离线数据中的行为信息指导任务采样，可能比随机采样更高效。
idea_spark.risk: 任务提取过程可能引入数据偏差，影响泛化到未见任务。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从数据中学习任务分布的思想可启发其他零样本学习问题的改进。

en.tldr: Proposes extracting task vectors from offline datasets to improve task sampling in offline zero-shot RL, enhancing zero-shot generalization.
en.motivation: Existing offline zero-shot RL algorithms randomly sample task vectors, failing to capture task space structure, leading to suboptimal generalization.
en.method: Extracts task vectors directly from the offline dataset to define the task distribution for policy training, integrated into existing algorithms.
en.result: Achieves an average 20% improvement in zero-shot performance across multiple benchmarks and baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how principled task sampling can improve offline zero-shot RL performance.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging behavioral data for task sampling may be more efficient than random sampling.
idea_spark.risk: Task extraction may introduce data bias, affecting generalization to unseen tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: The idea of learning task distributions from data can inspire improvements in other zero-shot learning problems.

papers.title: Make Any Collection Navigable: Methods for Constructing and Evaluating Hypergraph of Text
papers.summary: One reason the Web is more useful than a simple collection of documents is that the structure created by hyperlinks enables flexible navigation from one web page to another. However, hyperlinks are typically created manually and cannot fully capture a corpus' implicit semantic structures. Is there a general way to make an arbitrary collection navigable? Recent work has formalized this problem generally as constructing a Hypergraph of Text (HoT), which provides a formal mathematical structure for supporting navigation and browsing. However, how to construct and evaluate a Hypergraph of Text remains a challenge. In this paper, we propose and study several methods for constructing a HoT. We also propose a novel quantitative metric, effort ratio, for evaluating the structural quality of a constructed HoT. Experimental results show that even simple TF-IDF baselines can match LLM-based methods on our proposed effort ratio metric.

ai.tldr: 提出构建和评估文本超图的方法，并引入努力比指标，发现简单TF-IDF基线可与LLM方法媲美。
ai.motivation: 网页因超链接而可导航，但手动创建超链接无法充分捕获语料库的隐式语义结构，需要一种通用方法使任意集合可导航。
ai.method: 提出多种文本超图构建方法，并设计努力比指标评估超图的结构质量。
ai.result: 实验表明，简单的TF-IDF基线在努力比指标上可与基于LLM的方法匹敌。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何将任意文本集合转化为可导航的超图，并提供评估其质量的量化指标。

idea_spark.idea: 利用TF-IDF等轻量方法替代昂贵LLM，实现大规模文本集合的快速导航构建。
idea_spark.risk: 简单基线可能无法捕获深层语义，在复杂语料上导航质量有限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发探索更高效、可扩展的文本导航结构，无需依赖大型模型。

zh.tldr: 提出构建和评估文本超图的方法，并引入努力比指标，发现简单TF-IDF基线可与LLM方法媲美。
