en.tldr: Proposes a method to leverage redundancy in quantum error-correcting codes for flexible logical circuit compilation under hardware constraints, reducing the problem to a least squares problem with a closed-form solution.
en.motivation: Quantum computing faces twin challenges of fault-tolerance and compilation; traditional methods require costly SWAP gates to satisfy hardware connectivity, which is inefficient.
en.method: Exploits logical indistinguishability of physically distinct operators due to error-correcting codes, formulates the choice of an optimal physical operator as a least squares problem, and provides a closed-form solution.
en.result: Demonstrates with the [[4,2,2]] code that logical targets can be realized without SWAP gates, and discusses connections to compressed sensing.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to use code redundancy to simplify quantum circuit compilation, avoiding overhead from hardware connectivity constraints.

idea_spark.idea: Formulates compilation optimization as a least squares problem with a closed-form solution, eliminating the need for search.
idea_spark.risk: The closed-form solution may be sensitive to noise or approximation errors; stability needs verification in real hardware.
idea_spark.inspiration: Compressed sensing techniques may enable efficient compilation by leveraging physical degrees of freedom to reduce resource consumption.

papers.title: SIEVES: Selective Prediction Generalizes through Visual Evidence Scoring
papers.summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve ever-stronger performance on visual-language tasks. Even as traditional visual question answering benchmarks approach saturation, reliable deployment requires satisfying low error tolerances in real-world out-of-distribution (OOD) scenarios. Precisely, selective prediction aims to improve coverage, i.e. the share of inputs the system answers, while adhering to a user-defined risk level. This is typically achieved by assigning a confidence score to each answer and abstaining on those that fall below a certain threshold. To enable reliable generalization, we require reasoner models to produce localized visual evidence while answering, and design a selector that explicitly learns to estimate the quality of the localization provided by the reasoner. We show that SIEVES (Selective Prediction through Visual Evidence Scoring) improves coverage by up to three times on challenging OOD benchmarks (V* Bench, HR-Bench-8k, MME-RealWorld-Lite, VizWiz, and AdVQA), compared to non-grounding baselines. Beyond better generalization to OOD tasks, the design of the SIEVES selector enables transfer to proprietary reasoners without access to their weights or logits, such as o3 and Gemini-3-Pro, providing coverage boosts beyond those attributable to accuracy alone. We highlight that SIEVES generalizes across all five tested OOD datasets and reasoner models (Pixel-Reasoner, o3, and Gemini-3-Pro), without benchmark- or reasoner-specific training or adaptation.

ai.tldr: 提出SIEVES方法，通过视觉证据评分实现选择性预测，在多个OOD基准上覆盖率提升三倍。
ai.motivation: 多模态大模型在真实OOD场景中需要低错误容忍度，现有方法缺乏可靠的视觉证据质量评估。
ai.method: 让推理模型在回答时生成局部视觉证据，选择器学习评估证据定位质量，据此决定是否回答。
ai.result: 在V* Bench等五个OOD数据集上，覆盖率比非接地基线提升三倍，且可迁移至闭源模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何通过视觉证据评分提升模型在分布外场景下的可靠性和覆盖率。

idea_spark.idea: 将选择性预测与视觉定位质量直接关联，而非仅依赖模型置信度。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖推理模型生成定位的准确性，若定位质量差可能影响选择器效果。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从人类“先看再答”的决策过程出发，将视觉证据作为回答可靠性的关键指标。

en.tldr: SIEVES improves selective prediction by scoring visual evidence, achieving up to 3x coverage on OOD benchmarks.
en.motivation: MLLMs need low error tolerance in real-world OOD scenarios, but existing methods lack reliable visual evidence quality assessment.
en.method: Reasoner produces localized visual evidence while answering; selector learns to estimate localization quality and decides whether to answer.
en.result: Up to 3x coverage improvement over non-grounding baselines on five OOD datasets, transferable to proprietary models.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how visual evidence scoring enhances model reliability and coverage in out-of-distribution settings.

idea_spark.idea: Directly link selective prediction to visual localization quality rather than relying solely on model confidence.
idea_spark.risk: Effectiveness depends on the accuracy of the reasoner's localization; poor localization may degrade selector performance.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human 'look before answering' decision process, using visual evidence as a key indicator of answer reliability.

papers.title: Multi-action Tangled Program Graphs for Multi-task Reinforcement Learning with Continuous Control
papers.summary: Over the past few decades, machine learning has been widely used to learn complex tasks. Reinforcement Learning (RL), inspired by human behavior, is a great example, as it involves developing specific behaviours for specific tasks. To further challenge algorithms, Multi-Task RL (MTRL) environments have been introduced, requiring a single model to learn multiple behaviors. The Tangled Program Graph (TPG) algorithm is a Genetic Programming (GP) algorithm designed for discrete MTRL environments. Recently, the MAPLE algorithm has been proposed, as another GP algorithm that achieves high results in single task continuous RL environments. A variation of the TPG is proposed alongside MAPLE, named Multi-Action TPG (MATPG) that aggregates MAPLE agents, and creates a control flow to activate them. Initially tested on single task RL environments only, MATPG achieved similar results to MAPLE. In this work, we present a new benchmark based on the MuJoCo Half Cheetah from Gymnasium. This benchmark features five distinct obstacles that are randomly positioned in front of the agent, each of which demands a unique behavior. This benchmark serves as a use case for MATPG, to prove its ability as a GP solution for continuous MTRL environments. Our experiments demonstrate its superiority in this multi-task use case when combined with lexicase selection. Furthermore, we examine the interpretability of the evolved graph, revealing that the decision flow of the model is fully interpretable.

ai.tldr: 提出多动作纠缠程序图（MATPG）算法，结合MAPLE和纠缠程序图，在连续控制多任务强化学习中表现优于基线，且模型决策流完全可解释。
ai.motivation: 现有纠缠程序图（TPG）仅适用于离散多任务环境，而MAPLE在单任务连续控制中表现优异但无法直接处理多任务。需要一种遗传编程方法同时支持连续控制和多任务学习。
ai.method: 在MAPLE基础上构建多动作纠缠程序图（MATPG），通过控制流聚合多个MAPLE智能体，并引入lexicase选择策略优化多任务性能。在MuJoCo Half Cheetah上设计包含五种随机障碍物的新基准。
ai.result: MATPG在连续多任务环境中优于MAPLE和TPG，结合lexicase选择后性能进一步提升。演化出的图结构完全可解释，决策流清晰。
ai.help_to_user: 提供了一种可解释的遗传编程方案，用于连续控制多任务强化学习，适合需要透明决策流程的应用场景。

idea_spark.idea: 利用lexicase选择优化多任务性能，同时保持模型可解释性，可探索更复杂的任务组合。
idea_spark.risk: 基准任务仅基于单一环境（Half Cheetah），泛化性需在更多连续控制任务中验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 可解释的决策流为安全关键应用（如机器人控制）提供信任基础，可进一步结合人类反馈优化控制策略。

en.tldr: Proposes Multi-Action Tangled Program Graphs (MATPG), combining MAPLE and TPG, achieving superior performance in continuous multi-task RL with fully interpretable decision flow.
en.motivation: Existing TPG is limited to discrete multi-task environments, while MAPLE excels in single-task continuous control but cannot handle multi-task directly. A GP method supporting both continuous control and multi-task learning is needed.
en.method: Builds MATPG by aggregating MAPLE agents with a control flow, and introduces lexicase selection for multi-task optimization. A new benchmark with five random obstacles on MuJoCo Half Cheetah is designed.
en.result: MATPG outperforms MAPLE and TPG in continuous multi-task settings, with further improvement under lexicase selection. The evolved graph is fully interpretable.
en.help_to_user: Provides an interpretable GP solution for continuous multi-task RL, suitable for applications requiring transparent decision processes.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging lexicase selection for multi-task optimization while maintaining interpretability can be explored for more complex task compositions.
idea_spark.risk: The benchmark is based on a single environment (Half Cheetah); generalization needs validation on more continuous control tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Interpretable decision flow builds trust for safety-critical applications (e.g., robot control), and can be combined with human feedback to refine control policies.

papers.title: JURY-RL: Votes Propose, Proofs Dispose for Label-Free RLVR
papers.summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) enhances the reasoning of large language models (LLMs), but standard RLVR often depends on human-annotated answers or carefully curated reward specifications. In machine-checkable domains, label-free alternatives such as majority voting or LLM-as-a-judge remove annotation cost but can introduce false positives that destabilize training. We introduce JURY-RL, a label-free RLVR framework that decouples answer proposal from reward disposal: votes from model rollouts propose a candidate answer, and a formal verifier determines whether that candidate can receive positive reward. Concretely, only rollouts matching the plurality-voted answer are rewarded when that answer is successfully verified in Lean. When verification is inconclusive, we invoke ResZero (Residual-Zero), a fallback reward that discards the unverified plurality proposal and redistributes a zero-mean, variance-preserving signal over the residual answers. This design maintains a stable optimization gradient without reinforcing unverifiable consensus. Across three backbone models trained on mathematical data, JURY-RL consistently outperforms other label-free baselines on mathematical reasoning benchmarks and transfers competitively to code generation and general benchmarks. It attains pass@1 performance comparable to supervised ground-truth training, with superior generalization demonstrated by higher pass@k and response diversity.

ai.tldr: 提出JURY-RL框架，通过投票提议候选答案、形式验证器决定奖励，实现无标签的RLVR训练，在数学推理上达到监督学习水平。
ai.motivation: 标准RLVR依赖人工标注或精心设计的奖励，无标签替代方法（如多数投票）会引入假阳性，破坏训练稳定性。
ai.method: 将答案提议与奖励处置解耦：模型rollout投票产生候选答案，形式验证器（Lean）决定是否给予正奖励；验证失败时使用ResZero回退奖励，保持梯度稳定。
ai.result: 在三个骨干模型上，JURY-RL在数学推理基准上优于其他无标签基线，pass@1与监督训练相当，pass@k和响应多样性更高。
ai.help_to_user: 提供一种无需人工标注即可稳定训练推理模型的方法，适用于可形式验证的领域。

idea_spark.idea: 将验证器作为奖励的最终仲裁者，而非仅依赖投票或LLM评判。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖形式验证器的完备性，验证器覆盖不足时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 解耦提议与验证的架构可启发其他弱监督场景。

zh.tldr: 提出JURY-RL框架，通过投票提议候选答案、形式验证器决定奖励，实现无标签的RLVR训练，在数学推理上达到监督学习水平。
zh.motivation: 标准RLVR依赖人工标注或精心设计的奖励，无标签替代方法（如多数投票）会引入假阳性，破坏训练稳定性。

zh.help_to_user: 提供一种无需人工标注即可稳定训练推理模型的方法，适用于可形式验证的领域。

idea_spark.idea: 将验证器作为奖励的最终仲裁者，而非仅依赖投票或LLM评判。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖形式验证器的完备性，验证器覆盖不足时可能失效。
idea_spark.inspiration: 解耦提议与验证的架构可启发其他弱监督场景。

en.tldr: JURY-RL decouples answer proposal from reward disposal using votes and a formal verifier, achieving label-free RLVR with stable training and supervised-level performance on math reasoning.
en.motivation: Standard RLVR relies on human annotations or careful reward design; label-free alternatives like majority voting introduce false positives that destabilize training.
en.method: Votes from model rollouts propose a candidate answer; a formal verifier (Lean) determines reward; if verification fails, ResZero fallback redistributes a zero-mean signal to maintain gradient stability.
en.result: Outperforms label-free baselines on math reasoning benchmarks across three backbones; pass@1 matches supervised training, with higher pass@k and response diversity.
en.help_to_user: Provides a stable, annotation-free training method for reasoning models in formally verifiable domains.

idea_spark.idea: Use a formal verifier as the ultimate reward arbiter instead of relying solely on voting or LLM judges.
idea_spark.risk: Depends on verifier completeness; may fail if the verifier cannot cover all cases.
idea_spark.inspiration: The decoupling of proposal and verification could inspire other weak-supervision scenarios.

papers.title: PHISHREV: A Hybrid Machine Learning and Post-Hoc Non-monotonic Reasoning Framework for Context-Aware Phishing Website Classification
papers.summary: Phishing detection systems are predominantly rely on statistical machine learning models, which often lack contextual reasoning and are vulnerable to adversarial manipulation. In this work, we propose a hybrid framework that integrates machine learning classifiers with non-monotonic reasoning using Answer Set Programming (ASP) to enable context-aware decision refinement. The proposed post-hoc reasoning layer incorporates expert knowledge to revise classifier predictions through formal belief revisions. Experimental results indicate that the reasoning module modifies 5.08\% of classifier outputs, leading to improved decision consistency. A key advantage is that new domain knowledge can be incorporated into the reasoning layer in $\mathcal{O}(n)$ time, eliminating the need for model retraining.

ai.tldr: 提出一种混合机器学习与后验非单调推理的钓鱼网站分类框架，利用回答集编程实现上下文感知的决策修正。
ai.motivation: 传统统计机器学习模型缺乏上下文推理能力，易受对抗攻击。
ai.method: 集成机器学习分类器与基于回答集编程的非单调推理层，通过形式化信念修正调整分类结果。
ai.result: 推理模块修改了5.08%的分类器输出，提升了决策一致性，且新知识可在O(n)时间内加入。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何结合符号推理与机器学习提升钓鱼检测的鲁棒性和可解释性。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将非单调推理与深度学习模型结合，用于处理对抗样本或分布外检测。
idea_spark.risk: 推理规则的设计依赖专家知识，可能难以覆盖所有攻击模式。
idea_spark.inspiration: 利用逻辑编程的信念修正机制，为黑盒模型提供可解释的决策调整路径。

idea_spark.inspiration: 利用逻辑编程的信念修正机制，为黑盒模型提供可解释的决策调整路径。

en.tldr: Proposes a hybrid framework combining machine learning with post-hoc non-monotonic reasoning using Answer Set Programming for context-aware phishing website classification.
en.motivation: Statistical ML models lack contextual reasoning and are vulnerable to adversarial manipulation.
en.method: Integrates ML classifiers with a non-monotonic reasoning layer based on Answer Set Programming, revising predictions via formal belief revision.
en.result: The reasoning module modifies 5.08% of classifier outputs, improving decision consistency, and new knowledge can be added in O(n) time.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how combining symbolic reasoning with ML can enhance robustness and interpretability in phishing detection.

idea_spark.idea: Explore combining non-monotonic reasoning with deep learning for adversarial example handling or out-of-distribution detection.
idea_spark.risk: Designing reasoning rules relies on expert knowledge, which may not cover all attack patterns.
idea_spark.inspiration: Leverage belief revision mechanisms from logic programming to provide interpretable decision adjustments for black-box models.

papers.title: Toward Scalable Terminal Task Synthesis via Skill Graphs
papers.summary: Terminal agents have demonstrated strong potential for autonomous command-line execution, yet their training remains constrained by the scarcity of high-quality and diverse execution trajectories. Existing approaches mitigate this bottleneck by synthesizing large-scale terminal task instances for trajectory sampling. However, they primarily focus on scaling the number of tasks while providing limited control over the diversity of execution trajectories that agents actually experience during training. In this paper, we present SkillSynth, an automated framework for terminal task synthesis built on a scenario-mediated skill graph. SkillSynth first constructs a large-scale skill graph, where scenarios serve as intermediate transition nodes that connect diverse command-line skills. It then samples paths from this graph as abstractions of real-world workflows, and uses a multi-agent harness to instantiate them into executable task instances. By grounding task synthesis in graph-sampled workflow paths, SkillSynth explicitly controls the diversity of minimal execution trajectories required to solve the synthesized tasks. Experiments on Terminal-Bench demonstrate the effectiveness of SkillSynth. Moreover, task instances synthesized by SkillSynth have been adopted to train Hy3 Preview, contributing to its enhanced agentic capabilities in terminal-based settings.

ai.tldr: 提出SkillSynth框架，通过场景中介的技能图自动合成终端任务，控制执行轨迹多样性，提升智能体训练效果。
ai.motivation: 现有终端任务合成方法主要增加任务数量，但缺乏对执行轨迹多样性的控制，导致智能体训练轨迹单一。
ai.method: 构建大规模技能图，以场景为中间节点连接命令行技能；从图中采样路径作为工作流抽象，再用多智能体框架实例化为可执行任务。
ai.result: 在Terminal-Bench上验证有效性，合成的任务用于训练Hy3 Preview，增强了其终端智能体能力。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员自动生成多样化的终端任务，用于训练更鲁棒的命令行智能体。

idea_spark.idea: 利用技能图路径采样控制轨迹多样性，可进一步结合强化学习中的探索策略，动态调整任务难度。
idea_spark.risk: 技能图构建依赖领域知识，可能引入偏差；多智能体实例化过程可能产生不可执行任务。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受知识图谱路径推理启发，将工作流抽象为图路径，再实例化为具体任务，平衡了可控性与多样性。

zh.tldr: 提出SkillSynth框架，通过场景中介的技能图自动合成终端任务，控制执行轨迹多样性，提升智能体训练效果。

zh.help_to_user: 帮助研究人员自动生成多样化的终端任务，用于训练更鲁棒的命令行智能体。

idea_spark.idea: 利用技能图路径采样控制轨迹多样性，可进一步结合强化学习中的探索策略，动态调整任务难度。
idea_spark.risk: 技能图构建依赖领域知识，可能引入偏差；多智能体实例化过程可能产生不可执行任务。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受知识图谱路径推理启发，将工作流抽象为图路径，再实例化为具体任务，平衡了可控性与多样性。

en.tldr: Proposes SkillSynth, an automated framework for terminal task synthesis using a scenario-mediated skill graph to control execution trajectory diversity and improve agent training.
en.motivation: Existing terminal task synthesis methods focus on scaling task quantity but lack control over execution trajectory diversity, leading to homogeneous training experiences.
en.method: Constructs a large-scale skill graph with scenarios as intermediate nodes linking command-line skills; samples paths as workflow abstractions and instantiates them into executable tasks via a multi-agent harness.
en.result: Demonstrates effectiveness on Terminal-Bench; synthesized tasks are used to train Hy3 Preview, enhancing its terminal-based agentic capabilities.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers automatically generate diverse terminal tasks for training more robust command-line agents.

idea_spark.idea: Leveraging skill graph path sampling to control trajectory diversity can be combined with reinforcement learning exploration strategies to dynamically adjust task difficulty.
idea_spark.risk: Skill graph construction relies on domain knowledge and may introduce bias; multi-agent instantiation may produce infeasible tasks.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by knowledge graph path reasoning, abstracting workflows as graph paths and instantiating them into specific tasks balances controllability and diversity.

papers.title: RESTestBench: A Benchmark for Evaluating the Effectiveness of LLM-Generated REST API Test Cases from NL Requirements
papers.summary: Existing REST API testing tools are typically evaluated using code coverage and crash-based fault metrics. However, recent LLM-based approaches increasingly generate tests from NL requirements to validate functional behaviour, making traditional metrics weak proxies for whether generated tests validate intended behaviour. To address this gap, we present RESTestBench, a benchmark comprising three REST services paired with manually verified NL requirements in both precise and vague variants, enabling controlled and reproducible evaluation of requirement-based test generation. RESTestBench further introduces a requirements-based mutation testing metric that measures the fault-detection effectiveness of a generated test case with respect to a specific requirement, extending the property-based approach of Bartocci et al. . Using RESTestBench, we evaluate two approaches across multiple state-of-the-art LLMs: (i) non-refinement-based generation, and (ii) refinement-based generation guided by interaction with the running SUT. In the refinement experiments, RESTestBench assesses how exposure to the actual implementation, valid or mutated, affects test effectiveness. Our results show that test effectiveness drops considerably when the generator interacts with faulty or mutated code, especially for vague requirements, sometimes negating the benefit of refinement and indicating that incorporating actual SUT behaviour is unnecessary when requirement detail is high.

en.method: The benchmark includes three REST services with precise and vague NL requirements, and compares non-refinement vs. refinement-based test generation guided by SUT interaction.
en.result: Test effectiveness drops significantly when interacting with faulty code, especially for vague requirements; refinement benefit diminishes when requirements are detailed.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers and practitioners evaluate and improve LLM-based test generation for REST APIs.

idea_spark.risk: Limited benchmark scope may not capture all real-world API complexities and requirement types.
idea_spark.inspiration: Explore the trade-off between requirement precision and test effectiveness, inspiring smarter test generation frameworks.

papers.title: ReTokSync: Self-Synchronizing Tokenization Disambiguation for Generative Linguistic Steganography
papers.summary: Generative linguistic steganography (GLS) enables covert communication by embedding secret messages into the natural language generation process. In practical deployment, however, GLS is vulnerable to tokenization ambiguity: the same surface text may be re-tokenized into a different token sequence at the receiver, breaking the shared decoding state between the communicating parties so that a single local mismatch can propagate into complete extraction failure. Existing solutions either remove ambiguous tokens -- distorting the generation distribution and compromising security -- or preserve the distribution at the cost of substantially reduced embedding capacity or prohibitive runtime overhead. To address this issue, we propose ReTokSync (Re-Tokenization Synchronization), a self-synchronizing disambiguation framework that monitors the receiver-view tokenization during generation and triggers a corrective reset only when ambiguity actually occurs. By confining the effect of tokenization ambiguity to sparse residual bit errors rather than global desynchronization, ReTokSync leaves ambiguity-free positions entirely untouched and remains compatible with the underlying steganographic algorithm. Experiments on both English and Chinese settings show that ReTokSync stays closest to the steganographic baseline in distributional security (zero KL divergence), text quality, embedding capacity, and runtime, while achieving extraction accuracy above 99.7\%. Building on this property, we further develop a two-channel covert communication mechanism in which ReTokSync serves as the primary channel and a reliable auxiliary channel corrects the remaining errors, achieving 100\% end-to-end recovery across all evaluated configurations.

ai.tldr: 提出ReTokSync框架，解决生成式语言隐写中因分词歧义导致的解码失败问题，实现高精度提取。
ai.motivation: 现有方法要么移除歧义分词破坏分布安全性，要么保留歧义但降低容量或增加开销。
ai.method: 在生成过程中监控接收端视角的分词，仅在歧义实际发生时触发纠正重置，将影响限制为稀疏残差比特错误。
ai.result: 在英文和中文设置下，分布安全性（零KL散度）、文本质量、嵌入容量和运行时间接近基线，提取准确率超过99.7%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在不牺牲安全性和效率的前提下解决隐写通信中的分词歧义问题。

idea_spark.idea: 将ReTokSync与辅助纠错通道结合，实现100%端到端恢复，可启发设计更鲁棒的隐写协议。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖辅助通道可能引入额外通信开销或暴露隐写行为。
idea_spark.inspiration: 监控接收端状态并局部重置的思路可应用于分布式系统中的状态同步问题。

en.tldr: Proposes ReTokSync, a self-synchronizing disambiguation framework to address tokenization ambiguity in generative linguistic steganography, achieving high extraction accuracy.
en.motivation: Existing solutions either remove ambiguous tokens (distorting distribution security) or preserve them but reduce capacity or increase overhead.
en.method: Monitors receiver-view tokenization during generation and triggers corrective resets only when ambiguity occurs, confining effects to sparse residual bit errors.
en.result: In both English and Chinese settings, ReTokSync stays close to the baseline in distributional security (zero KL divergence), text quality, embedding capacity, and runtime, with extraction accuracy above 99.7%.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to resolve tokenization ambiguity in steganographic communication without sacrificing security or efficiency.

idea_spark.idea: Combining ReTokSync with an auxiliary error correction channel achieves 100% end-to-end recovery, inspiring more robust steganographic protocols.
idea_spark.risk: Relying on an auxiliary channel may introduce extra communication overhead or expose steganographic behavior.
idea_spark.inspiration: The approach of monitoring receiver state and performing local resets can be applied to state synchronization problems in distributed systems.

papers.title: What Makes Good Instruction-Tuning Data? An In-Context Learning Perspective
papers.summary: Instruction-tuning datasets often contain substantial redundancy and low-quality samples, necessitating effective data selection methods. We propose an instruction data selection framework based on weighted in-context influence (wICI), which measures how effectively each candidate example reduces instruction-following difficulty for semantically related peers. Through systematic experiments, we address three key questions: what constitutes effective instruction tuning data from an in-context perspective, whether sample difficulty correlates with in-context influence, and how in-context influence translates to instruction tuning effectiveness. Experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms existing baselines under constrained data budgets, while empirically showing that sample difficulty negatively correlates with in-context influence.

ai.tldr: 提出基于加权上下文影响的指令数据选择框架，从上下文学习角度揭示有效指令调优数据的特征。
ai.motivation: 指令调优数据集常含冗余和低质量样本，需要有效的数据选择方法。
ai.method: 提出加权上下文影响（wICI）框架，衡量候选样本对语义相关样本指令遵循难度的降低程度。
ai.result: 在多个模型和基准上，该方法在有限数据预算下优于现有基线，且样本难度与上下文影响负相关。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解如何从上下文学习角度选择高质量指令调优数据。

idea_spark.idea: 探索将上下文影响与主动学习结合，动态选择最具影响力的样本。
idea_spark.risk: 负相关结果可能受任务类型或模型架构影响，需验证泛化性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 样本难度与上下文影响的负相关提示：简单样本可能比困难样本在指令调优中更有效。

en.method: Proposes weighted in-context influence (wICI) framework that measures how each candidate example reduces instruction-following difficulty for semantically related peers.

en.help_to_user: Helps users understand how to select high-quality instruction-tuning data from an in-context learning perspective.

idea_spark.risk: The negative correlation may be affected by task type or model architecture, requiring generalization validation.
idea_spark.inspiration: The negative correlation between sample difficulty and in-context influence suggests that simple samples may be more effective than difficult ones in instruction tuning.

papers.title: Kodaira-Spencer theory for flux backgrounds
papers.summary: We give an explicit description (in component fields) of a holomorphic theory associated to a general supersymmetric background of $\mathcal N=1$ supergravity in ten dimensions. Conjecturally, this provides a sought-for holomorphic realisation of the supergravity twist in such backgrounds, generalising the minimal type I BCOV theory for Calabi-Yau manifolds. Our theory unpacks the recently introduced Courant contact model associated to a holomorphic Courant algebroid. We also show that a coisotropic reduction of this model reproduces the recent model of ref [1], which is formulated in terms of constrained fields.

ai.tldr: 本文给出了与十维N=1超引力一般超对称背景相关的全纯理论的显式分量场描述，推测该理论提供了此类背景中超引力扭曲的全纯实现，推广了Calabi-Yau流形上的最小I型BCOV理论。
ai.motivation: 寻找超引力扭曲在一般超对称背景下的全纯实现，推广已有的Calabi-Yau流形上的BCOV理论。
ai.method: 利用全纯Courant algebroid的Courant接触模型，并通过余迷向约化得到约束场形式。
ai.result: 给出了全纯理论的显式分量场描述，并展示了余迷向约化可重现文献[1]中的约束场模型。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解超引力扭曲在通量背景下的全纯实现，以及Courant几何在弦论中的应用。

idea_spark.idea: 将超引力扭曲与全纯几何结合，可能为通量紧化中的模空间问题提供新视角。
idea_spark.risk: 理论推测部分尚需严格证明，且实际计算可能复杂。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将类似方法应用于其他超引力理论或非几何通量背景。

en.tldr: This paper provides an explicit component-field description of a holomorphic theory associated to a general supersymmetric background of ten-dimensional N=1 supergravity, conjecturally realizing the supergravity twist in such backgrounds and generalizing the minimal type I BCOV theory for Calabi-Yau manifolds.
en.motivation: To find a holomorphic realization of the supergravity twist in general supersymmetric backgrounds, extending the BCOV theory beyond Calabi-Yau manifolds.
en.method: Using the Courant contact model associated to a holomorphic Courant algebroid, and performing a coisotropic reduction to obtain a constrained-field formulation.
en.result: An explicit component-field description of the holomorphic theory is given, and it is shown that coisotropic reduction reproduces the constrained-field model of reference [1].
en.help_to_user: Helps understand the holomorphic realization of supergravity twists in flux backgrounds and the application of Courant geometry in string theory.

idea_spark.idea: Combining supergravity twists with holomorphic geometry may offer new perspectives on moduli space problems in flux compactifications.
idea_spark.risk: The conjectural part requires rigorous proof, and actual computations may be involved.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying similar methods to other supergravity theories or non-geometric flux backgrounds.

papers.title: Second-order optimality conditions for optimization problems with generalized equation constraints
papers.summary: This paper provides second-order optimality conditions for optimization problems with generalized equation constraints (GEPs), a framework that encompasses several important and challenging models in mathematical programming, including mathematical programs with variational inequality constraints (MPVIs) and bilevel programs. The obtained optimality conditions are novel even for these particular problem classes. As an application, second-order optimality conditions for MPVIs are detailed. The technical key lies in developing first- and second-order variational analysis of the highly intricate constraint system, which is needed to capture the local curvature of the feasible set entering these optimality conditions. Part of this task was already carried out in our companion paper \cite{BeGfrYeZhangZhou}, and here we complete the study. Comprehensive variational analysis results are derived, which are of independent interest.

ai.tldr: 本文针对广义方程约束优化问题提出了二阶最优性条件，该框架涵盖数学规划中的多个重要模型，包括变分不等式约束数学规划和双层规划。
ai.motivation: 现有最优性条件难以处理广义方程约束带来的复杂曲率信息，需要发展新的变分分析工具。
ai.method: 通过建立约束系统的一阶和二阶变分分析，刻画可行集的局部曲率，从而推导出二阶最优性条件。
ai.result: 得到了新颖的二阶最优性条件，并详细应用于变分不等式约束数学规划。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解广义方程约束优化问题的局部最优性结构，为算法设计和收敛性分析提供理论基础。

idea_spark.idea: 将约束系统的曲率信息显式纳入最优性条件，可能启发新的数值算法设计。
idea_spark.risk: 变分分析技术门槛较高，实际应用时需简化计算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 考虑将二阶条件与机器学习中的约束优化问题结合，例如神经网络的训练约束。

en.tldr: This paper presents second-order optimality conditions for optimization problems with generalized equation constraints, covering important models such as MPVIs and bilevel programs.
en.motivation: Existing optimality conditions fail to capture the local curvature of feasible sets induced by generalized equation constraints, necessitating new variational analysis tools.
en.method: First- and second-order variational analysis of the constraint system is developed to characterize the curvature, leading to the derivation of second-order optimality conditions.
en.result: Novel second-order optimality conditions are obtained, with detailed application to MPVIs.
en.help_to_user: Provides theoretical insights into local optimality for generalized equation-constrained problems, supporting algorithm design and convergence analysis.

idea_spark.idea: Explicitly incorporating constraint curvature into optimality conditions may inspire new numerical methods.
idea_spark.risk: High technical complexity of variational analysis may hinder practical implementation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Consider applying second-order conditions to constrained optimization in machine learning, e.g., training neural networks with constraints.

papers.title: Robustness Evaluation of a Foundation Segmentation Model Under Simulated Domain Shifts in Abdominal CT: Implications for Health Digital Twin Deployment
papers.summary: Foundation segmentation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) have demonstrated strong generalization across natural images; however, their robustness under clinically realistic medical imaging domain shifts remains insufficiently quantified. We present a systematic slice-level robustness audit of SAM (ViT-B) for spleen segmentation in abdominal CT using 1,051 nonempty slices from 41 volumes in the Medical Segmentation Decathlon. A standardized ground-truth-derived bounding-box protocol was used to isolate encoder robustness from prompt uncertainty. Controlled perturbations simulating inter-scanner variability, including Gaussian noise, blur, contrast scaling, gamma correction, and resolution mismatch, were applied across ten conditions. The clean baseline achieved a mean Dice score of 0.9145 (95% CI: [0.909, 0.919]) with a failure rate of 0.67%. Across all perturbations, the absolute mean ΔDice remained below 0.01. Paired Wilcoxon signed-rank tests with Benjamini-Hochberg false discovery rate correction identified statistically significant but small-magnitude changes under selected conditions, while McNemar analysis showed no significant increase in failure probability. These findings indicate that SAM exhibits stable segmentation behavior under moderate CT domain shifts, supporting its role as a robust foundation baseline for medical image segmentation research. As health digital twins increasingly incorporate foundation segmentation models for anatomical modeling and organ-level monitoring, formal characterization of robustness under real-world imaging variability is a necessary step toward trustworthy deployment.

ai.tldr: 在腹部CT中，SAM在模拟域偏移下表现出稳定的脾脏分割性能，支持其在健康数字孪生中的部署。
ai.motivation: 基础分割模型在自然图像中表现良好，但在临床医学影像域偏移下的鲁棒性尚未充分量化，这对健康数字孪生的可信部署至关重要。
ai.method: 使用Medical Segmentation Decathlon的41个CT体积中的1051个非空切片，通过标准化的真实边界框协议隔离编码器鲁棒性，施加十种模拟域偏移（高斯噪声、模糊、对比度缩放、伽马校正、分辨率不匹配）。
ai.result: 干净基线平均Dice为0.9145，失败率0.67%；所有偏移下绝对平均ΔDice低于0.01；统计检验显示显著但微小的变化，McNemar分析未发现失败概率显著增加。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解SAM在医学影像域偏移下的鲁棒性，为健康数字孪生中的解剖建模和器官监测提供可靠性依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将SAM作为基础模型，结合多模态数据（如MRI和CT）进一步验证其在跨模态域偏移下的表现。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟偏移可能无法完全代表真实临床场景中的复杂变异，需在真实数据上验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将基础模型的鲁棒性测试纳入健康数字孪生的标准验证流程。

zh.tldr: 在腹部CT中，SAM在模拟域偏移下表现出稳定的脾脏分割性能，支持其在健康数字孪生中的部署。
zh.motivation: 基础分割模型在自然图像中表现良好，但在临床医学影像域偏移下的鲁棒性尚未充分量化，这对健康数字孪生的可信部署至关重要。
zh.method: 使用Medical Segmentation Decathlon的41个CT体积中的1051个非空切片，通过标准化的真实边界框协议隔离编码器鲁棒性，施加十种模拟域偏移（高斯噪声、模糊、对比度缩放、伽马校正、分辨率不匹配）。
zh.result: 干净基线平均Dice为0.9145，失败率0.67%；所有偏移下绝对平均ΔDice低于0.01；统计检验显示显著但微小的变化，McNemar分析未发现失败概率显著增加。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助用户了解SAM在医学影像域偏移下的鲁棒性，为健康数字孪生中的解剖建模和器官监测提供可靠性依据。

idea_spark.idea: 将SAM作为基础模型，结合多模态数据（如MRI和CT）进一步验证其在跨模态域偏移下的表现。
idea_spark.risk: 模拟偏移可能无法完全代表真实临床场景中的复杂变异，需在真实数据上验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 启发将基础模型的鲁棒性测试纳入健康数字孪生的标准验证流程。

en.tldr: SAM demonstrates stable spleen segmentation under simulated domain shifts in abdominal CT, supporting its deployment in health digital twins.
en.motivation: Foundation segmentation models generalize well on natural images, but their robustness under clinically realistic medical imaging domain shifts remains insufficiently quantified, which is critical for trustworthy health digital twin deployment.
en.method: Using 1,051 nonempty slices from 41 CT volumes of the Medical Segmentation Decathlon, a standardized ground-truth bounding-box protocol isolates encoder robustness; ten simulated domain shifts (Gaussian noise, blur, contrast scaling, gamma correction, resolution mismatch) are applied.
en.result: Clean baseline mean Dice 0.9145, failure rate 0.67%; absolute mean ΔDice < 0.01 across all perturbations; statistically significant but small-magnitude changes under selected conditions; no significant increase in failure probability by McNemar analysis.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand SAM's robustness under medical imaging domain shifts, providing reliability evidence for anatomical modeling and organ monitoring in health digital twins.

idea_spark.idea: Use SAM as a baseline and combine with multimodal data (e.g., MRI and CT) to further validate performance under cross-modal domain shifts.
idea_spark.risk: Simulated shifts may not fully capture real clinical variability; validation on real-world data is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspires incorporating foundation model robustness testing into standard validation pipelines for health digital twins.

papers.title: Personalized Multi-Interest Modeling for Cross-Domain Recommendation to Cold-Start Users
papers.summary: Cross-domain recommendation (CDR) has demonstrated to be an effective solution for alleviating the user cold-start issue. By leveraging rich user-item interactions available in a richly informative source domain, CDR could improve the recommendation performance for cold-start users in the target domain. Previous CDR approaches mostly adhere the Embedding and Mapping (EMCDR) paradigm, which learns a user-shared mapping function to transfer users' preference from the source domain to the target domain, neglecting users' personalized preference. Recent CDR approaches further leverage the meta-learning paradigm, considering the CDR task for each user independently and learning user-specific mapping functions for each user. However, they mostly learn representations for each user individually, which ignores the common preference between different users, neglecting valuable information for CDR. In addition, all these approaches usually summarize the user's preference into an overall representation, which can hardly capture the user's multi-interest preference. To this end, we propose a personalized multi-interest modeling framework for CDR to cold-start users, termed as NF-NPCDR. Specifically, we propose a personalized preference encoder that enhances the neural process (NP) with the normalizing flow (NF) to convert the Gaussian (unimodal) distribution to a multimodal distribution, providing a novel way to capture the user's personalized multi-interest preference. Then, we propose a common preference encoder with a preference pool to capture the common preference between different users. Furthermore, we introduce a stochastic adaptive decoder to incorporate both the personalized and common preference for cold-start users, adaptively modulating both preference for better recommendation.

ai.tldr: 提出个性化多兴趣建模框架NF-NPCDR，通过神经过程与归一化流结合，解决跨域推荐中冷启动用户的兴趣建模问题。
ai.motivation: 现有跨域推荐方法忽略用户个性化偏好和共同偏好，且将用户偏好总结为单一表示，难以捕捉多兴趣。
ai.method: 设计个性化偏好编码器（NP+NF）将高斯分布转为多模态分布，构建共同偏好编码器与偏好池，引入随机自适应解码器融合两种偏好。
ai.result: 在冷启动用户推荐中，NF-NPCDR能有效捕捉个性化多兴趣和用户间共同偏好，提升推荐性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用跨域信息为冷启动用户提供个性化推荐，并学习多兴趣建模方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将归一化流与神经过程结合，将单峰分布转化为多峰分布，以建模用户的多兴趣偏好。
idea_spark.risk: 多模态分布可能引入噪声，需谨慎设计分布转换的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从概率生成模型角度解决推荐中的多兴趣问题，启发其他领域（如文本生成）的多样性建模。

zh.result: 在冷启动用户推荐中，NF-NPCDR能有效捕捉个性化多兴趣和用户间共同偏好，提升推荐性能。
zh.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何利用跨域信息为冷启动用户提供个性化推荐，并学习多兴趣建模方法。

idea_spark.idea: 将归一化流与神经过程结合，将单峰分布转化为多峰分布，以建模用户的多兴趣偏好。
idea_spark.risk: 多模态分布可能引入噪声，需谨慎设计分布转换的稳定性。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从概率生成模型角度解决推荐中的多兴趣问题，启发其他领域（如文本生成）的多样性建模。

en.tldr: Proposes NF-NPCDR, a personalized multi-interest modeling framework that combines neural process with normalizing flow to address cold-start user recommendation in cross-domain settings.
en.motivation: Existing CDR methods ignore personalized and common preferences, and summarize user preference into a single representation, failing to capture multi-interest.
en.method: Designs a personalized preference encoder (NP+NF) to convert Gaussian distribution into multimodal distribution, builds a common preference encoder with a preference pool, and introduces a stochastic adaptive decoder to fuse both preferences.
en.result: NF-NPCDR effectively captures personalized multi-interest and common preferences among users, improving recommendation for cold-start users.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to leverage cross-domain information for personalized cold-start recommendation and learn multi-interest modeling techniques.

idea_spark.idea: Combining normalizing flow with neural process to transform unimodal distribution into multimodal distribution for modeling user multi-interest.
idea_spark.risk: Multimodal distribution may introduce noise; careful design is needed to ensure stability of distribution transformation.
idea_spark.inspiration: Using probabilistic generative models for multi-interest recommendation inspires diversity modeling in other fields like text generation.

papers.title: Slice Agent: Identifying and Isolating Slices in Shared Open Radio Unit
papers.summary: Network Slice as a Service (NSaaS) is a key enabler of Beyond Fifth Generation (5G) and Sixth Generation (6G) networks, supporting next-generation applications such as extended reality (XR), immersive services, and the tactile Internet. These networks must provide native support for slice-aware services across the entire Radio Access Network (RAN), including the Radio Unit (RU), Distributed Unit (DU), Central Unit (CU), and transport segments (fronthaul, midhaul, and backhaul). However, uplink slicing identification in shared Open-RUs (O-RUs) presents a fundamental challenge because the Open-DU (O-DU) handles scheduling, and the O-RU does not inherently know which uplink data belongs to which slice. In MultiPoint-to-MultiPoint (MP2MP) fronthaul scenarios, this limitation is further exacerbated by synchronization and timing constraints, which necessitate that the O-RU process control messages and the encapsulated data be delivered with ultra-low latency. To address this issue, we propose a slicing agent embedded in the O-RU that identifies slices and segregates uplink data into slice-specific enhanced Common Public Radio Interface (eCPRI) packets. Our design employs a pipeline architecture with dedicated paths for time-sensitive, flexible slicing, enabling slice isolation and prioritization. When implemented on an Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA), the agent processes each packet in 2 clock cycles, supporting up to 3822 slices per slot. Experimental results validate the approach, showing its feasibility, scalability, and high-performance capabilities for real-time, slice-aware uplink processing in Beyond 5G and 6G Open RAN deployments.

ai.tldr: 提出一种嵌入开放无线单元（O-RU）的切片代理，用于识别和隔离上行链路切片数据，并在FPGA上实现每包2时钟周期的高性能处理。
ai.motivation: 在共享O-RU中，O-DU负责调度，O-RU无法识别上行数据所属切片，导致切片感知服务难以实现。
ai.method: 设计流水线架构的切片代理，为时间敏感和灵活切片提供专用路径，将上行数据封装为切片特定的eCPRI包。
ai.result: FPGA实现每包2时钟周期处理，支持每时隙3822个切片，验证了可行性、可扩展性和高性能。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解如何在开放无线接入网中实现实时、切片感知的上行处理。

idea_spark.idea: 利用FPGA的并行处理能力，在物理层实现切片粒度的数据分流，避免上层调度延迟。
idea_spark.risk: FPGA资源消耗随切片数量线性增长，可能限制大规模部署；与现有O-RU标准兼容性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将网络切片功能下沉到最前端的无线单元，实现端到端切片原生支持。

zh.motivation: 在共享O-RU中，O-DU负责调度，O-RU无法识别上行数据所属切片，导致切片感知服务难以实现。

idea_spark.risk: FPGA资源消耗随切片数量线性增长，可能限制大规模部署；与现有O-RU标准兼容性需验证。
idea_spark.inspiration: 将网络切片功能下沉到最前端的无线单元，实现端到端切片原生支持。

en.tldr: Proposes a slicing agent embedded in the Open Radio Unit (O-RU) to identify and isolate uplink slice data, achieving 2 clock cycles per packet on FPGA.
en.motivation: In shared O-RUs, the O-DU handles scheduling but the O-RU cannot identify which uplink data belongs to which slice, hindering slice-aware services.
en.method: A pipeline architecture with dedicated paths for time-sensitive and flexible slicing, encapsulating uplink data into slice-specific eCPRI packets.
en.result: FPGA implementation processes each packet in 2 clock cycles, supporting up to 3822 slices per slot, demonstrating feasibility, scalability, and high performance.
en.help_to_user: Helps understand how to achieve real-time, slice-aware uplink processing in Open RAN.

idea_spark.idea: Leverage FPGA parallelism to perform slice-level data separation at the physical layer, avoiding scheduling delays from upper layers.
idea_spark.risk: FPGA resource consumption scales linearly with slice count, potentially limiting large-scale deployment; compatibility with existing O-RU standards needs verification.
idea_spark.inspiration: Push network slicing functionality down to the most front-end radio unit to achieve native end-to-end slice support.

papers.title: DualGeo: A Dual-View Framework for Worldwide Image Geo-localization
papers.summary: Worldwide image geo-localization aims to infer the geographic location of an image captured anywhere on Earth, spanning street, city, regional, national, and continental scales. Existing methods rely on visual features that are sensitive to environmental variations (e.g., lighting, season, and weather) and lack effective post-processing to filter outlier candidates, limiting localization accuracy. To address these limitations, we propose DualGeo, a two-stage framework for worldwide image geo-localization. First, it establishes a geo-representational foundation by fusing image and semantic segmentation features via bidirectional cross-attention. The fused features are then aligned with GPS coordinates through dual-view contrastive learning to build a global retrieval database. Second, it performs geo-cognitive refinement by re-ranking retrieved candidates using geographic clustering. It then feeds them into large multimodal models (LMMs) for final coordinate prediction. Experiments on IM2GPS, IM2GPS3k, and YFCC4k show that DualGeo outperforms state-of-the-art methods, improving street-level (<1 km) and city-level (<25 km) localization accuracy by 3.6%-16.58% and 1.29%-8.77%, respectively. Our code and datasets are available : https://github.com/CJ310177/DualGeo.

ai.tldr: 提出DualGeo双阶段框架，融合图像与语义分割特征，通过双向交叉注意力、双视角对比学习和地理聚类重排序，结合大语言模型提升全球图像地理定位精度。
ai.motivation: 现有方法依赖视觉特征，易受光照、季节等环境变化影响，且缺乏有效的后处理过滤异常候选，限制了定位精度。
ai.method: 第一阶段：通过双向交叉注意力融合图像和语义分割特征，经双视角对比学习与GPS坐标对齐构建全局检索库。第二阶段：利用地理聚类重排序候选，并输入大语言模型进行最终坐标预测。
ai.result: 在IM2GPS、IM2GPS3k和YFCC4k数据集上，街道级（<1 km）和城市级（<25 km）定位精度分别提升3.6%-16.58%和1.29%-8.77%，超越现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 可帮助用户从任意全球图像中推断地理位置，适用于旅游照片定位、地理信息检索等场景。

idea_spark.idea: 将地理聚类重排序与大型语言模型结合，利用语言模型的常识推理能力过滤异常候选，提升定位鲁棒性。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖大型语言模型可能引入计算开销和推理延迟，且对低质量或模糊图像效果可能受限。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类地理认知启发：先通过视觉线索缩小范围（如地标、建筑风格），再结合上下文知识精确定位。

en.tldr: Proposes DualGeo, a two-stage framework that fuses image and semantic segmentation features via bidirectional cross-attention, uses dual-view contrastive learning and geographic clustering re-ranking with large multimodal models to improve worldwide image geo-localization accuracy.
en.motivation: Existing methods rely on visual features sensitive to environmental variations (e.g., lighting, season, weather) and lack effective post-processing to filter outlier candidates, limiting localization accuracy.
en.method: Stage 1: Fuse image and semantic segmentation features via bidirectional cross-attention, align with GPS coordinates through dual-view contrastive learning to build a global retrieval database. Stage 2: Re-rank retrieved candidates using geographic clustering, then feed into large multimodal models for final coordinate prediction.
en.result: On IM2GPS, IM2GPS3k, and YFCC4k datasets, street-level (<1 km) and city-level (<25 km) accuracy improved by 3.6%-16.58% and 1.29%-8.77%, respectively, outperforming state-of-the-art methods.
en.help_to_user: Helps users infer geographic location from any worldwide image, useful for travel photo localization and geographic information retrieval.

idea_spark.idea: Combine geographic clustering re-ranking with large language models to leverage commonsense reasoning for filtering outlier candidates, enhancing robustness.
idea_spark.risk: Dependence on large language models may introduce computational overhead and inference latency, and performance may degrade on low-quality or ambiguous images.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human geographic cognition: first narrow down scope using visual cues (e.g., landmarks, architectural style), then refine location with contextual knowledge.

papers.title: Self-DACE++: Robust Low-Light Enhancement via Efficient Adaptive Curve Estimation
papers.summary: In this paper, we present Self-DACE++, an improved unsupervised and lightweight framework for Low-Light Image Enhancement (LLIE), building upon our previous Self-Reference Deep Adaptive Curve Estimation (Self-DACE). To better address the trade-off between computational efficiency and restoration quality, Self-DACE++ introduces enhanced Adaptive Adjustment Curves (AACs). These curves, governed by minimal trainable parameters, flexibly adjust the dynamic range while preserving the color fidelity, structural integrity, and naturalness of the enhanced images. To achieve an extremely lightweight architecture without sacrificing performance, we propose a randomized order training strategy coupled with a network fusion mechanism, which compresses the model into an efficient iterative inference structure. Furthermore, we formulate a physics-grounded objective function based on Retinex theory and incorporate a dedicated denoising module to effectively estimate and suppress latent noise in dark regions. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations on multiple real-world benchmark datasets demonstrate that Self-DACE++ outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, delivering superior enhancement quality with real-time inference capability. The code is available at https://github.com/John-Wendell/Self-DACE.

ai.tldr: 提出Self-DACE++，一种改进的无监督轻量级低光图像增强框架，通过高效自适应曲线估计实现实时高质量增强。
ai.motivation: 现有低光增强方法在计算效率与恢复质量之间存在权衡，需要更轻量且鲁棒的解决方案。
ai.method: 引入增强自适应调整曲线（AACs），采用随机顺序训练与网络融合机制压缩模型，基于Retinex理论构建物理约束目标函数并加入去噪模块。
ai.result: 在多个真实基准数据集上，Self-DACE++在增强质量和实时推理能力上均优于现有方法。
ai.help_to_user: 可用于低光图像实时增强，提升暗部细节与色彩保真度，适用于移动端或嵌入式设备。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机顺序训练与模型压缩结合，实现极轻量级迭代推理结构。
idea_spark.risk: 无监督方法在极端低光或复杂噪声场景下可能性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Retinex理论启发，将物理模型融入深度学习目标函数，提升增强的自然性。

zh.tldr: 提出Self-DACE++，一种改进的无监督轻量级低光图像增强框架，通过高效自适应曲线估计实现实时高质量增强。
zh.motivation: 现有低光增强方法在计算效率与恢复质量之间存在权衡，需要更轻量且鲁棒的解决方案。

zh.result: 在多个真实基准数据集上，Self-DACE++在增强质量和实时推理能力上均优于现有方法。
zh.help_to_user: 可用于低光图像实时增强，提升暗部细节与色彩保真度，适用于移动端或嵌入式设备。

idea_spark.idea: 将随机顺序训练与模型压缩结合，实现极轻量级迭代推理结构。
idea_spark.risk: 无监督方法在极端低光或复杂噪声场景下可能性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受Retinex理论启发，将物理模型融入深度学习目标函数，提升增强的自然性。

en.tldr: Proposes Self-DACE++, an improved unsupervised lightweight low-light image enhancement framework that achieves real-time high-quality enhancement via efficient adaptive curve estimation.
en.motivation: Existing low-light enhancement methods face a trade-off between computational efficiency and restoration quality, necessitating a more lightweight and robust solution.
en.method: Introduces enhanced Adaptive Adjustment Curves (AACs), employs a randomized order training strategy with network fusion for model compression, and formulates a physics-grounded objective based on Retinex theory with a dedicated denoising module.
en.result: On multiple real-world benchmark datasets, Self-DACE++ outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both enhancement quality and real-time inference capability.
en.help_to_user: Enables real-time low-light image enhancement with improved detail and color fidelity, suitable for mobile or embedded devices.

idea_spark.idea: Combines randomized order training with model compression to achieve an extremely lightweight iterative inference structure.
idea_spark.risk: Unsupervised methods may degrade under extreme low-light or complex noise conditions.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by Retinex theory, integrating physical models into deep learning objectives to enhance naturalness.

papers.title: SymphonyGen: 3D Hierarchical Orchestral Generation with Controllable Harmony Skeleton
papers.summary: Generating symphonic music requires simultaneously managing high-level structural form and dense, multi-track orchestration. Existing symbolic models often struggle with a "complexity-control imbalance", in which scaling bottlenecks limit long-term granular steerability. We present SymphonyGen, a 3D hierarchical framework for contemporary cinematic orchestration. SymphonyGen employs a cascading decoder architecture that decomposes the Bar, Track, and Event axes, improving computational efficiency and scalability over conventional 1D or 2D models. We introduce "short-score" conditioning via a beat-quantized multi-voice harmony skeleton, enabling outline control while preserving textural diversity. The model is further refined using Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a cross-modal audio-perceptual reward, aligning symbolic output with modern acoustic expectations. Additionally, we implement a dissonance-averse sampling algorithm to suppress unintended tonal clashes during inference. Objective evaluations show that both reinforcement learning and dissonance-averse sampling effectively enhance harmonic cleanliness while maintaining melodic expression. Subjective evaluations demonstrate that SymphonyGen outperforms baselines in musicality and preference for orchestral music generation. Demo page: https://symphonygen.github.io/

ai.tldr: 提出SymphonyGen，一个3D层次化框架，用于可控的交响乐生成，通过级联解码器、短谱条件、强化学习和不协和抑制采样，解决了复杂性与控制之间的平衡问题。
ai.motivation: 现有符号音乐模型在生成交响乐时难以同时管理高层结构和密集的多轨配器，存在“复杂-控制失衡”问题，即扩展瓶颈限制了长期细粒度可操控性。
ai.method: 采用级联解码器架构分解小节、音轨和事件三个维度；引入基于节拍量化的多声部和声骨架作为短谱条件；使用组相对策略优化（GRPO）结合跨模态音频感知奖励进行微调；并实现不协和规避采样算法。
ai.result: 客观评估显示强化学习和不协和规避采样均有效提升和声清晰度并保持旋律表现力；主观评估表明SymphonyGen在音乐性和偏好上优于基线。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户生成具有可控和声骨架的高质量交响乐，支持长序列、多轨配器，并减少不协和音。

idea_spark.idea: 将和声骨架与音频感知奖励结合，可进一步用于交互式音乐创作工具，允许用户实时调整和声轮廓。
idea_spark.risk: 依赖预定义的和声骨架可能限制风格多样性；音频感知奖励可能偏向特定声学特征。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受交响乐配器层次启发，将高层结构（和声骨架）与低层细节（音轨事件）分离建模，类似建筑设计中的骨架与填充。

en.tldr: Proposes SymphonyGen, a 3D hierarchical framework for controllable symphonic music generation, using cascading decoder, short-score conditioning, reinforcement learning, and dissonance-averse sampling to address the complexity-control imbalance.
en.motivation: Existing symbolic models struggle to manage both high-level structure and dense multi-track orchestration in symphonic music, suffering from a complexity-control imbalance where scaling bottlenecks limit fine-grained steerability.
en.method: Employs a cascading decoder architecture decomposing Bar, Track, and Event axes; introduces beat-quantized multi-voice harmony skeleton as short-score conditioning; fine-tunes with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) using cross-modal audio-perceptual reward; implements dissonance-averse sampling algorithm.
en.result: Objective evaluations show both reinforcement learning and dissonance-averse sampling effectively enhance harmonic cleanliness while preserving melodic expression; subjective evaluations demonstrate superiority in musicality and preference over baselines.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate high-quality symphonic music with controllable harmony skeleton, supporting long sequences and multi-track orchestration while reducing dissonance.

idea_spark.idea: Combining harmony skeleton with audio-perceptual reward could enable interactive music composition tools allowing real-time harmony contour adjustment.
idea_spark.risk: Reliance on predefined harmony skeletons may limit stylistic diversity; audio-perceptual reward may bias toward specific acoustic characteristics.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by symphonic orchestration hierarchy, separating high-level structure (harmony skeleton) from low-level details (track events), analogous to skeleton and infill in architectural design.

papers.title: ShapeY: A Principled Framework for Measuring Shape Recognition Capacity via Nearest-Neighbor Matching
papers.summary: Object recognition (OR) in humans relies heavily on shape cues and the ability to recognize objects across varying 3D viewpoints. Unlike humans, deep networks often rely on non-shape cues such as texture and background, leading to vulnerabilities in generalization and robustness. To address this gap, we introduce ShapeY, a novel and principled benchmarking framework designed to evaluate shape-based recognition capability in OR systems. ShapeY comprises 68,200 grayscale images of 200 3D objects rendered from multiple viewpoints and optionally subjected to non-shape ``appearance'' changes. Using a nearest-neighbor matching task, ShapeY specifically probes the fine-grained structure of an OR system's embedding space by evaluating whether object views are clustered by 3D shape similarity across varying 3D viewpoints and other non-shape changes. ShapeY provides a suite of quantitative and qualitative performance readouts, including error rate graphs, viewpoint tuning curves, histograms of positive and negative matching scores, and grids showing ordered best matches, which together offer a comprehensive evaluation of an OR system's shape understanding capability. Testing of 321 pre-trained networks with diverse architectures reveals significant challenges in achieving robust shape-based recognition: even state-of-the-art models struggle to generalize consistently across 3D viewpoint and appearance changes, and are prone to infrequent but egregious matches of objects of obviously completely different shape. ShapeY establishes a principled framework for advancing artificial vision systems toward human-like shape recognition capabilities, emphasizing the importance of disentangled and invariant object encodings.

ai.tldr: ShapeY是一个用于评估物体识别系统基于形状的识别能力的基准框架，包含68,200张灰度图像和最近邻匹配任务。
ai.motivation: 人类物体识别依赖形状线索，而深度网络常依赖纹理和背景等非形状线索，导致泛化性和鲁棒性不足。
ai.method: 构建包含200个3D物体多视角灰度图像的基准集，通过最近邻匹配任务评估嵌入空间中形状相似性聚类情况，并提供多种定量和定性指标。
ai.result: 测试321个预训练网络发现，即使最先进的模型也难以在视角和外观变化下稳定泛化，且偶尔出现形状明显不同的错误匹配。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助研究者系统评估和比较不同物体识别模型的形状理解能力，指导开发更鲁棒的视觉系统。

idea_spark.idea: 利用ShapeY的评估指标，设计一种训练策略，强制模型在嵌入空间中按形状相似性聚类，提升跨视角泛化能力。
idea_spark.risk: 基准可能过度强调形状线索，忽略纹理等有用信息，导致模型在真实场景中性能下降。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受人类视觉系统启发，强调形状不变性，可推动更类人的视觉表征学习研究。

en.tldr: ShapeY is a principled benchmark for evaluating shape-based recognition in object recognition systems, using 68,200 grayscale images and a nearest-neighbor matching task.
en.motivation: Human object recognition relies on shape cues, while deep networks often depend on non-shape cues like texture and background, leading to poor generalization and robustness.
en.method: Constructs a benchmark of 68,200 grayscale images of 200 3D objects from multiple viewpoints, uses nearest-neighbor matching to probe shape similarity clustering in embedding space, and provides multiple quantitative and qualitative metrics.
en.result: Testing 321 pre-trained networks shows that even state-of-the-art models struggle to generalize across viewpoint and appearance changes, and occasionally make egregious shape mismatches.
en.help_to_user: Helps researchers systematically evaluate and compare shape understanding of object recognition models, guiding development of more robust vision systems.

idea_spark.idea: Use ShapeY metrics to design a training strategy that forces models to cluster embeddings by shape similarity, improving cross-viewpoint generalization.
idea_spark.risk: Overemphasis on shape cues may neglect useful texture information, potentially degrading performance in real-world scenarios.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by human vision, emphasizing shape invariance can advance more human-like visual representation learning.

papers.title: Verification of Neural Networks (Lecture Notes)
papers.summary: These lecture notes provide an introduction to the verification of neural networks from a theoretical perspective. We discuss feed-forward neural networks, recurrent neural networks, attention mechanisms, and transformers, together with specification languages and algorithmic verification techniques.

ai.tldr: 这些讲义从理论角度介绍了神经网络验证，涵盖前馈网络、循环网络、注意力机制和Transformer，以及规范语言和算法验证技术。
ai.motivation: 神经网络在安全关键系统中广泛应用，需要形式化验证其正确性。
ai.method: 通过理论分析，讨论不同网络架构的验证方法，包括规范语言和算法技术。
ai.result: 提供了神经网络验证的理论基础，但未给出具体实验结果。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户理解神经网络验证的核心概念和理论框架。

idea_spark.idea: 开发针对Transformer的自动化验证工具。
idea_spark.risk: 理论验证可能难以扩展到大规模实际模型。
idea_spark.inspiration: 结合规范语言与算法验证，提升神经网络可靠性。

en.tldr: These lecture notes introduce neural network verification from a theoretical perspective, covering feed-forward networks, RNNs, attention mechanisms, transformers, specification languages, and algorithmic verification techniques.
en.motivation: Neural networks are widely used in safety-critical systems, necessitating formal verification of their correctness.
en.method: Theoretical analysis of verification methods for different network architectures, including specification languages and algorithmic techniques.
en.result: Provides theoretical foundations for neural network verification, without specific experimental results.
en.help_to_user: Helps users understand core concepts and theoretical frameworks of neural network verification.

idea_spark.idea: Develop automated verification tools for transformers.
idea_spark.risk: Theoretical verification may be difficult to scale to large practical models.
idea_spark.inspiration: Combine specification languages with algorithmic verification to enhance neural network reliability.

papers.title: Golden RPG: Confidence-Adaptive Region-Aware Noise for Compositional Text-to-Image Generation
papers.summary: Compositional text-to-image (T2I) generation requires a model to honour multiple sub-prompts that describe distinct image regions. Recent work shows that the \emph{starting noise} of a diffusion model carries significant semantic information: ``golden'' noise predicted from text can substantially raise prompt fidelity. We observe that this noise prediction is, however, fundamentally global: the same network is asked to summarise a long, multi-region prompt with a single text embedding, which becomes the bottleneck whenever the prompt describes scenes with spatially-separated entities. We introduce \textbf{Golden RPG}, a region-aware noise predictor that extends a frozen NPNet with two trainable additions: (i) a per-region \textbf{FiLM adapter} that reshapes the predicted noise according to each sub-prompt; and (ii) a \textbf{Region Cross-Attention} layer injected between two stages of the Swin backbone, allowing different spatial locations to attend to different sub-prompt tokens. To prevent the regional conditioning from degrading samples whose prompts are already easy, we further propose a \textbf{Confidence-Adaptive Blending} head that dynamically predicts, per sample, how strongly the regional signal should override the global signal. We evaluate on the original RPG benchmark (20 prompts, 100 samples) and on four multi-region categories of T2I-CompBench (1{,}200 images, six competing methods). Golden RPG achieves the highest Cross-Region-Coherence score on every category, while matching the strongest baselines on absolute CLIP-Score and CLIP-IQA. A paired user study further shows a $\boldsymbol{\sim}$67\% preference over the strongest baseline. The adapter contains $\sim$2M trainable parameters and adds only $0.6$\,s of inference overhead on top of SDXL.

ai.tldr: 提出Golden RPG，通过区域感知噪声预测和置信度自适应混合，提升组合式文本到图像生成中多子提示的忠实度。
ai.motivation: 现有扩散模型的起始噪声预测是全局的，难以处理描述空间分离实体的多区域提示，导致提示忠实度瓶颈。
ai.method: 在冻结的NPNet上添加两个可训练模块：每个子提示的FiLM适配器重塑噪声，以及Swin骨干间的区域交叉注意力层；另设置信度自适应混合头动态调节区域信号与全局信号的融合强度。
ai.result: 在RPG基准和T2I-CompBench四个多区域类别上，跨区域一致性得分最高，CLIP-Score和CLIP-IQA与最强基线持平，用户偏好约67%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助用户生成更准确遵循复杂多区域文本描述的图像，减少区域间语义冲突。

idea_spark.idea: 将区域交叉注意力与置信度自适应混合结合，动态平衡全局与局部条件，避免过度约束简单样本。
idea_spark.risk: 区域划分依赖外部提示解析，若子提示边界模糊可能导致区域错配；额外模块增加推理开销约0.6秒。
idea_spark.inspiration: 受“golden noise”全局性局限启发，通过空间解耦和自适应融合提升组合生成质量。

idea_spark.inspiration: 受“golden noise”全局性局限启发，通过空间解耦和自适应融合提升组合生成质量。

en.tldr: Golden RPG improves compositional text-to-image generation by region-aware noise prediction and confidence-adaptive blending, achieving higher prompt fidelity for multi-region prompts.
en.motivation: Existing diffusion models use global noise prediction, which becomes a bottleneck for prompts describing spatially separated entities in multiple regions.
en.method: Adds two trainable modules to a frozen NPNet: per-region FiLM adapters to reshape noise, and a Region Cross-Attention layer in the Swin backbone; plus a Confidence-Adaptive Blending head to dynamically balance regional and global signals.
en.result: Achieves highest Cross-Region-Coherence on RPG benchmark and T2I-CompBench, matches top baselines on CLIP-Score and CLIP-IQA, with ~67% user preference.
en.help_to_user: Helps users generate images that more accurately follow complex multi-region text descriptions, reducing inter-region semantic conflicts.

idea_spark.idea: Combining region cross-attention with confidence-adaptive blending dynamically balances global and local conditions, avoiding over-constraining simple samples.
idea_spark.risk: Region partitioning relies on external prompt parsing; ambiguous sub-prompt boundaries may cause misalignment; additional modules add ~0.6s inference overhead.
idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the global limitation of 'golden noise', spatial decoupling and adaptive fusion improve compositional generation quality.

papers.title: Three Models of RLHF Annotation: Extension, Evidence, and Authority
papers.summary: Preference-based alignment methods, most prominently Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF), use the judgments of human annotators to shape large language model behaviour. However, the normative role of these judgments is rarely made explicit. I distinguish three conceptual models of that role. The first is extension: annotators extend the system designers' own judgments about what outputs should be. The second is evidence: annotators provide independent evidence about some facts, whether moral, social or otherwise. The third is authority: annotators have some independent authority (as representatives of the broader population) to determine system outputs. I argue that these models have implications for how RLHF pipelines should solicit, validate and aggregate annotations. I survey landmark papers in the literature on RLHF and related methods to illustrate how they implicitly draw on these models, describe failure modes that come from unintentionally or intentionally conflating them, and offer normative criteria for choosing among them. My central recommendation is that RLHF pipeline designers should decompose annotation into separable dimensions and tailor each pipeline to the model most appropriate for that dimension, rather than seeking a single unified pipeline.

ai.tldr: 区分了RLHF标注的三种概念模型：扩展、证据和权威，并建议根据维度定制标注流程。
ai.motivation: RLHF中人类标注的规范性角色常被忽视，需要明确其理论基础。
ai.method: 通过概念分析和文献调研，区分三种模型并讨论其含义。
ai.result: 提出应分解标注维度，为每个维度选择最合适的模型，而非统一流程。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解RLHF标注的不同哲学立场及其对实践的影响。

idea_spark.idea: 设计一个自适应标注系统，根据任务维度动态切换标注模型。
idea_spark.risk: 模型混淆可能导致标注不一致或偏见放大。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从政治哲学中的代表权理论借鉴权威模型的合法性论证。

zh.tldr: 区分了RLHF标注的三种概念模型：扩展、证据和权威，并建议根据维度定制标注流程。
zh.motivation: RLHF中人类标注的规范性角色常被忽视，需要明确其理论基础。
zh.method: 通过概念分析和文献调研，区分三种模型并讨论其含义。

idea_spark.inspiration: 从政治哲学中的代表权理论借鉴权威模型的合法性论证。

en.tldr: Distinguishes three conceptual models of RLHF annotation: extension, evidence, and authority, and recommends tailoring pipelines per dimension.
en.motivation: The normative role of human judgments in RLHF is rarely made explicit, requiring conceptual clarification.
en.method: Conceptual analysis and literature survey to differentiate three models and their implications.
en.result: Proposes decomposing annotation into separable dimensions and matching each to the most appropriate model.
en.help_to_user: Clarifies philosophical underpinnings of RLHF annotation and guides pipeline design choices.

idea_spark.idea: Design an adaptive annotation system that switches models based on task dimension.
idea_spark.risk: Conflating models may cause annotation inconsistency or amplify biases.
idea_spark.inspiration: Borrow legitimacy arguments from political representation theory for the authority model.

papers.title: Dynamic UGV-UAV Cooperative Path Planning in Uncertain Environments
papers.summary: This paper addresses the Dynamic UGV-UAV Cooperative Path Planning (DUCPP) problem involving one unmanned ground vehicle (UGV) assisted by one or more unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) operating on an uncertain road network with potentially impassable edges. DUCPP is particularly relevant for scenarios such as disaster response, emergency supply transport, and rescue operations, where a UGV must reach a specified destination in the presence of partially unknown road conditions. To enable the UGV to travel safely and efficiently to its destination, the UAV(s) dynamically inspect edges in the environment to identify and prune damaged or impassable edges from consideration.   We present multiple strategies, including a bidirectional approach, to optimize UGV-UAV cooperation for finding a safe path in an uncertain road network. Furthermore, we explore the impact of using multiple UAVs on reducing the UGV's travel time, and evaluate the associated computation time. The proposed strategies are implemented and evaluated on 100 urban road networks. The results demonstrate that the bidirectional strategy achieves the best performance in most instances, and using multiple UAVs further reduces UGV travel time at the expense of increased computation time. This paper presents a robust framework for DUCPP to achieve efficient UGV-UAV cooperation for path planning and inspection, offering practical solutions for navigation in challenging and uncertain conditions.

ai.tldr: 提出在不确定道路网络中，无人机辅助无人车进行动态协同路径规划的框架，采用双向策略和多无人机协作，有效减少无人车行驶时间。
ai.motivation: 在灾害响应、紧急物资运输等场景中，无人车需在部分未知路况下安全高效到达目的地，现有方法难以应对动态不确定环境。
ai.method: 设计多种协同策略，包括双向搜索方法，让无人机动态检测并排除损坏或不可通行的道路边缘，并评估多无人机对行驶时间和计算开销的影响。
ai.result: 在100个城市道路网络上的实验表明，双向策略在多数实例中表现最佳，多无人机可进一步缩短无人车行驶时间，但计算时间增加。
ai.help_to_user: 为在不确定环境中规划无人车-无人机协同路径提供了实用框架和策略选择参考。

idea_spark.risk: 多无人机协作可能带来通信延迟和计算负担，实际部署需权衡实时性与资源消耗。

en.tldr: Proposes a framework for dynamic UGV-UAV cooperative path planning on uncertain road networks, using bidirectional strategies and multiple UAVs to reduce UGV travel time.
en.motivation: In disaster response and emergency supply transport, UGVs must navigate partially unknown road conditions safely and efficiently, which existing methods cannot handle well.

idea_spark.inspiration: Inspired by the 'reconnaissance before action' paradigm in disaster rescue, using UAVs as dynamic sensing units to provide real-time road condition updates for ground vehicles.

papers.title: The Surprising Effectiveness of Canonical Knowledge Distillation for Semantic Segmentation
papers.summary: Recent knowledge distillation (KD) methods for semantic segmentation introduce increasingly complex hand-crafted objectives, yet are typically evaluated under fixed iteration schedules. These objectives substantially increase per-iteration cost, meaning equal iteration counts do not correspond to equal training budgets. It is therefore unclear whether reported gains reflect stronger distillation signals or simply greater compute. We show that iteration-based comparisons are misleading: when wall-clock compute is matched, \textit{canonical} logit- and feature-based KD outperform recent segmentation-specific methods. Under extended training, feature-based distillation achieves state-of-the-art ResNet-18 performance on Cityscapes and ADE20K. A PSPNet ResNet-18 student closely approaches its ResNet-101 teacher despite using only one quarter of the parameters, reaching 99\% of the teacher's mIoU on Cityscapes (79.0 vs.\ 79.8) and 92\% on ADE20K. Our results challenge the prevailing assumption that KD for segmentation requires task-specific mechanisms and suggest that scaling, rather than complex hand-crafted objectives, should guide future method design.

ai.tldr: 在语义分割的知识蒸馏中，当计算预算相同时，简单的经典蒸馏方法（logit和feature）优于复杂的定制方法，且通过扩展训练可达到接近教师模型的性能。
ai.motivation: 现有语义分割知识蒸馏方法引入复杂手工目标，但比较时未考虑计算成本，导致性能提升可能来自额外计算而非蒸馏信号。
ai.method: 在匹配壁钟时间计算预算的条件下，比较经典logit和feature蒸馏与近期分割专用蒸馏方法，并延长训练周期。
ai.result: 经典feature蒸馏在Cityscapes和ADE20K上达到SOTA，PSPNet ResNet-18学生模型仅用1/4参数达到教师99% mIoU（Cityscapes 79.0 vs 79.8）。
ai.help_to_user: 提示在知识蒸馏中应优先考虑计算公平比较和扩展训练，而非设计复杂目标。

idea_spark.idea: 探索自动搜索最优蒸馏目标或自适应缩放策略，替代手工设计。
idea_spark.risk: 扩展训练可能掩盖方法差异，需谨慎控制计算预算。
idea_spark.inspiration: 简单方法+充足计算可能比复杂设计更有效，启发重新评估其他领域的蒸馏方法。

en.tldr: In semantic segmentation knowledge distillation, when compute budgets are matched, simple canonical logit- and feature-based methods outperform complex task-specific ones, and extended training achieves near-teacher performance.
en.motivation: Existing KD methods for segmentation introduce complex hand-crafted objectives but are compared under unequal compute budgets, making gains potentially due to extra compute rather than better distillation.
en.method: Compare canonical logit/feature distillation with recent segmentation-specific methods under matched wall-clock compute, and extend training schedules.
en.result: Feature-based distillation achieves SOTA on Cityscapes and ADE20K; PSPNet ResNet-18 student reaches 99% teacher mIoU on Cityscapes (79.0 vs 79.8) with 1/4 parameters.
en.help_to_user: Suggests prioritizing compute-fair comparison and scaling over complex objectives in knowledge distillation.

idea_spark.idea: Explore automatic search for optimal distillation objectives or adaptive scaling strategies instead of hand-crafted designs.
idea_spark.risk: Extended training may obscure method differences; careful control of compute budgets is needed.
idea_spark.inspiration: Simple methods with sufficient compute can outperform complex designs, inspiring re-evaluation of distillation approaches in other domains.

papers.title: Action-Aware Generative Sequence Modeling for Short Video Recommendation
papers.summary: With the rapid development of the Internet, users have increasingly higher expectations for the recommendation accuracy of online content consumption platforms. However, short videos often contain diverse segments, and users may not hold the same attitude toward all of them. Traditional binary-classification recommendation models, which treat a video as a single holistic entity, face limitations in accurately capturing such nuanced preferences. Considering that user consumption is a temporal process, this paper demonstrates that the timing of user actions can represent diverse intentions through statistical analysis and examination of action patterns. Based on this insight, we propose a novel modeling paradigm: Action-Aware Generative Sequence Network (A2Gen), which refines user actions along the temporal dimension and chains them into sequences for unified processing and prediction. First, we introduce the Context-aware Attention Module (CAM) to model action sequences enriched with item-specific contextual features. Building upon this, we develop the Hierarchical Sequence Encoder (HSE) to learn temporal action patterns from users' historical actions. Finally, through leveraging CAM, we design a module for action sequence generation: the Action-seq Autoregressive Generator (AAG). Extensive offline experiments on the Kuaishou's dataset and the Tmall public dataset demonstrate the superiority of our proposed model. Furthermore, through large-scale online A/B testing deployed on Kuaishou's platform, our model achieves significant improvements over baseline methods in multi-task prediction by leveraging sequential information. Specifically, it yields increases of 0.34% in user watch time, 8.1% in interaction rate, and 0.162% in overall user retention (LifeTime-7), leading to successful deployment across all traffic, serving over 400 million users every day.

ai.tldr: 提出动作感知生成序列网络（A2Gen），通过建模用户动作时序来提升短视频推荐精度。
ai.motivation: 传统推荐模型将视频视为整体，无法捕捉用户对视频不同片段的细粒度偏好。
ai.method: 设计上下文感知注意力模块（CAM）和层次序列编码器（HSE），并利用自回归生成器（AAG）预测动作序列。
ai.result: 在快手和天猫数据集上离线实验优于基线，在线A/B测试中观看时长提升0.34%，互动率提升8.1%，留存提升0.162%。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助推荐系统更精准地理解用户对短视频的实时兴趣，提升用户体验和平台指标。

idea_spark.idea: 将用户动作（如快进、暂停）作为细粒度信号，结合生成式序列预测，实现更动态的推荐。
idea_spark.risk: 动作序列的稀疏性和噪声可能影响模型稳定性，需大量标注或隐式信号。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从用户动作时序中挖掘意图，启发将行为过程而非结果作为推荐核心特征。

en.tldr: Proposes Action-Aware Generative Sequence Network (A2Gen) to improve short video recommendation by modeling user action timing.
en.motivation: Traditional models treat videos as whole entities, failing to capture fine-grained user preferences for different segments.
en.method: Designs Context-aware Attention Module (CAM) and Hierarchical Sequence Encoder (HSE), with an autoregressive generator (AAG) for action sequence prediction.
en.result: Offline experiments on Kuaishou and Tmall datasets show superiority; online A/B test yields +0.34% watch time, +8.1% interaction rate, +0.162% retention (LifeTime-7).
en.help_to_user: Helps recommendation systems better understand users' real-time interests in short videos, improving user experience and platform metrics.

idea_spark.idea: Use user actions (e.g., fast-forward, pause) as fine-grained signals combined with generative sequence prediction for more dynamic recommendations.
idea_spark.risk: Sparsity and noise in action sequences may affect model stability, requiring extensive labeling or implicit signals.
idea_spark.inspiration: Mining user intentions from action timing inspires using behavioral processes rather than outcomes as core recommendation features.

papers.title: The Blahut--Arimoto Algorithm as a Dynamical System with Exact $χ^2$ Dissipation
papers.summary: This paper uncovers an exact $χ^2$ dissipation identity for the Blahut--Arimoto (BA) flow and establishes its fundamental information-geometric structure. While prior works have analyzed BA convergence via the monotone decrease of the Kullback--Leibler divergence, we establish that the continuous-time flow $\partial_τq = \tilde{q}_β[q] - q$ is fundamentally governed by the Pearson $χ^2$ divergence. Specifically, we prove the governing identity $\frac{d}{dτ} Φ_β= -χ^2(\tilde{q}_β\| q)$, elevating $χ^2$ from a mere local approximation to the global non-asymptotic driver of the dynamics.   We establish a \emph{unified dissipation identity} revealing that the $χ^2$ and the symmetrised Jeffreys divergence $D_J$ differ only by a cubic residual $\mathcal{N}$, which vanishes \emph{exactly} for the BA flow. This algebraic cancellation identifies the Jacobian $K_q = D\tilde{q}_β[q]$ and its complement $\mathcal{A}_q = I - K_q$ as the Fisher--Rao Hessian of the free energy $Φ_β$. The spectral gap of $\mathcal{A}_{q^*}$ is proved to determine both the local exponential convergence rate (a universal value of $2$ in artificial time) and the stability of the attraction basin.   For Gaussian sources, the theory yields three concrete consequences: (i)~the reproduction variance obeys an exact closed ODE; (ii)~the Gaussian distribution emerges as the unique dynamical attractor; and (iii)~in high dimensions, convergence is bottlenecked by the maximum source variance -- \emph{spectral stiffness}. Significantly, this framework provides new dissipative interpretations for fundamental problems including MIMO channel capacity, Wyner--Ziv coding, and the information bottleneck. These results establish the BA flow as a canonical dissipative relaxation and provide a geometric foundation for the dynamical theory of information-theoretic optimisation.

ai.tldr: 本文揭示了Blahut-Arimoto流的一个精确χ²耗散恒等式，并建立了其信息几何结构，证明χ²散度是驱动该动力学的全局非渐近量。
ai.motivation: 现有工作仅通过KL散度的单调递减分析BA收敛性，本文旨在揭示其更深层的耗散结构。
ai.method: 通过连续时间流∂_τq = \tilde{q}_β[q] - q，证明Pearson χ²散度的精确耗散恒等式，并建立统一耗散恒等式。
ai.result: χ²散度与对称Jeffreys散度仅差一个三次残差，该残差在BA流中精确消失；谱隙决定局部指数收敛速率和吸引盆稳定性；对高斯源导出精确闭式ODE和谱刚度现象。
ai.help_to_user: 帮助理解BA算法的收敛机制和几何本质，为信息论优化问题提供新的耗散解释。

idea_spark.idea: 利用χ²耗散恒等式设计新的加速收敛算法或自适应步长策略。
idea_spark.risk: 理论推导依赖于特定流结构，推广至离散或非高斯情形可能需额外假设。
idea_spark.inspiration: 从信息几何角度重新审视经典算法，发现被忽略的精确恒等式，启发对更多优化动力学的几何分析。
